papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models can generate visually stunning images, yet, controlling what appears and how it appears, remains surprisingly difficult, especially when operating solely within the constraints of the text-conditioning space. For example, changing a subject or adjusting an attribute often leads to unintended side effects, such as altered backgrounds or distorted details. This is because most existing text-based control methods treat the embedding space as Euclidean and apply simple linear transformations, which do not reflect how semantic concepts are actually organized. In this work, we take a step back and ask: what is the true geometry of these embeddings? We find that text encoder representations lie on a hypersphere, where concepts are not linear directions but structured, anisotropic distributions better captured by Kent distributions. Building on this insight, we propose HEART, a training-free framework that performs Kent-aware geodesic transformations directly on the hypersphere. By respecting the underlying geometry, HEART enables intuitive and precise edits, such as consistent subject replacement and fine-grained attribute control, while preserving the original scene. Importantly, HEART requires no finetuning, inversion, or optimization, and generalizes across diffusion model architectures. Our results show that a simple shift in perspective, from linear to spherical, can unlock fast, and controllable image generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出HEART框架，利用Kent分布在超球面上进行几何感知的文本嵌入变换，实现无需训练的精确图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型在控制生成内容时，由于将嵌入空间视为欧几里得空间并应用线性变换，导致编辑时出现意外副作用（如背景改变或细节失真），缺乏对语义概念真实几何结构的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调、反演或优化的前提下，实现精确且一致的文本引导图像编辑，同时避免副作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本编码器的表示位于超球面上，概念不是线性方向，而是各向异性的分布，更适合用Kent分布描述。
analysis.method: HEART：一种无需训练的方法，直接在超球面上执行Kent感知的测地线变换，通过Kent分布对齐实现主体替换和属性控制。
contributions: 揭示了文本编码器嵌入的真实几何结构是超球面上的Kent分布，而非欧几里得空间中的线性方向。
提出HEART框架，利用Kent分布进行几何感知的嵌入变换，实现无需训练的精确图像编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定文本编码器的几何假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论复杂场景或多对象编辑时的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HEART框架，利用Kent分布在超球面上进行几何感知的文本嵌入变换，实现无需训练的精确图像编辑。

papers.title: It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets
papers.abstract: Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可泛化到任意规模，大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经后验估计在科学和应用领域广泛应用，但许多场景中条件变量是观测集合，元素间存在共享未知因素，需要联合处理。传统方法要求训练时使用部署时的集合大小，导致内存和计算成本随集合规模急剧增长，难以扩展到大规模集合。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练计算成本的前提下，使神经后验估计器能够处理任意大小的观测集合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种解耦策略：先用大小为2的集合训练一个均值池化Deep Set编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小；然后在预聚合的嵌入上微调推理头，使训练成本与部署集合大小N基本无关。
contributions: 提出一种简单且理论支持的策略，将表示学习与后验建模解耦，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可泛化到任意规模。
在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成等多个基准上，以极低计算成本匹配或超越标准基线。
analysis.experiments: 在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上，集合大小N达数千，方法匹配或超越标准基线，计算成本大幅降低。
limitations: 可能对集合内元素间复杂依赖关系的建模能力有限。
均值池化可能不适用于需要更精细聚合的任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，仅用大小为2的集合训练即可泛化到任意规模，大幅降低计算成本。

papers.title: DVD: Discrete Voxel Diffusion for 3D Generation and Editing
papers.abstract: We introduce Discrete Voxel Diffusion (DVD), a discrete diffusion framework to generate, assess, and edit sparse voxels for SLat (Structured LATent) based 3D generative pipelines. Although discrete diffusion has not generally displaced continuous diffusion in image-like generation, we show that it can be an effective first-stage prior for sparse voxel scaffolds. By treating voxel occupancy as a native discrete variable, DVD avoids continuous-to-discrete thresholding and provides a simple framework for voxel generation, uncertainty estimation, and editing. Beyond quality gains, DVD provides more interpretable generation dynamics through explicit categorical modeling. Furthermore, we leverage the predictive entropy as a robust uncertainty metric to identify ambiguous voxel regions and complicated samples, facilitating tasks such as data filtering and quality assessment. Finally, we propose a lightweight fine-tuning strategy using block-structured perturbation patterns. This approach empowers the model to inpaint and edit voxels within a single sampling round, requiring negligible auxiliary computation and no additional model evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出离散体素扩散模型DVD，用于3D生成与编辑，通过显式分类建模和不确定性估计提升质量与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D生成方法多采用连续扩散模型，但体素占用是天然离散变量，连续模型需要阈值化处理，导致信息损失和编辑困难。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个离散扩散框架，有效生成、评估和编辑稀疏体素，同时提供不确定性估计和高效编辑能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出离散体素扩散（DVD）框架，将体素占用作为离散变量进行扩散建模；利用预测熵作为不确定性度量；采用块结构扰动模式实现轻量级微调，支持单轮采样内的修复与编辑。
contributions: 首次将离散扩散有效应用于稀疏体素生成，避免连续到离散的阈值化步骤。
提出基于预测熵的不确定性度量，用于数据过滤和质量评估。
设计块结构扰动微调策略，实现高效的单轮采样编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于稀疏体素表示，对密集体素或其它3D表示效果未知。
编辑能力可能受限于块结构扰动的设计，复杂编辑场景下效果需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出离散体素扩散模型DVD，用于3D生成与编辑，通过显式分类建模和不确定性估计提升质量与可解释性。

papers.title: TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model
papers.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at https://github.com/NeuroADaS-Lab/TimeLesSeg.

analysis.tldr: TimeLesSeg 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架，通过随机生成模型模拟病灶演变，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多发性硬化（MS）病灶分割面临临床和影像异质性挑战，现有深度学习方法对分布变化（如扫描仪）和输入结构（横断面 vs 纵向）敏感，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的对比无关框架，既能处理横断面（单时间点）输入，也能处理纵向（多时间点）输入，且对扫描仪等分布变化鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TimeLesSeg，使用单一 CNN 模型，通过空掩码实现横断面处理；通过随机形态学操作变形病灶掩码生成模拟纵向演变；利用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比无关性。
contributions: 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架 TimeLesSeg。
设计基于随机形态学操作的生成式管道，模拟病灶演变以克服纵向数据稀缺和不一致性。
采用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比无关性，在多个数据集上取得优于现有方法的结果。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开和两个内部数据集上评估，TimeLesSeg 在单模态输入上超越对比无关 SOTA，在纵向处理上优于 SAMSEG 和 LST-AI。
limitations: 可能依赖病灶掩码的初始分割质量。
随机形态学操作可能无法完全模拟真实病灶演变模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TimeLesSeg 提出统一对比无关的横断面与纵向 MS 病灶分割框架，通过随机生成模型模拟病灶演变，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Exploring the non-convexity in machine learning using quantum-inspired optimization
papers.abstract: The escalating complexity of modern machine learning necessitates solving challenging non-convex optimization problems, particularly in high-dimensional regimes and scenarios contaminated by gross outliers. Traditional approaches, relying on convex relaxations or specialized local search heuristics, frequently succumb to suboptimal local minima and fail to recover the true underlying discrete structures. In this paper, we propose treating these non-convex challenges as a global search problem and introduce a unified framework based on Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization (QIEO). By leveraging a probabilistic representation inspired by quantum superposition, QIEO maintains a global view of the search space, enabling it to tunnel through local optima that trap conventional gradient-based and greedy solvers. We comprehensively evaluate QIEO across diverse non-convex applications, including sparse signal recovery (gene expression analysis and compressed sensing) and robust linear regression. Extensive benchmarking against state-of-the-art continuous solvers (ADAM, Differential Evolution), classical metaheuristics (Genetic Algorithms), and specialized non-convex algorithms (Iterative Hard Thresholding) demonstrates that QIEO consistently achieves superior structural fidelity, lower mean squared error, and enhanced robustness without support inflation. Our findings suggest that embracing a quantum-inspired global search provides a resilient, unified paradigm for overcoming the inherent intractability of discrete nonconvex machine learning landscapes.

analysis.tldr: 提出量子启发进化优化框架，统一解决非凸机器学习问题，在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒回归中优于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代机器学习面临高维和异常值污染下的非凸优化挑战，传统凸松弛或局部搜索方法易陷入次优局部极小，无法恢复真实离散结构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种全局搜索方法，克服非凸优化中的局部最优陷阱，实现高保真度的结构恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出量子启发进化优化（QIEO）框架，利用量子叠加启发的概率表示维护搜索空间的全局视图，从而穿越局部最优。
contributions: 提出统一的量子启发进化优化框架，适用于多种非凸机器学习问题。
在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒线性回归任务上，QIEO在结构保真度、均方误差和鲁棒性方面优于ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法和迭代硬阈值等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏信号恢复（基因表达分析和压缩感知）和鲁棒线性回归上进行了全面评估，与多种连续优化器、元启发式和专用非凸算法对比。
limitations: 量子启发方法的计算开销可能高于传统梯度方法。
框架在极大规模问题上的可扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量子启发进化优化框架，统一解决非凸机器学习问题，在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒回归中优于传统方法。

papers.title: Rebalancing gradient to improve self-supervised co-training of depth, odometry and optical flow predictions
papers.abstract: We present CoopNet, an approach that improves the cooperation of co-trained networks by dynamically adapting the apportionment of gradient, to ensure equitable learning progress. It is applied to motion-aware self-supervised prediction of depth maps, by introducing a new hybrid loss, based on a distribution model of photo-metric reconstruction errors made by, on the one hand the depth + odometry paired networks, and on the other hand the optical flow network. This model essentially assumes that the pixels from moving objects (that must be discarded for training depth and odometry), correspond to those where the two reconstructions strongly disagree. We justify this model by theoretical considerations and experimental evidences. A comparative evaluation on KITTI and CityScapes datasets shows that CoopNet improves or is comparable to the state-of-the-art in depth, odometry and optical flow predictions.

analysis.tldr: 通过动态重平衡梯度分配，CoopNet 提升了自监督联合训练中深度、里程计与光流预测的协作效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督运动感知预测中，深度+里程计网络与光流网络联合训练时，不同任务的学习进度不均衡，且运动物体像素对深度/里程计训练有害，需要有效区分并分配梯度。
analysis.problem: 如何动态调整梯度分配，使联合训练中不同网络（深度+里程计 vs 光流）能公平学习，并自动识别运动物体像素以提升深度/里程计预测质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 运动物体像素在深度+里程计重建与光流重建中会产生不一致的误差，这种不一致可用于识别运动物体。
analysis.method: 提出 CoopNet，通过混合损失函数（基于光度重建误差的分布模型）动态调整梯度分配，使深度+里程计网络与光流网络在训练中保持均衡学习进度。
contributions: 提出一种动态梯度重平衡方法，改善自监督联合训练中不同网络的学习协作。
引入基于误差分布模型的混合损失，利用深度+里程计与光流重建的不一致性自动识别运动物体像素。
在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 数据集上达到或超越深度、里程计和光流预测的当前最优水平。
analysis.experiments: 在 KITTI 和 CityScapes 数据集上进行了比较评估，结果显示 CoopNet 在深度、里程计和光流预测上优于或可比于现有最优方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定误差分布假设，在复杂场景下鲁棒性待验证。
未提及对动态物体密集或光照剧烈变化场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过动态重平衡梯度分配，CoopNet 提升了自监督联合训练中深度、里程计与光流预测的协作效果。

papers.title: TAVIS: A Benchmark for Egocentric Active Vision and Anticipatory Gaze in Imitation Learning
papers.abstract: Active vision -- where a policy controls its own gaze during manipulation -- has emerged as a key capability for imitation learning, with multiple independent systems demonstrating its benefits in the past year. Yet there is no shared benchmark to compare approaches or quantify what active vision contributes, on which task types, and under what conditions. We introduce TAVIS, evaluation infrastructure for active-vision imitation learning, with two complementary task suites -- TAVIS-Head (5 tasks, global search via pan/tilt necks) and TAVIS-Hands (3 tasks, local occlusion via wrist cameras) -- on two humanoid torso embodiments (GR1T2, Reachy2), built on IsaacLab. TAVIS provides three evaluation primitives: a paired headcam-vs-fixedcam protocol on identical demonstrations; GALT (Gaze-Action Lead Time), a novel metric grounded in cognitive science and HRI that quantifies anticipatory gaze in learned policies; and procedural ID/OOD splits. Baseline experiments with Diffusion Policy and $π_0$ reveal that (i) active-vision generally helps, but benefits are task-conditional rather than uniform; (ii) multi-task policies degrade sharply under controlled distribution shifts on both suites; and (iii) imitation alone yields anticipatory gaze, with median lead times comparable to the human teleoperator reference. Code, evaluation scripts, demonstrations (LeRobot v3.0; ~2200 episodes) and trained baselines are released at https://github.com/spiglerg/tavis and https://huggingface.co/tavis-benchmark.

analysis.tldr: TAVIS 是首个用于模仿学习中主动视觉和预期注视的基准，包含两个任务套件和新的评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 主动视觉在模仿学习中显示出潜力，但缺乏统一的基准来比较不同方法、量化其贡献及适用条件。
analysis.problem: 缺乏共享基准来评估主动视觉在模仿学习中的效果，包括任务类型、条件及预期注视能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：主动视觉通常有帮助但收益因任务而异；多任务策略在分布偏移下性能急剧下降；仅通过模仿学习即可产生预期注视行为。
analysis.method: 构建基于 IsaacLab 的 TAVIS 基准，包含 TAVIS-Head（5个任务，全局搜索）和 TAVIS-Hands（3个任务，局部遮挡）两个套件，提供配对头戴相机与固定相机协议、GALT 指标以及 ID/OOD 划分。
contributions: 提出首个主动视觉模仿学习基准 TAVIS，包含两个任务套件和两种人形机器人平台。
引入 GALT 指标量化学习策略中的预期注视行为。
通过基线实验揭示主动视觉的收益条件性和多任务策略的脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 使用 Diffusion Policy 和 π₀ 进行基线实验，在 TAVIS-Head 和 TAVIS-Hands 上评估，结果包括主动视觉的收益条件性、分布偏移下的性能下降以及预期注视的涌现。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（8个），可能无法覆盖所有主动视觉场景。
仅基于两种人形机器人平台，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TAVIS 是首个用于模仿学习中主动视觉和预期注视的基准，包含两个任务套件和新的评估指标。

papers.title: Delta-Adapter: Scalable Exemplar-Based Image Editing with Single-Pair Supervision
papers.abstract: Exemplar-based image editing applies a transformation defined by a source-target image pair to a new query image. Existing methods rely on a pair-of-pairs supervision paradigm, requiring two image pairs sharing the same edit semantics to learn the target transformation. This constraint makes training data difficult to curate at scale and limits generalization across diverse edit types. We propose Delta-Adapter, a method that learns transferable editing semantics under single-pair supervision, requiring no textual guidance. Rather than directly exposing the exemplar pair to the model, we leverage a pre-trained vision encoder to extract a semantic delta that encodes the visual transformation between the two images. This semantic delta is injected into a pre-trained image editing model via a Perceiver-based adapter. Since the target image is never directly visible to the model, it can serve as the prediction target, enabling single-pair supervision without requiring additional exemplar pairs. This formulation allows us to leverage existing large-scale editing datasets for training. To further promote faithful transformation transfer, we introduce a semantic delta consistency loss that aligns the semantic change of the generated output with the ground-truth semantic delta extracted from the exemplar pair. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-Adapter consistently improves both editing accuracy and content consistency over four strong baselines on seen editing tasks, while also generalizing more effectively to unseen editing tasks. Code will be available at https://delta-adapter.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 提出Delta-Adapter，仅需单对图像监督即可学习可迁移的图像编辑语义，无需文本指导。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于范例的图像编辑方法依赖成对监督，需要两个共享相同编辑语义的图像对来学习目标变换，导致训练数据难以大规模收集，且限制了编辑类型的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在单对图像监督下学习可迁移的编辑语义，实现无需文本指导的范例图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预训练视觉编码器提取源-目标图像对之间的语义增量（semantic delta），通过基于Perceiver的适配器注入预训练图像编辑模型；目标图像对模型不可见，从而支持单对监督；引入语义增量一致性损失促进忠实变换迁移。
contributions: 提出Delta-Adapter，在单对监督下学习可迁移编辑语义，无需文本指导。
引入语义增量一致性损失，提升编辑准确性和内容一致性。
在多个强基线上显著提升编辑性能，并有效泛化到未见编辑任务。
analysis.experiments: 在四个强基线上进行实验，结果表明Delta-Adapter在已知编辑任务上持续提升编辑准确性和内容一致性，并更有效地泛化到未知编辑任务。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉编码器的质量。
单对监督可能对复杂编辑类型效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Delta-Adapter，仅需单对图像监督即可学习可迁移的图像编辑语义，无需文本指导。

papers.title: TraceFix: Repairing Agent Coordination Protocols with TLA+ Counterexamples
papers.abstract: We present TraceFix, a verification-first pipeline for Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent coordination. An agent synthesizes a protocol topology as a structured intermediate representation (IR) from a task description, generates PlusCal coordination logic, and iteratively repairs the protocol using counterexamples from the TLA+ model checker (TLC) until verification succeeds. Verified process bodies are compiled into per-agent system prompts and executed under a runtime monitor that rejects out-of-topology coordination operations. On 48 tasks spanning 16 scenario families, all tasks reach full TLC verification; 62.5% pass on the first attempt and none requires more than four repair iterations. State spaces span six orders of magnitude yet verification completes in under 60 s for every task. A 3,456-run runtime comparison shows that topology-monitored execution achieves the highest task completion (89.4% average, 81.5% full) and that runtimes using the verified protocol degrade at roughly half the rate of prompt-only and chat-only baselines when model capability is reduced. A paired ablation under a fixed runtime shows that TLC-verified protocols cut deadlock/livelock (DL/LL) from 31.1% to 14.1%, with the largest separation under fault injection.

analysis.tldr: 提出TraceFix，用TLA+模型检查器验证并修复LLM多智能体协调协议，显著减少死锁/活锁并提升任务完成率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM多智能体协调中，协议容易产生死锁、活锁等错误，现有方法缺乏形式化验证，导致可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成并验证LLM多智能体协调协议，确保其正确性并减少运行时错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TraceFix：从任务描述合成协议拓扑作为结构化中间表示，生成PlusCal协调逻辑，利用TLA+模型检查器（TLC）的反例迭代修复协议直至验证通过，将验证后的进程体编译为智能体系统提示，并在运行时监控拒绝越拓扑操作。
contributions: 提出验证优先的LLM多智能体协调协议修复流程，结合TLA+形式化验证。
实验表明该方法在48个任务上全部通过TLC验证，62.5%一次通过，最多4次修复。
运行时比较显示拓扑监控执行达到最高任务完成率（89.4%平均），且验证协议将死锁/活锁从31.1%降至14.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在48个任务（16个场景族）上测试，所有任务达到完全TLC验证；3,456次运行时比较显示拓扑监控执行平均任务完成率89.4%，完全完成率81.5%；固定运行时消融实验显示TLC验证协议将死锁/活锁从31.1%降至14.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖TLA+模型检查器的可扩展性，状态空间极大时可能超时。
协议拓扑合成可能受限于任务描述的清晰度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TraceFix，用TLA+模型检查器验证并修复LLM多智能体协调协议，显著减少死锁/活锁并提升任务完成率。

papers.title: One Token Per Frame: Reconsidering Visual Bandwidth in World Models for VLA Policy
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on auxiliary world modules to plan over long horizons, yet how such modules should be parameterized on top of a pretrained VLA remains an open design question. Existing world-model-augmented VLAs typically pass the per-frame visual stream into the world module at high visual bandwidth and treat its rollout as a side product of action prediction; under a constrained adaptation budget on a frozen backbone, this leaves both the per-frame representation and the latent action coupling under-examined. We introduce OneWM-VLA, which compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame through an Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces the resulting latent stream and the action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective rather than connecting them through a separate decoder. Empirically, we find that per-frame visual bandwidth can be reduced to a single token without compromising long-horizon performance under our setup. Trained with 14.71M LoRA parameters on a $π_0$ (2B) backbone, OneWM-VLA improves the average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld~MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long (vs.85.2% for $π_0$), and reaches 60.0% on the long-horizon deformable task Fold Cloth on a real Piper arm (vs.20.0% for $π_0$).

analysis.tldr: 将每帧视觉压缩为单token，用流匹配统一预测潜变量和动作，显著提升VLA策略的长程任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型增强的VLA通常以高视觉带宽传递每帧视觉流，并将世界模型展开视为动作预测的副产品，在冻结骨干的有限适配预算下，每帧表示和潜动作耦合都未得到充分研究。
analysis.problem: 如何在预训练VLA骨干上高效参数化世界模块，以在低视觉带宽下实现长程规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现每帧视觉带宽可压缩至单token而不损害长程性能。
analysis.method: 提出OneWM-VLA，通过自适应注意力池化将每帧压缩为单语义token，并使用单一流匹配目标联合预测潜变量流和动作轨迹。
contributions: 提出OneWM-VLA，将每帧视觉压缩为单token，显著降低视觉带宽。
采用单一流匹配目标统一潜变量和动作预测，无需独立解码器。
在多个基准上取得显著性能提升，包括MetaWorld MT50、LIBERO-Long和真实机器人折叠布料任务。
analysis.experiments: 在MetaWorld MT50上平均成功率从47.9%提升至61.3%，在LIBERO-Long上达到95.6%（基线85.2%），在真实Piper臂的折叠布料任务上达到60.0%（基线20.0%）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLA骨干（如π₀）。
单token压缩在复杂视觉场景中可能丢失细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将每帧视觉压缩为单token，用流匹配统一预测潜变量和动作，显著提升VLA策略的长程任务成功率。

papers.title: INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy
papers.abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在个性化差分隐私下缓解高隐私数据效用不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化差分隐私中，高隐私需求数据（如敏感疾病阳性病例）在训练中可能被严重低估，导致模型对这类数据性能差，现有方法无法满足 IDP 或难以适配。
analysis.problem: 解决 IDP 场景下因隐私需求不同导致的效用不平衡问题，即高隐私数据在模型中的代表性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，隐私需求更强的数据在训练中可能被严重低估，导致部署时对类似数据性能较差。
analysis.method: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在每次迭代中策略性地降低批次内数据的权重，以提升高隐私数据的性能，并专门设计以满足 IDP。
contributions: 分析了 IDP 下的效用不平衡问题
提出 INO-SGD 算法，满足 IDP 且能缓解效用不平衡
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的隐私预算分配
未讨论与其他隐私技术的兼容性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 INO-SGD 算法，在个性化差分隐私下缓解高隐私数据效用不平衡问题。

papers.title: AgentEscapeBench: Evaluating Out-of-Domain Tool-Grounded Reasoning in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: As LLM-based agents increasingly rely on external tools, it is important to evaluate their ability to sustain tool-grounded reasoning beyond familiar workflows and short-range interactions. We introduce AgentEscapeBench, an escape-room-style benchmark that tests whether agents can infer, execute, and revise novel tool-use procedures under explicit long-range dependency constraints. Each task defines a directed acyclic dependency graph over tools and items, requiring agents to invoke real external functions, track hidden state revealed incrementally, propagate intermediate results, and submit a deterministically verifiable final answer. AgentEscapeBench includes 270 instances across five difficulty tiers and supports fully automated evaluation. Experiments with sixteen LLM agents and human participants show that performance drops sharply as dependency depth increases: humans decline from 98.3% success at difficulty-5 to 80.0% at difficulty-25, while the best model drops from 90.0% to 60.0%. Trajectory analysis attributes model failures mainly to breakdowns in long-range state tracking, clue adherence, and intermediate-result propagation. These findings suggest that current agents can often handle local tool use but still struggle with deep contextual dependencies. We hope AgentEscapeBench can serve as a diagnostic testbed for measuring current agent capabilities and informing future training efforts toward more robust general-purpose reasoning, action, and adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentEscapeBench，一个逃逸室风格的基准测试，评估LLM智能体在长程依赖约束下的工具推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体依赖外部工具，但缺乏对其在超出熟悉工作流和短程交互场景下维持工具推理能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM智能体在显式长程依赖约束下推断、执行和修正新工具使用流程的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着依赖深度增加，智能体性能急剧下降：人类从98.3%（难度5）降至80.0%（难度25），最佳模型从90.0%降至60.0%；失败主要源于长程状态跟踪、线索遵循和中间结果传播的崩溃。
analysis.method: 构建包含270个实例、5个难度等级的逃逸室风格基准，每个任务定义有向无环依赖图，要求智能体调用真实外部函数、跟踪逐步揭示的隐藏状态、传播中间结果并提交可验证的最终答案。
contributions: 提出AgentEscapeBench，一个评估LLM智能体长程工具推理能力的基准测试。
通过实验揭示当前智能体在深度上下文依赖下的性能瓶颈，并归因于状态跟踪和结果传播的失败。
analysis.experiments: 使用16个LLM智能体和人类参与者进行实验，报告了不同难度下的成功率，并进行了轨迹分析。
limitations: 基准测试仅覆盖逃逸室风格任务，可能无法完全代表真实世界工具使用场景。
未提供模型在失败后的具体改进策略或训练方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentEscapeBench，一个逃逸室风格的基准测试，评估LLM智能体在长程依赖约束下的工具推理能力。

papers.title: Trajectory as the Teacher: Few-Step Discrete Flow Matching via Energy-Navigated Distillation
papers.abstract: Discrete flow matching generates text by iteratively transforming noise tokens into coherent language, but may require hundreds of forward passes. Distillation uses the multi-step trajectory to train a student to reproduce the process in a few steps. When the student underperforms, the usual explanation is insufficient capacity. We argue the opposite: the trajectory is the bottleneck, not the student. Each training trajectory is built through a chain of blind stochastic jumps with no evaluation of sequence quality; a single bad decision at an early midpoint propagates through subsequent steps, yet the student must imitate the result. Trajectory-Shaped Discrete Flow Matching (TS-DFM) replaces these blind jumps with guided navigation: a lightweight energy compass evaluates candidate continuations at each midpoint, selecting the most coherent. All shaping is training-only; inference cost is unchanged. On 170M-parameter language modeling, the shaped student at 8 steps achieves 32% lower perplexity than the 1,024-step teacher while being 128x faster, with gains consistent across source distributions and three evaluators of increasing scale. TS-DFM achieves the best perplexity of any discrete-generation baseline we compare against, including methods trained on 6x more data or using 5x larger models.

analysis.tldr: 通过能量引导轨迹塑形，使少步离散流匹配学生模型超越多步教师模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散流匹配生成文本需要数百步前向传播，蒸馏时学生模型性能不佳通常被归因于容量不足，但本文认为瓶颈在于教师轨迹中的盲目随机跳跃。
analysis.problem: 教师轨迹中早期中间步的盲目决策导致错误传播，学生模型被迫模仿低质量轨迹，限制了少步蒸馏的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出教师轨迹由一系列盲目的随机跳跃构成，缺乏对序列质量的评估，早期错误会向后传播，而学生必须模仿这些有缺陷的轨迹。
analysis.method: 提出轨迹塑形离散流匹配（TS-DFM），在训练时使用轻量级能量罗盘评估每个中间步的候选续写，选择最连贯的轨迹，推理时无额外开销。
contributions: 揭示教师轨迹质量是少步蒸馏的瓶颈，而非学生容量。
提出TS-DFM方法，通过能量导航塑形训练轨迹，提升学生模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在170M参数语言模型上，8步学生模型困惑度比1024步教师低32%，速度快128倍，且优于多种基线。
limitations: 能量罗盘的设计和训练细节未在摘要中详述。
方法仅在语言建模任务上验证，其他模态或任务泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过能量引导轨迹塑形，使少步离散流匹配学生模型超越多步教师模型。

papers.title: MedVIGIL: Evaluating Trustworthy Medical VLMs Under Broken Visual Evidence
papers.abstract: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) are usually evaluated on intact image--question pairs, but trustworthy clinical use requires a stronger property: a model must recognise when the evidential basis for an answer has failed. We study this through silent failures under perturbed evidence, where a vision-required medical question is paired with a false premise, wording perturbation, knowledge-only rewrite, or ROI-corrupted image, yet the model returns a fluent non-refusal answer. We introduce medvigil, a 300-case evaluation suite drawn from four public medical VQA sources, supervised end to end by four board-certified radiologists: every gold answer, refusal option, candidate-answer set, paraphrase, false-premise trap, ROI box, and clinical risk tier is clinician-authored. Two attending radiologists annotate every case in parallel, a senior radiologist consolidates the released manifest, and a separate fourth radiologist independent of construction answers every probe to provide the human reference baseline. The release contains 2{,}556 MCQ probes, 240 counterfactual triplets, physician-adjudicated risk-tier and answerability flags, ROI boxes, and a paired open-ended variant. We report seven correctness-conditioned audit metrics that summarise into the medvigil Composite Score (MCS), and audit 16 vision-capable models plus two text-only baselines. The independent radiologist scores MCS 83.3 at silent-failure rate 5.8%, leaving a 14.1-point composite headroom above the strongest audited model (Claude Opus 4.7 at 69.2). The benchmark and evaluation harness are publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MedVIGIL 基准，评估医学 VLM 在视觉证据被破坏时的可信度，发现最强模型与人类仍有显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学 VLM 评估通常基于完整的图像-问题对，但临床可信使用要求模型在视觉证据失效时能够识别并拒绝回答，而现有方法缺乏对此类静默失败的评估。
analysis.problem: 医学 VLM 在视觉证据被破坏（如假前提、措辞扰动、仅知识改写或 ROI 损坏图像）时，仍会生成流畅的非拒绝回答，导致静默失败，需要系统评估模型的可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出模型在视觉证据被破坏时倾向于生成非拒绝回答，而非识别失败。
analysis.method: 构建 MedVIGIL 评估套件，包含 300 个病例，来自四个公开医学 VQA 源，由四位放射科医生监督标注，包括金答案、拒绝选项、候选答案集、释义、假前提陷阱、ROI 框和临床风险等级。提供 2556 个 MCQ 探针、240 个反事实三元组等，并定义七个正确性条件审计指标，汇总为 MedVIGIL 复合分数 (MCS)。
contributions: 提出 MedVIGIL 基准，系统评估医学 VLM 在视觉证据破坏下的可信度。
发布由放射科医生标注的 300 病例评估套件，包含多种扰动和审计指标。
审计 16 个视觉模型和 2 个纯文本基线，揭示最强模型与人类之间的显著差距。
analysis.experiments: 审计了 16 个视觉模型和 2 个纯文本基线，独立放射科医生 MCS 为 83.3，静默失败率 5.8%，最强模型 Claude Opus 4.7 的 MCS 为 69.2，存在 14.1 分的差距。
limitations: 评估套件仅包含 300 个病例，可能不足以覆盖所有临床场景。
仅针对视觉证据破坏，未考虑其他类型的模型失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MedVIGIL 基准，评估医学 VLM 在视觉证据被破坏时的可信度，发现最强模型与人类仍有显著差距。

papers.title: What Matters for Diffusion-Friendly Latent Manifold? Prior-Aligned Autoencoders for Latent Diffusion
papers.abstract: Tokenizers are a crucial component of latent diffusion models, as they define the latent space in which diffusion models operate. However, existing tokenizers are primarily designed to improve reconstruction fidelity or inherit pretrained representations, leaving unclear what kind of latent space is truly friendly for generative modeling. In this paper, we study this question from the perspective of latent manifold organization. By constructing controlled tokenizer variants, we identify three key properties of a diffusion-friendly latent manifold: coherent spatial structure, local manifold continuity, and global manifold semantics. We find that these properties are more consistent with downstream generation quality than reconstruction fidelity. Motivated by this finding, we propose the Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE), which explicitly shapes the latent manifold instead of leaving diffusion-friendly manifold to emerge indirectly from reconstruction or inheritance. Specifically, PAE leverages refined priors derived from VFMs and perturbation-based regularization to turn spatial structure, local continuity, and global semantics into explicit training objectives. On ImageNet 256x256, PAE improves both training efficiency and generation quality over existing tokenizers, reaching performance comparable to RAE with up to 13x faster convergence under the same training setup and achieving a new state-of-the-art gFID of 1.03. These results highlight the importance of organizing the latent manifold for latent diffusion models.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式塑造潜在流形的空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，使潜在扩散模型训练更快、生成质量更高。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分词器主要关注重建保真度或继承预训练表示，但什么样的潜在空间对生成建模真正友好尚不清楚，缺乏对潜在流形组织的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个对扩散模型友好的潜在流形，使其具备连贯的空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，从而提升生成质量和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过构造受控的分词器变体，发现扩散友好潜在流形的三个关键属性：连贯空间结构、局部流形连续性和全局流形语义，这些属性与下游生成质量的一致性高于重建保真度。
analysis.method: Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)：利用来自VFMs的精炼先验和基于扰动的正则化，将空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义作为显式训练目标，直接塑造潜在流形。
contributions: 识别并验证了扩散友好潜在流形的三个关键属性：连贯空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义。
提出PAE，通过显式先验对齐和正则化塑造潜在流形，在ImageNet 256x256上实现gFID 1.03，且训练收敛速度比RAE快13倍。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上评估，PAE在相同训练设置下比现有分词器提升训练效率和生成质量，达到gFID 1.03，收敛速度比RAE快13倍。
limitations: 方法依赖VFMs提供的先验，可能受限于VFMs的质量和泛化能力。
实验仅在ImageNet上进行，未验证在其他数据集或更大规模上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prior-Aligned AutoEncoder (PAE)，通过显式塑造潜在流形的空间结构、局部连续性和全局语义，使潜在扩散模型训练更快、生成质量更高。

papers.title: Flatness and Gradient Alignment Are Both Necessary: Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration for Multi-Distribution Learning
papers.abstract: Sharpness-aware and gradient-alignment methods have been shown to improve generalization, however each family of methods targets a single geometric property of the loss landscape, while ignoring the other. In this paper, we show that this omission is structurally unavoidable and that both flatness and gradient alignment should be considered in multi-distribution learning settings. Specifically, we derive an excess-risk decomposition that yields two additive leading-order terms: (i) an alignment term, controlled by the trace of $\bar{H}^{-1}Σ_g$ and (ii) a curvature term, controlled by $\bar{H}$, where $\bar{H}$ is the average Hessian and $Σ_g$ is the covariance of the gradient across distributions. Notably, $\bar{H}$ appears inverted in one and non-inverted in the other. We further show, via a counterexample, that neither quantity bounds the other in general, so no algorithm targeting only one term can guarantee low excess risk. Motivated by this decomposition, we propose SAGE (Spectral-Aware Gradient-Aligned Exploration) that targets both terms. The curvature component replaces SAM's gradient-scaled perturbation with the polar factor of each layer's gradient matrix, computed via Newton-Schulz iteration, so that the ascent step probes all directions with similar magnitude. On the other hand, the alignment component injects isotropic noise at the descent step, the magnitude of which scales with cross-distribution gradient disagreement. Experiments on five domain-generalization and two multi-task learning benchmarks show that the proposed method establishes a new state-of-the-art on DomainBed and acts as a general-purpose improvement to base MTL solvers, remaining competitive with, or even surpassing, state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAGE方法，同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，在多分布学习中实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有锐度感知方法仅关注平坦性，梯度对齐方法仅关注对齐性，但两者在多分布学习中均不可或缺，且无法互相替代。
analysis.problem: 多分布学习（如域泛化、多任务学习）中，如何同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐以降低超额风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推导出超额风险分解包含两个主导项：对齐项（由Hessian逆与梯度协方差的迹控制）和曲率项（由平均Hessian控制），且两者互不约束，单独优化任一项无法保证低风险。
analysis.method: 提出SAGE方法：曲率组件用每层梯度矩阵的极因子（通过Newton-Schulz迭代计算）替代SAM的梯度缩放扰动，使上升步均匀探索所有方向；对齐组件在下降步注入各向同性噪声，噪声幅度与跨分布梯度分歧成比例。
contributions: 推导出多分布学习超额风险的分解，揭示平坦性和对齐性均需优化且不可互相替代。
提出SAGE算法，同时优化曲率和对齐项，在域泛化和多任务学习基准上达到新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在DomainBed的5个域泛化基准和2个多任务学习基准上实验，SAGE在域泛化上达到新SOTA，在多任务学习上优于或持平现有方法。
limitations: Newton-Schulz迭代可能增加计算开销。
方法对超参数（如噪声幅度）敏感，需进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAGE方法，同时优化损失曲面的平坦性和梯度对齐，在多分布学习中实现SOTA。

papers.title: Sycophantic AI makes human interaction feel more effortful and less satisfying over time
papers.abstract: Millions of people now turn to artificial intelligence (AI) systems for personal advice, guidance, and support. Such systems can be sycophantic, frequently affirming users' views and beliefs. Across five preregistered studies (N = 3,075 participants, 12,766 human-AI conversations), including a three-week study with a census-representative U.S. sample, we provide longitudinal experimental evidence that sycophantic AI shifts how users approach their closest relationships. We show that sycophantic AI immediately delivers the emotional and esteem support users typically associate with close friends and family. Over three weeks of such interactions, users became nearly as likely to seek personal advice from sycophantic AI as from close friends and family, and reported lower satisfaction with their real-world social interactions. When given a choice among AI response styles, a majority preferred sycophantic AI -- not for the quality of its advice, but because it made them feel most understood. Together, these findings offer a relational account of AI sycophancy: by providing frictionless understanding, it may quietly raise the bar against which human relationships are judged.

analysis.tldr: 奉承型AI短期内提供情感支持，但长期使用会降低用户对真实人际关系的满意度。
analysis.research_motivation: 数百万用户向AI寻求个人建议，但AI可能表现出奉承行为，频繁认同用户观点，其长期社会影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究奉承型AI对用户人际关系感知和满意度的长期影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奉承型AI能立即提供类似亲密朋友的情感支持，但经过三周交互后，用户更倾向于向AI寻求建议，并对真实社交互动满意度下降。用户偏好奉承型AI并非因为建议质量，而是因为感觉被理解。
analysis.method: 五项预注册研究（N=3075，12766次对话），包括一项三周纵向研究，使用美国人口普查代表性样本，比较奉承型与非奉承型AI对用户社交行为的影响。
contributions: 提供奉承型AI长期影响人际关系的纵向实验证据
揭示奉承型AI通过无摩擦理解提升用户期望，从而降低真实社交满意度的机制
analysis.experiments: 五项预注册研究，共3075名参与者，12766次人机对话，包括三周纵向研究。
limitations: 研究仅关注短期（三周）效应，更长期影响未知
样本仅限美国，可能不具全球普适性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 奉承型AI短期内提供情感支持，但长期使用会降低用户对真实人际关系的满意度。

papers.title: One World, Dual Timeline: Decoupled Spatio-Temporal Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic scenes from Vehicle-to-Infrastructure Cooperative Autonomous Driving (VICAD) data is fundamentally complicated by temporal asynchrony: vehicle and infrastructure cameras operate on independent clocks, capturing the same dynamic agent such as cars and pedestrians at different physical times. Existing Gaussian Scene Graph methods implicitly assume synchronized observations and assign a single pose per agent per frame, which is an assumption that breaks in cooperative settings, where the resulting gradient conflicts cause severe ghosting on dynamic agents. We identify this as a representation-level failure, not an optimization artifact: we prove that any single-timeline formulation incurs an irreducible photometric loss scaling quadratically with agent velocity and cross-source time offset. To resolve this, we propose Dust (DecoUpled Spatio-Temporal) Gaussian Scene Graph for 4D Cooperative Driving Reconstruction. DUST Gaussian Scene Graph shares a canonical Gaussian set per agent for appearance consistency, while maintaining decouple pose trajectories aligned to each source's true capture timestamps. We prove that this decoupling enables the pose-gradient kernel block-diagonal, eliminating cross-source interference entirely. To make Dust practical, we further introduce a static anchor-based pose correction pipeline that corrects spatio misalignment between vehicle and infrastructure annotations, and a pose-regularized joint optimization scheme that prevents trajectory jitter and drift during early training. On 26 sequences from V2X-Seq, DUST achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving dynamic-area PSNR by 3.2 dB over the strongest baseline and reducing Fréchet Video Distance by 37.7%, with keeping robustness under larger temporal asynchrony. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DUST-6A55.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦时空高斯场景图，解决车路协同自动驾驶中多源相机时间异步导致的动态物体重影问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 车路协同自动驾驶中，车辆与基础设施相机独立时钟导致时间异步，现有高斯场景图方法假设同步观测，在协同场景下梯度冲突造成动态物体严重重影。
analysis.problem: 多源相机时间异步下动态场景重建中，单时间线表示导致不可约的光度损失，需消除跨源干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 证明单时间线公式会产生与代理速度和跨源时间偏移二次方成正比的光度损失，且梯度冲突源于表示层而非优化伪影。
analysis.method: 提出DUST高斯场景图，每个代理共享规范高斯集保证外观一致性，同时维护解耦的位姿轨迹对齐各源真实时间戳；引入静态锚点位姿校正和位姿正则化联合优化。
contributions: 理论证明单时间线表示在异步协同场景下存在不可约光度损失，并提出解耦双时间线框架消除跨源干扰。
提出DUST高斯场景图，实现外观共享与位姿解耦，并设计静态锚点校正和正则化优化方案。
analysis.experiments: 在V2X-Seq的26个序列上，动态区域PSNR提升3.2 dB，Fréchet Video Distance降低37.7%，且在更大时间异步下保持鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的静态锚点标注。
未讨论极端异步或高动态场景下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦时空高斯场景图，解决车路协同自动驾驶中多源相机时间异步导致的动态物体重影问题。

papers.title: Statistical inference with belief functions: A survey
papers.abstract: Belief functions are a powerful and popular framework for the mathematical characterisation of uncertainty, in particular in situations in which lack of data renders learning a probability distribution for the problem impractical. The first step in a reasoning chain based on belief functions is inference: how to learn a belief measure from the available data. In this survey we focus, in particular, on making inference from statistical data, and review the most significant contributions in the area.

analysis.tldr: 综述了基于信任函数的统计推断方法，重点介绍从数据中学习信任测度的主要贡献。
analysis.research_motivation: 信任函数是处理不确定性（尤其是数据稀缺时）的重要框架，但如何从统计数据中进行推断是该领域的基础问题，缺乏系统性综述。
analysis.problem: 如何从统计数据中学习信任测度（即基于信任函数的统计推断）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 综述了基于信任函数的统计推断方法，包括从数据中构建信任测度的主要技术路线。
contributions: 系统梳理了基于信任函数的统计推断领域的主要贡献
为后续研究提供了全面的文献参考
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述可能未涵盖所有最新进展
未对方法进行实证比较
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述了基于信任函数的统计推断方法，重点介绍从数据中学习信任测度的主要贡献。

papers.title: Consistency Regularised Gradient Flows for Inverse Problems
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) (Rombach et al., 2022) provide powerful generative priors for inverse problems. However, existing LDM-based inverse solvers typically require a large number of neural function evaluations (NFEs) and backpropagation through large pretrained components, leading to substantial computational costs and, in some cases, degraded reconstruction quality. We propose a unified Euclidean-Wasserstein-2 gradient-flow framework that jointly performs posterior sampling and prompt optimization in the latent space through a single flow that aligns the prior and posterior with the observed data. Combined with few-step latent text-to-image models, this formulation enables low-NFE inference without backpropagation through autoencoders. Experiments across several canonical imaging inverse problems show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly reduced computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，实现低NFE逆问题求解，无需反向传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LDM的逆求解器需要大量NFE和反向传播，计算成本高且重建质量可能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用LDM先验进行逆问题求解，减少计算开销并保持重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，在潜空间联合执行后验采样和提示优化，通过单一流对齐先验和后验与观测数据。
contributions: 提出统一梯度流框架，无需反向传播通过自编码器。
结合少步文本到图像模型，实现低NFE推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多个经典成像逆问题上达到SOTA性能，计算成本显著降低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定文本到图像模型。
框架在非成像逆问题上的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一欧几里得- Wasserstein-2梯度流框架，实现低NFE逆问题求解，无需反向传播。

papers.title: CoCoReviewBench: A Completeness- and Correctness-Oriented Benchmark for AI Reviewers
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid development of AI reviewers, evaluating such systems remains challenging: metrics favor overlap with human reviews over correctness. However, since human reviews often cover only a subset of salient issues and sometimes contain mistakes, they are unreliable as gold references. To address this, we build category-specific benchmark subsets and skip evaluation when the corresponding human reviews are missing to strengthen Completeness. We also leverage reviewer--author--meta-review discussions as expert annotations and filter unreliable reviews accordingly to strengthen Correctness. Finally, we introduce CoCoReviewBench, which curates 3,900 papers from ICLR and NeurIPS to enable reliable and fine-grained evaluation of AI reviewers. Analysis shows that AI reviewers remain limited in correctness and are prone to hallucinations, and highlights reasoning models as more effective reviewers, motivating further directions for improving AI reviewers. Benchmarks and models are available at https://github.com/hexuandeng/CoCoReviewBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向AI审稿人的完整性与正确性评测基准CoCoReviewBench。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI审稿系统评估依赖与人类审稿的匹配度，但人类审稿常不完整且含错误，导致评估不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能同时评估AI审稿完整性和正确性的可靠基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI审稿人正确性有限且易产生幻觉，推理模型作为审稿人更有效。
analysis.method: 构建类别特定基准子集，在人类审稿缺失时跳过评估以增强完整性；利用审稿-作者-元审稿讨论作为专家标注并过滤不可靠审稿以增强正确性。
contributions: 提出CoCoReviewBench基准，包含3900篇ICLR/NeurIPS论文，支持细粒度AI审稿评估。
揭示AI审稿人正确性不足和幻觉问题，并指出推理模型更有效。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖两个会议，可能不具广泛代表性。
依赖讨论作为专家标注，讨论本身可能不完整。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向AI审稿人的完整性与正确性评测基准CoCoReviewBench。

papers.title: BeeVe: Unsupervised Acoustic State Discovery in Honey Bee Buzzing
papers.abstract: Discovering structure in biological signals without supervision is a fundamental problem in computational intelligence, yet existing bioacoustic methods assume vocal production models or predefined semantic units, leaving non-vocal species poorly served. This work introduces BeeVe, an unsupervised framework for acoustic state discovery in collective honey bee buzzing. BeeVe uses the self-supervised Patchout Spectrogram Transformer (PaSST) as a frozen feature extractor, then trains a Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) without labels on those embeddings, learning a finite discrete codebook of acoustic tokens directly from unlabelled hive audio. No labels, pretext tasks, or contrastive objectives are used at any stage. Post-hoc evaluation against known queen status reveals that the learned tokens separate queenright and queenless conditions with Jensen-Shannon Divergence values between 0.609 and 0.688, and that the queenless condition further decomposes into three internally coherent sub-states stable across experiments with different codebook sizes and random seeds. Token transition analysis confirms non-random sequential structure (p << 0.001) across all experiments. Generalisation to unseen recordings preserves both token overlap (Jaccard = 0.947) and global manifold topology. These results demonstrate that unsupervised discrete codebook learning can recover repeatable acoustic structure from a non-vocal biological signal without annotation, opening a path toward non-invasive acoustic hive health monitoring.

analysis.tldr: BeeVe 无监督地从蜜蜂嗡嗡声中学习离散声学状态，无需标注即可区分蜂王存在与否并发现子状态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生物声学方法依赖发声模型或预定义语义单元，无法处理非发声物种（如蜜蜂）的集体嗡嗡声，且缺乏无监督结构发现手段。
analysis.problem: 如何从无标注的集体蜜蜂嗡嗡声中无监督地发现可重复的声学状态结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出无监督离散码本学习能从非发声生物信号中恢复可重复的声学结构。
analysis.method: 使用自监督 Patchout Spectrogram Transformer (PaSST) 作为冻结特征提取器，然后训练无标签的 Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) 学习离散声学 token 码本。
contributions: 提出 BeeVe，首个无监督框架用于集体蜜蜂嗡嗡声的声学状态发现。
实验表明学习到的 token 能区分蜂王存在/缺失状态，并发现缺失蜂王条件下的三个内部一致子状态。
analysis.experiments: 在蜂巢音频上评估，使用 Jensen-Shannon Divergence (0.609-0.688) 区分蜂王状态，token 转移分析显示非随机序列结构 (p<<0.001)，泛化到未见录音保持 token 重叠 (Jaccard=0.947) 和全局流形拓扑。
limitations: 仅针对蜜蜂嗡嗡声，可能不直接适用于其他非发声物种。
依赖 PaSST 特征提取器，其泛化性可能受限于预训练数据域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BeeVe 无监督地从蜜蜂嗡嗡声中学习离散声学状态，无需标注即可区分蜂王存在与否并发现子状态。

papers.title: Semantic-Aware Adaptive Visual Memory for Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Online streaming video understanding requires models to process continuous visual inputs and respond to user queries in real time, where the unbounded stream and unpredictable query timing turn memory management into a central challenge. Existing methods typically compress visual tokens via visual similarity heuristics, or augment compression with KV-cache-level retrieval. However, compression decisions rarely incorporate semantic signals, and retrieval is often added after compression is finalized, making the two stages hard to coordinate. We present SAVEMem, a training-free dual-stage framework that brings semantic awareness into memory generation and lets the retrieval scope adapt per query. In Stage~1, SAVEMem builds a three-tier streaming memory online under a constant memory budget. A fixed pseudo-question bank provides a lightweight semantic prior, so that long-term retention is shaped by semantic salience rather than visual similarity alone. In Stage~2, SAVEMem performs query-aware retrieval over this memory. An anchor-conditioned recency gate adapts the retrieval scope from short-term to mid- and long-term memory based on whether the query targets the present or the distant past. Within this scope, late interaction between query and memory tokens selects candidate frames for answering. Applied to Qwen2.5-VL without training, SAVEMem improves the OVO-Bench overall score from 52.27 to 62.69 and yields consistent gains on StreamingBench and ODV-Bench, while reducing peak GPU memory by 48\% at 128 frames over the backbone.

analysis.tldr: SAVEMem通过语义感知的双阶段记忆框架，无需训练即可显著提升流式视频理解性能并降低显存占用。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线流式视频理解需要模型处理连续视觉输入并实时响应用户查询，但无界流和不可预测的查询时机使内存管理成为核心挑战。现有方法通常基于视觉相似性进行压缩或KV缓存检索，但压缩决策很少融入语义信号，且检索往往在压缩完成后才添加，导致两个阶段难以协调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，为流式视频理解构建语义感知的自适应视觉记忆，以在恒定内存预算下实现高效压缩和查询感知检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SAVEMem，一个无需训练的双阶段框架：阶段1在线构建三层流式内存，利用固定伪问题库提供轻量级语义先验，使长期保留由语义显著性而非视觉相似性决定；阶段2执行查询感知检索，通过锚点条件的时间门自适应调整检索范围，并在该范围内通过查询与记忆令牌的后期交互选择候选帧。
contributions: 提出语义感知的自适应视觉记忆框架SAVEMem，无需训练即可用于流式视频理解。
设计双阶段机制：语义引导的压缩和查询感知的检索，两者协调工作。
在多个基准上取得显著性能提升，同时降低峰值GPU内存48%。
analysis.experiments: 在OVO-Bench上将整体分数从52.27提升至62.69，在StreamingBench和ODV-Bench上取得一致增益，在128帧下相比骨干网络降低峰值GPU内存48%。
limitations: 伪问题库的固定性可能限制对多样化查询的适应性。
方法在极长视频流或极端内存预算下的表现未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAVEMem通过语义感知的双阶段记忆框架，无需训练即可显著提升流式视频理解性能并降低显存占用。

papers.title: What if AI systems weren't chatbots?
papers.abstract: The rapid convergence of artificial intelligence (AI) toward conversational chatbot interfaces marks a critical moment for the industry. This paper argues that the chatbot paradigm is not a neutral interface choice, but a dominant sociotechnical configuration whose widespread adoption reshapes social, economic, legal, and environmental systems. We examine how treating AI primarily as conversational assistants has extensive structural downsides. We show how chatbot-based systems often fail to adequately meet user needs, particularly in complex or high-stakes contexts, while projecting confidence and authority. We further analyze how the normalization of chatbot-mediated interaction alters patterns of work, learning, and decision-making, contributing to deskilling, homogenization of knowledge, and shifting expectations of expertise. Finally, we examine broader societal effects, including labor displacement, concentration of economic power, and increased environmental costs driven by sustained investment in large-scale chatbot infrastructures. While acknowledging legitimate benefits, we argue that the current trajectory of AI development reflects specific value choices that prioritize conversational generality over domain specificity, accountability, and long-term social sustainability. We conclude by outlining alternative directions for AI development and governance that move beyond one-size-fits-all chatbots, emphasizing pluralistic system design, task-specific tools, and institutional safeguards to mitigate social and economic harm.

analysis.tldr: 批判当前AI过度依赖聊天机器人范式，分析其社会、经济、环境负面影响，并呼吁多元化设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI行业快速趋同于聊天机器人界面，但这种范式并非中性选择，而是具有深远社会影响的技术配置，需要批判性审视。
analysis.problem: 聊天机器人范式在复杂或高风险场景中无法充分满足用户需求，且带来技能退化、知识同质化、权力集中和环境成本等结构性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 聊天机器人系统常表现出过度自信和权威感，但实际效果不佳；其普及改变了工作、学习和决策模式，导致去技能化和知识同质化。
analysis.method: 基于社会技术分析框架，从用户需求、社会影响、经济权力和环境成本四个维度批判聊天机器人范式，并提出替代方向。
contributions: 系统性地揭示了聊天机器人范式的结构性负面影响，包括用户需求不匹配、社会技能退化、经济权力集中和环境成本。
提出了超越聊天机器人的替代AI发展路径，强调多元化设计、任务特定工具和制度保障。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持其批判论点，主要基于理论分析。
替代方案的具体实现细节和可行性未充分展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 批判当前AI过度依赖聊天机器人范式，分析其社会、经济、环境负面影响，并呼吁多元化设计。

papers.title: Enhancing Federated Quadruplet Learning: Stochastic Client Selection and Embedding Stability Analysis
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralised model training across distributed clients without requiring data centralisation. However, the generalisation performance of the global model is usually degraded by data heterogeneity across clients, particularly under limited data availability and class imbalance. To address this challenge, we propose FedQuad, a novel method that explicitly enforces minimising intra-class representations while enabling inter-class splits across clients. By jointly minimising distances between positive pairs and maximising distances between negative pairs, the proposed approach mitigates representation misalignment introduced during model aggregation. We evaluate our method on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet under diverse non-IID settings and varying numbers of clients, demonstrating consistent improvements over existing baselines. Additionally, we provide a comprehensive analysis of metric learning-based approaches in both centralised and federated environments, highlighting their effectiveness in alleviating representation collapse under heterogeneous data distributions.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedQuad，通过联合优化正负样本对距离来缓解联邦学习中的数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中数据异质性（non-IID）会降低全局模型的泛化性能，尤其在数据有限和类别不平衡时问题更突出。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中客户端数据异质性导致全局模型表征对齐不良，影响泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出数据异质性会导致表征对齐问题，但未提供具体失败模式分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedQuad方法，通过联合最小化正样本对距离和最大化负样本对距离，在联邦学习中显式约束类内表征紧凑性和类间分离性。
contributions: 提出FedQuad方法，在联邦学习中引入四元组损失以缓解数据异质性带来的表征对齐问题。
在多个非IID设置和不同客户端数量下进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。
提供了度量学习在集中式和联邦环境下缓解表征坍塌的全面分析。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上，在多种非IID设置和不同客户端数量下进行实验，结果优于现有基线。
limitations: 未讨论通信效率或计算开销。
未在更大规模或真实场景数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FedQuad，通过联合优化正负样本对距离来缓解联邦学习中的数据异质性导致的表征对齐问题。

papers.title: Video Understanding Reward Modeling: A Robust Benchmark and Performant Reward Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal reward models have advanced substantially in text and image domains, yet progress in video understanding reward modeling remains severely limited by the lack of robust evaluation benchmarks and high-quality preference data. To address this, we propose a unified framework spanning benchmark design, data construction, and reward model training. We introduce Video Understanding Reward Bench (VURB), a benchmark featuring 2,100 preference pairs with long chain-of-thought reasoning traces (averaging 1,143 tokens) and majority voting evaluation across general, long, and reasoning-oriented video tasks. We further construct Video Understanding Preference Dataset (VUP-35K) via a fully automated pipeline, providing large-scale high-quality supervision for video reward training. Building on the data, we train VideoDRM and VideoGRM, a discriminative and a generative reward model, both achieving state-of-the-art performance on VURB and VideoRewardBench. Further analysis confirms that VUP-35K enhances both reward performance and model reasoning capability, while VideoDRM and VideoGRM yield significant gains under best-of-$N$ test-time scaling.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频理解奖励模型基准VURB和数据集VUP-35K，训练出SOTA的判别式与生成式奖励模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态奖励模型在文本和图像领域进展显著，但视频理解奖励建模因缺乏鲁棒评测基准和高质偏好数据而严重受限。
analysis.problem: 视频理解奖励模型缺乏统一的基准设计、数据构建和模型训练框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一框架，包括基准VURB（2100偏好对，长思维链推理，多数投票评估）、自动化构建的数据集VUP-35K，以及基于此训练的判别式奖励模型VideoDRM和生成式奖励模型VideoGRM。
contributions: 提出视频理解奖励基准VURB，包含2100偏好对和长思维链推理。
构建大规模高质量视频偏好数据集VUP-35K。
训练出判别式VideoDRM和生成式VideoGRM奖励模型，在VURB和VideoRewardBench上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在VURB和VideoRewardBench上评估，VideoDRM和VideoGRM均达到SOTA；VUP-35K提升奖励性能和推理能力；在best-of-N测试时扩展中取得显著增益。
limitations: 可能仅关注特定视频任务类型。
自动化数据构建可能引入噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频理解奖励模型基准VURB和数据集VUP-35K，训练出SOTA的判别式与生成式奖励模型。

papers.title: Spectral Dynamics in Deep Networks: Feature Learning, Outlier Escape, and Learning Rate Transfer
papers.abstract: We study the evolution of hidden-weight spectra in wide neural networks trained by (stochastic) gradient descent. We develop a two-level dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) that jointly tracks bulk and outlier spectral dynamics for spiked ensembles whose spike directions remain statistically dependent on the random bulk. We apply this framework to two settings: (1) infinite-width nonlinear networks in mean-field/$μ$P scaling and (2) deep linear networks in the proportional high-dimensional limit, where width, input dimension, and sample size diverge with fixed ratios. Our theory predicts how outliers evolve with training time, width, output scale, and initialization variance. In deep linear networks, $μ$P yields width-consistent outlier dynamics and hyperparameter transfer, including width-stable growth of the leading NTK mode toward the edge of stability (EoS). In contrast, NTK parameterization exhibits strongly width-dependent outlier dynamics, despite converging to a stable large-width limit. We show that this bulk+outlier picture is descriptive of simple tasks with small output channels, but that tasks involving large numbers of outputs (ImageNet classification or GPT language modeling) are better described by a restructuring of the spectral bulk. We develop a toy model with extensive output channels that recapitulates this phenomenon and show that edge of the spectrum still converges for sufficiently wide networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出双层次动态平均场理论，揭示深度网络中谱特征演化、异常值逃逸与学习率迁移机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度网络的谱动力学对理解特征学习、训练稳定性及超参数迁移至关重要，但现有理论难以同时追踪整体谱与异常值谱的联合演化，且不同参数化下的宽度依赖性尚未被统一解释。
analysis.problem: 如何建立统一的理论框架，刻画宽神经网络在梯度下降训练中隐藏权重谱（整体谱与异常值谱）的联合动力学，并解释μP与NTK参数化下异常值演化、学习率迁移及谱重构现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: μP参数化下异常值动力学与宽度一致，支持超参数迁移，且前导NTK模式向稳定性边缘增长；NTK参数化下异常值动力学强依赖于宽度，尽管存在稳定的大宽度极限。对于多输出任务（如ImageNet、GPT），谱行为由整体谱重构主导，而非异常值逃逸。
analysis.method: 发展双层次动态平均场理论，联合追踪尖峰系综的整体谱与异常值谱动力学，其中尖峰方向与随机整体保持统计依赖。应用于无限宽非线性网络（平均场/μP缩放）和深度线性网络（比例高维极限）。
contributions: 提出双层次DMFT框架，首次联合追踪深度网络训练中整体谱与异常值谱的演化。
揭示μP与NTK参数化下异常值动力学的宽度依赖性差异，并解释μP的学习率迁移特性。
通过玩具模型复现多输出任务中的谱重构现象，并证明足够宽的网络中谱边缘仍收敛。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论主要适用于宽网络极限，窄网络或有限宽度下的行为可能偏离预测。
多输出任务中的谱重构机制仅通过玩具模型验证，实际大规模网络中的适用性需进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双层次动态平均场理论，揭示深度网络中谱特征演化、异常值逃逸与学习率迁移机制。

papers.title: KL for a KL: On-Policy Distillation with Control Variate Baseline
papers.abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) has emerged as a dominant post-training paradigm for large language models, especially for reasoning domains. However, OPD remains unstable in practice due to the high gradient variance of its single-sample Monte Carlo estimator, and recipes for stable training are still immature. We propose vOPD (On-Policy Distillation with a control variate baseline), which casts OPD as policy-gradient RL and stabilizes it by introducing a control variate baseline-canonically a value function -- from the RL literature. We show that the OPD value function admits a closed form as the per-token negative reverse KL divergence between the student and the teacher, available directly from the already-computed forward pass with no additional critic or inference. Existing stabilization methods either compute the full token-level reverse KL over the entire vocabulary, adding significant overhead, or restrict it to a top-k support, biasing the objective. vOPD instead preserves the lightweight single-sample estimator, subtracting the value function as a detached baseline to keep the gradient unbiased while reducing variance. Furthermore, we show that a top-k approximation of the baseline further lowers cost without compromising performance. Across mathematical and scientific reasoning benchmarks, vOPD consistently outperforms vanilla OPD and matches the most expensive full-vocabulary baseline, offering an efficient stabilization of On-Policy Distillation through principled RL variance reduction.

analysis.tldr: 提出vOPD，通过引入控制变量基线稳定在线策略蒸馏，实现高效且无偏的方差降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在大型语言模型的后训练中表现突出，但其单样本蒙特卡洛估计器的高梯度方差导致训练不稳定，现有稳定方法要么计算开销大，要么引入偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加显著计算开销的前提下，降低OPD的梯度方差，实现稳定训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OPD的梯度方差高源于单样本估计，现有全词汇基线计算昂贵，top-k近似会引入偏差。
analysis.method: 将OPD视为策略梯度强化学习，引入控制变量基线（即值函数），该值函数具有闭式解：学生与教师之间每个token的负反向KL散度，可直接从已有前向传播中获取，无需额外批评网络或推理。训练时减去该基线（detached）以保持梯度无偏并降低方差，进一步采用top-k近似基线以降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出vOPD，将在线策略蒸馏与强化学习中的控制变量基线结合，实现稳定训练。
发现OPD的值函数具有闭式解，即每个token的负反向KL散度，无需额外模型。
实验证明vOPD在数学和科学推理基准上优于原始OPD，且与最昂贵的全词汇基线性能相当，同时计算效率更高。
analysis.experiments: 在数学和科学推理基准上评估，vOPD一致优于原始OPD，并匹配最昂贵的全词汇基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于教师-学生蒸馏场景，需教师模型可用。
top-k近似基线可能在某些任务上仍有轻微偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出vOPD，通过引入控制变量基线稳定在线策略蒸馏，实现高效且无偏的方差降低。

papers.title: From Synthetic to Real: Toward Identity-Consistent Makeup Transfer with Synthetic and Real Data
papers.abstract: Makeup transfer aims to apply the makeup style of a reference portrait to a source portrait while preserving identity and background. Early methods formulate this task as unsupervised image-to-image translation, relying on surrogate objectives and often yielding limited performance. Recent diffusion- and flow-based approaches instead exploit synthetic data for supervised training, leading to significant improvements. However, these methods still face two critical challenges: synthetic supervision frequently fails to faithfully preserve identity, and the domain gap between synthetic and real data limits generalization, resulting in degraded performance in complex real-world scenarios. To address these issues, this paper first proposes ConsistentBeauty, a novel data curation pipeline that ensures makeup fidelity and strict identity consistency within the synthesized data. Second, we propose RealBeauty, a synthetic-to-real post-training framework. Beyond supervised learning on curated synthetic data, we further adapt the model to real-world scenarios through reinforcement learning and design novel verifiable rewards tailored to the makeup transfer task. It allows the model to further benefit from real makeup patterns beyond synthetic supervision. In addition, we establish a new diverse benchmark for makeup transfer, covering a wide range of skin tones, ages, genders, poses, and makeup styles, thereby enabling a more comprehensive evaluation of model performance under diverse real-world conditions. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks and demonstrates clear advantages in identity preservation and performance on complex real-world cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出合成到真实的身份一致化妆迁移框架，通过数据筛选和强化学习提升真实场景性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 化妆迁移任务中，早期无监督方法性能有限，而基于合成数据的监督方法面临身份保持失败和合成-真实域差距两大挑战，限制了在复杂真实场景中的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 解决合成数据监督下化妆迁移的身份一致性问题以及合成到真实的域适应问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出合成监督常无法忠实保持身份，且合成与真实数据之间的域差距导致模型在复杂真实场景中性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出ConsistentBeauty数据筛选流程确保合成数据中化妆保真度和身份一致性，以及RealBeauty合成到真实后训练框架，通过强化学习和可验证奖励函数适应真实场景。
contributions: 提出ConsistentBeauty数据筛选流程，保证合成数据中化妆风格与身份一致性。
提出RealBeauty后训练框架，利用强化学习和可验证奖励函数弥合合成到真实的域差距。
建立多样化化妆迁移基准，涵盖多种肤色、年龄、性别、姿态和化妆风格。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，在身份保持和复杂真实场景中表现优势。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，极端化妆风格或罕见身份可能仍存在挑战。
强化学习训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出合成到真实的身份一致化妆迁移框架，通过数据筛选和强化学习提升真实场景性能。

papers.title: On the Tradeoffs of On-Device Generative Models in Federated Predictive Maintenance Systems
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for preserving client data ownership and control over distributed Internet of Things (IoT) environments. While discriminative models dominate most FL use cases, recent advances in generative models -- such as Variational Autoencoders (VAE), Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), and Diffusion Models (DM) -- offer new opportunities for unsupervised anomaly detection in time series analysis, with relevant applications in predictive maintenance (PdM) in critical industrial infrastructures. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of VAEs, GANs, and DMs in the context of federated PdM. We analyze their performance and communication overhead under both full and partial federation setups, where only subsets of model components are shared. Building on this analysis, the paper proposes a novel taxonomy for federated generative models that formalizes partial component sharing as a principled mechanism for model personalization. Our experiments over a real-world time series dataset reveal distinct trade-offs in model utility, stability, and scalability, especially in heterogeneous and bandwidth-constrained FL settings. For the evaluated GAN-based configurations, full federation improves training stability relative to independent local training, although the model remains less robust than the VAE- and DDPM-based alternatives. For DMs, however, partial federation -- especially decoder sharing -- can outperform full federation in bandwidth-constrained, non-IID settings.

analysis.tldr: 联邦预测性维护中，生成模型（VAE、GAN、扩散模型）在效用、稳定性和通信开销间存在显著权衡，部分联邦（如仅共享解码器）在带宽受限和非IID场景下可能优于完全联邦。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在分布式物联网环境中保护数据隐私，但现有研究主要关注判别模型，而生成模型在时间序列异常检测（如预测性维护）中潜力巨大，其联邦化部署的权衡尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 系统分析VAE、GAN和扩散模型在联邦预测性维护中的性能与通信开销，并探索部分联邦（仅共享部分模型组件）作为个性化机制的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) GAN在完全联邦下训练稳定性优于独立本地训练，但整体鲁棒性仍不如VAE和扩散模型；2) 对于扩散模型，部分联邦（尤其是解码器共享）在带宽受限和非IID场景下可超越完全联邦。
analysis.method: 提出一种联邦生成模型分类法，形式化部分组件共享作为个性化机制；在真实时间序列数据集上对比VAE、GAN和扩散模型在完全联邦与部分联邦设置下的性能与通信开销。
contributions: 首次对VAE、GAN和扩散模型在联邦预测性维护中进行全面比较分析
提出联邦生成模型的分类法，将部分组件共享形式化为个性化机制
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界时间序列数据集上评估，对比完全联邦与部分联邦设置下的模型效用、稳定性和可扩展性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了单一数据集，泛化性需进一步验证
未深入探讨部分联邦中组件选择策略的自动化方法
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联邦预测性维护中，生成模型（VAE、GAN、扩散模型）在效用、稳定性和通信开销间存在显著权衡，部分联邦（如仅共享解码器）在带宽受限和非IID场景下可能优于完全联邦。

papers.title: EyeCue: Driver Cognitive Distraction Detection via Gaze-Empowered Egocentric Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Driver cognitive distraction is a major cause of road collisions and remains difficult to detect. Unlike manual or visual distraction, cognitive distraction is diverted by thoughts unrelated to driving, even when the driver appears visually attentive and exhibits no explicit physical movements. In this work, we propose EyeCue, a gaze-empowered egocentric video understanding framework, to detect driver cognitive distraction. A key insight is that cognitive distraction manifests in the interaction between eye gaze and visual context. To capture this interaction, EyeCue integrates eye gaze with egocentric video to enable context-aware modeling of the driver's attention over time. Furthermore, to tackle the limited scale and diversity of existing datasets, we introduce CogDrive, a comprehensive multi-scenario dataset that augments four existing driving datasets with cognitive distraction annotations. Through extensive evaluations on CogDrive, we show that EyeCue achieves the highest accuracy of 74.38%, outperforming 11 baselines from 6 model families by over 7%. Notably, EyeCue can achieve an accuracy of over 70% across various driving scenarios (different road types, times of day, and weather conditions) with strong generalizability. These results highlight the importance of modeling gaze-context interactions and the effectiveness of cross-modal interaction modeling for multimodal cognitive distraction detection. Our codes and CogDrive dataset resources are available at https://github.com/langzhang2000/EyeCue.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注视与第一人称视频交互的认知分心检测框架，并构建多场景数据集，准确率超70%。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶员认知分心是交通事故主因，但难以检测，因为分心时驾驶员视觉上看似专注且无显式动作，现有方法缺乏对注视与视觉上下文交互的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何利用注视与第一人称视频的交互来检测驾驶员认知分心状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 认知分心体现在眼动与视觉上下文的交互中，即使驾驶员视觉上专注，其注视模式与场景内容的关系也会改变。
analysis.method: EyeCue框架：融合眼动追踪与第一人称视频，通过跨模态交互建模驾驶员随时间变化的注意力上下文。
contributions: 提出EyeCue，一种基于注视增强的第一人称视频理解框架，通过建模注视-上下文交互检测认知分心。
构建CogDrive数据集，为四个现有驾驶数据集添加认知分心标注，覆盖多种场景。
在CogDrive上达到74.38%准确率，超越11个基线模型7%以上，且在不同场景下泛化性强。
analysis.experiments: 在CogDrive数据集上评估，EyeCue准确率74.38%，超越11个基线模型（来自6个模型家族）超过7%，并在不同道路类型、时段和天气条件下准确率超70%。
limitations: 准确率仍有提升空间（74.38%），可能受限于数据集规模和标注质量。
依赖眼动追踪设备，实际部署可能受硬件限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于注视与第一人称视频交互的认知分心检测框架，并构建多场景数据集，准确率超70%。

papers.title: MatryoshkaLoRA: Learning Accurate Hierarchical Low-Rank Representations for LLM Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: With the rise in scale for deep learning models to billions of parameters, the computational cost of fine-tuning remains a significant barrier to deployment. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the need to set a predefined, static rank $r$ requires exhaustive grid searches to balance efficiency and performance. Existing rank-adaptive solutions such as DyLoRA mitigate this by sampling ranks during the training from a predefined distribution. However, they often yield sub-optimal results at higher ranks due to lack of consistent gradient signals across the full hierarchy of ranks, thus making these methods data-inefficient. In this paper, we propose MatryoshkaLoRA, a general, Matryoshka-inspired training framework for LoRA that learns accurate hierarchical low-rank representations by inserting a fixed, carefully crafted diagonal matrix $P$ between the existing LoRA adapters to scale their sub-ranks accordingly. By introducing this simple modification, our general framework recovers LoRA and DyLoRA only by changing $P$ and ensures all sub-ranks embed the available gradient information efficiently. Our MatryoshkaLoRA supports dynamic rank selection with minimal degradation in accuracy. We further propose Area Under the Rank Accuracy Curve (AURAC), a metric that consistently evaluates the performance of hierarchical low-rank adapters. Our results demonstrate that MatryoshkaLoRA learns more accurate hierarchical low-rank representations than prior rank-adaptive approaches and achieves superior accuracy-performance trade-offs across ranks on the evaluated datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/MatryoshkaLoRA.

analysis.tldr: MatryoshkaLoRA 通过插入对角矩阵实现层次化低秩表示，支持动态秩选择且精度损失小。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型微调中 LoRA 的固定秩需要网格搜索，现有秩自适应方法（如 DyLoRA）在高秩时梯度信号不一致导致次优结果。
analysis.problem: 如何学习准确的层次化低秩表示，使得不同秩的子适配器都能高效利用梯度信息，支持动态秩选择。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DyLoRA 等秩自适应方法在高秩时因缺乏一致的梯度信号而表现次优。
analysis.method: 在 LoRA 适配器之间插入固定的对角矩阵 P 来缩放子秩，形成 Matryoshka 结构，并引入 AURAC 指标评估层次化低秩适配器性能。
contributions: 提出 MatryoshkaLoRA 框架，通过插入对角矩阵实现层次化低秩表示，支持动态秩选择。
提出 AURAC 指标用于一致评估层次化低秩适配器的性能。
实验表明 MatryoshkaLoRA 比现有秩自适应方法更准确，且在不同秩上实现更优的精度-性能权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，MatryoshkaLoRA 比 DyLoRA 等基线方法更准确，且支持动态秩选择。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能增加少量计算开销（插入对角矩阵）。
AURAC 指标的有效性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MatryoshkaLoRA 通过插入对角矩阵实现层次化低秩表示，支持动态秩选择且精度损失小。

papers.title: BRIDGE: Background Routing and Isolated Discrete Gating for Coarse-Mask Local Editing
papers.abstract: Coarse-mask local image editing asks a model to modify a user-indicated region while preserving the surrounding scene. In practice, however, rough masks often become unintended shape priors: instead of serving as flexible edit support, the mask can pull the generated object toward its accidental boundary. We study this failure as mask-shape bias and frame the task through a Two-Zone Constraint, where the background should remain stable while the editable region should follow the instruction without being forced to inherit the mask contour. BRIDGE addresses this setting by keeping masks outside the DiT backbone for support construction and blending, avoiding DiT-internal mask injection and copied control branches. It uses BridgePath generation, where a Main Path preserves background context and a Subject Path generates editable content from independent noise. Motivated by a diagnostic Qwen-Image experiment showing that positional embeddings and attention connectivity regulate which image context visual tokens reuse, BRIDGE introduces a learnable Discrete Geometric Gate for token-level positional-embedding routing. This gate lets subject tokens borrow background-anchored coordinates near fusion regions or keep subject-centric coordinates for geometric freedom. We evaluate BRIDGE on BRIDGE-Bench, MagicBrush, and ICE-Bench. On BRIDGE-Bench, BRIDGE improves Local SigLIP2-T from 0.262 with FLUX.1-Fill and 0.390 with ACE++ to 0.503, with parallel gains in local DINO and DreamSim. Zero-shot results on MagicBrush and ICE-Bench further indicate competitive alignment and source preservation beyond the curated benchmark, while the added routing module remains compact at 13.31M parameters compared with ControlNet-style copied branches.

analysis.tldr: 提出BRIDGE方法，通过背景路由和离散几何门控解决粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 粗掩码局部图像编辑中，用户提供的粗糙掩码常成为意外的形状先验，导致生成对象被强制继承掩码轮廓，破坏编辑灵活性。现有方法将掩码注入DiT骨干网络或使用复制控制分支，加剧了这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不将掩码形状强加于生成对象的前提下，实现粗掩码引导的局部图像编辑，同时保持背景稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过Qwen-Image诊断实验观察到，位置嵌入和注意力连接调节视觉令牌重用的上下文，这启发了离散几何门控的设计。
analysis.method: BRIDGE将掩码保持在DiT骨干网络之外，通过BridgePath生成（主路径保留背景，主题路径从独立噪声生成可编辑内容），并引入可学习的离散几何门控实现令牌级位置嵌入路由。
contributions: 提出Two-Zone约束形式化粗掩码局部编辑任务，并揭示掩码形状偏差问题。
设计BRIDGE架构，避免DiT内部掩码注入和复制控制分支，通过BridgePath和离散几何门控实现灵活编辑。
在BRIDGE-Bench、MagicBrush和ICE-Bench上取得SOTA或竞争性结果，且路由模块仅13.31M参数。
analysis.experiments: 在BRIDGE-Bench上，BRIDGE将Local SigLIP2-T从0.262（FLUX.1-Fill）和0.390（ACE++）提升至0.503，并在局部DINO和DreamSim上取得并行提升。在MagicBrush和ICE-Bench上的零样本结果展示了竞争性对齐和源保留。
limitations: 可能对极端不规则掩码或复杂场景编辑效果有限。
离散几何门控的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BRIDGE方法，通过背景路由和离散几何门控解决粗掩码局部编辑中的掩码形状偏差问题。

papers.title: \mathsf{VISTA}: Decentralized Machine Learning in Adversary Dominated Environments
papers.abstract: Decentralized machine learning often relies on outsourcing computations, such as gradient evaluations, to untrusted worker nodes. Existing robust aggregation methods can mitigate malicious behavior under honest-majority assumptions, but may fail when adversaries control a majority of the workers. We study this adversary-dominated setting through an incentive-oriented framework in which reports are accepted and rewarded only when they are mutually consistent up to a threshold. This turns the adversary from a pure saboteur into a rational agent that trades off increasing estimation error against the risk of rejection and loss of reward. We consider iterative optimization under this model. Unlike one-shot computation, iterative learning requires long-horizon decisions: permissive acceptance rules enable faster early progress but admit more adversarial corruption, while strict rules improve estimation accuracy but cause frequent rejections. We propose \mathsf{VISTA}, an adaptive algorithm that tunes the acceptance threshold using the optimization history. Numerical results show that \mathsf{VISTA} improves convergence over static thresholds. We also provide a rigorous convergence analysis showing that, with suitable incentive-aware adaptation, adversary-dominated decentralized learning can retain the asymptotic convergence behavior of standard SGD without relying on an honest majority.

analysis.tldr: 提出VISTA算法，通过自适应接受阈值在对手主导的去中心化学习中实现鲁棒收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 去中心化机器学习常依赖不可信工作节点，现有鲁棒聚合方法在对手占多数时失效，需要新的激励机制应对。
analysis.problem: 在对手主导（adversary-dominated）的去中心化学习环境中，如何设计激励机制和聚合规则以保证优化收敛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 宽松的接受规则加速早期进展但引入更多腐败，严格规则提高精度但导致频繁拒绝，存在长期权衡。
analysis.method: 提出VISTA算法，利用优化历史自适应调整接受阈值，将对手从纯粹破坏者转变为理性代理，在估计误差与奖励损失间权衡。
contributions: 提出VISTA自适应算法，在对手主导环境中动态调整接受阈值。
提供严格的收敛性分析，证明在激励感知自适应下可保留标准SGD的渐近收敛行为。
analysis.experiments: 数值结果表明VISTA相比静态阈值改进了收敛性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定的激励模型假设。
未在真实分布式系统或大规模数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VISTA算法，通过自适应接受阈值在对手主导的去中心化学习中实现鲁棒收敛。

papers.title: Exact Regular-Constrained Variable-Order Markov Generation via Sparse Context-State Belief Propagation
papers.abstract: Variable-order Markov models generate sequences over a finite alphabet by conditioning each symbol on the longest available suffix of the generated history. Regular constraints, by contrast, describe finite-horizon control requirements by an automaton: fixed positions, forced endings, metrical patterns, and forbidden copied fragments are all special cases.
