Existing exact methods already handle regular constraints with belief propagation for first-order Markov chains. The contribution here is the variable-order extension: identifying the state space on which the existing BP-regular machinery must be run when the generator is a variable-order/backoff model. A first-order constraint layer can enforce useful support conditions, but it computes future mass after merging histories that a variable-order generator deliberately keeps distinct. We formalize this mismatch and give the sparse construction obtained by replacing the first-order Markov state with the observed context state, then taking the standard product with the regular constraint automaton. For a fixed trained context graph and automaton, inference is linear in the sequence horizon; in general it is polynomial in the number of reachable product edges. This gives the correct variable-order distribution conditioned on regular constraints without expanding to all K-tuples. The same finite-source interface supports reversible data augmentation by inverse count lookup, matching materialized transposition augmentation without storing transformed corpora. We also separate exact BP inference from generation-time backoff policies, such as singleton avoidance, whose stochastic semantics must be made explicit if exactness is claimed.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏上下文状态置信传播方法，实现变阶马尔可夫模型在正则约束下的精确生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 变阶马尔可夫模型在序列生成中广泛应用，但现有正则约束方法仅适用于一阶马尔可夫链，无法处理变阶模型因历史区分导致的分布不匹配问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不展开所有K元组的情况下，对变阶马尔可夫模型施加正则约束并实现精确生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一阶约束层在合并历史时丢失了变阶生成器刻意保持的区分信息，导致未来质量计算错误。
analysis.method: 将一阶马尔可夫状态替换为观测到的上下文状态，并与正则约束自动机进行标准乘积，构建稀疏上下文状态图，然后在该图上运行置信传播。
contributions: 形式化了变阶马尔可夫模型与正则约束之间的不匹配问题，并给出稀疏构造方法。
证明了推理复杂度在固定上下文图和自动机下与序列视界线性相关，在一般情况下与可达乘积边数多项式相关。
支持通过逆计数查找实现可逆数据增强，无需存储变换后的语料库。
区分了精确BP推理与生成时的回退策略（如避免单例），明确了精确性所需的随机语义。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法依赖于训练好的上下文图和自动机，可能对图结构敏感。
多项式复杂度在自动机状态数较大时可能仍较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏上下文状态置信传播方法，实现变阶马尔可夫模型在正则约束下的精确生成。

papers.title: PPI-Net connects molecular protein interactions to functional processes in disease
papers.abstract: Understanding how molecular alterations propagate across biological systems to drive disease remains a central challenge. Although high-throughput profiling enables comprehensive characterization of tumor states, most models neglect structured biological relationships or lack interpretability across scales. Here we present PPI-Net, a hierarchical graph neural network that integrates protein-protein interaction (PPI) networks with pathway-level representations to model disease from molecular interactions to functional processes. Patient-specific molecular profiles are embedded within a shared interaction network from STRING and propagated through a multi-layer Reactome hierarchy using graph attention, enabling aggregation of gene-level signals into higher-order biological programs. Across RNA-seq data from ten cancer types from The Cancer Genome Atlas, PPI-Net achieves robust predictive performance, with balanced accuracy exceeding 90% in multiple cohorts. Comparative analysis on RNA-Seq data from breast cancer demonstrated that PPI-Net's integration of the Reactome hierarchy improved balanced accuracy by 6.7% relative to a PPI-only model, while hierarchical multi-level supervision improved balanced accuracy by 12.3% relative to using only a single top-level prediction head. Applying a multi-omics approach using RNA-seq and methylation data improves model interpretation, recovering canonical oncogenic modules, including TP53-AKT signaling and stress response pathways, while revealing convergence onto coherent programs such as ion signaling and cellular responses to stimuli. These results demonstrate that integrating interaction networks with pathway hierarchies enables accurate prediction while providing mechanistic insight into cancer biology.

analysis.tldr: PPI-Net 通过分层图神经网络整合蛋白质相互作用网络与通路层级，实现从分子到功能过程的疾病建模与预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子改变如何跨生物系统传播导致疾病仍不清楚，现有模型忽略结构化生物关系或缺乏跨尺度可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何整合蛋白质相互作用网络与通路层级信息，实现从分子交互到功能过程的疾病建模与可解释预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PPI-Net，一种分层图神经网络，利用 STRING 的 PPI 网络嵌入患者分子谱，通过图注意力机制沿 Reactome 层级传播信号，聚合基因级信号为高阶生物程序。
contributions: 提出 PPI-Net，整合 PPI 网络与通路层级的分层图神经网络，用于疾病建模。
在 TCGA 十种癌症 RNA-seq 数据上实现超过 90% 的平衡准确率，并验证了层级整合与多层级监督的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 TCGA 十种癌症 RNA-seq 数据上评估，平衡准确率超过 90%；乳腺癌 RNA-seq 对比显示，整合 Reactome 层级比仅用 PPI 提升 6.7% 平衡准确率，层级多监督比单顶层预测头提升 12.3%；多组学（RNA-seq + 甲基化）改善模型解释性，恢复典型致癌模块。
limitations: 可能依赖 STRING 和 Reactome 数据库的完整性与准确性。
仅在癌症数据上验证，泛化到其他疾病需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PPI-Net 通过分层图神经网络整合蛋白质相互作用网络与通路层级，实现从分子到功能过程的疾病建模与预测。

papers.title: Approximation-Free Differentiable Oblique Decision Trees
papers.abstract: Decision Trees (DTs) are widely used in safety-critical domains such as medical diagnosis, valued for their interpretability and effectiveness on tabular data. However, training accurate oblique DTs is challenging due to complex optimization landscapes and overfitting risks, particularly in regression. Recent advances have introduced differentiable formulations that enable gradient-based training and joint optimization of decision boundaries and leaf regressors. Yet, existing approaches typically rely on approximations, either through probabilistic softening of boundaries (soft DTs) or quantized gradients such as the Straight-Through Estimator (STE). To overcome these limitations, we propose DTSemNet, a novel, semantically equivalent, and invertible representation of hard oblique DTs as neural networks. DTSemNet enables end-to-end training with standard gradient descent, eliminating the need for approximations in both classification and regression. While classification aligns naturally with this formulation, regression remains challenging due to the joint optimization of internal nodes and leaf regressors. To address this, we analyze the limitations of STE and introduce an annealed Top-k method that provides accurate gradient signals without approximation. Extensive experiments on classification and regression benchmarks show that DTSemNet-trained oblique DTs outperform state-of-the-art differentiable DTs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that DTSemNet can serve as programmatic DT policies in reinforcement learning environments, thereby broadening their applicability.

analysis.tldr: 提出DTSemNet，一种无需近似的可微斜决策树表示，通过标准梯度下降端到端训练，在分类和回归上超越现有可微决策树。
analysis.research_motivation: 决策树在安全关键领域（如医疗诊断）中广泛使用，但训练准确的斜决策树面临复杂优化和过拟合风险，现有可微方法依赖近似（如软决策树或STE），限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用近似的情况下，实现斜决策树的端到端可微训练，并解决回归任务中内部节点与叶回归器联合优化的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出回归任务中STE方法存在梯度信号不准确的问题，而分类任务与DTSemNet的语义等价表示自然对齐。
analysis.method: 提出DTSemNet，将硬斜决策树表示为语义等价且可逆的神经网络，通过标准梯度下降端到端训练；针对回归任务，引入退火Top-k方法提供准确梯度信号。
contributions: 提出DTSemNet，一种无需近似的可微斜决策树表示，支持分类和回归的端到端训练。
分析STE在回归中的局限性，并引入退火Top-k方法改善梯度信号。
在分类和回归基准上超越现有可微决策树，并展示在强化学习环境中作为程序化决策树策略的适用性。
analysis.experiments: 在分类和回归基准上进行了广泛实验，DTSemNet训练的斜决策树优于最先进的可微决策树；并在强化学习环境中验证了其作为程序化策略的有效性。
limitations: 可能对大规模数据集或高维特征的计算效率有挑战。
退火Top-k方法的超参数调优可能敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DTSemNet，一种无需近似的可微斜决策树表示，通过标准梯度下降端到端训练，在分类和回归上超越现有可微决策树。

papers.title: Explainable Part-Based Vehicle Classifier with Spatial Awareness
papers.abstract: In the area of Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), fine-grained vehicle classification systems play an essential role. Recently, the authors have presented a novel vision-based classification approach in which standard end-to-end Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been decomposed into 1) a CNN-based detector for semantically strong vehicle parts, followed by 2) feature construction and 3) final classification by a decision tree. In contrast to conventional CNNs, this allows both easy extensibility to new vehicle categories - without the need to fully retrain the part detector - and an important step towards the interpretability of the model, removing partially the black-box nature inherent to CNNs. Here we present an important extension of this approach that now incorporates spatial awareness of the vehicle parts: while the feature construction 2) of the previous approach used a binary decision for each feature (present vs. absent), now a full spatial probability map is constructed to condition the presence of each individual part with respect to a given vehicle category. The classification is performed using a softmax regression approach for the overall vehicle probabilities. This method shows a considerably improved robustness against false (part-)detections, a point that is crucial for practical application. Comparative analyses with a state-of-the-art end-to-end CNN indicate that our part-based methods achieve comparable accuracy, effectively challenging the presumed trade-off between accuracy and explainability. This research represents a significant advance in vehicle classification for ITS and forms the basis for systems that combine high accuracy with intuitive interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种具有空间感知能力的可解释部件级车辆分类器，在保持可解释性的同时达到与端到端CNN相当的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能交通系统中需要高精度且可解释的车辆分类方法，但传统端到端CNN是黑箱，难以解释且扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 现有部件级车辆分类方法缺乏空间感知，导致对错误部件检测的鲁棒性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CNN分解为部件检测器、特征构建和分类器三部分，特征构建中使用空间概率图代替二元决策，分类采用softmax回归。
contributions: 引入空间感知机制，构建全空间概率图以条件化部件存在性
显著提升对错误部件检测的鲁棒性，同时保持可解释性
analysis.experiments: 与端到端CNN的对比分析表明，所提部件方法达到可比较的精度，挑战了精度与可解释性之间的权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的部件检测器
空间概率图的构建可能增加计算复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种具有空间感知能力的可解释部件级车辆分类器，在保持可解释性的同时达到与端到端CNN相当的精度。

papers.title: CyBiasBench: Benchmarking Bias in LLM Agents for Cyber-Attack Scenarios
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents in offensive cybersecurity. In this paper, we reveal an interesting phenomenon: different agents exhibit distinct attack patterns. Specifically, each agent exhibits an attack-selection bias, disproportionately concentrating its efforts on a narrow subset of attack families regardless of prompt variations. To systematically quantify this behavior, we introduce CyBiasBench, a comprehensive 630-session benchmark that evaluates five agents on three targets and four prompt conditions with ten attack families. We identify explicit bias across agents, with different dominant attack families and varying entropy levels in their attack-family allocation distributions. Such bias is better characterized as a trait of the agents, rather than a factor associated with the attack success rate. Furthermore, our experiments reveal a bias momentum effect, where agents resist explicit steering toward attack families that conflict with their bias. This forced distribution shift does not yield measurable improvements in attack performance. To ensure reproducibility and facilitate future research, we release an interactive result dashboard at https://trustworthyai.co.kr/CyBiasBench/ and a reproducibility artifact with aggregated session-level statistics and full evaluation scripts at https://github.com/Harry24k/CyBiasBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出CyBiasBench基准，揭示LLM Agent在网络安全攻击中存在攻击选择偏差，且偏差具有动量效应。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为自主Agent在攻击性网络安全中应用日益广泛，但不同Agent的攻击行为模式差异尚未被系统研究，缺乏量化偏差的基准。
analysis.problem: 量化LLM Agent在攻击场景中的攻击选择偏差，并分析其特性（如是否与成功率相关、是否可被引导改变）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同Agent表现出不同的攻击选择偏差，倾向于集中使用少数攻击家族，且这种偏差是Agent的固有特质，与攻击成功率无关；存在偏差动量效应，即Agent抵抗被引导至与其偏差冲突的攻击家族。
analysis.method: 构建包含630个会话的基准CyBiasBench，评估5个Agent在3个目标、4种提示条件和10个攻击家族上的表现，通过攻击家族分配分布的熵和主导家族量化偏差。
contributions: 首次系统揭示LLM Agent在攻击场景中的攻击选择偏差现象。
提出CyBiasBench基准，包含630个会话，覆盖多Agent、多目标、多提示和多攻击家族。
发现偏差动量效应，即Agent抵抗与自身偏差冲突的引导。
开源交互式仪表盘和可复现性工件。
analysis.experiments: 在5个Agent、3个目标、4种提示条件和10个攻击家族上进行630个会话的评估，分析了偏差分布、熵值、与成功率的关系以及引导效果。
limitations: 仅评估了5个Agent，可能不覆盖所有主流模型。
攻击家族数量有限（10个），可能无法完全代表真实攻击空间。
未深入探讨偏差产生的根本原因（如训练数据或模型架构）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CyBiasBench基准，揭示LLM Agent在网络安全攻击中存在攻击选择偏差，且偏差具有动量效应。

papers.title: Anisotropic Modality Align
papers.abstract: Training multimodal large language models has long been limited by the scarcity of high-quality paired multimodal data. Recent studies show that the shared representation space of pretrained multimodal contrastive models can serve as a bridge, enabling models to perform multimodal training with unimodal data. However, the key premise of this paradigm remains insufficiently understood: can representations from different modalities be reliably interchanged? The core obstacle lies in the persistent Modality Gap in the shared space. In this work, we revisit the geometric nature of the modality gap. We find that modality representations already share compatible dominant semantic geometry. What truly hinders modality interchangeability is not a simple global shift, but an anisotropic residual structure concentrated along a small number of dominant directions. Based on this finding, we further propose the principle of anisotropic modality gap alignment: effective modality alignment should align with the target-modality distribution while preserving the semantic structure of the source modality. Guided by this principle, we propose an anisotropic geometric correction framework, AnisoAlign, for unpaired modality alignment. This framework leverages the internal geometric prior of the target modality and performs bounded correction on source-modality representations, thereby constructing substitute representations in the target modality. Experiments confirm its benefits in both geometric diagnostics and text-only MLLM training. Overall, this work recasts the modality gap from an empirical observation into a correctable, structured geometric phenomenon and provides a new representation alignment perspective for training multimodal models with unimodal data.

analysis.tldr: 提出各向异性模态间隙对齐方法，利用目标模态几何先验修正源模态表示，实现非配对模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量配对多模态数据稀缺限制了多模态大语言模型训练，现有方法利用预训练对比模型的共享表示空间作为桥梁，但模态间隙阻碍了表示的可互换性。
analysis.problem: 解决共享表示空间中模态间隙导致的表示不可互换问题，实现非配对模态的有效对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模态表示已共享兼容的主导语义几何，真正阻碍互换的是沿少数主导方向集中的各向异性残差结构，而非简单的全局偏移。
analysis.method: 提出各向异性几何校正框架AnisoAlign，利用目标模态的内部几何先验，对源模态表示进行有界校正，构建目标模态中的替代表示。
contributions: 揭示了模态间隙的各向异性几何本质，指出其是沿少数主导方向集中的残差结构。
提出各向异性模态间隙对齐原则和AnisoAlign框架，实现非配对模态对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在几何诊断和纯文本MLLM训练中验证了方法有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练对比模型的质量。
校正过程可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出各向异性模态间隙对齐方法，利用目标模态几何先验修正源模态表示，实现非配对模态对齐。

papers.title: Divide and Conquer: Object Co-occurrence Helps Mitigate Simplicity Bias in OOD Detection
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is crucial for ensuring the reliability of deep learning models. Existing methods mostly focus on regular entangled representations to discriminate in-distribution (ID) and OOD data, neglecting the rich contextual information within images. This issue is particularly challenging for detecting near-OOD, as models with simplicity bias struggle to learn discriminative features in disentangled representations. The human visual system can use the co-occurrence of objects in the natural environment to facilitate scene understanding. Inspired by this, we propose an Object-Centric OOD detection framework that learns to capture Object CO-occurrence (OCO) patterns within images. The proposed method introduces a new OOD detection paradigm that understands object co-occurrence within an image by predicting disentangled representations for the test sample, then adaptively divides patterns into three scenarios based on object co-occurrence patterns observed in ID training data, and finally performs OOD detection in a divide-and-conquer manner. By doing so, OCO can distinguish near-OOD by considering the semantic contextual relationships present in their images, avoiding the tendency to focus solely on simple, easily learnable regions. We evaluate OCO through experiments across challenging and full-spectrum OOD settings, demonstrating competitive results and confirming its ability to address both semantic and covariate shifts. Code is released at https://github.com/Michael-McQueen/OCO.

analysis.tldr: 利用物体共现模式，通过分治策略提升OOD检测对近分布外样本的区分能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测方法多关注正则化纠缠表示，忽略了图像中的丰富上下文信息，导致对近分布外样本检测困难；人类视觉系统利用物体共现辅助场景理解，启发本文探索类似机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用物体共现模式提升OOD检测，特别是近分布外样本的识别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型存在简单性偏好，难以从解耦表示中学习判别性特征，导致近OOD检测困难；物体共现模式可提供语义上下文关系，帮助区分ID和OOD。
analysis.method: 提出Object-Centric OOD检测框架（OCO），学习图像中的物体共现模式：先预测测试样本的解耦表示，然后根据ID训练数据中的共现模式自适应划分三种场景，最后以分治策略进行OOD检测。
contributions: 提出基于物体共现的OOD检测新范式，利用语义上下文关系区分近分布外样本。
设计分治策略，根据共现模式自适应划分场景并分别检测，缓解简单性偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性和全频谱OOD设置下进行实验，展示了竞争性结果，并确认了方法处理语义和协变量偏移的能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的对象检测或解耦表示预测模块。
物体共现模式在复杂场景中可能难以准确捕捉。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用物体共现模式，通过分治策略提升OOD检测对近分布外样本的区分能力。

papers.title: GazeVLM: Active Vision via Internal Attention Control for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Human visual reasoning is governed by active vision, a process where metacognitive control drives top-down goal-directed attention, dynamically routing foveal focus toward task-relevant details while maintaining peripheral awareness of the global scene. In contrast, modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process visual information passively, relying on the static accumulation of massive token contexts that dilute spatial reasoning and induce linguistic hallucinations. Here we propose the following paradigm shift: GazeVLM, a multimodal architecture that internalizes this metacognitive oversight over its deployment of attention resources directly into the reasoning loop. By empowering the VLM to autonomously generate gaze tokens ($\texttt{<LOOK>}$), GazeVLM establishes a top-down control mechanism over its own causal attention mask. The model dynamically dictates its focal intent, triggering a continuous suppression bias that dampens irrelevant visual features, implementing spatial selective attention and simulating foveal fixation. Once local reasoning concludes, the bias lifts, seamlessly restoring the global view. This architecture enables the model to fluidly transition between global spatial awareness and localized focal reasoning without relying on external agentic contraptions like cropping tools, or inflating the context window with additional visual tokens derived from localized visual patches. Trained with a bespoke Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) procedure that rewards valid grounding, our 4B-parameter GazeVLM delivers strong high-resolution multimodal reasoning performance, surpassing state-of-the-art VLMs in its parameter class by nearly 4% and agentic multimodal pipelines built around thinking with images by more than 5% on HRBench-4k and HRBench-8k.

analysis.tldr: GazeVLM通过内部注意力控制实现主动视觉，提升多模态推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM被动处理视觉信息，依赖静态大量token，稀释空间推理并导致语言幻觉，缺乏类似人类主动视觉的元认知控制。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在推理过程中自主控制注意力资源，实现动态的全局-局部视觉聚焦，而不依赖外部裁剪工具或增加上下文窗口。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 被动视觉处理导致空间推理能力下降和语言幻觉；外部裁剪工具或额外局部token会增加复杂性和计算开销。
analysis.method: 提出GazeVLM架构，通过生成注视token（<LOOK>）建立自上而下的因果注意力掩码控制，动态抑制无关视觉特征，模拟中央凹注视，并在局部推理结束后恢复全局视图。
contributions: 提出内部注意力控制机制，使VLM能自主生成注视token动态调整注意力焦点。
设计基于GRPO的训练过程，奖励有效接地，实现4B参数模型在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k上超越同类SOTA VLM近4%，超越基于图像的agentic pipeline超5%。
analysis.experiments: 在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k上评估，GazeVLM（4B参数）超越同类SOTA VLM近4%，超越agentic multimodal pipeline超5%。
limitations: 仅验证了4B参数规模，更大模型效果未知。
注视token的生成策略可能对特定任务敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GazeVLM通过内部注意力控制实现主动视觉，提升多模态推理性能。

papers.title: ICDAR 2026 Competition on Writer Identification and Pen Classification from Hand-Drawn Circles
papers.abstract: This paper presents CircleID, a large-scale ICDAR 2026 competition on writer identification and pen classification from scanned hand-drawn circles. The primary objective is to investigate how biometric writer characteristics and physical pen features naturally entangle within minimal, static traces. CircleID comprises two distinct tasks: (1) open-set writer identification, requiring models to recognize known writers while explicitly rejecting unknown ones, and (2) cross-writer pen classification, evaluated across both seen and unseen writers. Participants were provided with a new, controlled dataset of 46,155 tightly cropped circle images, digitized at 400 DPI and annotated for writer identity and pen type. The dataset comprises samples from 50 known and 16 unknown writers using eight different pens. Hosted on Kaggle as two separate tracks with public and private leaderboards, the competition provided participants with a ResNet baseline. In total, 389 teams (436 participants) made 3,185 submissions for the pen classification task, and 113 teams (141 participants) made 1,737 submissions for the writer identification track. The best-performing private leaderboard submissions achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 64.801% for writer identification and 92.726% for pen classification. This paper details the dataset, evaluates the winning methodologies, and analyzes the impact of out-of-distribution writers on model generalization and feature disentanglement. In this large-scale competition, CircleID establishes a new baseline for minimal-trace analysis.

analysis.tldr: ICDAR 2026竞赛通过手绘圆圈图像研究笔迹识别与笔型分类，建立大规模基准数据集并分析特征纠缠。
analysis.research_motivation: 手写生物特征与物理笔迹特征在最小静态痕迹中自然纠缠，现有研究缺乏大规模、受控的基准来探索这种纠缠及其对开放集识别和跨写者泛化的影响。
analysis.problem: 从扫描的手绘圆圈图像中同时进行开放集写者识别和跨写者笔型分类，并分析写者与笔特征之间的纠缠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含46,155个紧密裁剪的圆圈图像数据集（400 DPI，标注写者身份和笔型），组织Kaggle竞赛，提供ResNet基线，通过公开和私有排行榜评估提交方法。
contributions: 发布了CircleID数据集，包含50名已知和16名未知写者使用8种不同笔的46,155个手绘圆圈图像。
组织了大规模ICDAR 2026竞赛，吸引389个团队参与笔分类任务，113个团队参与写者识别任务。
分析了分布外写者对模型泛化和特征解缠的影响，建立了最小痕迹分析的新基线。
analysis.experiments: 竞赛结果：写者识别Top-1准确率64.801%，笔分类Top-1准确率92.726%。
limitations: 仅使用手绘圆圈这一单一静态痕迹，可能无法完全代表真实手写场景。
数据集规模相对有限（66名写者，8种笔），可能影响模型泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ICDAR 2026竞赛通过手绘圆圈图像研究笔迹识别与笔型分类，建立大规模基准数据集并分析特征纠缠。

papers.title: Pre-training Enables Extraordinary All-optical Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Optical neural networks are emerging as powerful machine learning and information processing tools because of their potential advantages in speed and energy efficiency. The training methods of these physical models, however, remain underexplored compared to their digital counterparts and are leading to suboptimal performance. This paper reports a pre-training-driven approach that leads to snapshot image denoising with substantially improved quality. We demonstrated effective free-space optical denoising by a diffractive network optimized by a two-step process including (1) pre-training using a massive dataset of 3.45 million diverse but simple images and (2) fine-tuning with the corresponding task-specific datasets. Compared to conventional Fourier-domain filtering and directly trained diffractive networks, such a transfer learning process exhibited prominent advantages for denoising images degraded by severe noise, peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) below 8 dB, while preserving fine image features and improving the PSNR to above 18 dB. Importantly, the same pre-trained optical network could be consistently fine-tuned to process degraded images from highly diverse styles ranging from handwritten digits (MNIST) and chest X-rays (ChestMNIST) to CIFAR-10 images and human faces (CelebA). We further demonstrated the critical role of our optical denoisers in vision-based applications, including face detection, plate recognition, and localization of UAVs in noisy conditions.

analysis.tldr: 预训练+微调的光学衍射网络实现全光图像去噪，在严重噪声下PSNR从低于8dB提升至18dB以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学神经网络在速度和能效上具有优势，但其训练方法研究不足，导致性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何通过有效的训练策略提升光学神经网络在图像去噪任务中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接训练的光学网络在严重噪声（PSNR<8dB）下性能不足，而预训练+微调能显著提升去噪质量并保留细节。
analysis.method: 两步训练法：先在345万张多样化简单图像上预训练光学衍射网络，再在任务特定数据集上微调。
contributions: 提出预训练驱动的全光图像去噪方法，显著提升严重噪声下的去噪质量。
证明预训练光学网络可微调适应多种风格（手写数字、X光、自然图像等）的去噪任务。
展示光学去噪器在视觉应用（人脸检测、车牌识别、无人机定位）中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、ChestMNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA等数据集上验证，PSNR从<8dB提升至>18dB，并应用于人脸检测、车牌识别、无人机定位。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据集，计算资源需求高。
仅针对图像去噪任务，泛化到其他光学计算任务需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 预训练+微调的光学衍射网络实现全光图像去噪，在严重噪声下PSNR从低于8dB提升至18dB以上。

papers.title: Text-to-CAD Evaluation with CADTests
papers.abstract: Text-to-CAD has recently emerged as an important task with the potential to substantially accelerate design workflows. Despite its significance, there has been surprisingly little work on Text-to-CAD evaluation, and assessing CAD model generation performance remains a considerable challenge. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation perspective for Text-to-CAD based on automated testing. We propose CADTestBench, the first test-based benchmark for Text-to-CAD, based on CADTests, executable software tests that verify whether a generated CAD model satisfies the geometric and topological requirements of the input prompt. Using CADTestBench, we conduct comprehensive benchmarking of recent Text-to-CAD methods and further demonstrate that CADTests can also guide CAD model generation, yielding simple baselines that surpass performance of current methods. CADTestBench code and data are available at GitHub and Hugging Face dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于自动化测试的Text-to-CAD评测基准CADTestBench，并展示其可用于指导生成。
analysis.research_motivation: Text-to-CAD任务能显著加速设计流程，但缺乏系统评测方法，现有评估难以验证生成模型是否满足几何和拓扑要求。
analysis.problem: 如何有效评估Text-to-CAD生成的CAD模型是否满足输入提示中的几何与拓扑需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CADTestBench，基于可执行的CADTests软件测试，自动验证生成模型是否符合几何和拓扑要求；并利用CADTests指导生成，构建简单基线。
contributions: 提出首个基于测试的Text-to-CAD评测基准CADTestBench
展示CADTests可用于指导生成，提升基线性能
analysis.experiments: 对近期Text-to-CAD方法进行了全面基准测试，并验证了CADTests引导生成的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖特定类型的几何和拓扑要求
测试用例的全面性有待扩展
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于自动化测试的Text-to-CAD评测基准CADTestBench，并展示其可用于指导生成。

papers.title: Beyond Confidence: Rethinking Self-Assessments for Performance Prediction in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in settings where reliable self-assessment is critical. Assessing model reliability has evolved from using probabilistic correctness estimates to, more recently, eliciting verbalized confidence. Confidence, however, has been shown to be an inconsistent and overoptimistic predictor of model correctness. Drawing on cognitive appraisal theory, a framework from human psychology that decomposes self-evaluation into multiple components, we propose a multidimensional perspective on model self-assessment. We elicit six appraisal-based dimensions of self-assessment, alongside confidence, and evaluate their utility for predicting model failure across 12 LLMs and 38 tasks spanning eight domains. We find that competence-related appraisal dimensions, particularly effort and ability, consistently match or outperform confidence across most settings. Effort additionally yields less overoptimistic estimates that remain stable across model sizes. In contrast, affective dimensions provide marginally predictive signals. Furthermore, the most informative dimension varies systematically with task characteristics: effort is most predictive for reasoning-intensive tasks, while ability and confidence dominate on retrieval-oriented tasks. Broadly, our findings indicate that structured multidimensional self-assessment is a promising approach to improving the reliability and safety of language model deployment across diverse real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于认知评价理论的多维自我评估方法，优于传统置信度预测LLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在关键场景中需要可靠自我评估，但现有置信度方法不一致且过度乐观，亟需更有效的预测手段。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更准确、稳定的LLM自我评估机制以预测模型错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 置信度作为预测器不一致且过度乐观；能力相关维度（如努力）表现稳定且优于置信度；任务类型影响最有效维度。
analysis.method: 基于认知评价理论，引出六个评价维度（努力、能力等）与置信度，评估其对12个LLM在38个任务上的错误预测能力。
contributions: 提出多维自我评估框架，系统比较了评价维度与置信度的预测性能。
发现努力维度在推理密集型任务中表现最佳，且估计更稳定。
揭示了任务特征与最有效评估维度之间的系统关系。
analysis.experiments: 在12个LLM和38个任务（覆盖8个领域）上评估了多维自我评估的预测效用。
limitations: 未探讨多维评估在实际部署中的计算开销。
可能未涵盖所有认知评价维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于认知评价理论的多维自我评估方法，优于传统置信度预测LLM性能。

papers.title: Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.

analysis.tldr: Prune-OPD通过动态截断漂移轨迹，在长程推理中实现高效可靠的在线策略蒸馏。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）利用密集教师奖励提升推理模型，但扩展到长程任务时，学生生成前缀与教师思维过程产生漂移，导致奖励质量下降和计算浪费。
analysis.problem: 解决OPD在长程推理中因前缀漂移导致的奖励不可靠和计算浪费问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学生生成前缀与教师思维过程发生漂移时，教师密集奖励失去局部可剥削性，继续生成和评估漂移轨迹会降低奖励质量并造成计算浪费。
analysis.method: Prune-OPD通过实时监控学生与教师预测的局部兼容性（如top-k重叠）检测前缀漂移事件，一旦检测到严重漂移，则单调降低后续不可靠奖励的权重并触发动态截断，将计算重新分配给可靠的教师监督。
contributions: 提出Prune-OPD框架，动态对齐训练预算与监督质量，通过实时检测前缀漂移并截断无效轨迹。
在多个教师-学生组合和基准测试（AMC, AIME, HMMT）上，减少37.6%-68.0%训练时间，同时保持或提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在AMC、AIME、HMMT等挑战性基准上评估，Prune-OPD减少训练时间37.6%-68.0%，并保持或提升性能。
limitations: 可能依赖于教师-学生兼容性的实时监控指标（如top-k重叠）的准确性。
动态截断策略在极端漂移场景下的最优性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Prune-OPD通过动态截断漂移轨迹，在长程推理中实现高效可靠的在线策略蒸馏。

papers.title: SARA: Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment for Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Recent video diffusion models (VDMs) synthesize visually convincing clips, yet still drop entities, mis-bind attributes, and weaken the interactions specified in the prompt. Representation-alignment objectives such as VideoREPA and MoAlign improve fine-grained text following by distilling spatio-temporal token relations from a frozen visual foundation model, but their pairwise supervision budget is allocated by visual or motion cues rather than by how relevant each pair is to the prompt. We present SARA, Semantically Adaptive Relational Alignment, which keeps token-relation distillation (TRD) on a frozen VFM target and adds a text-conditioned saliency that decides which token pairs carry supervision. A lightweight Stage 1 aligner is trained with per-entity SAM 3.1 mask supervision and an InfoNCE regulariser, and its continuous saliency is fused into TRD through a pair-routing operator that assigns each token pair a weight whenever either of its two endpoints is salient, thereby routing supervision toward subject-subject and subject-background pairs and away from background-background ones. In the Wan2.2 continual-training setting, SARA improves both text alignment and motion quality over SFT, VideoREPA, and MoAlign on a 13-dimension VLM rubric, on the public VBench benchmarks, and in a blind user study.

analysis.tldr: SARA 通过文本条件显著性引导的 token 关系蒸馏，提升视频扩散模型的文本对齐与运动质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在生成时仍存在实体丢失、属性错绑、交互弱化等问题，而表示对齐方法（如 VideoREPA、MoAlign）的监督分配基于视觉或运动线索，忽略了与提示的相关性，导致对齐效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何根据文本提示的语义相关性自适应地分配 token 对监督预算，以提升视频扩散模型的细粒度文本跟随能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SARA 在冻结的视觉基础模型上保持 token 关系蒸馏，并引入文本条件显著性模块，通过轻量级 Stage 1 对齐器（使用 SAM 3.1 掩码监督和 InfoNCE 正则化）学习连续显著性，再通过 pair-routing 算子将显著性融合到蒸馏中，为每个 token 对分配权重，优先监督主体-主体和主体-背景对，减少背景-背景对的监督。
contributions: 提出语义自适应关系对齐（SARA）方法，通过文本条件显著性引导 token 关系蒸馏的监督分配。
在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，SARA 在 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲测用户研究中均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。
analysis.experiments: 在 Wan2.2 持续训练设置下，使用 13 维 VLM 评估、VBench 基准和盲测用户研究进行实验，SARA 在文本对齐和运动质量上均优于 SFT、VideoREPA 和 MoAlign。
limitations: 依赖冻结的视觉基础模型和 SAM 3.1 掩码，可能引入额外计算开销。
显著性模块的训练需要实体级掩码标注，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SARA 通过文本条件显著性引导的 token 关系蒸馏，提升视频扩散模型的文本对齐与运动质量。

papers.title: Toward Privileged Foundation Models:LUPI for Accelerated and Improved Learning
papers.abstract: Training foundation models is computationally intensive and often slow to converge.We introduce PIQL,Privileged Information for Quick and Quality Learning, the first framework to systematically integrate privileged information (PI) to simultaneously accelerate learning and improve generalization in tabular foundation models (TFMs). We construct two complementary forms of PI: (i) aggregate dataset-level statistics that reduce the burden on in-context learning, and (ii) encodings of the underlying data-generating program, providing knowledge beyond observable data. We further design an architecture that effectively transfers the train-time-only PI by learning to reconstruct it from observed context at inference. We provide a theoretical analysis characterizing conditions under which PI reduces the population-level approximation gap and accelerates convergence in finite-data regimes. Empirical evidence shows that PIQL enables TFMs to achieve faster convergence, lower final loss, and better generalization, in effect, reducing data and compute requirements. Our work establishes PI-guided pretraining as a principled and practical paradigm for improving the efficiency and performance of foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 提出PIQL框架，利用特权信息加速表格基础模型训练并提升泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练基础模型计算密集且收敛缓慢，现有方法缺乏系统性利用特权信息来同时加速学习和提升泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计框架有效整合特权信息以加速表格基础模型的训练收敛并改善泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建两种互补特权信息（数据集级统计和底层数据生成程序编码），并设计架构在训练时利用特权信息、推理时从观测上下文重建。
contributions: 首次系统性地将特权信息整合到表格基础模型中，同时加速学习和提升泛化。
提出两种互补特权信息形式及相应架构，并给出理论分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 特权信息的获取可能依赖额外知识或计算。
方法在非表格数据上的适用性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PIQL框架，利用特权信息加速表格基础模型训练并提升泛化能力。

papers.title: Neural Operators as Efficient Function Interpolators
papers.abstract: Neural operators (NOs) are designed to learn maps between infinite-dimensional function spaces. We propose a novel reframing of their use. By introducing an auxiliary base-space, any finite-dimensional function can be viewed as an operator acting by composition on functions of the base-space. Through a range of benchmarks on analytic functions of increasing complexity and dimensionality, we demonstrate that NOs can match or outperform standard multilayer perceptrons and Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks in accuracy while requiring significantly fewer parameters and training time. As a real-world application, we apply a two-dimensional Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator (TFNO) to the nuclear chart, learning a correction to state-of-the-art nuclear mass models as a partially observed residual field. A TFNO ensemble reaches a held-out root-mean-square error of 198.2 keV, placing it among the best recent neural-network approaches while retaining high parameter efficiency and short training times. More broadly, these results introduce NOs as a scalable framework for finite-dimensional function interpolation, from analytic benchmarks to structured scientific data.

analysis.tldr: 将神经算子重新用作高效函数插值器，在参数效率和训练速度上优于MLP和KAN。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统神经网络（如MLP）在函数插值任务中参数效率低、训练时间长，而神经算子（NO）原本设计用于无限维函数空间映射，其潜力在有限维插值中未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将神经算子有效应用于有限维函数插值，并提升参数效率与训练速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入辅助基空间，将有限维函数视为通过复合作用在基空间函数上的算子，从而将神经算子框架用于函数插值。
contributions: 提出将神经算子重新解释为有限维函数插值器的新视角。
在解析函数基准和核质量模型残差校正任务上，验证了神经算子相比MLP和KAN在参数效率和训练时间上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂度递增的解析函数基准上，神经算子在精度相当或更优的情况下，参数和训练时间显著减少；在核质量模型校正任务中，TFNO集成达到198.2 keV的均方根误差，参数效率高且训练时间短。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有平滑性或结构性的函数插值任务。
辅助基空间的选择可能影响泛化性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将神经算子重新用作高效函数插值器，在参数效率和训练速度上优于MLP和KAN。

papers.title: Spectral Surgery: Class-Targeted Post-Hoc Rebalancing via Hessian Spike Perturbation
papers.abstract: The Hessian spectrum of trained deep networks exhibits a characteristic structure: a continuous bulk of near-zero eigenvalues and a small number of large outlier eigenvalues (spikes), confirming the relevance of Random Matrix Theory in deep learning. The spike count matches the number of classes minus one. While prior work has described this structure, no method has exploited it operationally to improve classification performance. We propose Spectral Surgery, a post-hoc optimization method that directly perturbs model weights along spike eigenvectors to rebalance per-class accuracy without retraining. We introduce (i) a spike-class sensitivity matrix that quantifies the directional derivative of each class's accuracy along each spike eigenvector, (ii) a constrained optimization of perturbation coefficients that targets weak classes while preserving strong ones, and (iii) an adaptive amplitude control that raises or lowers the perturbation budget based on iteration-level improvement signals. We obtain encouraging results on CIFAR-10 and ISIC-2019 on both balanced accuracy and standard deviation.

analysis.tldr: 利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰特征，通过后验权重扰动重平衡分类器各类别准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度网络 Hessian 谱存在尖峰结构，但尚未被用于提升分类性能，现有方法缺乏利用该结构的操作手段。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰特征，在不重训练的情况下重平衡各类别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Hessian 谱具有连续 bulk 和少量尖峰，尖峰数量等于类别数减一。
analysis.method: 提出 Spectral Surgery，沿尖峰特征向量扰动模型权重，通过尖峰-类别敏感矩阵和约束优化重平衡各类别准确率。
contributions: 提出尖峰-类别敏感矩阵量化每类准确率沿尖峰特征向量的方向导数
设计约束优化和自适应幅度控制，在提升弱类同时保持强类性能
analysis.experiments: 在 CIFAR-10 和 ISIC-2019 上获得平衡准确率和标准差方面的鼓励性结果。
limitations: 仅验证了图像分类任务，未涉及其他模态或更大规模数据集
方法依赖 Hessian 谱计算，可能对超大规模模型有计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用 Hessian 谱的尖峰特征，通过后验权重扰动重平衡分类器各类别准确率。

papers.title: APEX: Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination Metric for Image Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: As generative models achieve unprecedented visual quality, the gold standard for image evaluation remains traditional feature-distribution metrics (e.g., FID). However, these metrics are provably hindered by the closed-vocabulary bottleneck of outdated features and the assumptive bias of rigid parametric formulations. Recent alternatives exploit modern backbones to solve the feature bottleneck, yet continue to suffer from parametric limitations. To close this gap, we introduce APEX (Assumption-free Projection-based Embedding eXamination), a novel evaluation framework leveraging the Sliced Wasserstein Distance as a mathematically grounded, assumption-free similarity measure. APEX inherits effective scalability to high-dimensional spaces, as we prove with theoretical and empirical evidences. Moreover, APEX is embedding-agnostic and uses two open-vocabulary foundation models, CLIP and DINOv2, as feature extractors. Benchmarking APEX against established baselines reveals superior robustness to visual degradations. Additionally, we show that APEX metrics exhibit intra- and cross-dataset stability, ensuring highly stable evaluations on out-of-domain datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无假设的投影嵌入检验指标APEX，用于图像质量评估，克服传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数假设偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统图像质量评估指标（如FID）受限于过时特征的封闭词汇瓶颈和刚性参数化假设，而现代替代方法虽解决了特征瓶颈但仍受参数限制，亟需一种无假设、可扩展的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 现有图像质量评估指标存在特征瓶颈和参数假设偏差，导致评估不准确和泛化性差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统指标（如FID）因使用过时特征和刚性参数化假设而性能受限；现代方法虽采用现代骨干网络但仍有参数化局限。
analysis.method: 提出APEX框架，基于Sliced Wasserstein距离作为无假设的相似性度量，使用CLIP和DINOv2作为开放词汇特征提取器，实现嵌入无关的高维空间可扩展性。
contributions: 提出APEX，一种无假设、基于投影的嵌入检验指标，利用Sliced Wasserstein距离实现数学上严谨的相似性度量。
理论证明APEX在高维空间的有效可扩展性，并通过实验验证。
APEX对视觉退化具有优越的鲁棒性，且表现出跨数据集稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在图像质量评估基准上对比APEX与已有基线，显示其对视觉退化的优越鲁棒性，以及跨数据集稳定性。
limitations: 依赖CLIP和DINOv2作为特征提取器，可能受限于这些模型的能力。
未在更多样化的退化类型或真实场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无假设的投影嵌入检验指标APEX，用于图像质量评估，克服传统指标的特征瓶颈和参数假设偏差。

papers.title: Radiologist-Guided Causal Concept Bottleneck Models for Chest X-Ray Interpretation
papers.abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) in medical imaging aim to improve model interpretability by predicting intermediate clinical concepts before final diagnoses. However, most existing CBMs treat concepts as discriminative predictors of pathology labels, without explicitly modelling the underlying clinical generative process where diseases produce observable radiographic findings. We propose XpertCausal, a radiologist-guided causal CBM for chest X-ray interpretation which models pathology-to-concept relationships using a probabilistic noisy-OR framework. This generative model is then inverted via Bayesian inference to estimate pathology probabilities from predicted concepts. Radiologist-curated concept-pathology associations are used to constrain model structure to radiologist-defined clinically plausible reasoning pathways. We evaluate XpertCausal on MIMIC-CXR across pathology classification performance, calibration, explanation quality, and alignment with radiologist-defined reasoning pathways. Compared with both a non-causal CBM baseline and a causal ablation with unconstrained learned associations, XpertCausal achieves improved AUROC, calibration, and clinically relevant explanation quality, while learning concept-pathology relationships that more closely align with expert knowledge. These results demonstrate that incorporating clinically motivated causal structure and expert domain knowledge into CBMs can lead to more accurate, interpretable, and clinically aligned models for CXR interpretation.

analysis.tldr: 提出放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，通过噪声OR框架建模病理-影像征象因果关系，提升胸部X光片解释的准确性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型将概念视为病理标签的判别预测器，未建模疾病产生影像征象的临床生成过程，导致可解释性不足且与临床推理路径不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床因果结构（病理→影像征象）显式融入概念瓶颈模型，实现更准确、可解释且符合临床推理的胸部X光片诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出XpertCausal，使用概率噪声OR框架建模病理到概念的生成关系，通过贝叶斯推断从预测概念反推病理概率，并用放射科医生整理的病理-概念关联约束模型结构。
contributions: 提出放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，显式建模病理-影像征象的临床生成过程。
在MIMIC-CXR上验证模型在分类性能、校准、解释质量及与临床推理路径对齐方面的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上评估病理分类性能、校准、解释质量及与放射科医生定义的推理路径对齐程度，与无因果CBM基线及无约束因果消融对比。
limitations: 依赖放射科医生手动定义概念-病理关联，可能引入主观偏差。
仅在单一数据集（MIMIC-CXR）上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出放射科医生引导的因果概念瓶颈模型，通过噪声OR框架建模病理-影像征象因果关系，提升胸部X光片解释的准确性与可解释性。

papers.title: Differentiable Ray Tracing with Gaussians for Unified Radio Propagation Simulation and View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Explicit neural representations such as 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enable high-fidelity and real-time novel view synthesis, yet optimize for alpha-composited optical appearance rather than ray-intersectable geometry. In contrast, radio-frequency (RF) digital twins require deterministic multi-bounce paths, where the geometry dictates trajectories and their associated attenuation and delay. We introduce a framework enabling differentiable RF propagation simulation directly within visually reconstructed neural scenes, allowing point-to-point path computation between arbitrary 3D locations while preserving high-quality visual rendering. Unlike conventional RF simulation pipelines that rely on manually constructed meshes, we embed Gaussian primitives into a hardware-accelerated ray tracing structure as the underlying spatial representation. By extracting physically meaningful channel impulse responses from visual-only reconstructions, we provide cross-modal evidence that neural reconstructions can serve as unified spatial representations for both electromagnetic propagation simulation and photorealistic view synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可微射线追踪框架，将高斯原语嵌入硬件加速射线追踪结构，实现从视觉重建场景中统一进行射频传播模拟和新视图合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）针对光学外观优化，缺乏射线可相交的几何结构，而射频数字孪生需要确定性多跳路径，传统方法依赖手动构建网格，效率低且无法与视觉重建统一。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉重建的神经场景（如3DGS）同时支持可微的射频传播模拟，实现点对点路径计算并保持高质量视觉渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将高斯原语嵌入硬件加速的射线追踪结构作为底层空间表示，通过可微射线追踪计算任意3D位置间的多跳路径，提取物理意义的信道冲激响应。
contributions: 提出统一框架，在视觉重建场景中实现可微射频传播模拟。
证明神经重建可作为电磁传播模拟和逼真视图合成的统一空间表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯原语的几何精度，复杂场景下路径计算可能不准确。
射频模拟的物理真实性可能受限于视觉重建的几何细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可微射线追踪框架，将高斯原语嵌入硬件加速射线追踪结构，实现从视觉重建场景中统一进行射频传播模拟和新视图合成。

papers.title: Tracing Uncertainty in Language Model "Reasoning"
papers.abstract: Language model (LM) "reasoning", commonly described as Chain-of-Thought or test-time scaling, often improves benchmark performance, but the dynamics underlying this process remain poorly understood. We study these dynamics through the lens of uncertainty quantification by treating the "reasoning" traces, the intermediate token sequences generated by LMs, as evolving model states. We summarize each trace by an uncertainty trace profile: a small set of features describing the shape of the uncertainty signal over its trace, such as its slope and linearity. We find that across five LMs evaluated on GSM8K and ProntoQA, these profiles predict whether a trace yields a correct final answer with AUROC up to 0.807, improving markedly on recent related work. We reach AUROC 0.801 using only the first few hundred tokens of full traces, suggesting that errors can be detected early in the generation. A detailed comparison of correct and incorrect traces further reveals qualitatively distinct uncertainty profiles, with correct traces showing a steeper and less linear decline in uncertainty. Together, the results suggest that our method, grounded in decision-making under uncertainty, provides a principled lens for studying the generative process underlying LM "reasoning".

analysis.tldr: 通过不确定性轨迹轮廓预测语言模型推理轨迹的正确性，AUROC最高达0.807。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型的推理过程（如思维链）虽能提升基准性能，但其内部动态机制仍不清晰，缺乏有效的分析工具。
analysis.problem: 如何量化和预测语言模型推理轨迹的正确性，并理解正确与错误轨迹的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正确轨迹的不确定性下降更陡峭、更非线性；仅用前几百个token即可高精度预测最终答案正确性。
analysis.method: 将推理轨迹视为演化状态，提取不确定性轨迹轮廓（如斜率、线性度等特征），基于这些特征训练分类器预测轨迹正确性。
contributions: 提出不确定性轨迹轮廓方法，用于分析和预测LM推理轨迹的正确性。
在多个模型和数据集上验证方法有效性，AUROC达0.807，且早期检测AUROC达0.801。
揭示正确与错误轨迹的定性差异，为理解LM推理动态提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K和ProntoQA数据集上评估5个语言模型，AUROC最高0.807，早期检测AUROC 0.801。
limitations: 仅评估了数学和逻辑推理任务，泛化性待验证。
不确定性度量方法可能依赖模型具体实现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过不确定性轨迹轮廓预测语言模型推理轨迹的正确性，AUROC最高达0.807。

papers.title: POETS: Uncertainty-Aware LLM Optimization via Compute-Efficient Policy Ensembles
papers.abstract: Balancing exploration and exploitation is a core challenge in sequential decision-making and black-box optimization. We introduce POETS ($\textbf{Po}$licy $\textbf{E}$nsembles for $\textbf{T}$hompson $\textbf{S}$ampling), a novel framework that bridges uncertainty quantification and policy optimization. Our approach is grounded in the insight that policies trained with Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization implicitly encode an underlying reward function. Building on this, POETS bypasses the complex, nested process of training an uncertainty-aware reward model and separately fitting a policy to this model. Instead, we directly train a policy ensemble to capture epistemic uncertainty by matching implicitly encoded reward functions to online, bootstrapped data. To overcome the prohibitive compute and memory constraints of ensembling Large Language Models (LLMs), POETS utilizes an efficient architecture: the ensemble shares a pre-trained backbone while maintaining diversity through independent Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) branches. Theoretically, we prove that POETS implicitly conducts KL-regularized Thompson sampling and thus inherits strong cumulative regret bounds of ${\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$. Empirically, we demonstrate that POETS achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency across diverse scientific discovery domains, including protein search and quantum circuit design. Furthermore, it improves the optimization trajectories of reinforcement learning, proving particularly robust in off-policy settings with experience replay or in small dataset regimes.

analysis.tldr: POETS 通过共享预训练骨干网络和独立 LoRA 分支的高效策略集成，隐式实现 KL 正则化汤普森采样，在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中取得最优样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在序列决策和黑箱优化中，平衡探索与利用是核心挑战，但现有方法通常需要复杂嵌套过程来训练不确定性感知的奖励模型并单独拟合策略，计算成本高且难以扩展到大型语言模型。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地在 LLM 优化中集成不确定性量化与策略优化，避免嵌套训练过程，同时克服集成模型的计算和内存瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: POETS 框架：基于 KL 正则化策略隐式编码奖励函数的洞察，直接训练策略集成以匹配在线自助采样数据来捕获认知不确定性；采用共享预训练骨干网络和独立 LoRA 分支的高效架构。
contributions: 提出 POETS 框架，将不确定性量化与策略优化统一，避免嵌套训练过程。
理论证明 POETS 隐式执行 KL 正则化汤普森采样，具有强累积遗憾界。
在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中实现最先进样本效率，并在强化学习离线策略设置中表现鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现领域进行实验，并测试了强化学习中的离线策略和少量数据场景。
limitations: 可能对 LoRA 分支的多样性维持机制敏感。
理论遗憾界依赖于特定假设，实际性能可能受限于预训练骨干网络的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: POETS 通过共享预训练骨干网络和独立 LoRA 分支的高效策略集成，隐式实现 KL 正则化汤普森采样，在蛋白质搜索和量子电路设计等科学发现任务中取得最优样本效率。

papers.title: SIMI: Self-information Mining Network for Low-light Image Enhancement
papers.abstract: Poor lighting conditions significantly impact image quality, posing substantial challenges for image editing and visualization. Many existing enhancement methods aim at proposing complex models while neglecting the intrinsic information contained within low-light images. In this work, we propose the Self-Information Mining (SIMI) network, an innovative unsupervised framework that decomposes low-light images into multiple components based on bit-plane decomposition. Our approach allows mining intrinsic information without relying on external data. This not only accelerates model convergence but also improves performance and reduces computational overhead. The unsupervised nature of our method facilitates real-world applicability. Experiments conducted on standard benchmarks demonstrate that SIMI achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于位平面分解的自信息挖掘无监督低光图像增强网络，无需外部数据即可提升性能并降低计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光照条件严重影响图像质量，现有方法多关注复杂模型而忽略了低光图像本身的内在信息，且依赖外部数据，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在无监督条件下有效利用低光图像自身的内在信息进行增强，同时提升性能并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自信息挖掘（SIMI）网络，基于位平面分解将低光图像分解为多个分量，从中挖掘内在信息，无需外部数据。
contributions: 提出无监督的SIMI网络，利用位平面分解挖掘低光图像内在信息。
加速模型收敛，提升性能并降低计算开销，增强实际应用可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准数据集上达到最先进性能，但摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景泛化能力有限。
位平面分解的适用性可能受图像类型限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于位平面分解的自信息挖掘无监督低光图像增强网络，无需外部数据即可提升性能并降低计算开销。

papers.title: Head Similarity: Modeling Structured Whole-Head Appearance Beyond Face Recognition
papers.abstract: Many vision applications require identity consistency beyond strict biometric recognition, especially under non-frontal views or when facial cues are missing. However, conventional face recognition models enforce intra-identity invariance, collapsing appearance variations such as hairstyle or styling changes into a single representation, limiting their use in appearance-sensitive scenarios. To address this limitation, we introduce Head Similarity, a new formulation that extends identity-centric recognition to structured whole-head similarity modeling. Our approach explicitly captures intra-identity appearance variation and enforces hierarchical similarity ordering across identity and appearance states, enabling meaningful comparison even under occlusion or rear-view conditions. We construct a large-scale benchmark from long-form videos with weakly-supervised appearance states, covering diverse poses, occlusions, and temporal changes. As a first step, we develop a simple yet effective framework that jointly models identity discrimination and appearance-sensitive similarity through hierarchical supervision and identity-aware distillation. Experiments show that conventional face recognition models fail to capture appearance-dependent similarity, while our approach demonstrates the feasibility of structured whole-head similarity modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出头部相似度概念，建模结构化全头外观，超越传统人脸识别的身份不变性限制。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统人脸识别模型强制身份不变性，忽略发型、风格等外观变化，在非正面视角或面部遮挡场景下无法满足需要身份一致性的应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何建模结构化全头外观相似度，在保持身份区分的同时捕捉外观变化，实现遮挡或后视条件下的有意义比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统人脸识别模型在非正面视角或面部线索缺失时失败，因为其强制身份不变性导致外观变化被压缩。
analysis.method: 提出层次化监督和身份感知蒸馏的框架，联合建模身份判别和外观敏感相似度，并构建大规模弱监督基准。
contributions: 提出头部相似度新问题，扩展身份识别到结构化全头外观建模
构建大规模弱监督基准，覆盖多样姿态、遮挡和时间变化
开发简单有效的框架，通过层次化监督和身份感知蒸馏实现外观敏感相似度建模
analysis.experiments: 实验表明传统人脸识别模型无法捕捉外观依赖的相似度，而所提方法展示了结构化全头相似度建模的可行性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 弱监督标注可能引入噪声
框架在极端外观变化下的泛化能力待验证

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出头部相似度概念，建模结构化全头外观，超越传统人脸识别的身份不变性限制。

papers.title: RuleSafe-VL: Evaluating Rule-Conditioned Decision Reasoning in Vision-Language Content Moderation
papers.abstract: Platform content moderation applies explicit policy rules and context-dependent conditions to decide whether user content is allowed, restricted, or removed. A correct moderation outcome must therefore depend on which rules a case activates, how those rules interact, and whether the available evidence is sufficient. Current multimodal safety benchmarks largely reduce moderation to matching predefined final labels, leaving this underlying rule structure untested. As a result, a high benchmark score reveals little about whether a model applies the policy correctly or arrives at the correct label through superficial cues. To evaluate this rule-governed process, we introduce RuleSafe-VL, a benchmark for rule-conditioned decision reasoning in vision-language content moderation. Derived from publicly available platform moderation policies, RuleSafe-VL formalizes 93 atomic rules and 92 typed rule relations, yielding 2,166 context-sensitive image-text cases across three high-risk policy families. Its four diagnostic tasks decompose moderation into a rule-conditioned decision chain. They identify activated rules, recover rule interactions, judge decision sufficiency, and resolve outcomes once missing context is supplied. Experiments on 10 frontier, open-source, and safety-oriented VLMs reveal rule-relation recovery as the dominant bottleneck, where the best model reaches only 64.8 Macro-F1 and some safety-oriented models fall below 7 Macro-F1. Decision-state prediction also remains unreliable, peaking at 64.5 Macro-F1. RuleSafe-VL shifts moderation evaluation from final-label scoring toward diagnostic assessment of rule-conditioned decision reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出RuleSafe-VL基准，系统评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理能力，发现规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态安全基准仅匹配预定义标签，无法测试模型是否真正理解并应用平台政策规则，导致高分可能来自表面线索而非正确推理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估视觉语言模型在内容审核中基于规则条件进行决策推理的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈，最佳模型仅达64.8 Macro-F1，部分安全导向模型低于7 Macro-F1；决策状态预测不可靠，最高64.5 Macro-F1。
analysis.method: 从公开平台审核政策中形式化93条原子规则和92种规则关系，构建2166个上下文敏感图文案例，设计四个诊断任务分解规则条件决策链。
contributions: 提出RuleSafe-VL基准，系统评估VLM在内容审核中的规则条件决策推理。
通过四个诊断任务揭示规则关系恢复是主要瓶颈，并指出当前模型在决策状态预测上的不可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在10个前沿、开源和安全导向的VLM上实验，报告了Macro-F1指标。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三个高风险政策家族，可能不全面。
未提供模型在真实平台上的部署验证。

papers.title: When Losses Align: Gradient-Based Composite Loss Weighting for Efficient Pretraining
papers.abstract: Modern deep models are often pretrained on large-scale data with missing labels using composite objectives, where the relative weights of multiple loss terms act as hyperparameters. Tuning these weights with random search or Bayesian optimization is computationally expensive, as it requires many independent training runs. To address this, we propose a gradient-based bilevel method that learns pretraining loss weights online by aligning the composite pretraining gradient with a downstream objective. By exploiting the structure of the loss, the method avoids the multiple backward passes typically required by truncated backpropagation through the full model, reducing the overhead of hyperparameter tuning to approximately 30% above a single training run. We evaluate the approach on event-sequence modeling and self-supervised computer vision, where it matches or improves upon carefully tuned baselines while substantially reducing the cost of hyperparameter tuning compared to random or Bayesian search.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度的双层优化方法，在线学习预训练损失权重，使复合梯度与下游目标对齐，显著降低调参成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代深度模型常在大规模缺失标签数据上使用复合目标进行预训练，其中多个损失项的相对权重作为超参数，通过随机搜索或贝叶斯优化调参需要大量独立训练运行，计算成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地学习复合预训练损失中多个损失项的权重，避免昂贵的超参数调优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于梯度的双层优化方法，通过将复合预训练梯度与下游目标对齐，在线学习损失权重；利用损失结构避免全模型截断反向传播所需的多次反向传播，将调参开销降低到单次训练运行的约30%。
contributions: 提出一种高效的梯度基双层方法，在线学习预训练损失权重，无需多次独立训练运行。
在事件序列建模和自监督计算机视觉任务上，匹配或超越精心调优的基线，同时显著降低超参数调优成本。

limitations: 方法可能依赖于损失结构，对某些复合损失可能不适用。

papers.title: Vibe coding before the trend
papers.abstract: Early 2025 we ran a series of vibe coding challenges across four different student cohorts. The cohorts included 54 ICT students, 24 digital marketing students, and 7 journalism students at Fontys University of Applied Sciences (Netherlands), and 22 BA Communication students at North-West University (South Africa). From the student reflections, five major patterns emerged. Students reported that AI tools shifted their focus from syntax to higher-order thinking; they also described a skill shift from memorizing to evaluating; they viewed AI proficiency as career-essential; they framed their relationship with AI as partnership rather than replacement; and finally non-technical students showed the strongest appreciation for the accessibility these tools provide. This practitioner report documents what we observed during the classroom experiments, we reflect on how the landscape has shifted in the year since, and shares practical lessons for educators considering similar experiments. We present the observations as what they are: patterns from practice, not proven conclusions, in the beleif that sharing early stage experiences contributes to the overall field of AI and education.

analysis.tldr: 2025年初在四组学生中开展vibe coding挑战，发现AI工具将焦点从语法转向高阶思维、技能从记忆转向评估等五大模式。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编程工具快速发展，但缺乏对教育实践中学生实际体验和技能转变的系统观察，尤其是非技术背景学生的反馈。
analysis.problem: 探索AI辅助编程（vibe coding）在不同学科学生中的实际影响和模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但报告了五个观察到的模式：AI工具将焦点从语法转向高阶思维、技能从记忆转向评估、AI能力被视为职业必备、学生视AI为伙伴而非替代、非技术学生最欣赏可及性。
analysis.method: 在四个学生群体（ICT、数字营销、新闻、传播）中开展vibe coding挑战，收集学生反思并归纳模式。
contributions: 记录了AI编程工具在教育中的实际应用模式
为非技术背景学生的AI教育提供了实践见解

limitations: 样本量有限且非随机，结论可能不具广泛代表性

papers.title: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Renal Lesion Stratification in CT
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of open-source medical foundation models (FMs) raises a practical question: how well do their pre-trained representations transfer to clinically relevant but data-scarce classification tasks? Particularly in CT-based renal lesion classification, a push toward greater generalizability would be meaningful, as the field is constrained by inherently limited training data. We addressed this through a benchmark of three medical FMs on this specific task. This six-class problem spans common entities like cysts and clear cell renal cell carcinoma, alongside rare subtypes. Using a frozen feature-probing protocol, we compared FM embeddings against a handcrafted radiomics classifier and a 3D ResNet-50 trained from scratch. Models were trained on a composite dataset of 2,854 lesions and evaluated on an external test set of 234 lesions from The Cancer Imaging Archive. Our results reveal two key findings. First, FM performance (AUC 0.70-0.77) matched the from-scratch ResNet (AUC 0.72) while drastically reducing hardware demand, requiring only seconds on a CPU after feature extraction. However, the conventional radiomics baseline significantly outperformed all deep learning approaches, achieving an AUC of 0.88 (all p $\leq$ 0.002). This suggests that current generalist FM embeddings do not yet capture the fine-grained texture and shape heterogeneity driving histological subtype discrimination. Despite their potential in data-scarce settings, medical FMs did not surpass established models for renal lesion stratification, leaving radiomics as the current state-of-the-art.

analysis.tldr: 医学基础模型在CT肾病变分类中表现不如传统影像组学方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源医学基础模型（FM）快速增多，但它们在数据稀缺的临床分类任务中的迁移能力尚不明确，尤其是CT肾病变分类受限于训练数据不足，亟需评估其泛化性。
analysis.problem: 评估医学基础模型在CT肾病变六分类任务中的预训练表征迁移效果，并与传统影像组学及从头训练的3D ResNet-50对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基础模型（AUC 0.70-0.77）与从头训练的ResNet（AUC 0.72）性能相当，但传统影像组学基线显著优于所有深度学习方法（AUC 0.88），表明当前通用FM嵌入未能捕捉组织学亚型区分所需的细粒度纹理和形状异质性。
analysis.method: 采用冻结特征探测协议，比较三种医学FM的嵌入与手工影像组学分类器及3D ResNet-50的性能，在2854个病变的复合数据集上训练，并在234个病变的外部测试集上评估。
contributions: 系统评估了医学基础模型在CT肾病变分类任务中的迁移性能
揭示了当前基础模型在细粒度纹理和形状特征捕捉上的局限性，指出影像组学仍是该任务的最优方法
analysis.experiments: 在2854个病变的复合数据集上训练，在234个病变的外部测试集（来自The Cancer Imaging Archive）上评估，报告AUC指标。
limitations: 仅评估了冻结特征协议，未探索微调或适配器方法

papers.title: Alternating Target-Path Planning for Scalable Multi-Agent Coordination
papers.abstract: The concurrent target assignment and pathfinding (TAPF) problem extends multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) by asking planners to allocate distinct targets and collision-free paths to agents. Prior work on TAPF has relied exclusively on Conflict-Based Search (CBS), which tightly couples target assignment and pathfinding, resulting in compute-intensive, non-scalable solutions. In contrast, we propose an iterative refinement framework that decouples target assignment from pathfinding. Our framework builds on modern, fast, suboptimal MAPF solvers, such as LaCAM. Specifically, within a given time budget, it repeatedly solves MAPF for the current target assignment, identifies bottleneck agents via MAPF feedback, and refines the assignment. Empirical results show that feedback-driven reassignment loop is effective, enabling our framework to scale well beyond the reach of the state-of-the-art CBS-based solver while maintaining decent solution quality. This represents a solid step toward practical, large scale TAPF suitable for real-world setups.

analysis.tldr: 通过解耦目标分配与路径规划，提出迭代优化框架，显著提升多智能体协调的可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有TAPF方法依赖CBS紧密耦合目标分配与路径规划，计算密集且难以扩展，无法满足大规模实际应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何高效解决大规模多智能体同时目标分配与路径规划（TAPF）问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出迭代优化框架，解耦目标分配与路径规划：在时间预算内，使用快速次优MAPF求解器（如LaCAM）求解当前目标分配下的路径，通过MAPF反馈识别瓶颈智能体并重新分配目标。
contributions: 提出一种解耦目标分配与路径规划的迭代优化框架，可基于现代快速MAPF求解器构建。
实验表明该框架在可扩展性上远超基于CBS的现有方法，同时保持可接受的解质量。

迭代过程可能增加计算时间，需平衡时间预算与解质量。

papers.title: LAMES: A Large-Scale and Artisanal Mining Environmental Segmentation Dataset
papers.abstract: Mining operations are of utmost importance to the economy of some nations. However, such operations result in land-use change, very high energy consumption, and negative impacts on the environment, including soil erosion and deforestation. The mining process can impact an area much larger than the mining site itself. Adding to the negative externalities linked to mining is the fact that, in addition to government-sanctioned legal mining operations, illegal mining is widespread, including in various countries of Africa. The ability to monitor remote mining site activities can be useful, e.g., for the detection of illegal artisanal mining activities and their environmental impacts. An important outcome of such monitoring could include a better understanding of the interrelationship between mine facility attributes (e.g., mining types, processing methods, commodities, etc.) and their impact on the natural environment. In this work, we present a data set that contains 150 Large Scale Mining (LSM) sites and 870km^2 annotated area of Artisanal Small-scale Mining (ASM) sites. The metadata includes nine eminent LSM sections and 27 mining site attributes for each LSM site. We also discuss the data set's possible contribution to the research community, social and environmental consequences, and researchers' responsibilities from an ethics perspective.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个包含150个大型矿场和870km²手工小规模矿场标注区域的环境分割数据集，用于监测采矿活动及其环境影响。

数据集包含丰富的元数据，支持多属性分析。

papers.title: Online Goal Recognition using Path Signature and Dynamic Time Warping
papers.abstract: Online goal recognition in continuous domains poses two central challenges: efficiently encoding large trajectories and effectively comparing them. Recent work addresses these challenges by using custom state-space representations and metrics to compare observations against hypotheses. However, these approaches often overlook well-established encoding techniques used in other domains that offer substantial advantages. This paper introduces a novel method for online goal recognition that leverages path signatures, a compact, expressive representation of rough path theory that efficiently captures key semantic features of trajectories, enabling more meaningful comparisons between them. Experiments show that our method consistently outperforms the state of the art in predictive accuracy and online planning efficiency, while remaining competitive offline.

analysis.tldr: 利用路径签名和动态时间规整实现高效的在线目标识别。

papers.title: Intelligent Truck Matching in Full Truckload Shipments using Ping2Hex approach
papers.abstract: Accurate truck-to-shipment matching using GPS data is foundational for full truckload supply chain visibility, enabling real-time tracking and accurate estimated time of arrival (ETA) predictions. However, missing or corrupted vehicle identifiers prevent traditional matching approaches, leaving shipments without visibility. This paper presents Intelligent Truck Matching (ITM) 2.0, a machine learning system that addresses this critical gap by formulating matching as a probabilistic ranking problem. Our approach leverages Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing to discretize GPS pings into route similarity features, combined with temporal information, then applies LightGBM gradient boosting with threshold-based post-processing. Through rigorous evaluation including offline model selection (SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM), comprehensive ablation studies, and production shadow testing, we demonstrate substantial gains over rule-based baselines. ITM 2.0 achieves 26 percentage point precision improvement in North America and 14 points in Europe, while doubling coverage. Deployed in production at Project44 handling full truckload shipments, the system demonstrates robustness to geocoding errors up to 1 km, multiple candidate trucks, and sparse pings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Uber H3六边形空间索引和LightGBM的卡车-货物匹配系统，显著提升匹配精度和覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 全卡车运输中，GPS数据可用于实时跟踪和ETA预测，但缺失或损坏的车辆标识符导致传统匹配方法失效，造成货物无法被追踪。
analysis.problem: 在车辆标识符缺失或损坏的情况下，如何利用GPS数据准确地将卡车与货物进行匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将匹配问题建模为概率排序问题，利用Uber H3六边形空间索引将GPS ping离散化为路线相似性特征，结合时间信息，使用LightGBM梯度提升模型进行训练，并采用基于阈值的后处理。
contributions: 提出ITM 2.0系统，将卡车-货物匹配形式化为概率排序问题。
引入Uber H3六边形空间索引和LightGBM模型，在北美和欧洲分别实现26和14个百分点的精度提升，覆盖率翻倍。
analysis.experiments: 包括离线模型选择（SVM、XGBoost、LightGBM）、全面消融实验和生产环境影子测试，在Project44全卡车运输场景中部署。
limitations: 可能依赖GPS数据质量和采样频率。
阈值后处理可能引入额外调参需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Uber H3六边形空间索引和LightGBM的卡车-货物匹配系统，显著提升匹配精度和覆盖率。

papers.title: Benchmarking EngGPT2-16B-A3B against Comparable Italian and International Open-source LLMs
papers.abstract: This report benchmarks the performance of ENGINEERING Ingegneria Informatica S.p.A.'s EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B LLM, a 16B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 3B active parameters. Performance is investigated across a wide variety of representative benchmarks, and is compared against comparably-sized open-source MoE and dense models. In comparison with popular Italian models, namely FastwebMIIA-7B, Minerva-7B, Velvet-14B, and LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B performs as well or better on international benchmarks: ARC-Challenge, GSM8K, AIME24, AIME25, MMLU, and HumanEval (HE). It achieves the best performance for the longest context setting (32k) of the RULER benchmark. On the Italian benchmark dataset ITALIC, the model performs as well or better than the other models except for Velvet-14B, which outperforms it. Compared with popular MoE models of comparable size, the new model reports higher values than DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat on all considered benchmarks. It has higher values than Moonlight-16B-A3B on HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, and the 32k RULER setting, but lower on BFCL and some ARC and ITALIC settings. Finally it has lower values than GPT-OSS-20B on most benchmarks, including HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, ARC, BFCL, and the RULER 32k. When compared with popular dense models, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B reports higher values on AIME24 and AIME25 than Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Gemma-3-12b-it, and Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16, but lower values on ITALIC, BFCL, and RULER with a 32k context. When performance is aggregated across all benchmark metrics, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B shows higher performance than the Italian models under evaluation while achieving lower results than some of the most performant international models, in particular GPT-5 nano and Qwen3-8B. Taken together, our findings find the new model to be a step forward for native Italian Large Language Models.

analysis.tldr: EngGPT2-16B-A3B 在意大利语和国际开源 LLM 基准测试中表现良好，尤其在长上下文和数学推理上领先。
analysis.research_motivation: 意大利语 LLM 的发展需要评估本土模型与国际模型的性能差距，以推动语言模型在特定语言场景下的进步。
analysis.problem: 评估 EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B 模型在多种基准上的性能，并与同类意大利语和国际开源模型进行比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B 在国际基准上优于多数意大利模型，但在某些基准上落后于顶尖国际模型；MoE 架构在参数效率上具有优势。
analysis.method: 在 ARC-Challenge、GSM8K、AIME24/25、MMLU、HumanEval、RULER、ITALIC、BFCL 等基准上对比 EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B 与多个开源模型。
contributions: 提供了 EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B 的全面基准测试结果
揭示了该模型在意大利语 LLM 中的领先地位及与国际模型的差距
analysis.experiments: 在多个国际和意大利语基准上进行了系统比较，包括 ARC、GSM8K、AIME、MMLU、HumanEval、RULER、ITALIC、BFCL。
limitations: 未提供训练细节或模型架构创新
仅报告了基准分数，缺乏实际应用场景评估
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EngGPT2-16B-A3B 在意大利语和国际开源 LLM 基准测试中表现良好，尤其在长上下文和数学推理上领先。

papers.title: Drifting Field Policy: A One-Step Generative Policy via Wasserstein Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: We propose Drifting Field Policy (DFP), a non-ODE one-step generative policy built on the drifting model paradigm. We frame the policy update as a reverse-KL Wasserstein-2 gradient flow toward a soft target policy, so that each DFP update corresponds to a gradient step in probability space. By construction, this gradient is decomposed into an ascent toward higher action-value regions and a score matching with the anchor policy as a trust region. We further derive a simple, tractable surrogate of the otherwise intractable update loss, akin to behavior cloning on top-K critic-selected actions. We find empirically that this mechanism uniquely benefits the drifting backbone owing to its non-ODE parameterization. With one-step inference, DFP achieves state-of-the-art performance on several manipulation tasks across Robomimic and OGBench, outperforming ODE-based policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Wasserstein梯度流的非ODE一步生成式策略，在机器人操作任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于ODE的生成式策略推理成本高，且策略更新缺乏概率空间的几何解释，需要更高效且理论优雅的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种非ODE的一步生成式策略，使其更新过程具有概率流几何意义，同时保持高性能和低推理成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将策略更新建模为反向KL Wasserstein-2梯度流，分解为朝向高动作值区域的上升项和与锚策略的分数匹配信任区域项，并推导出基于Top-K评论家选择动作的行为克隆代理损失。
contributions: 提出Drifting Field Policy (DFP)，一种非ODE的一步生成式策略，基于Wasserstein梯度流进行策略更新。
推导出易于处理的代理损失函数，并证明非ODE参数化对漂移骨干网络的独特优势。
在Robomimic和OGBench的多个操作任务上取得SOTA性能，超越基于ODE的策略。
analysis.experiments: 在Robomimic和OGBench的多个操作任务上评估，DFP达到SOTA性能，优于ODE-based策略。
limitations: 可能对超参数（如Top-K选择）敏感。
仅在模拟环境验证，未提及真实机器人实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Wasserstein梯度流的非ODE一步生成式策略，在机器人操作任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: SOD: Step-wise On-policy Distillation for Small Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) is difficult to scale to small language models due to instability in long-horizon tool interactions and limited model capacity. While reinforcement learning methods like group relative policy optimization provide only sparse outcome-level rewards. Recently, on-policy distillation (OPD) has gained popularity by supplying dense token-level supervision from a teacher on student-generated trajectories. However, our experiments indicate that applying OPD to TIR leads to a critical failure mode: erroneous tool calls tend to cascade across subsequent reasoning steps, progressively amplifying student-teacher divergence and rendering the teacher's token-level supervision increasingly unreliable. To address this, we propose SOD, a step-wise on-policy distillation framework for small language model agents, which adaptively reweights distillation strength at each step based on step-level divergence. Therefore, SOD can attenuate potentially misleading teacher signals in high-divergence regions while preserving dense guidance in well-aligned states. Experiments on challenging math, science, and code benchmarks show that SOD achieves up to 20.86% improvement over the second-best baseline. Notably, our 0.6B student achieves 26.13% on AIME 2025, demonstrating effective transfer of agentic reasoning to lightweight models. Our code is available at https://github.com/YoungZ365/SOD.

analysis.tldr: 提出逐步在线蒸馏框架SOD，通过自适应调整蒸馏强度解决小模型在工具集成推理中的级联错误问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具集成推理（TIR）在小语言模型中因长程工具交互不稳定和模型容量有限而难以扩展，现有强化学习方法仅提供稀疏结果奖励，而在线蒸馏（OPD）虽提供密集监督，但在TIR中会因错误工具调用级联导致师生分歧放大。
analysis.problem: 小语言模型在工具集成推理中，在线蒸馏的密集监督因错误级联而变得不可靠，需要一种自适应蒸馏方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，在线蒸馏应用于TIR时，错误工具调用会在后续推理步骤中级联，逐步放大师生分歧，使教师提供的token级监督越来越不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出SOD（逐步在线蒸馏）框架，基于步骤级分歧自适应重新加权每个步骤的蒸馏强度，在高分歧区域减弱潜在误导的教师信号，在良好对齐状态保留密集指导。
contributions: 识别了在线蒸馏在工具集成推理中的级联错误失败模式
提出SOD框架，通过步骤级自适应加权解决该问题
在数学、科学和代码基准上实现最高20.86%的提升，0.6B模型在AIME 2025上达到26.13%
analysis.experiments: 在数学、科学和代码基准上实验，SOD相比第二好的基线提升高达20.86%，0.6B学生模型在AIME 2025上达到26.13%。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，若教师本身在工具调用上不准确则效果受限
步骤级分歧计算可能增加额外开销
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出逐步在线蒸馏框架SOD，通过自适应调整蒸馏强度解决小模型在工具集成推理中的级联错误问题。

papers.title: Curated Synthetic Data Doesn't Have to Collapse: A Theoretical Study of Generative Retraining with Pluralistic Preferences
papers.abstract: Recursive retraining of generative models poses a critical representation challenge: when synthetic outputs are curated based on a fixed reward signal, the model tends to collapse onto a narrow set of outputs that over-optimize that objective. Prior work suggests that such collapse is unavoidable without adding real data into the mix. We revisit this conclusion from an alignment perspective and show that collapse can be mitigated through curation based on multiple reward functions. We formalize the dynamics of recursive training under heterogeneous preferences and prove that, under certain conditions, the model converges to a stable distribution that allocates probability mass across competing high-reward regions. The limiting distribution preserves diversity and provably satisfies a weighted Nash bargaining solution, offering a formal interpretation of value aggregation in synthetic retraining loops.

analysis.tldr: 理论证明基于多元偏好的合成数据筛选可避免生成模型递归训练中的模式坍缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型递归训练时，若仅依赖单一奖励信号筛选合成数据，模型会坍缩到少数过优化输出，破坏多样性。先前研究认为不加入真实数据则无法避免，但该结论可能过于悲观。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入真实数据的情况下，通过合成数据筛选策略避免生成模型递归训练中的表示坍缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基于固定奖励信号的合成数据筛选会导致模型坍缩到窄输出集，而基于多元奖励函数（异质偏好）的筛选可以缓解坍缩。
analysis.method: 从对齐视角形式化异质偏好下的递归训练动态，证明模型收敛到在竞争高奖励区域分配概率质量的稳定分布，该分布满足加权纳什议价解。
contributions: 理论证明多元偏好筛选可避免合成数据递归训练中的坍缩，无需真实数据。
揭示收敛分布满足加权纳什议价解，为合成数据循环中的价值聚合提供形式化解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果依赖于特定条件（如偏好异质性程度），实际中可能难以严格满足。
未讨论多元奖励函数的设计与获取成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 理论证明基于多元偏好的合成数据筛选可避免生成模型递归训练中的模式坍缩。

papers.title: LLM hallucinations in the wild: Large-scale evidence from non-existent citations
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are known to generate plausible but false information across a wide range of contexts, yet the real-world magnitude and consequences of this hallucination problem remain poorly understood. Here we leverage a uniquely verifiable object - scientific citations - to audit 111 million references across 2.5 million papers in arXiv, bioRxiv, SSRN, and PubMed Central. We find a sharp rise in non-existent references following widespread LLM adoption, with a conservative estimate of 146,932 hallucinated citations in 2025 alone. These errors are diffusely embedded across many papers but especially pronounced in fields with rapid AI uptake, in manuscripts with linguistic signatures of AI-assisted writing, and among small and early-career author teams. At the same time, hallucinated references disproportionately assign credit to already prominent and male scholars, suggesting that LLM-generated errors may reinforce existing inequities in scientific recognition. Preprint moderation and journal publication processes capture only a fraction of these errors, suggesting that the spread of hallucinated content has outpaced existing safeguards.
