Together, these findings demonstrate that LLM hallucinations are infiltrating knowledge production at scale, threatening both the reliability and equity of future scientific discovery as human and AI systems draw on the existing literature.

analysis.tldr: LLM幻觉已大规模渗透科学文献，2025年arXiv等平台出现约14.7万条虚构引用，且错误偏向知名男性学者。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成虚假信息（幻觉）的严重性已被广泛认知，但其在真实世界中的规模、分布和后果缺乏大规模实证证据。
analysis.problem: 量化LLM幻觉在科学文献中的实际发生率、分布特征及其对学术公平性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：LLM采用后虚构引用急剧上升；错误在AI快速应用的领域、AI辅助写作特征的稿件及小型/早期职业作者团队中更突出；虚构引用不成比例地分配给知名男性学者，可能加剧科学认可中的不平等。
analysis.method: 利用科学引用的可验证性，审计arXiv、bioRxiv、SSRN和PubMed Central中250万篇论文的1.11亿条参考文献，统计不存在的引用。
contributions: 提供了LLM幻觉在科学文献中大规模传播的首个实证证据，估计2025年有146,932条虚构引用。
揭示了幻觉引用在作者团队特征和学者性别/声望上的系统性偏差，指出其可能加剧科学认可不平等。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基于1.11亿条引用的大规模审计。
limitations: 仅基于科学引用这一特定对象，可能无法完全推广到其他类型的幻觉。
保守估计可能低估实际幻觉数量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM幻觉已大规模渗透科学文献，2025年arXiv等平台出现约14.7万条虚构引用，且错误偏向知名男性学者。

papers.title: Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer: Decoupling Compute from Memory in Looped Language Models
papers.abstract: Recurrent LLM architectures have emerged as a promising approach for improving reasoning, as they enable multi-step computation in the embedding space without generating intermediate tokens. Models such as Ouro perform reasoning by iteratively updating internal representations while retaining a standard Key-Value (KV) cache across iterations, causing memory consumption to grow linearly with reasoning depth. Consequently, increasing the number of reasoning iterations can lead to prohibitive memory usage, limiting the practical scalability of such architectures. In this work, we propose Memory-Efficient Looped Transformer (MELT), a novel architecture that decouples reasoning depth from memory consumption. Instead of using a standard KV cache per layer and loop, MELT maintains a single KV cache per layer that is shared across reasoning loops. This cache is updated over time via a learnable gating mechanism. To enable stable and efficient training under this architecture, we propose to train MELT using chunk-wise training in a two phase procedure: interpolated transition, followed by attention-aligned distillation, both from the LoopLM starting model to MELT. Empirically, we show that MELT models fine-tuned from pretrained Ouro parameters outperform standard LLMs of comparable size, while maintaining a memory footprint comparable to those models and dramatically smaller than Ouro's. Overall, MELT achieves constant-memory iterative reasoning without sacrificing LoopLM performance, using only a lightweight post-training procedure.

analysis.tldr: 提出MELT架构，通过跨循环共享KV缓存和可学习门控机制，将循环语言模型的推理深度与内存消耗解耦，实现恒定内存的迭代推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环LLM架构通过多步计算提升推理能力，但标准KV缓存随推理深度线性增长内存，限制了实际可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 循环语言模型中内存消耗随推理迭代次数线性增长，导致深度推理时内存开销过大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准KV缓存在每次循环中独立存储，导致内存随推理深度线性增长。
analysis.method: 提出MELT架构，每层仅维护一个跨循环共享的KV缓存，并通过可学习门控机制更新；采用分块训练两阶段流程：插值过渡和注意力对齐蒸馏，从LoopLM模型微调得到MELT。
contributions: 提出MELT架构，实现推理深度与内存消耗的解耦，内存占用恒定。
设计分块训练两阶段流程（插值过渡+注意力对齐蒸馏），实现从LoopLM到MELT的高效微调。
analysis.experiments: 在Ouro模型上微调，MELT模型在保持与标准LLM相当内存占用的同时，性能优于同规模标准LLM，且内存远小于Ouro。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定循环架构（如Ouro），泛化性未验证。
训练流程依赖预训练模型，从头训练效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MELT架构，通过跨循环共享KV缓存和可学习门控机制，将循环语言模型的推理深度与内存消耗解耦，实现恒定内存的迭代推理。

papers.title: An Efficient Hybrid Sparse Attention with CPU-GPU Parallelism for Long-Context Inference
papers.abstract: Long-context inference increasingly operates over CPU-resident KV caches, either because decoding-time KV states exceed GPU memory capacity or because disaggregated prefill-decode systems place KV data in host memory. Although block-sparse attention reduces attention cost in this setting, sparsity alone is insufficient for end-to-end efficiency. GPU-only designs remain constrained by PCIe bandwidth and metadata memory overhead, while CPU-GPU hybrid designs still suffer from substantial GPU idle time and bottlenecks in CPU-side top-k selection and sparse attention computation. Fluxion is built on three key insights: output-aware KV budgeting, head-specific and granularity-aware sparse configuration, and cross-device coordinated execution for sparse attention over CPU-resident KV caches. Guided by these insights, Fluxion combines a lightweight head-property predictor, a granularity-budget selector, and a priority-based scheduler to jointly optimize budget allocation, sparse configuration, and CPU-GPU execution overlap. This co-design enables hybrid sparse attention to achieve both accuracy and system efficiency in long-context inference. Across 2 models, 3 benchmarks, and 40 tasks, Fluxion preserves quality well -- the worst average degradation is only -0.26 relative to FULL, while delivering 1.5$\times$-3.7$\times$ speedup over the strongest fixed sparse hybrid baseline, whose KV budget is only 0.05.

analysis.tldr: Fluxion通过CPU-GPU协同的混合稀疏注意力机制，在长上下文推理中实现1.5-3.7倍加速且质量损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存常驻CPU内存，GPU显存不足或分离式系统导致PCIe带宽和元数据开销成为瓶颈，现有GPU-only或CPU-GPU混合设计存在GPU空闲和CPU端top-k选择瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的混合稀疏注意力机制，在CPU驻留KV缓存场景下同时保证推理精度和系统效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Fluxion，包含三个关键组件：轻量级头部属性预测器、粒度-预算选择器和优先级调度器，联合优化预算分配、稀疏配置和CPU-GPU执行重叠。
contributions: 提出输出感知的KV预算、头部特定和粒度感知的稀疏配置、跨设备协调执行三个关键洞察。
设计Fluxion系统，实现混合稀疏注意力在长上下文推理中的精度和效率协同优化。
analysis.experiments: 在2个模型、3个基准、40个任务上评估，Fluxion相对于全注意力平均退化仅-0.26，相比最强固定稀疏混合基线（KV预算仅0.05）实现1.5-3.7倍加速。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件和系统环境，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论对更复杂注意力模式（如因果掩码）的适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Fluxion通过CPU-GPU协同的混合稀疏注意力机制，在长上下文推理中实现1.5-3.7倍加速且质量损失极小。

papers.title: The AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto
papers.abstract: Despite the widespread adoption of agile methods, achieving true agility at scale remains elusive. Large-scale agile frameworks remain largely human-centric and manual, relying on coordination meetings, artifact synchronization, and role-based handoffs that inhibit real-time adaptation. Meanwhile, rapid advances in AI, particularly large language models, have begun transforming software engineering, yet their potential for organizational-level agility remains underexplored. We present the AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto: a set of values and principles that redefine how large-scale software development is organized when AI becomes a first-class participant rather than a peripheral tool. The manifesto is grounded in six principles, parallel processes, intent-driven teams, living knowledge, verification-first assurance, orchestrated agent workforces, and reusable blueprints, that together shift development from a meeting-driven, document-heavy, sequential process to an intelligent, adaptive, continuously learning system.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI原生大规模敏捷软件开发宣言，将AI从工具提升为一级参与者，重新定义大规模软件开发的组织方式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大规模敏捷框架仍以人为中心、依赖手动协调，难以实现实时适应；AI（尤其是LLM）在软件工程中的应用潜力未被充分挖掘。
analysis.problem: 如何将AI作为一级参与者融入大规模敏捷开发，以克服传统框架的协调瓶颈和适应性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AI原生大规模敏捷软件开发宣言，包含六个原则：并行流程、意图驱动团队、活知识、验证优先保障、编排化智能体工作流、可复用蓝图。
contributions: 提出AI原生大规模敏捷软件开发宣言，定义AI作为一级参与者的价值观和原则。
提出六个原则，将开发从会议驱动、文档繁重、顺序流程转变为智能、自适应、持续学习的系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 宣言性质，缺乏实证验证。
原则的具体实现和落地挑战未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI原生大规模敏捷软件开发宣言，将AI从工具提升为一级参与者，重新定义大规模软件开发的组织方式。

papers.title: Hierarchical Task Network Planning with LLM-Generated Heuristics
papers.abstract: HTN planning is a variation of classical planning where, instead of searching for a linear sequence of actions, an algorithm decomposes higher-level tasks using a method library until only executable actions remain. On one hand, this allows one to introduce domain knowledge that can speed up the search for a solution through the method library. On the other hand, it creates challenges that go beyond those of classical state-space search. While recent research produced a number of heuristics and novel algorithms that speed up HTN planning, these heuristics are not yet as informative as those available in classical planning algorithms. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can generate effective search heuristics for HTN planning, extending the methodology of Corrêa, Pereira, and Seipp (2025) from classical to hierarchical planning. Using the Pytrich planner on six standard total-order HTN benchmark domains, we evaluate heuristics generated by nine LLMs under domain-specific prompting and compare them against the TDG and LMCount domain-independent baselines and the PANDA planner. Our results show that LLM-generated heuristics nearly match the coverage of the best available HTN planner, while substantially reducing search effort on 83% of shared problems.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的启发式函数在HTN规划中几乎达到最佳规划器的覆盖率，同时大幅减少搜索开销。
analysis.research_motivation: HTN规划依赖领域知识加速搜索，但现有启发式函数不如经典规划中的信息丰富，限制了规划效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM为HTN规划生成有效的搜索启发式函数，以提升规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用LLM在领域特定提示下生成启发式函数，并集成到Pytrich规划器中，在六个标准总序HTN基准域上进行评估。
contributions: 首次将LLM生成启发式的方法从经典规划扩展到层次化HTN规划。
实验表明LLM生成的启发式在覆盖率上接近最佳HTN规划器，并在83%的共享问题上显著减少搜索努力。
analysis.experiments: 在六个标准总序HTN基准域上，使用九个LLM生成启发式，与TDG、LMCount基线和PANDA规划器比较。
limitations: 仅测试了总序HTN域，未涉及偏序或更复杂层次结构。
依赖领域特定提示，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的启发式函数在HTN规划中几乎达到最佳规划器的覆盖率，同时大幅减少搜索开销。

papers.title: Cross-Attention and Encoder-Decoder Transformers: A Logical Characterization
papers.abstract: We give a novel logical characterization of encoder-decoder transformers, the foundational architecture for LLMs that also sees use in various settings that benefit from cross-attention. We study such transformers over text in the practical setting of floating-point numbers and soft-attention, characterizing them with a new temporal logic. This logic extends propositional logic with a counting global modality over the encoder input and a past modality over the decoder input. We also give an additional characterization of such transformers via a type of distributed automata, and show that our results are not limited to the specific choices in the architecture and can account for changes in, e.g., masking. Finally, we discuss encoder-decoder transformers in the autoregressive setting.

analysis.tldr: 通过时序逻辑和分布式自动机对编码器-解码器Transformer进行逻辑刻画。
analysis.research_motivation: 编码器-解码器Transformer是LLM的基础架构，广泛应用于交叉注意力场景，但其逻辑表达能力缺乏形式化理解。
analysis.problem: 为浮点数和软注意力设置下的编码器-解码器Transformer提供逻辑刻画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种新的时序逻辑，扩展命题逻辑，包含编码器输入的计数全局模态和解码器输入的过去模态；并给出分布式自动机刻画。
contributions: 首次给出编码器-解码器Transformer的逻辑刻画，使用新时序逻辑。
通过分布式自动机提供额外刻画，并展示结果对架构变体（如掩码）的适应性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 逻辑刻画可能未覆盖所有实际变体。
自动机刻画的计算复杂度未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过时序逻辑和分布式自动机对编码器-解码器Transformer进行逻辑刻画。

papers.title: Finite-Time Analysis of MCTS in Continuous POMDP Planning
papers.abstract: This paper presents a finite-time analysis for Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) in Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs), with probabilistic concentration bounds in both discrete and continuous observation spaces. While MCTS-style solvers such as POMCP achieve empirical success in many applications, rigorous finite-time guarantees remain an open problem due to the nonstationarity and the interdependencies induced by heuristic action selection (e.g., UCB). In the discrete setting, we address these challenges by extending the polynomial exploration bonus to UCB in POMDP setting, yielding polynomial concentration bounds for the empirical value estimation at the root node. For continuous observation spaces, we introduce an abstract partitioning framework and propose a finite-time bound on partitioning loss. Under mild conditions, we prove highprobability bound on value estimates in POMDPs with continuous observation space. Specifically, we propose Voro-POMCPOW, a variant of POMCPOW with f inite-time guarantees that adaptively partitions the continuous observation space using Voronoi cells. This approach maintains a finite branching factor while preserving the original observation generator. Empirical validation demonstrates that the proposed Voro-POMCPOW shows competitive performance while providing theoretical guarantees. Although our analysis focuses on continuous POMDPs, the techniques developed herein are also applicable to continuous MDPs, closing another gap on the MDP side.

analysis.tldr: 本文首次为连续POMDP中的MCTS提供了有限时间分析，并提出Voro-POMCPOW算法，通过Voronoi自适应分区实现理论保证。
analysis.research_motivation: MCTS在POMDP中应用广泛（如POMCP），但缺乏严格的有限时间保证，主要由于非平稳性和启发式动作选择（如UCB）带来的相互依赖。
analysis.problem: 为连续观测空间的POMDP中的MCTS提供有限时间收敛保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在离散观测空间，将多项式探索奖励扩展到UCB，得到经验值估计的多项式浓度界；在连续观测空间，引入抽象分区框架，提出分区损失的有限时间界，并设计Voro-POMCPOW算法，使用Voronoi单元自适应分区连续观测空间，保持有限分支因子。
contributions: 首次为连续POMDP中的MCTS提供有限时间分析，给出高概率值估计界。
提出Voro-POMCPOW算法，结合Voronoi分区实现理论保证与竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设（如观测生成器性质）。
Voronoi分区在高维观测空间可能计算开销大。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文首次为连续POMDP中的MCTS提供了有限时间分析，并提出Voro-POMCPOW算法，通过Voronoi自适应分区实现理论保证。

papers.title: DRIP-R: A Benchmark for Decision-Making and Reasoning Under Real-World Policy Ambiguity in the Retail Domain
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly deployed for routine but consequential tasks in real-world domains, where their behavior is governed by inherently ambiguous domain policies that admit multiple valid interpretations. Despite the prevalence of such ambiguities in practice, existing agent benchmarks largely assume unambiguous, well-specified policies, leaving a critical evaluation gap. We introduce DRIP-R, a benchmark that systematically exploits real-world retail policy ambiguities to construct scenarios in which no single correct resolution exists. DRIP-R comprises a curated set of policy-ambiguous return scenarios paired with a realistic customer personas, a full-duplex conversational simulation with tool-calling capabilities and a multi-judge evaluation framework covering policy adherence, dialogue quality, behavioral alignment, and resolution quality. Our experiments show that frontier models fundamentally disagree on identical policy-ambiguous scenarios, confirming that ambiguity poses a genuine and systematic challenge to LLM decision-making.

analysis.tldr: DRIP-R 基准测试揭示了 LLM 在零售领域政策歧义场景下的决策分歧。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中领域政策常存在歧义，但现有 Agent 基准大多假设政策明确无歧义，导致关键评估缺失。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM Agent 在真实零售政策歧义场景下的决策与推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型在相同的政策歧义场景下存在根本性分歧，表明歧义对 LLM 决策构成系统性挑战。
analysis.method: 构建包含政策歧义退货场景、真实客户画像、全双工会话模拟、工具调用和多裁判评估框架的基准。
contributions: 提出首个针对零售领域政策歧义的 LLM Agent 基准 DRIP-R。
通过实验证明前沿模型在歧义场景下存在系统性分歧。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅聚焦零售领域，可能不直接推广到其他领域。
基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有歧义类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DRIP-R 基准测试揭示了 LLM 在零售领域政策歧义场景下的决策分歧。

papers.title: OphEdit: Training-Free Text-Guided Editing of Ophthalmic Surgical Videos
papers.abstract: High-fidelity surgical video generation can greatly improve medical training and the development of AI, adapting these generative models for precise video editing remains a formidable challenge. Modifying surgical attributes, such as instrument tissue interactions or procedural phases is challenging due to the strict anatomical and temporal constraints. In this paper, we propose OphEdit, a novel training-free framework for the text-guided editing of ophthalmic surgical videos. Our approach leverages a deterministic second-order ODE inversion pipeline to capture Attention Value (V) tensors from the original video. By selectively injecting these stored tensors into the conditional Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) branch during the denoising phase, OphEdit rigorously preserves the intricate anatomical geometry of the eye while seamlessly mapping text-driven semantic modifications onto the video stream. Clinical evaluations demonstrates that OphEdit effectively handles complex surgical transformations, such as instrument swaps and procedural variations, with superior structural fidelity and temporal consistency compared to natural-domain video editors. Our work represents the first application of training-free video editing in the ophthalmic surgical domain, offering a scalable solution for generating diverse, annotated medical datasets without the need for exhaustive manual recording or costly model fine-tuning. The code and prompts can be accessed at https://github.com/ophedit/OphEdit

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的眼科手术视频编辑框架OphEdit，通过ODE反演和注意力值注入实现文本引导编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量手术视频生成可提升医学训练和AI开发，但现有生成模型难以实现精确视频编辑，尤其是手术属性修改面临严格的解剖和时间约束。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的情况下，实现文本引导的眼科手术视频编辑，同时保持解剖结构保真度和时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用确定性二阶ODE反演管道捕获原始视频的注意力值（V）张量，在去噪阶段选择性地将这些张量注入条件无分类器引导（CFG）分支，从而保留解剖几何结构并映射文本驱动的语义修改。
contributions: 首次将无需训练的视频编辑应用于眼科手术领域。
提出OphEdit框架，通过注意力值注入实现结构保真和时间一致的手术视频编辑。
analysis.experiments: 临床评估表明OphEdit在处理复杂手术变换（如器械交换、程序变化）时，相比自然域视频编辑器具有更优的结构保真度和时间一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖ODE反演的计算效率。
仅针对眼科手术视频，泛化到其他手术领域需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的眼科手术视频编辑框架OphEdit，通过ODE反演和注意力值注入实现文本引导编辑。

papers.title: Dependence on Early and Late Reverberation of Single-Channel Speaker Distance Estimation
papers.abstract: Single-channel speaker distance estimation has recently achieved centimeter-level accuracy in simulated environments, yet it remains unclear which components of the room impulse response (RIR) the model exploits and how performance depends on the recording conditions. In this work, we decompose simulated RIRs into four variants (full, direct-only, no-late, and no-early) using the mixing time estimated from the echo density function as the boundary between early reflections and late reverberation. We define four calibration scenarios, from fully calibrated (synchronised capture, known source level) to fully uncalibrated (arbitrary onset, unknown level), and evaluate all combinations on a matched dataset. Results show that without time calibration, mean absolute error (MAE) increases to $1.29$ m and the model extracts reverberation-based cues, with early reflections emerging as the most informative component. Further analysis against DRR, $C_{50}$, and $T_{60}$ confirms that estimation accuracy improves with stronger early energy and degrades in highly reverberant environments. When time calibration is available, the model achieves a MAE of $0.14$ m by extracting the propagation delay alone, regardless of the RIR content.

analysis.tldr: 单通道说话人距离估计中，早期反射是最关键的RIR成分，时间校准下模型仅依赖传播延迟即可达到厘米级精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 单通道说话人距离估计在模拟环境中已取得高精度，但模型依赖的RIR成分及性能受记录条件的影响尚不明确，理解这些因素有助于提升实际应用中的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 探究单通道说话人距离估计模型依赖的RIR成分（早期反射、晚期混响等）以及不同校准条件（时间、声源级）对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无时间校准时，模型依赖混响线索，早期反射是最具信息量的成分；有时间校准时，模型仅利用传播延迟即可达到高精度，忽略RIR内容。
analysis.method: 将模拟RIR分解为四种变体（完整、仅直达、无晚期、无早期），基于混响密度函数估计的混合时间划分早期反射与晚期混响；定义四种校准场景（从完全校准到完全未校准），在匹配数据集上评估所有组合。
contributions: 首次系统分析单通道距离估计中不同RIR成分的作用，揭示早期反射的关键性。
量化了时间校准和声源级校准对性能的影响，表明时间校准下模型仅依赖传播延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据集上评估了RIR变体与校准场景的组合，报告了MAE指标，并与DRR、C50、T60等声学参数进行了相关性分析。
limitations: 实验基于模拟RIR，真实环境中的泛化性未验证。
仅考虑单通道场景，多通道或移动声源情况未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单通道说话人距离估计中，早期反射是最关键的RIR成分，时间校准下模型仅依赖传播延迟即可达到厘米级精度。

papers.title: GASim: A Graph-Accelerated Hybrid Framework for Social Simulation
papers.abstract: Large-scale social simulators are essential for studying complex social patterns. Prior work explores hybrid methods to scale up simulations, combining large language models (LLM)-based agents with numerical agent-based models (ABM). However, this incurs high latency due to expensive memory retrieval and sequential ABM execution. To address this challenge, we propose GASim, a graph-accelerated hybrid multi-agent framework for large-scale social simulations. For core agents driven by LLM, GASim introduces Graph-Optimized Memory (GOM) to replace intensive LLM-based retrieval pipelines with lightweight propagation over a sparse memory graph. For the majority of ordinary agents, GASim employs Graph Message Passing (GMP), substituting sequential ABM execution with parallel updates by fine-grained feature aggregation and Graph Attention Network. We further introduce Entropy-Driven Grouping (EDG) that coordinates this hybrid partitioning, leveraging information entropy to dynamically identify emergent core agents situated in information-diverse neighborhoods. Extensive experiments show that GASim not only delivers a substantial 9.94-fold end-to-end speedup over the traditional hybrid framework but also consumes less than 20% of baseline tokens, significantly reducing costs while preserving strong alignment with real-world public opinion trends. Our code is available at https://github.com/Jasmine0201/GASim.

analysis.tldr: GASim 通过图加速和混合框架，实现大规模社会模拟的 9.94 倍加速和 80% 的 token 节省。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模社会模拟器对研究复杂社会模式至关重要，但现有混合方法（LLM 代理 + 数值 ABM）因昂贵的记忆检索和顺序 ABM 执行导致高延迟，亟需加速。
analysis.problem: 如何降低大规模混合社会模拟中 LLM 代理的记忆检索开销和 ABM 的顺序执行瓶颈，实现高效仿真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GASim 框架，包含三个组件：Graph-Optimized Memory (GOM) 用轻量级图传播替代 LLM 检索；Graph Message Passing (GMP) 用并行图注意力网络更新替代顺序 ABM；Entropy-Driven Grouping (EDG) 基于信息熵动态划分核心代理与普通代理。
contributions: 提出图加速的混合多智能体框架 GASim，实现大规模社会模拟的端到端加速。
引入 GOM 和 GMP 分别优化 LLM 代理和 ABM 代理的执行效率。
设计 EDG 动态协调混合分区，保持模拟与现实舆论趋势的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界舆论趋势数据集上，GASim 实现 9.94 倍端到端加速，token 消耗低于基线 20%，且模拟结果与真实趋势高度一致。
limitations: 可能依赖图结构质量，稀疏图设计可能限制复杂交互建模。
EDG 的动态分组可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GASim 通过图加速和混合框架，实现大规模社会模拟的 9.94 倍加速和 80% 的 token 节省。

papers.title: TRACE: Tourism Recommendation with Accountable Citation Evidence
papers.abstract: Tourism is a high-stakes setting for conversational recommender systems (CRS): a plausible-sounding suggestion can waste real money and trip time once a traveler acts on it. Existing CRS benchmarks primarily evaluate systems with a single Recall@k score over entity mentions, and tourism-specific resources add spatial or knowledge-graph context, yet none of them couple multi-turn recommendation with verbatim review-span evidence and rejection recovery. This leaves an evaluation gap for tourism recommendation that is simultaneously trustworthy, verifiable, and adaptive: recommend the right point of interest (POI) for multi-aspect preferences (such as cuisine, price, atmosphere, walking distance), justify each suggestion with verifiable evidence from prior visitors so the traveler can act without trial and error, and recover when the first recommendation is rejected mid-dialogue. We introduce TRACE, where each item is a multi-turn tourism recommendation dialogue with review-span citations and explicit rejection turns: 10,000 dialogues over 2,400 Yelp POIs and 34,208 reviews across eight U.S. cities, paired with 14 retrieval, planning, and LLM baselines, along with 25 metrics organized under Accuracy, Grounding, and Recovery. Across these baselines, TRACE reveals the Three-Competency Gap: LLM Zero-Shot leads in closed-set Recall@1 and rejection recovery but cites less densely than retrievers; non-LLM retrievers achieve surface-verbatim grounding but with low accuracy; Multi-Review Synthesis fails at recovery. The Grounding Score agrees with human citation precision (Spearman rho=+0.80, p<10^-20), and paired t-tests reproduce the per-baseline ranking (p<0.01 on the dominant contrasts). TRACE reframes accountable tourism recommendation as a joint target (right POI, verifiable evidence, adaptive repair) rather than a single-axis leaderboard.

analysis.tldr: TRACE 是一个旅游推荐对话数据集，要求推荐、可验证引用和拒绝恢复，揭示了现有模型在准确性、引用和恢复三方面的能力差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 旅游推荐是高风险的对话场景，现有基准仅用单一 Recall@k 评估，缺乏可验证引用和拒绝恢复能力，导致推荐不可信、不可验证且不具适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个同时满足准确推荐、可验证引用和拒绝恢复的旅游推荐对话系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了“三能力差距”：LLM Zero-Shot 在闭集 Recall@1 和拒绝恢复上领先但引用密度低；非 LLM 检索器实现表面逐字引用但准确率低；多评论合成在恢复上失败。
analysis.method: 构建 TRACE 数据集，包含 10,000 个多轮对话，每个对话带有评论跨度引用和显式拒绝轮次，并基于 14 个基线和 25 个指标（准确性、引用、恢复）进行评估。
contributions: 提出了 TRACE 数据集，将旅游推荐重新定义为联合目标（正确 POI、可验证证据、自适应修复）。
揭示了现有模型在准确性、引用和恢复三方面的能力差距，并提供了 14 个基线和 25 个指标的评估框架。
analysis.experiments: 在 14 个基线上评估，使用 25 个指标（准确性、引用、恢复），Grounding Score 与人类引用精度高度相关（Spearman rho=+0.80, p<10^-20），配对 t 检验重现基线排名（p<0.01）。
limitations: 数据集仅基于 Yelp 评论和八个美国城市，可能不具全球代表性。
未提供具体模型改进方法，仅揭示差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE 是一个旅游推荐对话数据集，要求推荐、可验证引用和拒绝恢复，揭示了现有模型在准确性、引用和恢复三方面的能力差距。

papers.title: FactoryBench: Evaluating Industrial Machine Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce FactoryBench, a benchmark for evaluating time-series models and LLMs on machine understanding over industrial robotic telemetry. Q&A pairs are organized along four causal levels (state, intervention, counterfactual, decision) instantiating Pearl's ladder of causation, and span five answer formats: four structured formats are scored deterministically and free-form answers are scored by an LLM-as-judge voting protocol. We propose a scalable Q&A generation framework built around structured question templates, present FactoryWave (a dense, multitask, multivariate sensor dataset collected from a UR3 cobot and a KUKA KR10 industrial arm), and construct FactoryBench as a large-scale benchmark of over 70k Q&A items grounded in roughly 15k normalized episodes from FactoryWave, AURSAD, and voraus-AD. Zero-shot evaluation of six frontier LLMs shows that no model exceeds 50% on structured levels or 18% on decision-making, revealing a wide gap between current models and operational machine understanding.

analysis.tldr: FactoryBench 评估 LLM 在工业机器人遥测数据上的机器理解能力，发现现有模型在因果推理和决策任务上表现不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业机器人遥测数据蕴含丰富的机器状态信息，但现有时间序列模型和 LLM 在工业场景下的机器理解能力缺乏系统评估，尤其是因果推理和决策层面。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个覆盖因果层次和多答案格式的基准，以评估模型对工业机器人遥测数据的理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本评估显示，前沿 LLM 在结构化因果层次上准确率不超过 50%，在决策任务上低于 18%，表明当前模型与工业机器理解之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 提出 FactoryBench 基准，包含基于 Pearl 因果阶梯的四级问答（状态、干预、反事实、决策）和五种答案格式，并设计可扩展的问答生成框架。
contributions: 构建了包含 70k+ 问答对的大规模工业机器理解基准 FactoryBench，覆盖因果层次和多格式答案。
发布了 FactoryWave 数据集，包含来自 UR3 和 KUKA KR10 的多任务多变量传感器数据。
揭示了当前 LLM 在工业机器理解上的严重不足，为未来研究提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 对六个前沿 LLM 进行零样本评估，结果显示结构化层次准确率低于 50%，决策任务低于 18%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖工业机器人遥测，可能不适用于其他工业领域。
LLM-as-judge 评分协议可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FactoryBench 评估 LLM 在工业机器人遥测数据上的机器理解能力，发现现有模型在因果推理和决策任务上表现不足。

papers.title: The Endogeneity of Miscalibration: Impossibility and Escape in Scored Reporting
papers.abstract: Eliciting truthful reports from autonomous agents is a core problem in scalable AI oversight: a principal scores the agent's report using a strictly proper scoring rule, but the agent also benefits from the report through a non-accuracy channel (approval for autonomous action, allocation share, downstream control). The same structure appears in classical mechanism-design settings such as marketplace operation. Our main result is an endogeneity: the principal's optimal oversight necessarily uses a non-affine approval function to screen types, yet any non-affine approval makes truthful reporting suboptimal under the combined objective whenever deviation is undetectable. The principal cannot avoid the perturbation that undermines calibration. This impossibility holds for all strictly proper scoring rules, with a closed-form perturbation formula. A constructive escape exists: a step-function approval threshold achieves first-best screening for every strictly proper scoring rule, because the agent's binary inflate-or-not choice creates a type-space threshold regardless of the generator's curvature. Under the Brier score specifically, the type-independent inflation cost yields a welfare equivalence between second-best and first-best; we prove this equivalence is unique to Brier (the welfare gap under smooth $C^1$ oversight is bounded below by $Ω(\text{Var}(1/G'') (γ/β)^2)$ for every non-Brier rule). Two instances develop the framework: AI agent oversight (the lead motivating setting) and marketplace operation (a parallel mechanism-design domain). The message for AI alignment is direct: smooth scoring-based oversight cannot elicit truthful reports from a strategic agent; sharp thresholds are the calibration-preserving design.

analysis.tldr: 在评分报告机制中，非仿射审批函数必然破坏校准，而阶跃函数阈值可恢复真实报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 可扩展AI监督中，如何从自主智能体获取真实报告是核心问题。传统严格适当评分规则假设智能体仅关心准确性，但实际中智能体还从报告获得非准确性收益（如自主行动批准、资源分配），导致激励扭曲。
analysis.problem: 证明在存在非准确性收益时，任何非仿射审批函数都会使真实报告不再最优，从而破坏校准；并寻找能保持校准的监督设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非仿射审批函数引入扰动，使得智能体在联合目标下偏离真实报告，且该扰动无法避免。
analysis.method: 理论分析：证明所有严格适当评分规则下非仿射审批导致校准破坏，并给出闭式扰动公式；提出阶跃函数审批阈值可恢复一阶最优筛选；证明Brier评分下福利等价唯一性。
contributions: 证明非仿射审批必然破坏校准，且对所有严格适当评分规则成立。
提出阶跃函数审批阈值作为构造性逃逸方案，实现一阶最优筛选。
证明Brier评分下二阶最优与一阶最优福利等价，并给出非Brier规则下的福利下界。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果依赖于智能体偏离不可检测的假设。
阶跃函数阈值在实际应用中可能过于刚性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在评分报告机制中，非仿射审批函数必然破坏校准，而阶跃函数阈值可恢复真实报告。

papers.title: Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation for Fast Probabilistic Inference
papers.abstract: Diffusion models achieve strong generation quality, diversity, and distribution coverage, but their performance often comes with expensive inference. In this work, we propose Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation (STMD), a teacher-free framework for accelerating diffusion model inference while preserving probabilistic sample generation. In contrast to score-based diffusion models, whose denoising parametrization models the mean of the posterior distribution, STMD distills the full transition map associated with the sampling stochastic differential equation (SDE). We parameterize these SDE transitions with a conditional Mean Flow model, yielding a one- or few-step stochastic sampler that retains the transition structure of the underlying diffusion process. This perspective is especially useful for downstream tasks that require stochastic inference, such as diffusion posterior sampling, inverse problems, and energy-based fine-tuning. Compared to recent distillation methods, STMD requires no pretrained teacher, bi-level optimization, or trajectory simulation and caching, enabling efficient and scalable training. We derive convergence bounds for our method in the Wasserstein distance, providing a strong theoretical foundation for our approach, and validate STMD on various image generation examples on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CelebA datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，通过蒸馏SDE转移映射实现扩散模型快速概率推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型生成质量高但推理成本高，现有蒸馏方法依赖预训练教师模型或复杂优化，限制了效率和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖教师模型和复杂训练的情况下，加速扩散模型推理并保持概率采样能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 蒸馏采样随机微分方程（SDE）的完整转移映射，用条件均值流模型参数化SDE转移，得到一步或几步的随机采样器。
contributions: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，无需预训练教师、双层优化或轨迹缓存。
推导了Wasserstein距离下的收敛界，提供理论保证。
在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA上验证了图像生成效果。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA数据集上进行图像生成实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续状态空间的扩散模型。
理论收敛界可能依赖于特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无教师蒸馏框架STMD，通过蒸馏SDE转移映射实现扩散模型快速概率推理。

papers.title: Towards Billion-scale Multi-modal Biometric Search
papers.abstract: Searching a multi-biometric database of a billion records for a country-level identity system requires pushing the limits of all aspects of a biometric system, including acquisition, preprocessing, feature extraction, accuracy, matching speed, presentation attack detection, and handling of special cases (e.g., missing finger digits). This is the first paper that gives insights into such a large-scale multimodal biometric search system, called Bharat ABIS, based on open-source architectures. The end-to-end pipeline of Bharat ABIS processes fingerprint, face and iris modalities through modality-specific stages of preprocessing (segmentation), quality assessment, presentation attack detection, and learning an embedding (feature extraction), producing a concatenated template of 13.5KB per person. We present a detailed analysis of the modalities and how they are integrated to create an efficient and effective solution for 1:N search (de-duplication). Evaluations on a demographically stratified gallery of 220 million identities, randomly sampled from 1.55 billion records in India's Aadhaar database, yield an FNIR of 0.3% at an FPIR of 0.5%, for adult probes (over 18 years). We also compare the performance of Bharat ABIS against three state-of-the-art COTS systems on a 20M gallery. Our system achieves a throughput of 100 searches per second on a gallery of 40M on a single server (8xNvidia H100 GPUs, 2TB RAM).

analysis.tldr: 首个十亿级多模态生物特征搜索系统Bharat ABIS，基于开源架构实现指纹、人脸、虹膜融合，在2.2亿身份库上达到0.3% FNIR@0.5% FPIR。
analysis.research_motivation: 国家级身份系统需要处理十亿级多模态生物特征数据，现有系统在规模、速度和准确性上难以满足需求，且缺乏公开的大规模多模态搜索系统研究。
analysis.problem: 构建一个能够处理十亿级记录、支持指纹/人脸/虹膜多模态融合、实现高效1:N去重搜索的端到端生物特征识别系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Bharat ABIS系统，采用开源架构，对指纹、人脸、虹膜分别进行预处理（分割）、质量评估、呈现攻击检测和特征嵌入学习，生成13.5KB/人的拼接模板，并设计多模态融合策略实现高效1:N搜索。
contributions: 首个公开的十亿级多模态生物特征搜索系统Bharat ABIS的设计与实现
在2.2亿身份库上达到0.3% FNIR@0.5% FPIR，单服务器40M库上每秒100次搜索的吞吐量
analysis.experiments: 在印度Aadhaar数据库的2.2亿身份（从15.5亿记录中随机采样）上进行评估，成人探针FNIR为0.3% @ FPIR 0.5%；并在2000万库上与三个商用系统对比。
limitations: 系统依赖特定硬件（8×Nvidia H100 GPU, 2TB RAM），部署成本高
仅评估了成人探针，儿童或特殊人群性能未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个十亿级多模态生物特征搜索系统Bharat ABIS，基于开源架构实现指纹、人脸、虹膜融合，在2.2亿身份库上达到0.3% FNIR@0.5% FPIR。

papers.title: Aquatic Neuromorphic Optical Flow
papers.abstract: Underwater environments impose severe constraints on conventional imaging systems and demand solutions that balance high-quality sensing with strict resource efficiency. While emerging event cameras offer a promising alternative, their potential in aquatic scenarios remains largely unexplored. Through the lens of neuromorphic vision, this work pioneers the investigation of motion fields that serve as key media for agile underwater perception. Built upon spiking neural networks, we introduce a self-supervised framework to estimate per-pixel optical flow from asynchronous event streams, elegantly bypassing the long-standing bottleneck of underwater data scarcity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves competitive visual and quantitative results against leading techniques while operating with superior computational efficiency. By bridging neuromorphic sensing and aquatic intelligence, this work opens new frontiers for lightweight, real-time, and low-cost perception on resource-constrained underwater edge platforms.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于脉冲神经网络的自监督框架，从事件流中估计光流，实现高效水下感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下环境对传统成像系统限制大，需要兼顾高质量感知和资源效率，事件相机虽有潜力但水下应用探索不足。
analysis.problem: 水下场景中缺乏标注数据，且现有方法难以在资源受限平台上实现高效光流估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于脉冲神经网络的自监督框架，从异步事件流中逐像素估计光流。
contributions: 首次将神经形态视觉引入水下运动场研究，为敏捷水下感知提供新媒介。
提出自监督框架，绕过水下数据稀缺瓶颈，实现高效光流估计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定水下场景验证，泛化性未知。
自监督方法可能在某些极端条件下性能下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于脉冲神经网络的自监督框架，从事件流中估计光流，实现高效水下感知。

papers.title: Breaking Spatial Uniformity: Prior-Guided Mamba with Radial Serialization for Lens Flare Removal
papers.abstract: Lens flares, caused by complex optical aberrations, severely degrade image quality especially in nighttime photography. Although recent restoration methods have made remarkable progress, most still rely on spatially uniform processing. They are failing to handle the region-dependent restoration demands of flare scenes, where saturated light sources should be preserved, flare artifacts removed, and background details recovered. To address this challenge, we propose DeflareMambav2, a prior-guided Mamba framework for lens flare removal. Specifically, we introduce a Flare Prior Network (FPN) to estimate flare priors and guide adaptive restoration. Besides, a novel radial serialization strategy breaks spatially homogeneous processing by performing flare-aware targeted sampling, and better supports long-range modeling in State Space Models (SSMs). Based on these priors, the backbone adopts a dual-level adaptive scheme. It explicitly preserves light-source regions to avoid over-processing, and applies curriculum-based restoration to the remaining contaminated areas while calibrating restoration intensity at the pixel level. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeflareMambav2 achieves state-of-the-art performance with reduced parameter burden. Code is available at https://github.com/BNU-ERC-ITEA/DeflareMambav2.

analysis.tldr: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架DeflareMambav2，通过径向序列化打破空间均匀处理，实现透镜耀斑去除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像恢复方法大多采用空间均匀处理，无法满足耀斑场景中区域依赖的恢复需求（如保留光源、去除伪影、恢复背景细节），导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 透镜耀斑去除中，如何实现区域自适应的非均匀处理以同时保留光源、去除耀斑伪影并恢复背景细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，耀斑场景中不同区域（饱和光源、耀斑伪影、背景）需要不同的恢复策略，空间均匀处理无法满足这种区域依赖需求。
analysis.method: 提出DeflareMambav2框架，包含：1) Flare Prior Network (FPN) 估计耀斑先验；2) 径向序列化策略实现耀斑感知的定向采样，打破空间均匀性；3) 双层级自适应方案，显式保留光源区域，对污染区域进行课程式恢复并像素级校准强度。
contributions: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架DeflareMambav2，实现透镜耀斑去除的区域自适应处理。
设计径向序列化策略，打破空间均匀性，支持SSM的长程建模。
引入双层级自适应方案，显式保护光源区域并动态调整恢复强度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到SOTA性能且参数更少。
limitations: 可能依赖先验估计的准确性，先验误差会影响后续恢复。
径向序列化策略在极端耀斑场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出先验引导的Mamba框架DeflareMambav2，通过径向序列化打破空间均匀处理，实现透镜耀斑去除。

papers.title: Operating Within the Operational Design Domain: Zero-Shot Perception with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Over the last few years, research on autonomous systems has matured to such a degree that the field is increasingly well-positioned to translate research into practical, stakeholder-driven use cases across well-defined domains. However, for a wide-scale practical adoption of autonomous systems, adherence to safety regulations is crucial. Many regulations are influenced by the Operational Design Domain (ODD), which defines the specific conditions in which an autonomous agent can function. This is especially relevant for Automated Driving Systems (ADS), as a dependable perception of ODD elements is essential for safe implementation and auditing. Vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual recognition and language reasoning, functioning without task-specific training data, which makes them suitable for adaptable ODD perception. To assess whether VLMs can function as zero-shot "ODD sensors" that adapt to evolving definitions, we contribute (i) an empirical study of zero-shot ODD classification and detection using four VLMs on a custom dataset and Mapillary Vistas, along with failure analyses; (ii) an ablation of zero-shot optimization strategies with a cost-performance overview; and (iii) a suite of reusable prompting templates with guidance for adaptation. Our findings indicate that definition-anchored chain-of-thought prompting with persona decomposition performs best, while other methods may result in reduced recall. Overall, our results pave the way for transparent and effective ODD-based perception in safety-critical applications.

analysis.tldr: 探索视觉-语言模型作为零样本ODD感知器的可行性，发现定义锚定链式思维提示效果最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统需遵守安全法规，而ODD定义了运行条件，但传统感知方法依赖任务特定数据，难以适应ODD定义的动态变化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉-语言模型实现零样本的ODD元素感知（分类与检测），以适应不断演变的ODD定义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 定义锚定链式思维提示结合角色分解表现最佳，而其他零样本优化策略可能导致召回率下降。
analysis.method: 使用四种VLM进行零样本ODD分类与检测，对比不同提示策略（如定义锚定链式思维、角色分解等），并提供可复用的提示模板。
contributions: 对四种VLM在自定义数据集和Mapillary Vistas上进行零样本ODD分类与检测的实证研究及失败分析
零样本优化策略的消融实验及成本-性能概览
一套可复用的提示模板及适应指南
analysis.experiments: 在自定义数据集和Mapillary Vistas上评估四种VLM的零样本ODD分类与检测性能，并进行失败分析和消融实验。
limitations: 仅评估了四种VLM，可能不覆盖所有模型
零样本性能可能受ODD定义复杂性和场景多样性影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索视觉-语言模型作为零样本ODD感知器的可行性，发现定义锚定链式思维提示效果最佳。

papers.title: Quality-Conditioned Agreement in Automated Short Answer Scoring: Mid-Range Degradation and the Impact of Task-Specific Adaptation
papers.abstract: Automated short answer scoring (ASAS) is shifting from discriminative, fine-tuned models to large language models (LLMs) used in few-shot settings. This paradigm leverages LLMs broad world knowledge and ease of deployment, but limited task-specific data may reduce alignment on complex scoring tasks. In particular, its impact on scoring partially correct responses that require nuanced interpretation remains underexplored. We investigate the relationship between the degree of task-specific adaptation of different models and quality-conditioned scoring agreement. We compare three LLMs (GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, Claude Opus 4.5) in few-shot mode, a fine-tuned BERT-based encoder, and a human expert on two open-ended biology items, using several hundred student responses and ground truth scores provided by a biology education expert. The results show that human-human agreement is highest and stable across the full quality spectrum. All AI models perform well on fully correct and fully incorrect responses, but exhibit substantial degradation on mid-range responses. This mid-range degradation is conditioned on task-specific adaptation: It is most severe in few-shot LLMs with few examples and decreases as task-specific data increases, with fine-tuned encoder models performing best. This mid-range degradation may lead to inequitable evaluation of responses produced by students with developing understanding. Our findings highlight the importance of quality-conditioned fairness, with particular attention to mid-range responses.

analysis.tldr: 自动短答案评分中，AI模型在中等质量回答上表现显著下降，且任务特定适应可缓解此问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动短答案评分正从判别式微调模型转向大语言模型（LLM）的少样本设置，但任务特定数据有限可能降低复杂评分任务的对齐性，尤其是对需要细致解释的部分正确回答的影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究不同模型的任务特定适应程度与质量条件评分一致性之间的关系，特别是中等质量回答上的退化现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有AI模型在完全正确和完全错误的回答上表现良好，但在中等质量回答上出现显著退化；退化程度与任务特定适应程度相关：少样本LLM退化最严重，随着任务数据增加而减轻，微调编码器模型表现最佳。
analysis.method: 比较三种LLM（GPT-5.2、GPT-4o、Claude Opus 4.5）的少样本模式、微调BERT编码器模型和人类专家在两个开放式生物学题目上的评分一致性，使用数百个学生回答和专家提供的真实分数。
contributions: 揭示了自动短答案评分中AI模型在中等质量回答上的退化现象，并证明其与任务特定适应程度相关。
强调了质量条件公平性的重要性，特别是对中等质量回答的关注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涉及两个生物学题目，可能限制泛化性。
未详细说明模型架构和训练细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自动短答案评分中，AI模型在中等质量回答上表现显著下降，且任务特定适应可缓解此问题。

papers.title: MAVEN: Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing
papers.abstract: While explicit reasoning trajectories enhance model interpretability, existing paradigms often rely on monolithic chains that lack intermediate verification, allowing early errors to cascade unchecked. This lack of modularity impedes granular auditing and compromises the epistemic trust required for high-stakes applications. We propose MAVEN (Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing), a blackboard-inspired framework designed to transform LLMs into deliberate reasoners through explicit role-decoupling. At its core, MAVEN operationalizes an adversarial Skeptic-Researcher-Judge loop, simulating expert deliberation by functionally separating logical defense from factual grounding. Experiments on OpenBookQA, TruthfulQA, HALUEVAL and StrategyQA benchmarks demonstrate that MAVEN delivers superior reasoning quality across four fine-grained metrics. Notably, MAVEN consistently outperforms latent reasoning models such as GEMINI-3.1-Pro and consensus-based baselines (e.g., ReConcile) by generating explicitly structured, modular, and verifiable deliberation trajectories, rather than relying on implicit internal states or post-hoc consensus. Moreover, comprehensive evaluations confirm that MAVEN is fully model-agnostic, serving as a strong and transferable reasoning booster that yields substantial performance improvements across diverse backbone models.

analysis.tldr: MAVEN通过多智能体对抗验证循环提升LLM推理的可验证性和准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理范式依赖单一链式推理，缺乏中间验证，导致早期错误级联且难以审计，在高风险应用中缺乏可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM转变为具有显式中间验证和模块化审计能力的审慎推理者。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MAVEN框架，采用黑板架构，通过对抗性的Skeptic-Researcher-Judge循环实现角色解耦，分离逻辑辩护与事实依据。
contributions: 提出多智能体验证-细化网络，实现显式结构化、模块化且可验证的推理轨迹。
在多个基准上验证了MAVEN优于潜在推理模型和共识基线，且模型无关，可作为强推理增强器。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenBookQA、TruthfulQA、HALUEVAL和StrategyQA基准上，使用四个细粒度指标评估，MAVEN优于GEMINI-3.1-Pro和ReConcile等基线。
limitations: 可能增加推理计算开销。
依赖多智能体交互，可能引入额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAVEN通过多智能体对抗验证循环提升LLM推理的可验证性和准确性。

papers.title: EggHand: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Egocentric Hand Pose Forecasting
papers.abstract: Forecasting future 3D hand pose sequences from egocentric video is essential for understanding human intention and enabling embodied applications such as AR/VR assistance and human-robot interaction. However, this task remains a highly challenging problem because egocentric hand motion is driven by complex human intent, exhibits highly dexterous articulations, and is observed under drastic viewpoint shifts induced by ego-motion. In this work, we introduce EggHand, a foundation-model-based framework for egocentric hand pose forecasting that unifies multimodal semantic reasoning with dynamic motion modeling. Our approach couples an action decoder from a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model, which captures the structured temporal dynamics of hand motion, with an egocentric video-text encoder that provides viewpoint-aware contextual information learned from large-scale first-person video. Together, these components overcome the brittleness of generic visual encoders under ego-motion and enable joint reasoning over motion, context, and high-level intent-without relying on body pose or external tracking. Experiments on the EgoExo4D dataset show that EggHand sets a new state of the art in forecasting accuracy, remains robust under severe ego-motion, and further enables controllable prediction via language-based task prompts. Project page: https://jyoun9.github.io/EggHand

analysis.tldr: EggHand 是一个基于 VLA 模型的多模态基础模型，用于从第一人称视频中预测未来手部姿态序列。
analysis.research_motivation: 从第一人称视频预测未来手部姿态对于理解人类意图和 AR/VR、人机交互等具身应用至关重要，但该任务因复杂的人类意图、高度灵活的手部关节运动以及自我运动导致的视角剧烈变化而极具挑战性。
analysis.problem: 解决从第一人称视频中准确预测未来 3D 手部姿态序列的问题，克服自我运动下通用视觉编码器的脆弱性，并实现基于语言的可控预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EggHand 框架，将视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中的动作解码器与第一人称视频-文本编码器相结合，前者捕捉手部运动的结构化时间动态，后者提供视角感知的上下文信息，实现运动、上下文和高层意图的联合推理。
contributions: 提出了 EggHand，一个用于第一人称手部姿态预测的基础模型框架，统一了多模态语义推理与动态运动建模。
在 EgoExo4D 数据集上取得了新的最优预测精度，在剧烈自我运动下保持鲁棒性，并支持基于语言任务提示的可控预测。
analysis.experiments: 在 EgoExo4D 数据集上进行了实验，结果显示 EggHand 在预测精度上达到新最优，在剧烈自我运动下保持鲁棒，并支持基于语言的可控预测。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模第一人称视频数据，数据获取成本高。
未提及对未见过的自我运动模式或极端场景的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EggHand 是一个基于 VLA 模型的多模态基础模型，用于从第一人称视频中预测未来手部姿态序列。

papers.title: LithoBench: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Remote-Sensing Lithology Interpretation
papers.abstract: Remote sensing lithology interpretation is fundamental to geological surveys, mineral exploration, and regional geological mapping. Unlike general land-cover recognition, lithology interpretation is a knowledge-intensive task that requires experts to infer rock types from various features, e.g., subtle visual, spectral, textural, geomorphological, and contextual cues, making reliable automated interpretation highly challenging. Geological knowledge-guided large multimodal models offer new opportunities, yet their evaluation remains constrained by the lack of benchmarks that capture lithological annotations, multi-level geological semantics, and expert-informed assessment. Here, we propose LithoBench, a multi-level benchmark for evaluating geological semantic understanding in remote sensing lithology interpretation. LithoBench contains 10,000 expert-annotated interpretation instances across 12 representative lithological categories, including 4,000 multiple-choice and 6,000 open-ended tasks organized into five cognitive levels: Identification and Description, Comparative Analysis, Mechanism Explanation, Practical Application, and Comprehensive Reasoning. We further develop an expert-in-the-loop, knowledge-grounded semi-automated construction pipeline, coupling multi sub-processes, e.g., structured geological image descriptions, to enhance geological validity and evaluation reliability. Experiments with multiple large vision-language models eveal substantial limitations in geological semantic understanding, particularly on higher-order explanation, application, and reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出遥感岩性解释多级基准LithoBench，评估大视觉语言模型在地质语义理解上的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感岩性解释是地质调查和矿产勘探的基础，但现有基准缺乏岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估，限制了地质知识引导的大多模态模型的可靠评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含岩性标注、多级地质语义和专家评估的基准来评估大视觉语言模型在遥感岩性解释中的地质语义理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，多个大视觉语言模型在地质语义理解上存在显著局限，尤其是在高阶解释、应用和推理任务上。
analysis.method: 提出LithoBench基准，包含10,000个专家标注的实例（12类岩性），分为4,000个多项选择和6,000个开放式任务，涵盖五个认知层次；并开发了专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程。
contributions: 构建了首个多级遥感岩性解释基准LithoBench，包含专家标注和五个认知层次的任务。
开发了专家在环、知识引导的半自动构建流程，确保地质有效性和评估可靠性。
通过多个大视觉语言模型的实验揭示了当前模型在地质语义理解上的显著局限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实验显示模型在地质语义理解上存在局限。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖12类岩性，可能不足以代表所有地质场景。
半自动构建流程可能仍存在标注偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出遥感岩性解释多级基准LithoBench，评估大视觉语言模型在地质语义理解上的能力。

papers.title: Tacit Knowledge Extraction via Logic Augmented Generation and Active Inference
papers.abstract: Tacit knowledge plays a central role in human expertise, yet it remains difficult to capture, formalize, and reuse in machine-interpretable form. This challenge is especially relevant in procedural domains, where successful execution depends not only on explicit instructions, but also on implicit assumptions, contextual constraints, embodied skills, and experience-based judgments rarely documented. As a result, current knowledge engineering pipelines struggle to transform tacit and process-centric knowledge into formally specified, machine-interpretable representations that can be queried, validated, reasoned over, and reused. In this paper, we introduce a neuro-symbolic framework that combines Logic-Augmented Generation and an Active-Inference-inspired approach for ontology-grounded Knowledge Graph construction. We evaluate the approach in a knowledge transfer case study in manufacturing, using assembly-like repair procedures from instructional videos as a reproducible proxy domain. Results show that the proposed solution improves completeness and semantic quality, advancing neuro-symbolic knowledge engineering for industrial domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理，从视频中提取隐性知识构建知识图谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐性知识难以形式化，现有知识工程流程难以将过程性隐性知识转化为机器可解释的表示。
analysis.problem: 如何从程序性领域（如制造维修视频）中提取隐性知识并构建可查询、验证和推理的知识图谱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 神经符号框架：逻辑增强生成（Logic-Augmented Generation）结合基于主动推理（Active Inference）的本体知识图谱构建。
contributions: 提出结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理的神经符号框架用于隐性知识提取
在制造维修视频案例中验证了方法在完整性和语义质量上的提升
analysis.experiments: 在制造领域的装配维修程序视频上进行知识迁移案例研究，结果显示完整性和语义质量提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域本体设计
主动推理的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号框架结合逻辑增强生成与主动推理，从视频中提取隐性知识构建知识图谱。

papers.title: Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding
papers.abstract: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is a widely used abstraction for multi-robot trajectory planning problems, where multiple homogeneous agents move simultaneously within a shared environment. Although solving MAPF optimally is NP-hard, scalable and efficient solvers are critical for real-world applications such as logistics and search-and-rescue. To this end, the research community has proposed various decentralized suboptimal MAPF solvers that leverage machine learning. Such methods frame MAPF (from a single agent perspective) as a Dec-POMDP where at each time step an agent has to decide an action based on the local observation and typically solve the problem via reinforcement learning or imitation learning. We follow the same approach but additionally introduce a learnable communication module tailored to enhance cooperation between agents via efficient feature sharing. We present the Local Communication for Multi-agent Pathfinding (LC-MAPF), a generalizable pre-trained model that applies multi-round communication between neighboring agents to exchange information and improve their coordination. Our experiments show that the introduced method outperforms the existing learning-based MAPF solvers, including IL and RL-based approaches, across diverse metrics in a diverse range of (unseen) test scenarios. Remarkably, the introduced communication mechanism does not compromise LC-MAPF's scalability, a common bottleneck for communication-based MAPF solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种局部通信模块增强多智能体路径规划中的协作，实现可扩展且性能优于现有学习方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体路径规划（MAPF）在物流、搜救等实际应用中至关重要，但最优求解是NP难的；现有基于学习的分散式求解器虽可扩展，但缺乏有效的智能体间通信机制，限制了协作效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可学习的局部通信模块，在不牺牲可扩展性的前提下提升多智能体路径规划中的协作与协调能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LC-MAPF，一个可泛化的预训练模型，通过多轮局部通信在相邻智能体间交换特征，增强协调决策。
contributions: 引入可学习的局部通信模块，专为大规模MAPF设计，提升智能体间协作。
LC-MAPF在多种未见测试场景中优于现有基于IL和RL的MAPF求解器，且不牺牲可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种未见测试场景中评估，LC-MAPF在多个指标上优于现有基于IL和RL的MAPF求解器。
limitations: 可能依赖局部通信的假设，在全局信息需求高的场景下性能受限。
预训练模型可能对特定环境分布敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种局部通信模块增强多智能体路径规划中的协作，实现可扩展且性能优于现有学习方法。

papers.title: Post-training makes large language models less human-like
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as surrogates for human participants, but it remains unclear which models best capture human behavior and why. To address this, we introduce Psych-201, a novel dataset that enables us to measure behavioral alignment at scale. We find that post-training -- the stage that turns base models into useful assistants -- consistently reduces alignment with human behavior across model families, sizes, and objectives. Moreover, this misalignment widens in newer model generations even as base models continue to improve. Finally, we find that persona-induction -- a popular technique for eliciting human-like behavior by conditioning models on participant-specific information -- does not improve predictions at the level of individuals. Taken together, our results suggest that the very processes that are currently employed to turn LLMs into useful assistants also make them less accurate models of human behavior.

analysis.tldr: 后训练阶段使大语言模型与人类行为对齐程度下降，且新模型更严重。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 被广泛用作人类参与者的替代，但哪些模型最能捕捉人类行为以及原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估后训练（将基础模型转变为有用助手的阶段）对 LLM 与人类行为对齐程度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后训练一致地降低了模型与人类行为的对齐，且新模型世代中这种错位加剧，而基础模型仍在改进。
analysis.method: 引入 Psych-201 数据集，测量行为对齐；对比基础模型与后训练模型；测试角色诱导技术。
contributions: 构建 Psych-201 数据集用于大规模行为对齐测量
发现后训练普遍降低 LLM 与人类行为对齐，且新模型更严重
揭示角色诱导在个体层面无法改善预测
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估特定数据集 Psych-201，可能不覆盖所有人类行为维度
未深入分析后训练中具体哪些步骤导致对齐下降
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 后训练阶段使大语言模型与人类行为对齐程度下降，且新模型更严重。

papers.title: Inference Time Causal Probing in LLMs
papers.abstract: Causal probing methods aim to test and control how internal representations influence the behavior of generative models. In causal probing, an intervention modifies hidden states so that a property takes on a different value. Most existing approaches define such interventions by training an auxiliary probe classifier, which ties the method to a specific task or model and risks misalignment with the model's predictive geometry. We propose Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI), a probe-free, gradient-based technique that directly steers hidden states using the model's native output. HDMI applies a margin objective that increases the probability of a target continuation while decreasing that of the source, without relying on probe classifiers. We further introduce a lookahead variant (LA-HDMI) for text editing that backpropagates through the softmax embeddings, modifying the current hidden state so that the likelihood of user-specified tokens increases in next token generations while preserving fluency. To evaluate interventions, we measure completeness (whether the targeted property changes as intended) and selectivity (whether unrelated properties are preserved), and report their harmonic mean as an overall measure of reliability. HDMI consistently achieves higher reliability than prior methods on the LGD agreement corpus and the CausalGym benchmark, across Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct, and Pythia-70M.

analysis.tldr: 提出无探针的因果干预方法HDMI，利用模型原生输出直接调控隐藏状态，在LLM因果探测中取得更高可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果探测方法依赖辅助探针分类器定义干预，这会导致方法绑定于特定任务或模型，且可能与模型的预测几何结构不一致，限制了通用性和准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用探针分类器的情况下，直接利用模型原生输出对LLM隐藏状态进行因果干预，以可靠地测试和控制内部表征对生成行为的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Hidden-state Driven Margin Intervention (HDMI)，一种无探针、基于梯度的技术，通过边际目标直接调整隐藏状态，增加目标续写概率并降低源续写概率；并引入前瞻变体LA-HDMI用于文本编辑，通过softmax嵌入反向传播修改当前隐藏状态以提升用户指定token的似然性。
contributions: 提出无探针的因果干预方法HDMI，避免探针与模型几何结构的不对齐。
引入LA-HDMI变体实现文本编辑中的可控生成。
定义完整性和选择性指标及其调和均值作为干预可靠性度量。
analysis.experiments: 在LGD agreement语料库和CausalGym基准上，使用Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct和Pythia-70M模型，HDMI在可靠性上一致优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能对长文本或复杂任务的计算开销较高。
梯度反向传播可能引入额外噪声或训练不稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无探针的因果干预方法HDMI，利用模型原生输出直接调控隐藏状态，在LLM因果探测中取得更高可靠性。

papers.title: Safe, or Simply Incapable? Rethinking Safety Evaluation for Phone-Use Agents
papers.abstract: When a phone-use agent avoids harm, does that show safety, or simply inability to act? Existing evaluations often cannot tell. A harmful outcome may be avoided because the agent recognized the risk and chose the safe action, or because it failed to understand the screen or execute any relevant action at all. These cases have different causes and call for different fixes, yet current benchmarks often merge them under task success, refusal, or final harmful outcome. We address this problem with PhoneSafety, a benchmark of 700 safety-critical moments drawn from real phone interactions across more than 130 apps. Each instance isolates the next decision at a risky moment and asks a simple question: does the model take the safe action, take the unsafe action, or fail to do anything useful? We evaluate eight representative phone-use agents under this framework. Our results reveal two main patterns. First, stronger general phone-use ability does not reliably imply safer choices at risky moments. Models that perform better on ordinary app tasks are not always the ones that behave more safely when the next action matters. Second, failures to do anything useful behave like a capability signal rather than a safety signal: they are concentrated in more visually and operationally demanding settings and remain stable when the evaluation protocol changes. Across models, failures split into two recurring patterns: unsafe choices in settings where the model can act but chooses wrongly, and inability to act in more visually and operationally demanding screens. Overall, a harmless outcome is not enough to count as evidence of safety. Evaluating phone-use agents requires separating unsafe judgment from inability to act.

analysis.tldr: PhoneSafety基准揭示：手机操作智能体的无害结果可能源于能力不足而非安全对齐，需区分不安全判断与无法行动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全评估无法区分智能体避免伤害是出于安全对齐还是能力不足，导致误判安全水平，阻碍针对性改进。
analysis.problem: 如何设计评估框架以区分手机操作智能体的不安全行为与因能力不足导致的无法行动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更强的通用手机操作能力并不保证更安全的选择；无法行动模式集中在视觉和操作更复杂的场景，且随评估协议变化保持稳定，更像能力信号而非安全信号。
analysis.method: 构建PhoneSafety基准，包含700个来自130+真实应用的安全关键时刻，每个实例要求模型在安全行动、不安全行动或无法行动中做出选择。
contributions: 提出PhoneSafety基准，用于区分手机操作智能体的不安全行为与能力不足导致的无法行动。
通过评估8个代表性智能体，揭示无害结果不能作为安全证据，需分离不安全判断与无法行动。
analysis.experiments: 评估了8个代表性手机操作智能体，发现两个主要模式：更强的通用能力不保证更安全的选择；无法行动模式集中在复杂场景且稳定。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖130+应用，可能无法代表所有手机交互场景。
未提供具体模型性能数值或对比基线。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhoneSafety基准揭示：手机操作智能体的无害结果可能源于能力不足而非安全对齐，需区分不安全判断与无法行动。

papers.title: FS-I2P:A Hierarchical Focus-Sweep Registration Network with Dynamically Allocated Depth
papers.abstract: Image-to-point cloud registration is often challenged by viewpoint changes, cross-modal discrepancies, and repetitive textures, which induce scale ambiguity and consequently lead to erroneous correspondences. Recent detection-free methods alleviate this issue by leveraging multi-scale features and transformer-based interactions. However, they still suffer from attention drift across layers and intra-scale inconsistencies, hindering precise registration. Inspired by human behavior, we propose a ``Focus--Sweep'' paradigm and develop a Hierarchical Focus--Sweep Interaction Module within an SSM-based framework to enhance multi-level cross-modal feature association. In addition, we introduce a Dynamic Layer Allocation Strategy that adaptively determines the iteration depth to better exploit geometric constraints and improve matching robustness. Extensive experiments and ablations on two benchmarks, RGB-D Scenes V2 and 7-Scenes, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层聚焦扫描配准网络，通过动态分配深度和SSM框架提升图像与点云配准精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像到点云配准面临视角变化、跨模态差异和重复纹理导致的尺度模糊问题，现有无检测方法虽利用多尺度特征和Transformer交互，但仍存在层间注意力漂移和层内不一致性，阻碍精确配准。
analysis.problem: 解决图像与点云配准中因尺度模糊导致的错误对应问题，特别是跨层注意力漂移和层内不一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有检测免费方法存在注意力漂移和层内不一致性，导致配准精度受限。
analysis.method: 提出“聚焦-扫描”范式，基于SSM框架构建分层聚焦扫描交互模块，并引入动态层分配策略自适应确定迭代深度。
contributions: 提出Focus-Sweep范式和分层交互模块，增强多级跨模态特征关联。
设计动态层分配策略，自适应确定迭代深度以利用几何约束。
analysis.experiments: 在RGB-D Scenes V2和7-Scenes两个基准上进行了大量实验和消融研究，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对极端视角变化或严重遮挡场景鲁棒性不足。
动态层分配策略的计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层聚焦扫描配准网络，通过动态分配深度和SSM框架提升图像与点云配准精度。

papers.title: Nürnberg NLP at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Axis Voter Ensembles for Psychological Defence Mechanism Classification
papers.abstract: Detecting levels of psychological defence mechanisms in supportive conversations is inherently ambiguous. In the PsyDefDetect shared task at BioNLP 2026 the eight positive defence categories share surface language and differ only in pragmatic function and trained raters reach only moderate inter-annotator agreement. On such a task the decisive lever is not a stronger single model but error independence, since any single representation will waver on the overlapping defence boundaries. We translate this insight into a 9-voter ensemble spanning three orthogonal axes: class granularity (all nine classes for the gatekeeper, only the eight defence classes for the specialists), training method (generative and discriminative) and base model. The system reaches $F1_{test}{=}.420$ on the hidden test set, placing first among 21 registered teams.

analysis.tldr: 通过多轴投票集成（9个投票器）在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第一名（F1=0.420）。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理防御机制检测具有内在歧义性，不同类别共享表面语言，仅语用功能不同，标注者间一致性低，单一模型难以区分重叠的防御边界。
analysis.problem: 在支持性对话中准确分类八种积极心理防御机制，克服类别间表面语言重叠和标注歧义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，由于类别间共享表面语言且仅语用功能不同，标注者间一致性仅为中等，单一模型在重叠边界上表现不稳定。
analysis.method: 构建9个投票器的集成系统，沿三个正交轴变化：类别粒度（门控器用全部9类，专家只用8个防御类）、训练方法（生成式和判别式）和基础模型。
contributions: 提出多轴投票集成方法，利用错误独立性提升分类性能。
在PsyDefDetect共享任务中取得第一名，F1=0.420，超过21个参赛队伍。
analysis.experiments: 在PsyDefDetect共享任务的隐藏测试集上评估，F1=0.420，排名第一。
limitations: F1值仅为0.420，绝对性能仍有提升空间。
集成方法计算开销较大，可能不适用于实时场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多轴投票集成（9个投票器）在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第一名（F1=0.420）。

papers.title: SAM 3D Animal: Promptable Animal 3D Reconstruction from Images in the Wild
papers.abstract: 3D animal reconstruction in the wild remains challenging due to large species variation, frequent occlusions, and the prevalence of multi-animal scenes, while existing methods predominantly focus on single-animal settings. We present SAM 3D Animal, the first promptable framework for multi-animal 3D reconstruction from a single image. Built on the SMAL+ parametric animal model, our method jointly reconstructs multiple instances and supports flexible prompts in the form of keypoints and masks which enable more reliable disambiguation in crowded and occluded scenes. To train such a model, we further introduce Herd3D, a multi-animal 3D dataset containing over 5K images, designed to increase diversity in species, interactions, and occlusion patterns. Experiments on the Animal3D, APTv2, and Animal Kingdom datasets show that our framework achieves state-of-the-art results over both existing model-based and model-free methods, demonstrating a scalable and effective solution for prompt-driven animal 3D reconstruction in the wild.

analysis.tldr: 首个支持单图多动物3D重建的提示驱动框架，结合SMAL+模型与关键点/掩码提示，并引入多动物数据集Herd3D。
analysis.research_motivation: 野外动物3D重建因物种多样、频繁遮挡和多动物场景而极具挑战，现有方法主要针对单动物场景，缺乏处理多实例和交互的能力。
analysis.problem: 从单张野外图像中实现多动物3D重建，需解决物种差异、遮挡和多实例歧义问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于SMAL+参数化动物模型，构建提示驱动框架，支持关键点和掩码作为灵活提示，联合重建多个实例；同时引入多动物3D数据集Herd3D（5000+图像）以增加物种、交互和遮挡模式的多样性。
contributions: 提出首个提示驱动的多动物3D重建框架SAM 3D Animal，支持关键点和掩码提示。
构建多动物3D数据集Herd3D，包含5000+图像，提升物种和遮挡多样性。
在Animal3D、APTv2和Animal Kingdom数据集上达到SOTA，优于现有基于模型和无模型方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Animal3D、APTv2和Animal Kingdom数据集上评估，与现有基于模型和无模型方法对比，取得SOTA结果。
limitations: 依赖SMAL+参数模型，可能无法覆盖所有动物形态。
提示（关键点/掩码）的获取可能增加用户负担。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个支持单图多动物3D重建的提示驱动框架，结合SMAL+模型与关键点/掩码提示，并引入多动物数据集Herd3D。

papers.title: Mathematical Reasoning via Intervention-Based Time-Series Causal Discovery Using LLMs as Concept Mastery Simulators
papers.abstract: Recent methods for improving LLM mathematical reasoning, whether through MCTS-based test-time search or causal graph-guided knowledge injection, cannot identify which concepts causally contribute to a correct answer, as the observed association may be spurious, driven by confounders such as problem difficulty. We propose CIKA (Causal Intervention for Knowledge Activation), a framework that uses the LLM itself as an interventional simulator: a prompt sets the concept state to ``mastered'' and the correctness change estimates the causal effect. We formalize this quantity as an Interventional Capability Probe (ICP), which diagnoses whether the LLM can use a given concept -- distinct from merely possessing knowledge. Because the intervention exogenously sets the concept state independently of problem difficulty, ICP separates confounding that observational methods cannot. On 67 screened problems, the ICP of the top-ranked concept (+0.219) is significantly larger than that of the negative control (+0.039; paired $t$-test, $p < 10^{-6}$, Cohen's $d = 0.86$), confirming that the probe discriminates causally relevant concepts from irrelevant ones. Analysis of 601 Omni-MATH problems further shows that solved problems have 6.1$\times$ higher ATE than unsolved ones (0.338 vs. 0.055), confirming that ICP is predictive of problem-solving success. With a 7B-parameter LLM whose weights are entirely frozen, CIKA achieves 69.7\% on the contamination-free Omni-MATH-Rule benchmark and 64.0\% overall, compared to 60.5\% for o1-mini, and 97.2\% on GSM8K, 46--50\% on AIME 2024--2026, and 46.2\% on MathArena. The Causal Knowledge Activation component contributes 33.8\% of correct answers on problems where the base model alone fails, demonstrating that the LLM already possessed but had not activated the requisite knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM自身作为干预模拟器，通过因果干预识别数学推理中的关键概念，显著提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法无法区分LLM数学推理中哪些概念真正因果贡献于正确答案，因为观测关联可能受问题难度等混杂因素干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM中识别并激活对数学推理真正因果相关的概念知识，排除混杂因素影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CIKA框架，包含干预能力探针（ICP）和因果知识激活组件：通过提示将概念状态设为“掌握”，测量正确率变化作为因果效应估计，分离混杂因素。
contributions: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM自身作为干预模拟器进行因果发现，无需外部知识或微调。
定义干预能力探针（ICP），可区分因果相关与无关概念，并预测问题解决成功率。
在多个数学推理基准上取得显著性能提升，尤其激活了LLM已拥有但未使用的知识。
analysis.experiments: 在67个筛选问题、601个Omni-MATH问题、Omni-MATH-Rule、GSM8K、AIME 2024-2026、MathArena等基准上评估，CIKA在7B参数冻结模型上达到69.7% (Omni-MATH-Rule)、64.0%总体、97.2% (GSM8K)、46-50% (AIME)、46.2% (MathArena)，因果知识激活贡献33.8%的正确回答。
limitations: 可能依赖提示工程的质量和一致性。
干预模拟的保真度可能受限于LLM自身能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CIKA框架，利用LLM自身作为干预模拟器，通过因果干预识别数学推理中的关键概念，显著提升推理性能。

papers.title: TraceAV-Bench: Benchmarking Multi-Hop Trajectory Reasoning over Long Audio-Visual Videos
papers.abstract: Real-world audio-visual understanding requires chaining evidence that is sparse, temporally dispersed, and split across the visual and auditory streams, whereas existing benchmarks largely fail to evaluate this capability. They restrict videos to short clips, isolate modalities, or reduce questions to one-hop perception. We introduce TraceAV-Bench, the first benchmark to jointly evaluate multi-hop reasoning over long audio-visual trajectories and multimodal hallucination robustness. TraceAV-Bench comprises 2,200 rigorously validated multiple-choice questions over 578 long videos, totaling 339.5 hours, spanning 4 evaluation dimensions and 15 sub-tasks. Each question is grounded in an explicit reasoning chain that averages 3.68 hops across a 15.1-minute temporal span. The dataset is built by a three-step semi-automated pipeline followed by a strict quality assurance process. Evaluation of multiple representative OmniLLMs on TraceAV-Bench reveals that the benchmark poses a persistent challenge across all models, with the strongest closed-source model (Gemini 3.1 Pro) reaching only 68.29% on general tasks, and the best open-source model (Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0) reaching 51.70%, leaving substantial headroom. Moreover, we find that robustness to multimodal hallucination is largely decoupled from general multimodal reasoning performance. We anticipate that TraceAV-Bench will stimulate further research toward OmniLLMs that can reason coherently and faithfully over long-form audio-visual content.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估长音频-视觉视频多跳轨迹推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准局限于短视频、单模态或单跳感知，无法评估真实世界中需要跨模态、长时序证据链的推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够联合评估长音频-视觉视频多跳推理和多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最强闭源模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）在通用任务上仅达68.29%，开源模型（Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0）为51.70%，且多模态幻觉鲁棒性与通用推理性能基本解耦。
analysis.method: 构建包含2,200道多选题、578个长视频（总计339.5小时）的基准，通过三步半自动流水线加严格质量保证生成，每个问题平均3.68跳推理链，时间跨度15.1分钟。
contributions: 首个联合评估长音频-视觉视频多跳推理和多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。
揭示现有OmniLLM在该任务上的显著不足及幻觉鲁棒性与推理性能的解耦现象。
analysis.experiments: 评估多个代表性OmniLLM，最强闭源模型Gemini 3.1 Pro通用任务准确率68.29%，最佳开源模型Ming-Flash-Omni-2.0为51.70%。
limitations: 基准仅包含英文视频和问题，可能缺乏语言多样性。
多选题格式可能无法完全反映开放生成场景下的推理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估长音频-视觉视频多跳轨迹推理与多模态幻觉鲁棒性的基准。

papers.title: Beyond Defenses: Manifold-Aligned Regularization for Intrinsic 3D Point Cloud Robustness
papers.abstract: Despite extensive progress in point cloud robustness, existing methods primarily improve performance through augmentation or defense mechanisms, while overlooking the geometric root cause of adversarial fragility. We hypothesize that adversarial vulnerability in 3D networks arises from a manifold misalignment between the latent geometry learned by the model and the intrinsic geometry of the underlying surface. Small, geometry-preserving perturbations along the input manifold often induce disproportionate distortions in feature space, revealing a misalignment between latent and intrinsic geometries. We formalize this phenomenon by developing a geometric interpretation of 3D robustness that links classical adversarial theory to the intrinsic structure of point clouds. Motivated by this analysis, we introduce Manifold-Aligned Point Recognition (MAPR), a framework that regularizes the latent geometry by aligning predictions across intrinsic perturbations. MAPR augments each point cloud with intrinsic features capturing local curvature and diffusion structure, and applies a consistency loss that preserves invariance to intrinsic, geometry-preserving perturbations. Without relying on adversarial training or additional data, MAPR consistently improves robustness across multiple adversarial attacks on both the ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN datasets, achieving average robustness gains of +20.02% and +8.58% on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 通过流形对齐正则化提升3D点云内在鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D点云鲁棒性方法主要依赖数据增强或防御机制，忽略了对抗脆弱性的几何根源，即模型学习的潜在几何与底层表面内在几何之间的流形错位。
analysis.problem: 解决3D点云分类模型对几何保持扰动的对抗脆弱性问题，通过正则化潜在几何与内在几何的对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到沿输入流形的微小几何保持扰动会在特征空间引起不成比例的扭曲，表明潜在几何与内在几何之间存在错位。
analysis.method: 提出Manifold-Aligned Point Recognition (MAPR)框架，通过内在特征（局部曲率和扩散结构）增强点云，并应用一致性损失以保持对内在几何保持扰动的不变性。
contributions: 形式化了3D鲁棒性的几何解释，将经典对抗理论与点云内在结构联系起来。
提出MAPR框架，无需对抗训练或额外数据即可提升鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在ModelNet40和ScanObjectNN数据集上，针对多种对抗攻击，平均鲁棒性分别提升+20.02%和+8.58%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于点云的3D分类任务，泛化到其他3D任务需验证。
内在特征的计算可能增加额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过流形对齐正则化提升3D点云内在鲁棒性，无需对抗训练。

papers.title: Revisiting Transformer Layer Parameterization Through Causal Energy Minimization
papers.abstract: Transformer blocks typically combine multi-head attention (MHA) for token mixing with gated MLPs for token-wise feature transformation, yet many choices in their parameterization remain largely empirical. We introduce Causal Energy Minimization (CEM), a framework that recasts Transformer layers as optimization steps on conditional energy functions while explicitly accounting for layer parameterization. Extending prior energy-based interpretations of attention, CEM shows that weight-tied MHA can be derived as a gradient update on an interaction energy, and that a gated MLP with shared up/down projections can be viewed through an element-wise energy. This perspective identifies a design space for Transformer layers that includes within-layer weight sharing, diagonal-plus-low-rank interactions, lightweight preconditioners, and recursive updates. We evaluate CEM-derived layers in language-modeling experiments at the moderate hundred-million-parameter scale. Despite their constrained parameterizations, these layers train stably and can match corresponding Transformer baselines. Overall, our results suggest that CEM provides a useful lens for understanding Transformer layer parameterization, connecting Transformer architectures to energy-based models and motivating further exploration of energy-guided layer designs.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果能量最小化框架重新解释Transformer层参数化，提出权重共享等设计并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer层中多头注意力和门控MLP的参数化选择大多基于经验，缺乏理论指导，理解其设计原理有助于改进架构。
analysis.problem: 如何从能量最小化角度统一解释并改进Transformer层的参数化设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果能量最小化（CEM）框架，将Transformer层重写为条件能量函数上的优化步骤，推导出权重共享的MHA和门控MLP，并识别出层内权重共享、对角加低秩交互、轻量预条件子和递归更新等设计空间。
contributions: 提出CEM框架，将Transformer层参数化与能量最小化联系起来。
识别出包括权重共享在内的多种层设计，并在语言建模实验中验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在数亿参数规模的语言建模实验中，CEM导出的层训练稳定且能匹配标准Transformer基线。
limitations: 实验规模为中等参数规模，未在更大模型上验证。
CEM框架可能不适用于所有Transformer变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因果能量最小化框架重新解释Transformer层参数化，提出权重共享等设计并验证其有效性。

papers.title: Parallel Lifted Planning via Semi-Naive Datalog Evaluation
papers.abstract: Lifted classical planners operate directly on first-order planning tasks to avoid the computationally demanding grounding step. However, lifted planning is typically slower, as planners must repeatedly instantiate ground structures during search. Many core components of lifted classical planning, such as successor generation, axiom evaluation, task grounding, and delete-relaxed heuristics, have previously been studied through the lens of Datalog evaluation. We build upon this line of work and extend it by developing and analyzing an execution model with two levels of parallelism: rule-level parallelism and grounding parallelism. We further specialize this solver for planning-specific workloads with a grounder based on clique enumeration, which we extend to support semi-naive Datalog evaluation. Our experimental evaluation using greedy best-first search with the FF heuristic shows that our implementation already solves more tasks than the baselines on a single core, and the gap widens as additional cores are used. Moreover, on hard-to-ground tasks where on average 97.6% of the total runtime is spent in Datalog execution, the proposed execution model exhibits an average parallel fraction of 92.4%, while achieving up to a 6-fold speedup on 8 cores in practice.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于半朴素Datalog评估的并行提升规划方法，通过两级并行和团枚举接地器加速规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 提升经典规划器避免耗时的接地步骤，但通常因搜索中反复实例化结构而较慢；现有Datalog方法可加速核心组件，但缺乏并行化支持。
analysis.problem: 如何利用并行Datalog评估高效实现提升经典规划，特别是处理接地困难的任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发具有规则级并行和接地并行的执行模型，并基于团枚举扩展半朴素Datalog评估的接地器。
contributions: 提出两级并行执行模型（规则级和接地级）用于提升规划。
设计基于团枚举的接地器，支持半朴素Datalog评估。
实验表明单核性能优于基线，多核加速显著，并行分数高达92.4%。
analysis.experiments: 使用贪婪最佳优先搜索和FF启发式，在单核上比基线解决更多任务，多核时差距扩大；在难接地任务上，平均92.4%的并行分数，8核实现6倍加速。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定规划任务（如难接地任务）。
并行效率可能受限于任务结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于半朴素Datalog评估的并行提升规划方法，通过两级并行和团枚举接地器加速规划。

papers.title: Your Language Model is Its Own Critic: Reinforcement Learning with Value Estimation from Actor's Internal States
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for Large Reasoning Models hinges on baseline estimation for variance reduction, but existing approaches pay a heavy price: PPO requires a policy-model scale critic, while GRPO needs multiple rollouts per prompt to keep its empirical group mean stable.
