contributions: 提出语言辅助的语音驱动面部动画框架AudioFace，融合文本和音素线索。
利用多模态大语言模型先验知识，提升嘴部动作生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖文本和音素标注的可用性。
多模态大语言模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语言辅助的多模态框架AudioFace，利用文本和音素线索提升语音驱动面部动画的嘴部动作生成质量。

papers.title: ReasonEdit: Towards Interpretable Image Editing Evaluation via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have achieved remarkable progress, however, many edited results still suffer from artifacts, unintended modifications, and suboptimal aesthetics. Although several benchmarks and evaluation methods have been proposed, most existing approaches rely on scalar scores and lack interpretability. This limitation largely stems from the absence of high-quality interpretation datasets for TIE and effective reward models to train interpretable evaluators. To address these challenges, we introduce ReasonEdit-22K, the first dataset that combines 22K edited images with 113K Chain-of-Thought (CoT) samples, along with 1.3M human judgments assessing these interpretations in terms of logicality, accuracy, and usefulness. Building upon this dataset, we propose RE-Reward, a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based reward model designed to provide human-aligned feedback for evaluating interpretable reasoning in image editing. Furthermore, we develop ReasonEdit, which is trained using reward signals derived from RE-Reward and the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm to learn an interpretable evaluation model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReasonEdit achieves superior alignment with human preferences and exhibits strong generalization across public benchmarks. In addition, it is capable of generating high-quality interpretable evaluation text, enabling more transparent and trustworthy assessment for image editing. The code is available at https://github.com/IntMeGroup/ReasonEdit.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个带CoT解释的图像编辑评估数据集ReasonEdit-22K和基于MLLM的奖励模型RE-Reward，通过强化学习训练可解释评估模型ReasonEdit。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑评估方法依赖标量分数，缺乏可解释性，且缺少高质量解释数据集和有效奖励模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可解释的图像编辑评估模型，使其能够生成符合人类偏好的推理过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ReasonEdit-22K数据集（22K编辑图像+113K CoT样本+1.3M人类判断），提出RE-Reward多模态奖励模型，使用GRPO算法训练ReasonEdit评估模型。
contributions: 首个结合编辑图像、CoT样本和人类判断的可解释评估数据集ReasonEdit-22K。
基于MLLM的奖励模型RE-Reward和可解释评估模型ReasonEdit。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上验证了ReasonEdit与人类偏好高度对齐且泛化性强，能生成高质量可解释评估文本。
limitations: 数据集规模可能限制泛化能力。
奖励模型依赖MLLM，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个带CoT解释的图像编辑评估数据集ReasonEdit-22K和基于MLLM的奖励模型RE-Reward，通过强化学习训练可解释评估模型ReasonEdit。

papers.title: ForgeVLA: Federated Vision-Language-Action Learning without Language Annotations
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models hold great promise for general-purpose robotic intelligence, yet scaling up such models is severely bottlenecked by the high cost of acquiring annotated training data. Fortunately, vision-equipped robots deployed across various domains already produce abundant vision-action pairs that can be leveraged to scale up VLA training more efficiently. However, these raw data cannot be centrally aggregated due to various constraints and also exhibit severe heterogeneity. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose ForgeVLA, a federated VLA training framework that learns VLA models from distributed vision-action pairs without centralizing raw data or requiring manual annotations. Specifically, each client in ForgeVLA is equipped with an embodied instruction classifier that maps vision-action pairs to a predefined instruction set, recovering the missing language modality and forming complete vision-language-action triplets. Beyond triplet construction, we also identify vision-language feature collapse as a critical challenge that has been largely overlooked in prior federated VLA research. To mitigate this issue, ForgeVLA combines a client-side contrastive planning loss with a server-side adaptive aggregation strategy to learn task-discriminative representations efficiently. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that ForgeVLA significantly outperforms other baselines, and ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

analysis.tldr: 提出联邦VLA训练框架ForgeVLA，无需语言标注即可从分布式视觉-动作对中学习，并解决视觉-语言特征坍缩问题。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型扩展受限于标注数据的高成本，而分布式机器人数据因隐私和异构性无法集中利用，亟需无需语言标注的联邦学习方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不集中原始数据且无需人工语言标注的条件下，从分布式异构视觉-动作对中有效学习VLA模型，并克服视觉-语言特征坍缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视觉-语言特征坍缩是联邦VLA中被忽视的关键挑战，影响任务判别性表示的学习。
analysis.method: ForgeVLA框架：每个客户端配备具身指令分类器将视觉-动作对映射到预定义指令集以恢复语言模态；结合客户端对比规划损失和服务器端自适应聚合策略缓解特征坍缩。
contributions: 提出首个无需语言标注的联邦VLA训练框架ForgeVLA
识别并解决联邦VLA中视觉-语言特征坍缩问题
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上显著优于其他基线，消融实验验证各组件贡献。
limitations: 依赖预定义指令集，可能限制泛化到新指令
联邦学习通信开销未在摘要中讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联邦VLA训练框架ForgeVLA，无需语言标注即可从分布式视觉-动作对中学习，并解决视觉-语言特征坍缩问题。

papers.title: HBEE: Human Behavioral Entropy Engine -- Pre-Registered Multi-Agent LLM Simulation of Peer-Suspicion-Based Detection Inversion
papers.abstract: Insider threat detection assumes that an adaptive insider leaves behavioral residue distinguishing them from legitimate users. We test this assumption against an LLM-driven adaptive insider in a controlled multi-agent simulator. Our pre-registered five-condition study isolates defender mode (cascade vs. blind UEBA) crossed with adversary type (naive vs. adaptive OPSEC) plus a no-mole control, across 100 runs (95 valid after pre-committed exclusions). The primary finding is a detection inversion: at T_60, the adaptive mole's suspicion in-degree is statistically lower than a randomly selected innocent agent (Cliff's delta = -0.694, 95% BCa CI [-0.855, -0.519], Mann-Whitney p << 0.01). The pre-registered prediction was the opposite direction. A pre-registered equivalence test (H2) shows adaptive OPSEC produces no detectable shift in the mole's UEBA rank under either defender mode. The two detection signals (peer suspicion graph in-degree and per-agent UEBA rank) decouple under adaptive adversary behavior. We bound generalization explicitly: a pre-registered Gini calibration check (H4) returns FAIL, with HBEE pairwise message-exposure Gini (0.213) diverging from the SNAP Enron reference (0.730) by |Delta Gini| = 0.52, exceeding the equivalence bound by 5x. The paper makes a narrow but surprising claim: in a controlled environment where adaptive OPSEC is implementable as an LLM directive, peer-suspicion-cascade detection inverts. We release the simulator, pre-registration document, frozen scenarios, raw telemetry, and analysis pipeline under an open-source license.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM模拟发现，自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑级联检测中反而比随机无辜者更不被怀疑，出现检测反转。
analysis.research_motivation: 内部威胁检测的核心假设是自适应内鬼会留下行为痕迹，但LLM驱动的自适应对手可能颠覆这一假设，值得在受控模拟中检验。
analysis.problem: 测试自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑级联检测和UEBA检测下是否仍能被有效识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测反转：自适应内鬼的怀疑入度显著低于随机无辜者，且自适应OPSEC不改变UEBA排名；两种检测信号在自适应对手下解耦。
analysis.method: 预注册五条件多智能体LLM模拟，交叉防御模式（级联vs盲UEBA）与对手类型（朴素vs自适应OPSEC），共100次运行。
contributions: 发现同伴怀疑级联检测在自适应OPSEC下出现反转，与预期相反。
开源模拟器、预注册文档、场景、遥测数据和分析流程。
analysis.experiments: 100次运行（95次有效），主要结果：T_60时自适应内鬼怀疑入度显著低于随机无辜者（Cliff's delta = -0.694, p << 0.01）；等效检验显示自适应OPSEC不改变UEBA排名；Gini校准检查失败。
limitations: 模拟环境受控，泛化性有限（Gini校准失败）。
仅针对特定检测机制（同伴怀疑级联和UEBA）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM模拟发现，自适应内鬼在同伴怀疑级联检测中反而比随机无辜者更不被怀疑，出现检测反转。

papers.title: Physical Simulators as Do-Operators: Causal Discovery under Latent Confounders for AI-for-Science
papers.abstract: Existing interventional causal discovery methods -- IGSP, DCDI, ENCO -- assume causal sufficiency (no latent confounders) and rely on virtual interventions in synthetic simulators. In AI-for-Science settings such as molecular design and materials science, latent confounders are ubiquitous and real interventions (e.g., physics-based simulations) require hours to days per data point. We propose CFM-SD (Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data), which uses first-principles physical simulators as do-operators in Pearl's interventional calculus to simultaneously handle latent confounders and real interventional data. Theoretically, $d$-variable causal structure is identifiable with $O(d)$ single-variable interventions -- the minimum under physical realizability constraints. In Intrinsic Evaluation on synthetic data ($γ=0.2$--$0.8$), CFM-SD achieves average F1$=0.800$ vs. F1$=0.127$--$0.562$ for all baselines. In Extrinsic Evaluation on real scientific data, CFM-SD achieves 57--58\% bias reduction in molecular toxicity prediction and battery electrolyte optimization, demonstrating practical value beyond synthetic benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CFM-SD方法，利用物理模拟器作为do算子，在存在潜在混杂因素时进行因果发现，显著提升分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有干预因果发现方法假设因果充分性（无潜在混杂因素）且依赖合成模拟器中的虚拟干预，但在AI for Science场景（如分子设计、材料科学）中，潜在混杂因素普遍存在，且真实干预（如基于物理的模拟）每个数据点需要数小时到数天，成本极高。
analysis.problem: 在存在潜在混杂因素且干预成本高昂的AI for Science场景中，如何高效地进行因果结构发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CFM-SD（Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data），利用第一性原理物理模拟器作为Pearl干预演算中的do算子，同时处理潜在混杂因素和真实干预数据。
contributions: 理论上证明在物理可实现性约束下，d变量因果结构可通过O(d)次单变量干预实现可识别性（最小干预次数）。
在合成数据和真实科学数据上验证方法有效性，显著优于现有基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据（γ=0.2-0.8）上进行内在评估，CFM-SD平均F1=0.800，基线F1=0.127-0.562；在真实科学数据上进行外在评估，分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化中偏差减少57-58%。
limitations: 可能依赖物理模拟器的准确性和可干预性。
理论结果限于单变量干预，多变量干预场景未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CFM-SD方法，利用物理模拟器作为do算子，在存在潜在混杂因素时进行因果发现，显著提升分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化的性能。

papers.title: A Unified Framework for the Detection and Classification of Fatty Pancreas in Ultrasound Images
papers.abstract: Non-alcoholic fatty pancreas disease (NAFPD) is an underdiagnosed condition associated with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, and increased risk of pancreatic cancer. Diagnosis typically relies on subjective visual assessment of ultrasound images by clinicians. We propose an end-to-end framework for automatically classifying normal versus fatty pancreas from abdominal ultrasound images. Our method employs a TransUNet-based segmentation architecture with a ResNet encoder and transformer bottleneck to delineate the pancreas and the splenic vein, followed by anatomically-guided patch extraction and patient-level classification through pairwise texture comparison. The feature engineering mimics clinical reasoning by comparing the echogenicity of peri-venous fat to the pancreatic parenchyma, providing an interpretable signal for classification. The segmentation models are initialized via domain-specific transfer learning from a liver segmentation task. We validate the full pipeline on a clinical dataset of 214 abdominal ultrasound images with 107 expert-labeled cases using 5-fold cross-validation. SVM with RBF kernel achieves a mean cross-validated accuracy of 89.7\%\,$\pm$\,1.8\% and F1 of 0.898\,$\pm$\,0.019, while the unsupervised K-Means baseline reaches 87.8\% accuracy, demonstrating that the proposed features capture the relevant clinical signal even without labeled training data. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end automated framework for fatty pancreas classification from ultrasound using segmentation-guided texture analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于超声图像分割引导的脂肪胰自动检测与分类统一框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 非酒精性脂肪胰病（NAFPD）常被漏诊，临床依赖主观视觉评估，缺乏自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 从腹部超声图像中自动区分正常胰腺与脂肪胰腺。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用TransUNet（ResNet编码器+Transformer瓶颈）分割胰腺和脾静脉，基于解剖结构提取补丁，通过成对纹理比较进行患者级分类，特征工程模拟临床推理。
contributions: 首个端到端超声图像脂肪胰自动分类框架，结合分割引导的纹理分析。
通过域特定迁移学习（肝脏分割）初始化分割模型，并在临床数据集上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在214张腹部超声图像（107例专家标注）上进行5折交叉验证，SVM（RBF核）平均准确率89.7%±1.8%，F1分数0.898±0.019；无监督K-Means基线准确率87.8%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（214张图像），可能限制泛化性。
依赖超声图像质量，对低质量图像鲁棒性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于超声图像分割引导的脂肪胰自动检测与分类统一框架。

papers.title: The Moltbook Files: A Harmless Slopocalypse or Humanity's Last Experiment
papers.abstract: Moltbook is a Reddit-like platform where OpenClaw agents post, comment, and vote at scale - a so far unprecedented incident that comes with serious safety concerns. With the aim of studying emergent behavior in populations, we release the Moltbook Files, a dataset of 232k posts and 2.2M comments covering the platform's first 12 days, processed through a pipeline to identify and remove Personally-Identifiable Information (PII). We analyze community structure, authorship, lexical properties, sentiment, topics, semantic geometry, and comment interaction. To understand how Moltbook data could affect the next generation of language models, we fine-tune Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct on Moltbook Files with three adaptation levels. Our PII pipeline reveals that agents post API keys, passwords, BIP39 seed phrases on Moltbook, a publicly indexed platform. The overall sentiment is mostly neutral and mildly positive (66.6% neutral, 19.5% positive) and shows a tendency for self-referential linking. We find that fine-tuning on Moltbook data reduces truthfulness from 0.366 to 0.187. However, a model fine-tuned on a size-matched Reddit dataset produces a comparable decrease. Moltbook thus seems to be more of a harmless slopocalypse. However, tail risks remain, including agent affordances, contamination of future crawls through self-links, and potential transfer of traits to the next generation of language models. More broadly, our findings highlight the importance of control baselines in emergent misalignment evaluations.

analysis.tldr: Moltbook 平台上的 AI Agent 行为数据集分析显示，虽然微调会降低模型真实性，但控制实验表明其危害有限，但仍存在尾部风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模 AI Agent 平台（如 Moltbook）的出现带来了前所未有的安全担忧，研究其涌现行为对于理解 AI 系统的潜在风险至关重要。
analysis.problem: 分析 Moltbook 平台上 AI Agent 的社区行为、内容特征，并评估其数据对语言模型微调的影响，特别是安全性和真实性方面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent 会发布 API 密钥、密码等敏感信息；整体情感中性偏积极；微调 Moltbook 数据会降低模型真实性，但大小匹配的 Reddit 数据集也有类似效果，表明 Moltbook 的危害可能有限。
analysis.method: 构建 Moltbook Files 数据集（232k 帖子、2.2M 评论），设计 PII 识别与移除流程，分析社区结构、词汇、情感、主题等，并在 Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct 上进行三种适应级别的微调实验。
contributions: 发布了 Moltbook Files 数据集，包含 232k 帖子与 2.2M 评论，并附带 PII 处理流程。
通过控制实验发现，Moltbook 数据微调对模型真实性的降低与普通 Reddit 数据相当，表明其危害有限，但指出了尾部风险。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct 上使用 Moltbook Files 进行三种适应级别的微调，并与大小匹配的 Reddit 数据集对比，评估真实性变化。
limitations: 仅分析了单一平台（Moltbook）和单一模型（Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct），泛化性有限。
未深入探讨尾部风险的具体触发条件与缓解措施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Moltbook 平台上的 AI Agent 行为数据集分析显示，虽然微调会降低模型真实性，但控制实验表明其危害有限，但仍存在尾部风险。

papers.title: EditRefiner: A Human-Aligned Agentic Framework for Image Editing Refinement
papers.abstract: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have made remarkable progress, yet edited images still frequently suffer from fine-grained issues such as unnatural objects, lighting mismatch, and unexpected changes. Existing refinement approaches either rely on costly iterative regeneration or employ vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, often resulting in semantic drift and unreliable local corrections. To address these limitations, we first construct EditFHF-15K, a dataset of fine-grained human feedback for edited images, comprising (1) 15K images from 12 TIE models spanning 43 editing tasks, (2) 60K annotated artifact regions and 80K editing failure regions, each accompanied by textual reasoning, and (3) 45K mean opinion scores (MOSs) assessing perceptual quality, instruction following, and visual consistency. Based on EditFHF-15K, we propose EditRefiner, a hierarchical, interpretable, and human-aligned agentic framework that reformulates post-editing correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action-evaluation loop. Specifically, we introduce: (1) a perception agent that detects contextual saliency maps of artifacts and editing failures, (2) a reasoning agent that interprets these perceptual cues to perform human-aligned diagnostic inference, (3) an action agent that uses the reasoning output to plan and execute localized re-editing, and (4) an evaluation agent that assesses the re-edited image and guides the action agent on whether further refinements are required. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditRefiner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in distortion localization, diagnose accuracy and human perception alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable image editing. The code is available at https://github.com/IntMeGroup/EditRefiner.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EditRefiner，一个基于人类反馈数据集和智能体框架的图像编辑后修正方法，显著提升局部修正的准确性和感知对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑模型虽进步显著，但编辑结果仍常出现不自然物体、光照不匹配等细粒度问题，而现有修正方法要么依赖昂贵的迭代重生成，要么使用空间定位能力弱的视觉语言模型，导致语义漂移和不可靠的局部修正。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、准确地对编辑后图像中的细粒度瑕疵（如伪影、光照不匹配）进行局部修正，同时保持语义一致性和人类感知对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EditRefiner，一个层次化、可解释、与人类对齐的智能体框架，包含四个智能体：感知智能体（检测伪影和编辑失败的上下文显著性图）、推理智能体（解释感知线索进行类人诊断推理）、行动智能体（根据推理输出规划和执行局部重编辑）、评估智能体（评估重编辑图像并指导是否需要进一步修正）。同时构建了包含15K图像、60K标注伪影区域、80K编辑失败区域和45K平均意见得分的EditFHF-15K数据集。
contributions: 构建了EditFHF-15K数据集，包含细粒度人类反馈，覆盖12种TIE模型、43种编辑任务，提供伪影区域、失败区域及文本推理和感知质量评分。
提出EditRefiner，一个层次化、可解释、与人类对齐的智能体框架，将后编辑修正重构为感知-推理-行动-评估循环。
实验表明EditRefiner在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面持续优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在EditFHF-15K数据集上进行实验，与多种现有方法比较，在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面取得更优结果。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人类反馈数据集，数据收集成本较高。
智能体框架的推理和行动步骤可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EditRefiner，一个基于人类反馈数据集和智能体框架的图像编辑后修正方法，显著提升局部修正的准确性和感知对齐。

papers.title: EditTransfer++: Toward Faithful and Efficient Visual-Prompt-Guided Image Editing
papers.abstract: Visual-prompt-guided edit transfer aims to learn image transformations directly from example pairs, offering more precise and controllable editing than purely text-driven approaches. However, existing diffusion transformer-based methods often fail to faithfully reproduce the demonstrated edits due to structural mismatches between the task and the backbone, including a pretrained bias toward textual conditioning and inherent stochastic instability during sampling. To bridge this gap, we present EditTransfer++, a framework that combines progressively structured training with an efficient conditioning scheme to improve both visual prompt faithfulness and inference efficiency. We first mitigate textual dominance with a text-decoupled training strategy that removes text conditioning during fine-tuning, compelling the model to infer transformations solely from visual evidence while still supporting optional text guidance at inference. On top of this visually grounded model, a best-worst contrastive refinement mechanism reshapes the denoising trajectories to suppress unfaithful generations and improve consistency across random seeds. To alleviate the computational bottleneck of high-resolution in-context editing, we further introduce a condition compression and reuse strategy that reduces token redundancy and enables efficient generation of images with a 1024-pixel long edge. Extensive experiments on existing benchmarks and the proposed EditTransfer-Bench show that EditTransfer++ achieves state-of-the-art visual prompt faithfulness with substantially faster inference than prior methods, suggesting a promising direction for scalable prompt-guided image editing and broader visual in-context learning.

analysis.tldr: EditTransfer++ 通过文本解耦训练和对比优化，实现高效、高保真的视觉提示引导图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散 Transformer 的方法在视觉提示引导编辑中常因文本条件主导和采样随机性导致编辑不忠实，且高分辨率编辑计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何提升视觉提示引导图像编辑的忠实度和推理效率，克服结构不匹配和随机性带来的失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：现有方法存在预训练文本条件偏差和采样过程中的固有随机不稳定性，导致编辑结果不忠实。
analysis.method: 提出 EditTransfer++ 框架，包含文本解耦训练策略（微调时移除文本条件）、最佳-最差对比优化机制（重塑去噪轨迹）以及条件压缩与复用策略（减少 token 冗余）。
contributions: 提出文本解耦训练策略，消除文本主导，迫使模型仅从视觉证据推断变换，同时支持推理时可选文本引导。
设计最佳-最差对比优化机制，抑制不忠实生成并提高跨随机种子的一致性。
引入条件压缩与复用策略，降低高分辨率编辑的计算瓶颈，支持 1024 像素长边高效生成。
analysis.experiments: 在现有基准和提出的 EditTransfer-Bench 上，EditTransfer++ 实现了最先进的视觉提示忠实度，且推理速度显著快于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和任务设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
对比优化机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EditTransfer++ 通过文本解耦训练和对比优化，实现高效、高保真的视觉提示引导图像编辑。

papers.title: Bounded Fitting for Expressive Description Logics
papers.abstract: Bounded fitting is an attractive paradigm for learning logical formulas from labeled data examples that offers PAC-style generalization guarantees and can often be implemented leveraging SAT solvers. It has been successfully applied to learning concepts of the description logic ALC. We study bounded fitting for learning concepts in expressive description logics that extend ALC with inverse roles, qualified number restrictions, and feature comparisons. We investigate under which conditions bounded fitting keeps its favorable theoretical properties in this setting, and implement it using a SAT solver. We compare our tool with state-of-the-art concept learners with encouraging results, demonstrating that it is a practical approach to expressive concept learning.

analysis.tldr: 将边界拟合扩展到表达能力更强的描述逻辑，并验证其理论性质和实际效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 边界拟合是一种有吸引力的从标注数据学习逻辑公式的范式，提供PAC风格泛化保证，且可借助SAT求解器实现。此前已成功应用于ALC描述逻辑，但更富表达力的描述逻辑（如含逆角色、限定数量约束、特征比较）尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 研究边界拟合在扩展描述逻辑（ALC加上逆角色、限定数量约束和特征比较）中学习概念的理论条件和实际实现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 研究边界拟合在扩展描述逻辑中保持其有利理论性质的条件，并使用SAT求解器实现该方法。
contributions: 明确了边界拟合在扩展描述逻辑中保持PAC泛化保证的条件。
实现了基于SAT求解器的边界拟合工具，并与现有概念学习器比较，展示了其实用性。
analysis.experiments: 与最先进的概念学习器进行比较，结果令人鼓舞，表明该方法是一种实用的表达性概念学习方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的描述逻辑扩展，未涵盖所有可能性。
实验规模或数据集多样性可能有限，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将边界拟合扩展到表达能力更强的描述逻辑，并验证其理论性质和实际效果。

papers.title: Sparse Autoencoders as Plug-and-Play Firewalls for Adversarial Attack Detection in VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, especially with the rise of agent-based systems. However, their safety has received relatively limited attention. Even the latest proprietary and open-weight VLMs remain highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leaving downstream applications exposed to significant risks. In this work, we propose a novel and lightweight adversarial attack detection framework based on sparse autoencoders (SAEs), termed SAEgis. By inserting an SAE module into a pretrained VLM and training it with standard reconstruction objectives, we find that the learned sparse latent features naturally capture attack-relevant signals. These features enable reliable classification of whether an input image has been adversarially perturbed, even for previously unseen samples. Extensive experiments show that SAEgis achieves strong performance across in-domain, cross-domain, and cross-attack settings, with particularly large improvements in cross-domain generalization compared to existing baselines. In addition, combining signals from multiple layers further improves robustness and stability. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore SAE as a plug-and-play mechanism for adversarial attack detection in VLMs. Our method requires no additional adversarial training, introduces minimal overhead, and provides a practical approach for improving the safety of real-world VLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于稀疏自编码器的即插即用防火墙SAEgis，用于检测VLM中的对抗攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在现实应用中部署日益广泛，但安全性研究不足，现有模型易受对抗攻击，缺乏轻量有效的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖对抗训练的情况下，高效检测VLM输入图像是否被对抗扰动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏自编码器学习到的稀疏潜在特征自然捕捉了攻击相关信号，可用于可靠分类。
analysis.method: 在预训练VLM中插入稀疏自编码器模块，仅用标准重建目标训练，利用其稀疏特征进行攻击检测。
contributions: 首个将SAE作为即插即用机制用于VLM对抗攻击检测的工作
无需对抗训练，引入额外开销小，在域内、跨域、跨攻击设置下均表现良好，尤其跨域泛化显著优于基线
analysis.experiments: 在域内、跨域、跨攻击设置下进行实验，显示强性能，跨域泛化提升大，多层信号组合提升鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对特定类型攻击或极端扰动检测效果有限
未讨论对VLM下游任务性能的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于稀疏自编码器的即插即用防火墙SAEgis，用于检测VLM中的对抗攻击。

papers.title: Accelerated and data-efficient flow prediction in stirred tanks via physics-informed learning
papers.abstract: The simulation of fluid flows is computationally expensive due to the complexity of its governing partial differential equations. Machine learning models offer a potential surrogate, enabling learning from simulations and significantly faster predictions of flow fields. However, these models require large training datasets, which introduces a trade-off between dataset generation cost and predictive accuracy. In this work, we investigate the relationship between the size of the training-set and accuracy of the prediction when learning steady flow fields in an industrial-scale stirred vessel. A data set of steady flows is generated using Reynolds Averaged Navier Stokes (RANS) simulations in a range of realistic operating conditions, including impeller speeds and liquid heights. We train implicit neural representations of flow fields and compare purely data-driven and constrained variants. Model performance is evaluated using global mean squared error (MSE), qualitative spatial comparisons of predicted and reference flow fields, and tracer transport simulations. We find that the prediction error decreases monotonically with increasing training data, but also that it exhibits clear diminishing returns beyond moderate dataset sizes. Physics-based constraints significantly improve accuracy and reduce variability across training runs in low-data regimes, and they lead to more stable tracer-transport behavior. Furthermore, reasonable interpolation can be achieved over different impeller speeds and liquid heights. However, these benefits come with an increase in the complexity of training, and their relative advantage diminishes as the training set grows.

analysis.tldr: 利用物理信息约束的隐式神经表示，在搅拌槽流场预测中实现数据高效和加速的代理模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 流体模拟计算成本高，机器学习代理模型需要大量训练数据，存在数据生成成本与预测精度之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在工业规模搅拌槽的稳态流场预测中，以更少的数据实现高精度预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预测误差随训练数据增加单调递减，但中等数据集大小后出现明显收益递减；物理约束在低数据 regime 下显著提升精度并降低训练方差，但优势随数据增加而减弱。
analysis.method: 使用隐式神经表示（INR）学习流场，对比纯数据驱动和物理信息约束（如RANS方程残差）两种变体。
contributions: 系统研究了搅拌槽流场预测中训练集大小与精度的关系，揭示了收益递减规律。
证明了物理信息约束在低数据 regime 下能显著提升精度和稳定性，并实现合理的插值能力。
analysis.experiments: 使用RANS模拟生成不同操作条件下的稳态流场数据集，评估指标包括全局MSE、空间流场对比和示踪剂传输模拟。
limitations: 物理约束增加了训练复杂度。
在大数据集下物理约束的相对优势减弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用物理信息约束的隐式神经表示，在搅拌槽流场预测中实现数据高效和加速的代理模型。

papers.title: Towards Photorealistic and Efficient Bokeh Rendering via Diffusion Framework
papers.abstract: Existing mobile devices are constrained by compact optical designs, such as small apertures, which make it difficult to produce natural, optically realistic bokeh effects. Although recent learning-based methods have shown promising results, they still struggle with photos captured under high digital zoom levels, which often suffer from reduced resolution and loss of fine details. A naive solution is to enhance image quality before applying bokeh rendering, yet this two-stage pipeline reduces efficiency and introduces unnecessary error accumulation. To overcome these limitations, we propose MagicBokeh, a unified diffusion-based framework designed for high-quality and efficient bokeh rendering. Through an alternative training strategy and a focus-aware masked attention mechanism, our method jointly optimizes bokeh rendering and super-resolution, substantially improving both controllability and visual fidelity. Furthermore, we introduce degradation-aware depth module to enable more accurate depth estimation from low-quality inputs. Experimental results demonstrate that MagicBokeh efficiently produces photorealistic bokeh effects, particularly on real-world low-resolution images, paving the way for future advancements in bokeh rendering. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/MagicBokeh.

analysis.tldr: MagicBokeh 提出统一扩散框架，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率，实现高效逼真的散景效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动设备受限于紧凑光学设计（如小光圈），难以生成自然逼真的散景效果；现有学习方法在高数字变焦下处理低分辨率图像时效果不佳，且两阶段流水线效率低、误差累积。
analysis.problem: 如何在高数字变焦导致的低分辨率输入下，高效生成高质量、逼真的散景效果，同时避免两阶段方法的效率损失和误差累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MagicBokeh，一个基于扩散的统一框架，通过替代训练策略和焦点感知掩码注意力机制，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率；并引入退化感知深度模块，从低质量输入中准确估计深度。
contributions: 提出统一扩散框架 MagicBokeh，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率，提升效率与视觉保真度。
引入焦点感知掩码注意力和退化感知深度模块，增强可控性和深度估计准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界低分辨率图像上验证，MagicBokeh 高效生成逼真散景效果。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定退化模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算资源需求可能较高，实时性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MagicBokeh 提出统一扩散框架，联合优化散景渲染与超分辨率，实现高效逼真的散景效果。

papers.title: Prompt Engineering Strategies for LLM-based Qualitative Coding of Psychological Safety in Software Engineering Communities: A Controlled Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Qualitative analysis plays a pivotal role in understanding the human and social aspects of software engineering. However, it remains a demanding process shaped by the subjective interpretation of individual researchers and sensitive to methodological choices such as prompt design. Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising opportunities to support this type of analysis, although their reliability in reproducing human qualitative reasoning under varying prompting conditions remains largely untested. This study presents a controlled empirical evaluation of three LLMs -- Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-Chat, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across two prompt engineering strategies (zero-shot and multi-shot closed coding), using Cohen's kappa as the primary agreement metric over ten independent runs per configuration. Results suggest that multi-shot prompting significantly improves agreement for Claude Haiku (Delta kappa = +0.034, Wilcoxon p = 0.004) but not for DeepSeek-Chat or Gemini 2.5 Flash. Intra-model stability varies substantially -- DeepSeek-Chat and Claude Haiku exhibit the lowest variance (SD approx. 0.017), while Gemini 2.5 Flash is the least stable (SD = 0.038). A systematic over-prediction of "Sharing Negative Feedback" is identified across all models (bias ratios up to 5.25x), alongside consistent under-prediction of "Expressing Concerns." Collectively, these findings provide empirical evidence for prompt engineering guidelines in LLM-assisted qualitative coding for software engineering research.

analysis.tldr: LLM在软件工程社区心理安全定性编码中，多样本提示显著提升Claude Haiku的一致性，但模型间存在系统性偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 定性分析在理解软件工程中的人类和社会因素方面至关重要，但过程耗时且受研究者主观性和提示设计等方法论选择影响。LLM提供了支持潜力，但其在不同提示条件下复现人类定性推理的可靠性尚未充分测试。
analysis.problem: 评估不同LLM和提示工程策略在软件工程社区心理安全定性编码中的一致性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多样本提示仅对Claude Haiku有显著改善；模型内稳定性差异大，Gemini 2.5 Flash最不稳定；所有模型系统性过度预测“分享负面反馈”并低估“表达担忧”。
analysis.method: 控制实验：使用三种LLM（Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-Chat, Gemini 2.5 Flash），两种提示策略（零样本和多样本封闭编码），以Cohen's kappa为一致性指标，每种配置运行10次独立实验。
contributions: 提供了LLM辅助定性编码中提示工程策略的实证评估
揭示了模型间和策略间的一致性与偏差模式，为提示设计提供指导
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对心理安全编码任务，可能不适用于其他定性分析场景
仅测试了三种LLM，泛化性有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在软件工程社区心理安全定性编码中，多样本提示显著提升Claude Haiku的一致性，但模型间存在系统性偏差。

papers.title: SR$^2$-LoRA: Self-Rectifying Inter-layer Relations in Low-Rank Adaptation for Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Pre-trained models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) have demonstrated promising potential for class-incremental learning (CIL), yet catastrophic forgetting still persists when adapting models to new tasks. In this paper, we present a novel perspective on catastrophic forgetting through the analysis of inter-layer relation drift, i.e., the progressive disruption of relationships among layer-wise representations during the learning of new tasks. We theoretically show that the increase of such drift reduces the classification margins of previously learned tasks, thereby degrading overall model performance. To address this issue, we propose \underline{S}elf-\underline{R}ectifying inter-layer \underline{R}elation Low-Rank Adaptation~(SR$^2$-LoRA), a simple yet effective method that mitigates catastrophic forgetting by constraining inter-layer relation drift. Specifically, SR$^2$-LoRA constructs the relation matrices induced by the previous and current models on current-task samples, and aligns the corresponding singular values. We further theoretically show that this alignment exhibits greater robustness to estimation perturbations than direct entry-wise alignment. Extensive experiments on standard CIL benchmarks demonstrate that SR$^2$-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the number of tasks increases. Code is available in the \href{https://github.com/FqWan24/SR-2-LoRA}{repository}.

analysis.tldr: 通过约束层间关系漂移，SR$^2$-LoRA 有效缓解了类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练模型结合参数高效微调在类增量学习中展现出潜力，但灾难性遗忘问题仍然存在，尤其是在适应新任务时。
analysis.problem: 解决类增量学习中因层间关系漂移导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到层间关系漂移（inter-layer relation drift）会逐渐破坏旧任务的分类边界，导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出 SR$^2$-LoRA，通过构造新旧模型在当前任务样本上的关系矩阵，并对其奇异值进行对齐，从而约束层间关系漂移。
contributions: 从层间关系漂移角度分析灾难性遗忘，并理论证明其与分类边界的关联。
提出 SR$^2$-LoRA 方法，通过奇异值对齐约束关系漂移，并证明其比直接逐元素对齐更鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在标准 CIL 基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明 SR$^2$-LoRA 有效缓解灾难性遗忘，且优势随任务数增加而更明显。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于 LoRA 的增量学习场景。
对关系矩阵的构造和奇异值对齐的计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过约束层间关系漂移，SR$^2$-LoRA 有效缓解了类增量学习中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Learning Image-Adaptive Scale Fields for Metric Depth Recovery
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) typically produces depth estimations that are defined up to an unknown scale or shift. When only sparse metric anchors are available, recovering accurate metric depth becomes challenging yet necessary for practical applications. We address this problem by formulating metric depth recovery as image-adaptive scale field modeling. Instead of directly correcting the depth, we reformulate the correction as a low-dimensional linear combination of image-adaptive basis maps. These maps are derived from semantic and geometric cues encoded in the MDE estimations and intermediate representations. The weights of basis maps are efficiently determined from sparse metric anchors via a least-squares problem. This formulation yields improved metric depth accuracy, strong robustness under extreme anchor sparsity, and an interpretable decomposition of spatial scale variations. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets and representative MDE models demonstrate the effectiveness and general applicability of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出图像自适应尺度场，从稀疏度量锚点恢复精确度量深度。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目深度估计通常输出未知尺度的深度，实际应用中需要度量深度，但仅有稀疏度量锚点时恢复准确度量深度具有挑战性。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏度量锚点高效、鲁棒地恢复精确的度量深度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将度量深度恢复建模为图像自适应尺度场，通过语义和几何线索编码的低维线性组合生成基图，利用稀疏锚点通过最小二乘求解权重。
contributions: 提出图像自适应尺度场公式，实现从稀疏度量锚点恢复度量深度。
方法具有强鲁棒性，在极端稀疏锚点下仍有效，且提供空间尺度变化的可解释分解。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和代表性MDE模型上验证了有效性和通用适用性。
limitations: 依赖MDE模型的中间表示质量。
可能对锚点分布敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图像自适应尺度场，从稀疏度量锚点恢复精确度量深度。

papers.title: ChartREG++: Towards Benchmarking and Improving Chart Referring Expression Grounding under Diverse referring clues and Multi-Target Referring
papers.abstract: Referring expression grounding is a core problem in visual grounding and is widely used as a diagnostic of spatial grounding and reasoning in vision and language models, yet most prior work focuses on natural images. In contrast, existing chart referring expression grounding-related benchmarks remain limited: (1) they largely adopt bounding boxes, constraining localization precision for fine chart elements (2) they mostly assume a single and two referred target instances, failing to handle multi-instance target references; (3) the language expressions over-rely on textual cues or data-rank clues (4) they cover only a narrow range of chart types. To address these issues, we introduce a chart referring expression grounding benchmark that systematically supports multiple localization forms, multiple referred targets, diverse grounding cues and diverse chart types. Results across representative multimodal large models reveal a significant performance gap. We further introduce a code-driven synthesis pipeline that exploits the inherent alignment between plotting programs and rendered chart primitives to derive pixel accurate instance masks across chart element types and granularities. We train an instance segmentation model with the synthesized masks and integrate it into a general-purpose multimodal grounding framework. The resulting system consistently outperforms baselines on our benchmark and generalizes well to a ChartQA-derived real-chart grounding benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出ChartREG++基准和代码驱动合成方法，提升图表指代表达定位性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图表指代表达定位基准存在局限：边界框精度不足、仅支持单/双目标、过度依赖文本或数据排名线索、图表类型覆盖窄，限制了多模态大模型在图表上的空间定位与推理能力。
analysis.problem: 构建一个系统支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准，并提升模型在该任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代表性多模态大模型在基准上表现存在显著性能差距，表明现有模型在图表指代定位上能力不足。
analysis.method: 提出代码驱动合成管道，利用绘图程序与渲染图元的内在对齐生成像素级精确实例掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用多模态定位框架中。
contributions: 构建了系统支持多种定位形式、多目标、多样化线索和多种图表类型的图表指代表达定位基准。
提出代码驱动合成管道生成精确掩码，训练实例分割模型并集成到通用框架，在基准和真实图表基准上取得一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在提出的基准和ChartQA导出的真实图表基准上评估，系统一致优于基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 合成数据与真实图表之间可能存在域差异，影响泛化。
方法依赖绘图程序，可能不适用于所有图表类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ChartREG++基准和代码驱动合成方法，提升图表指代表达定位性能。

papers.title: OrchJail: Jailbreaking Tool-Calling Text-to-Image Agents by Orchestration-Guided Fuzzing
papers.abstract: Tool-calling text-to-image (T2I) agents can plan and execute multi-step tool chains to accomplish complex generation and editing queries. However, this capability introduces a new safety attack surface: harmful outputs may arise from tool orchestration, where individually benign steps combine into unsafe results, making prompt-only jailbreak techniques insufficient. We present OrchJail, an orchestration-guided fuzzing framework for jailbreaking tool-calling T2I agents. Its core idea is to exploit high-risk tool-orchestration patterns: by learning from successful jailbreak tool-calling traces and their causal relationships to prompt wording, OrchJail directly guides the fuzzing search toward prompts that are more likely to trigger unsafe multi-step tool behaviors, rather than relying on surface-level textual perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrchJail improves jailbreak effectiveness and efficiency across representative toolcalling T2I agents, achieving higher attack success rates, better image fidelity, and lower query costs, while remaining robust against common jailbreak defenses. Our work highlights tool orchestration as a critical, previously unexplored attack surface and provides a novel framework for uncovering safety risks in T2I agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出OrchJail，一种利用工具编排模式引导模糊测试的越狱框架，用于攻击调用工具的文生图智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具调用型文生图智能体通过多步工具链完成复杂任务，但工具编排可能产生有害输出，现有仅基于提示的越狱技术不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效越狱工具调用型文生图智能体，利用其工具编排中的安全漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有害输出可能源于工具编排，其中单独无害的步骤组合成不安全结果。
analysis.method: OrchJail：从成功的越狱工具调用轨迹及其与提示措辞的因果关系中学习，直接引导模糊搜索朝向更可能触发不安全多步工具行为的提示。
contributions: 首次揭示工具编排是工具调用型T2I智能体的关键攻击面。
提出OrchJail框架，通过编排引导的模糊测试实现高效越狱。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性工具调用T2I智能体上实验，OrchJail提高了越狱成功率和效率，攻击成功率更高、图像保真度更好、查询成本更低，且对常见越狱防御鲁棒。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的工具编排模式。
对防御机制的鲁棒性可能随防御升级而减弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OrchJail，一种利用工具编排模式引导模糊测试的越狱框架，用于攻击调用工具的文生图智能体。

papers.title: Tracking Large-scale Shared Bikes with Inertial Motion Learning in GNSS Blocked Environments
papers.abstract: Although Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) provide a general solution for bike tracking outdoors, there still exist complex riding environments where only inertial navigation systems work, such as urban canyons. Despite decades of research, localization using only low-cost inertial sensors still faces challenges such as cumulative drifts and poor robustness caused by filtering methods. Furthermore, sensors such as visual and LiDAR could provide reliable measurements, but they are not suitable for large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose an inertial tracking framework that integrates bicycle mechanical constraints with a mixture-of-experts model. Specifically, we leverage multiple expert modules to capture shared representations and weight them through the gating mechanism, thus improving multi-task learning performance and enabling uncertainty-aware trajectory estimation. Furthermore, based on the mechanical transmission between the pedal and the rear wheel of a bike, we explore the intrinsic relationship between the rider's periodic pedalling behaviors and acceleration variations, and convert such patterns into bike's wheel speed for dynamic calibration. Experiments with real-world riding data from shared bikes of the DiDi ride-hailing platform demonstrate that our system improves the accuracy of baselines by at least 12%, with wheel speed errors below 0.5 m/s at 95-percentile.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，在GNSS失效环境下实现高精度共享单车追踪。
analysis.research_motivation: GNSS在复杂城市环境中易失效，而低成本惯性传感器存在累积漂移和鲁棒性差的问题；视觉/LiDAR等传感器不适合大规模部署。
analysis.problem: 在GNSS阻塞环境下，仅使用低成本惯性传感器实现高精度、鲁棒的共享单车追踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出惯性追踪框架，集成自行车机械约束与混合专家模型：利用多个专家模块捕获共享表示并通过门控机制加权，实现多任务学习和不确定性感知轨迹估计；基于踏板与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行周期性行为转换为车轮速度进行动态校准。
contributions: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，提升多任务学习性能。
利用踏板-后轮机械传动关系，将骑行行为转换为车轮速度实现动态校准。
analysis.experiments: 在滴滴出行共享单车真实骑行数据上实验，系统相比基线准确率提升至少12%，车轮速度误差在95百分位下低于0.5 m/s。
limitations: 可能依赖特定自行车机械结构，泛化到其他车型需调整。
未提及在极端骑行行为（如急停、跳跃）下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，在GNSS失效环境下实现高精度共享单车追踪。

papers.title: InsHuman: Towards Natural and Identity-Preserving Human Insertion
papers.abstract: Human insertion aims to naturally place specific individuals into a target background. Although existing image editing models may have such ability, they often produce failure cases, including inappropriate human pose in new background, inconsistent number of people, and modified facial identity. Moreover, publicly available human datasets often lack full-body portraits and realistic physical interaction between humans and their background. To address these challenges, we propose InsHuman for natural and identity-preserving human insertion. Specifically, we propose Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF), which detects foreground humans to obtain a binary mask and applies region-aware weighting to align the human regions between predicted and ground-truth latents, ensuring the person's pose, count, and overall appearance are coherently adapted to the target background.We further propose Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP), which detects and matches faces between the generated image and the source image in terms of face recognition features to enforce identity consistency for each face.In addition, we propose Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) strategy to construct BDP-InsHuman, a high-quality dataset with realistic human-background interactions. Experiments demonstrate that InsHuman achieves significant improvements in generating plausible images while keeping human identity unchanged.

analysis.tldr: 提出 InsHuman 框架，通过自适应融合与身份保持模块实现自然且保真的人体插入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在人体插入任务中常出现姿态不当、人数不一致、面部身份改变等问题，且公开数据集缺乏全身肖像和真实的人-背景交互。
analysis.problem: 如何自然地将特定个体插入目标背景，同时保持身份一致性和场景合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型在人体插入时存在失败模式：人体姿态与背景不协调、人数错误、面部身份被修改。
analysis.method: 提出 InsHuman 框架，包含三个组件：Human-Background Adaptive Fusion (HBAF) 通过前景检测和区域感知加权对齐人体区域；Face-to-Face ID-Preserving (FFIP) 利用人脸识别特征强制身份一致性；Bidirectional Data Pairing (BDP) 构建高质量数据集。
contributions: 提出 InsHuman 框架，实现自然且身份保持的人体插入。
提出 HBAF 和 FFIP 模块分别解决人体-背景融合和身份保持问题。
构建 BDP-InsHuman 数据集，包含真实的人-背景交互。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人脸检测和识别模型。
数据集规模和质量可能影响泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 InsHuman 框架，通过自适应融合与身份保持模块实现自然且保真的人体插入。

papers.title: GPO-V: Jailbreak Diffusion Vision Language Model by Global Probability Optimization
papers.abstract: Diffusion Vision-Language Models (dVLMs), built upon the non-causal foundations of Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs), have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in multimodal tasks by departing from the traditional autoregressive generation paradigm. While dVLMs appear inherently robust against conventional jailbreak tactics, which we categorize as Fixed Prefix Optimization (FPO) (e.g., anchoring responses with "Sure, here is"), this perceived resilience is deceptive. Our investigation into the safety landscape of dVLMs reveals a unique refusal pattern: Immediate Refusal and Progressive Refusal. We find that while FPO-based attacks often fail by triggering the latter, the progressive refinement process itself uncovers a novel, latent attack surface. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose Global Probability Optimization (GPO), a general jailbreak paradigm designed specifically for the denoising trajectory of masked diffusion models. Unlike prefix-based methods, GPO manipulates the global generative dynamics to bypass guardrails in diffusion language models. Building on this, we introduce GPO-V, the first visual-modality jailbreak framework tailored for dVLMs. Empirical results demonstrate that GPO-V produces stealthy perturbations with exceptional cross-model transferability, revealing a critical security gap in non-sequential generative architectures. Our findings underscore the critical urgency of addressing safety alignment in dVLMs. These results necessitate an immediate and fundamental re-evaluation of current defense paradigms to mitigate the unique risks of diffusion-based generation. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GPO-V-0250.

analysis.tldr: 提出GPO-V，首个针对扩散视觉语言模型的视觉模态越狱框架，利用全局概率优化绕过安全护栏。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散视觉语言模型（dVLMs）在非自回归生成中展现出强大能力，但其安全对齐尚未充分研究；传统越狱方法（如固定前缀优化）因触发渐进式拒绝而失效，但扩散模型的去噪轨迹暴露了新的攻击面。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散语言模型的去噪过程设计针对dVLMs的视觉模态越狱攻击，以绕过其安全护栏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: dVLMs表现出独特的拒绝模式：即时拒绝和渐进式拒绝；基于固定前缀的越狱攻击常因触发渐进式拒绝而失败，但渐进式精炼过程本身揭示了潜在的攻击面。
analysis.method: 提出全局概率优化（GPO）范式，通过操纵扩散模型的全局生成动态来绕过安全护栏；基于此设计GPO-V，首个针对dVLMs的视觉模态越狱框架，生成具有跨模型迁移性的隐蔽扰动。
contributions: 揭示了dVLMs中独特的拒绝模式（即时拒绝和渐进式拒绝），并指出固定前缀优化攻击的局限性。
提出GPO，一种针对掩码扩散模型去噪轨迹的通用越狱范式。
提出GPO-V，首个针对dVLMs的视觉模态越狱框架，实验证明其具有出色的跨模型迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于掩码扩散的dVLMs，对其他架构的泛化性未知。
攻击的隐蔽性和实际部署中的可检测性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GPO-V，首个针对扩散视觉语言模型的视觉模态越狱框架，利用全局概率优化绕过安全护栏。

papers.title: Exposing and Mitigating Temporal Attack in Deepfake Video Detection
papers.abstract: While spatiotemporal deepfake detectors achieve high AUC, our experiments reveal their susceptibility to evasion attacks. These models tend to overfit on fragile temporal spectrum cues, rather than learning robust semantic causality. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose SpInShield, a temporal spectral-invariant defense framework explicitly designed to decouple semantic motion from manipulatable spectral artifacts. We propose a learnable spectral adversary that dynamically synthesizes severe spectral deformations, simulating extreme attack scenarios. By employing a shortcut suppression optimization strategy, SpInShield compels the encoder to extract reliable forensic cues while purging unstable spectral statistics from the latent space. Experiments show that SpInShield obtains competitive performance on widely used datasets and outperforms the strongest baseline by 21.30 percentage points in AUC under simulated amplitude spectral attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpInShield框架，通过频谱不变性防御暴露并缓解深度伪造视频检测中的时间攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时空深度伪造检测器虽在AUC上表现优异，但易受逃避攻击，因为它们过度拟合脆弱的时域频谱线索而非学习鲁棒的语义因果性。
analysis.problem: 深度伪造视频检测模型对时域频谱攻击的脆弱性，以及如何设计防御机制使其关注语义运动而非可操纵的频谱伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型倾向于依赖不稳定的时域频谱统计特征，而非鲁棒的语义因果关系，导致在频谱攻击下性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出SpInShield，一种时域频谱不变性防御框架，包含可学习的频谱对手动态合成严重频谱变形，并通过捷径抑制优化策略迫使编码器提取可靠取证线索并清除不稳定频谱统计。
contributions: 揭示了深度伪造检测器对时域频谱攻击的脆弱性，并分析了其过拟合频谱线索的现象。
提出了SpInShield防御框架，通过频谱不变性学习和捷径抑制策略提升鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的数据集上取得有竞争力的性能，在模拟幅度频谱攻击下AUC比最强基线高21.30个百分点。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的频谱攻击有效，对其他攻击泛化性未知。
防御框架的计算开销未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpInShield框架，通过频谱不变性防御暴露并缓解深度伪造视频检测中的时间攻击。

papers.title: Rubric-based On-policy Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a powerful paradigm for model alignment, yet its reliance on teacher logits restricts its application to white-box scenarios. We contend that structured semantic rubrics can serve as a scalable alternative to teacher logits, enabling OPD using only teacher-generated responses. To prove it, we introduce ROPD, a simple yet foundational framework for rubric-based OPD. Specifically, ROPD induces prompt-specific rubrics from teacher-student contrasts, and then utilizes these rubrics to score the student rollouts for on-policy optimization. Empirically, ROPD outperforms the advanced logit-based OPD methods across most scenarios, and achieving up to a 10x gain in sample efficiency. These results position rubric-based OPD as a flexible, black-box-compatible alternative to the prevailing logit-based OPD, offering a simple yet strong baseline for scalable distillation across proprietary and open-source LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Peregrine123/ROPD_official.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于语义评分标准的在线蒸馏框架ROPD，用教师生成的评分标准替代logits实现黑盒对齐，样本效率提升10倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线蒸馏（OPD）依赖教师logits，限制了其在黑盒场景（如仅能访问教师模型输出）中的应用，需要一种更灵活的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用教师logits的情况下，仅利用教师生成的响应实现有效的在线蒸馏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ROPD框架，通过教师-学生对比生成提示特定的语义评分标准（rubrics），然后用这些评分标准对学生模型的自生成响应进行评分，用于在线策略优化。
contributions: 提出基于语义评分标准的在线蒸馏范式，替代传统的logits蒸馏，支持黑盒场景。
实验表明ROPD在多数场景下优于先进的logits蒸馏方法，样本效率提升高达10倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个场景下与logits蒸馏方法对比，ROPD在多数场景下表现更优，样本效率提升10倍。
limitations: 评分标准的生成可能依赖教师-学生对比的质量，对初始模型敏感。
未讨论评分标准在不同任务间的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于语义评分标准的在线蒸馏框架ROPD，用教师生成的评分标准替代logits实现黑盒对齐，样本效率提升10倍。

papers.title: Unsolvability Ceiling in Multi-LLM Routing: An Empirical Study of Evaluation Artifacts
papers.abstract: Efficient routing across multiple LLMs enables cost-quality tradeoffs by directing queries to the cheapest capable model. Prior work attributes routing headroom to an "unsolvability ceiling", queries no model in the pool can solve. We present a large-scale study of multi-tier LLM routing with 206,000 query-model pairs across six benchmarks (MMLU, MedQA, HumanEval, MBPP, Alpaca, ShareGPT) using the Gemma 4 and Llama 3.1 families. Evaluating with both LLM-as-a-judge and exact-match metrics, we show that a substantial portion of reported unsolvability stems from evaluation artifacts: (i) systematic judge biases favoring verbosity over correctness, (ii) truncation under fixed generation budgets, and (iii) output format mismatches. Through dual-judge validation and exact-match grounding, we reduce measured unsolvability across tasks. We introduce a decomposition framework attributing failures to these artifacts, revealing consistent patterns across domains and model families. These artifacts also distort router training signals: standard routers collapse to majority-class prediction (~79% smallest-tier optimal), confirmed via random-feature and shuffled-label controls, incurring a 13-17 percentage point opportunity cost. We provide actionable recommendations including dual-judge validation, exact-match anchoring, and cost-sensitive objectives. Our findings suggest existing routing headroom estimates are substantially inflated, underscoring the need for reliable evaluation protocols in multi-LLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 多LLM路由中的不可解性天花板很大程度上源于评估伪影，而非模型能力不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 多LLM路由通过将查询分配给最便宜的可用模型来实现成本-质量权衡，但现有工作将路由空间归因于“不可解性天花板”，即池中所有模型都无法解决的查询。准确评估这一天花板对于路由系统的可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化多LLM路由中“不可解性天花板”的评估伪影，包括评判者偏见、截断和格式不匹配，并分析其对路由训练信号的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过大规模实验观察到，报告中的不可解性很大一部分源于评估伪影：系统性的评判者偏见偏好冗长而非正确性、固定生成预算下的截断、输出格式不匹配。这些伪影还扭曲了路由训练信号，导致标准路由器崩溃为多数类预测（约79%选择最小层最优），造成13-17个百分点的机会成本。
analysis.method: 提出一个分解框架，将失败归因于三类评估伪影（评判者偏见、截断、格式不匹配），并通过双评判者验证和精确匹配锚定来减少测量的不可解性。
contributions: 大规模实证研究（206,000个查询-模型对，六个基准）揭示多LLM路由中不可解性天花板的主要来源是评估伪影。
提出分解框架和缓解策略（双评判者验证、精确匹配锚定、成本敏感目标），并给出可操作建议。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU、MedQA、HumanEval、MBPP、Alpaca、ShareGPT六个基准上，使用Gemma 4和Llama 3.1模型家族，共206,000个查询-模型对，采用LLM-as-a-judge和精确匹配两种评估指标。
limitations: 研究仅限于特定模型家族和基准，可能不适用于其他模型或任务。
缓解策略（如双评判者验证）可能增加评估成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多LLM路由中的不可解性天花板很大程度上源于评估伪影，而非模型能力不足。

papers.title: BalCapRL: A Balanced Framework for RL-Based MLLM Image Captioning
papers.abstract: Image captioning is one of the most fundamental tasks in computer vision. Owing to its open-ended nature, it has received significant attention in the era of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). In pursuit of ever more detailed and accurate captions, recent work has increasingly turned to reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing captioning-RL methods and evaluation metrics often emphasize a narrow notion of caption quality, inducing trade-offs across core dimensions of captioning. For example, utility-oriented objectives can encourage noisy, hallucinated, or overlong captions that improve downstream question answering while harming fluency, whereas arena-style objectives can favor fluent but generic descriptions with limited usefulness. To address this, we propose a more balanced RL framework that jointly optimizes utility-aware correctness, reference coverage, and linguistic quality. In order to effectively optimize the resulting continuous multi-objective reward formulation, we apply GDPO-style reward-decoupled normalization to continuous-valued captioning rewards and show that it improves performance over vanilla GRPO. Additionally, we introduce length-conditional reward masking, yielding a more suitable length penalty for captioning. Across LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL 3B and 7B base models, our method consistently improves caption quality, with peak gains of +13.6 DCScore, +9.0 CaptionQA, and +29.0 CapArena across different models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种平衡的RL框架，联合优化多目标奖励以提升MLLM图像描述质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于强化学习的图像描述方法往往只优化单一质量维度（如实用性或流畅性），导致描述存在噪声、幻觉或过于泛化等问题，缺乏对正确性、覆盖度和语言质量的综合考量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个平衡的强化学习框架，同时优化图像描述的实用性、参考覆盖度和语言质量，避免单一目标带来的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，实用性导向的目标会导致描述包含噪声、幻觉或过长，损害流畅性；而竞技场式目标则倾向于生成流畅但泛化的描述，实用性有限。
analysis.method: 提出BalCapRL框架，联合优化实用性正确性、参考覆盖度和语言质量三个奖励，采用GDPO风格的奖励解耦归一化处理连续值奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码以施加更合适的长度惩罚。
contributions: 提出一个平衡的多目标强化学习框架，联合优化图像描述的多个核心维度。
将GDPO风格的奖励解耦归一化应用于连续值描述奖励，并引入长度条件奖励掩码，提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen2.5-VL 3B/7B基模型上实验，DCScore提升+13.6，CaptionQA提升+9.0，CapArena提升+29.0。
limitations: 可能对奖励权重的选择敏感，需要调参。
未在更多样化的MLLM架构上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种平衡的RL框架，联合优化多目标奖励以提升MLLM图像描述质量。

papers.title: Offline Policy Optimization with Posterior Sampling
papers.abstract: A fundamental challenge in model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) lies in the trade-off between generalization and robustness against exploitation errors in out-of-distribution (OOD) regions. While OOD samples may capture valid underlying physical dynamics, they also introduce the risk of model exploitation. Existing methods typically address this risk through excessive pessimistic regularization, which ensures robustness but often sacrifices generalization. To overcome this limitation, we propose Posterior Sampling-based Policy Optimization (PSPO), which formulates dynamics modeling as a Bayesian inference process to derive a posterior that explicitly quantifies model fidelity. Through the integration of posterior sampling and constrained policy optimization, our method leverages dynamics-consistent OOD transitions for generalization while ensuring robustness against model exploitation. Theoretically, we formulate Q-value estimation under posterior sampling as a stochastic approximation problem and establish its convergence. We decompose policy optimization into a sequence of constrained subproblems, demonstrating that solving these subproblems guarantees monotonic improvement until convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks validate that PSPO achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于后验采样的离线策略优化方法，在模型泛化与鲁棒性之间取得更好平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线强化学习中，基于模型的方法面临泛化与鲁棒性的权衡：过度悲观正则化虽能避免模型利用，但牺牲了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在离线强化学习中同时利用分布外样本的泛化潜力并避免模型利用风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分布外样本可能包含有效物理动态，但也引入模型利用风险；现有方法通过过度悲观正则化牺牲泛化。
analysis.method: 将动力学建模视为贝叶斯推断过程，得到量化模型保真度的后验；结合后验采样与约束策略优化，利用动力学一致的分布外转换进行泛化，同时确保鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出PSPO框架，通过后验采样显式量化模型保真度，平衡泛化与鲁棒性。
理论证明Q值估计的收敛性，并证明策略优化单调改进直至收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，PSPO优于最先进基线。
limitations: 后验推断的计算成本可能较高。
对先验假设的敏感性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于后验采样的离线策略优化方法，在模型泛化与鲁棒性之间取得更好平衡。

papers.title: ST-Gen4D: Embedding 4D Spatiotemporal Cognition into World Model for 4D Generation
papers.abstract: Generative models have achieved success in producing apparently coherent 2D videos, but remain challenging in the physical world due to lack of 4D spatiotemporal scale. Typically, existing 4D generative models directly embed macro scale constraints to enhance overall spatiotemporal consistency. However, these methods only ensure global appearance coherence and fail to reveal the local dynamics of the physical world. Our insight is that global appearance structure and local dynamic topology empower 4D spatiotemporal cognition, thereby enabling 4D generation with spatiotemporal regularities. In this work, we propose ST-Gen4D, a 4D generation framework with 4D spatiotemporal cognition-based world model. Our model is guided by four key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal representation. We encode various modalities into multiple representations as a feature basis. 2) Spatiotemporal cognition. We sculpture these representations into global appearance graph and local dynamic graph, and fuse them via semantic-bridged spatiotemporal fusion to obtain a 4D cognition graph. 3) Spatiotemporal reasoning. We utilize a world model to derive future state based on the 4D cognition. 4) Spatiotemporal generation. We leverage the derived cognition as condition to guide latent diffusion for 4D Gaussian generation. By deeply integrating 4D intrinsic cognition with generative priors, our model guarantees the structural rationality and topological consistency of 4D generation. Moreover, we propose ST-4D datasets by aggregating public 4D datasets and self-built subset. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our ST-Gen4D across 3D and 4D generation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，通过嵌入4D时空认知的世界模型实现结构合理且拓扑一致的4D生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有4D生成模型仅保证全局外观一致性，无法揭示物理世界的局部动态，缺乏对4D时空尺度的深入认知。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有全局外观结构和局部动态拓扑一致性的4D内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法仅关注宏观尺度约束，导致全局外观连贯但局部动态缺失。
analysis.method: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，包含时空表征、时空认知（构建全局外观图和局部动态图并通过语义桥接融合）、时空推理（世界模型预测未来状态）和时空生成（以认知图为条件引导潜扩散生成4D高斯）。
contributions: 提出基于4D时空认知的世界模型生成框架ST-Gen4D。
设计全局外观图与局部动态图融合的4D认知图构建方法。
构建ST-4D数据集，整合公开4D数据集和自建子集。
analysis.experiments: 在3D和4D生成任务上进行了大量实验，展示了ST-Gen4D的优越性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量4D数据，数据稀缺时性能受限。
世界模型的推理计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ST-Gen4D框架，通过嵌入4D时空认知的世界模型实现结构合理且拓扑一致的4D生成。

papers.title: A Marine Debris Detection Framework for Ocean Robots via Self-Attention Enhancement and Feature Interaction Optimization
papers.abstract: Marine debris detection for ocean robot is crucial for ecological protection, yet performance is often degraded by low-quality images with blur, complex backgrounds, and small targets. To address these challenges, we propose YOLO-MD, an enhanced YOLO-based detection framework. A Dual-Branch Convolutional Enhanced Self-Attention (DB-CASA) module is designed to strengthen spatial-channel interactions, improving feature representation in degraded images. Additionally, a lightweight shift-based operation is introduced to enhance fine-grained feature extraction for objects of varying scales while maintaining parameter efficiency. We further propose SFG-Loss to mitigate class imbalance and optimization instability via dynamic sample reweighting. Experiments on the UODM dataset demonstrate that YOLO-MD achieves 0.875 precision, 0.822 F1-score, and 0.849 mAP50, outperforming the latest state-of-the-art methods. The effectiveness of this method has also been verified through real-world robotic edge deployment experiments.

analysis.tldr: 提出YOLO-MD框架，通过自注意力增强和特征交互优化提升海洋机器人垃圾检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 海洋垃圾检测对生态保护至关重要，但现有方法在模糊、复杂背景和小目标等低质量图像下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决海洋机器人检测中图像质量退化导致的特征表示不足和类不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出YOLO-MD框架，包含双分支卷积增强自注意力模块（DB-CASA）增强空间-通道交互，轻量级移位操作提升多尺度细粒度特征提取，以及SFG-Loss通过动态样本重加权缓解类不平衡和优化不稳定。
contributions: 提出DB-CASA模块增强退化图像中的特征表示。
设计轻量级移位操作提升多尺度目标特征提取效率。
提出SFG-Loss缓解类不平衡和优化不稳定问题。
analysis.experiments: 在UODM数据集上，YOLO-MD达到0.875精度、0.822 F1分数和0.849 mAP50，优于最新方法，并通过真实机器人边缘部署实验验证。
limitations: 可能对极端模糊或遮挡场景鲁棒性不足。
未提及在多种机器人平台上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出YOLO-MD框架，通过自注意力增强和特征交互优化提升海洋机器人垃圾检测性能。

papers.title: Velocity-Space 3D Asset Editing
papers.abstract: Editing a 3D asset locally, modifying a target region while preserving the rest, is a fundamental requirement of native 3D editing. Existing methods enforce locality through mechanisms external to the generator, such as manual 3D masks, post-hoc voxel merging, or 2D multi-view lifting. None of them intervene where the corruption actually originates: inside the ODE sampler. For a rectified-flow generator to achieve faithful local editing, its velocity field should be strong over the target editing region while vanishing on preserved content. Yet a single velocity field can hardly satisfy both requirements simultaneously, leading to three problems: (i) identity leakage that keeps the edit signal non-zero on preserved regions; (ii) no dedicated edit-amplification channel, so strengthening the edit inevitably perturbs identity; and (iii) an identity drag at the geometry and material stages, where a global condition pulls every token toward the target. We propose VS3D (Velocity-Space 3D Asset editing}), an inversion-free, training-free, and mask-free framework that addresses each problem with a targeted intervention inside the sampler. VS3D integrates three complementary modules, each corresponding to a specific stage of the editing pipeline. Reconstruction-Anchored Source Injection (RASI) absorbs identity leakage by turning the unconditional embedding into a per-step, asset-specific anchor calibrated through source reconstruction. Partial-Mean Guidance (PMG) amplifies the edit signal by contrasting high- and low-quality subsample estimates of the velocity difference, active only where a consistent edit exists. Twin-Agreement Residual injection (TAR) lets the sampler decide token by token what to preserve at the geometry and material stages.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需反转、无需训练、无需掩码的3D资产局部编辑框架VS3D，通过直接干预ODE采样器中的速度场来解决身份泄露、编辑信号放大和全局条件拖拽问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D局部编辑方法依赖外部机制（如手动3D掩码、体素合并或多视图提升），无法从根本上解决编辑过程中速度场在保留区域非零导致的身份泄露和编辑信号不足问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用掩码、反转或训练的情况下，实现3D资产的忠实局部编辑，同时避免身份泄露、编辑信号弱和全局条件拖拽。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，整流流生成器的速度场难以同时满足在编辑区域强、在保留区域消失的要求，导致三个问题：身份泄露（编辑信号在保留区域非零）、缺乏专用编辑放大通道（增强编辑必然扰动身份）、几何和材质阶段的全局条件拖拽。
analysis.method: VS3D框架包含三个模块：重建锚定源注入（RASI）通过源重建校准每步锚点吸收身份泄露；部分均值引导（PMG）通过对比高低质量子样本估计的速度差放大编辑信号；双一致残差注入（TAR）让采样器逐token决定几何和材质阶段保留的内容。
contributions: 提出VS3D，首个无需反转、训练和掩码的3D局部编辑框架，直接干预ODE采样器。
设计RASI、PMG和TAR三个互补模块，分别解决身份泄露、编辑信号放大和全局条件拖拽问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定生成器架构（整流流），泛化性待验证。
三个模块的协同调参可能复杂，实际效果需实验支撑。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需反转、无需训练、无需掩码的3D资产局部编辑框架VS3D，通过直接干预ODE采样器中的速度场来解决身份泄露、编辑信号放大和全局条件拖拽问题。

papers.title: Escaping the Diversity Trap in Robotic Manipulation via Anchor-Centric Adaptation
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer broad general capabilities, deploying them on specific hardware requires real-world adaptation to bridge the embodiment gap. Since robot demonstrations are costly, this adaptation must often occur under a strict data budget. In this work, we identify a critical diversity trap: the standard heuristic of "maximizing coverage" by collecting diverse, single-shot demonstrations can be self-defeating due to non-vanishing estimation noise. We formalize this phenomenon as a Coverage--Density Trade-off. By decomposing the policy error into estimation (density) and extrapolation (coverage) terms, we characterize an interior optimal allocation of unique conditions for a fixed budget. Guided by this analysis, we propose Anchor-Centric Adaptation (ACA), a two-stage framework that first stabilizes a policy skeleton through repeated demonstrations at core anchors, then selectively expands coverage to high-risk boundaries via teacher-forced error mining and constrained residual updates. Real-robot experiments validate our trade-off framework and demonstrate that ACA significantly improves task reliability and success rates over standard diverse sampling strategies under the same budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出锚点中心适应方法，通过重复演示核心锚点再选择性扩展覆盖，解决机器人操作中数据有限时的多样性陷阱问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型在特定硬件上部署时面临具身差距，需要真实世界适应，但机器人演示成本高昂，数据预算严格。
analysis.problem: 在有限数据预算下，标准启发式方法（最大化覆盖多样性）因估计噪声非零而陷入多样性陷阱，导致策略性能不佳。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出多样性陷阱：收集多样但单次演示的“最大化覆盖”策略因非零估计噪声而适得其反；形式化为覆盖-密度权衡，存在唯一条件数量的内部最优分配。
analysis.method: 提出锚点中心适应（ACA）两阶段框架：第一阶段通过核心锚点的重复演示稳定策略骨架；第二阶段通过教师强制错误挖掘和约束残差更新选择性扩展高风险边界覆盖。
contributions: 识别并形式化机器人操作中的多样性陷阱，提出覆盖-密度权衡理论。
提出锚点中心适应（ACA）方法，在固定预算下显著提升任务可靠性和成功率。
analysis.experiments: 真实机器人实验验证了权衡框架，并表明ACA在相同预算下优于标准多样采样策略。
limitations: 可能依赖锚点选择的质量，未讨论自动锚点发现。
仅验证了操作任务，未涉及其他机器人领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出锚点中心适应方法，通过重复演示核心锚点再选择性扩展覆盖，解决机器人操作中数据有限时的多样性陷阱问题。

papers.title: RELO: Reinforcement Learning to Localize for Visual Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Conventional visual object trackers localize targets using handcrafted spatial priors, often in the form of heatmaps. Such priors provide only surrogate supervision and are poorly aligned with tracking optimization and evaluation metrics, such as intersection over union (IoU) and area under the success curve (AUC). Here, we introduce RELO, a REinforcement-learning-to-LOcalize method for visual object tracking that formulates target localization as a Markov decision process. Specifically, RELO replaces handcrafted spatial priors with a localization policy learned over spatial positions via reinforcement learning, with rewards combining frame-level IoU and sequence-level AUC. We additionally introduce layer-aligned temporal token propagation to improve semantic consistency across frames, with negligible computational overhead. Across multiple benchmarks, RELO achieves superior results, attaining 57.5% AUC on LaSOText without template updates. This confirms that reward-driven localization provides an effective alternative to prior-driven localization for visual object tracking.

analysis.tldr: RELO 用强化学习替代手工空间先验，以 IoU 和 AUC 为奖励直接优化目标定位，在 LaSOText 上达到 57.5% AUC。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视觉目标跟踪器依赖手工设计的空间先验（如热图）进行定位，这些先验仅提供代理监督，与跟踪优化和评估指标（如 IoU、AUC）对齐不佳，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何将目标定位从手工先验驱动转变为奖励驱动，使其直接与跟踪性能指标对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将目标定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程，通过强化学习学习空间位置上的定位策略，奖励结合帧级 IoU 和序列级 AUC；并引入层对齐的时间令牌传播以增强语义一致性。
contributions: 提出 RELO，一种基于强化学习的视觉目标跟踪定位方法，直接优化 IoU 和 AUC。
引入层对齐的时间令牌传播，以极小计算开销提升帧间语义一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上取得优异结果，在 LaSOText 上无需模板更新即达到 57.5% AUC。
limitations: 可能对奖励函数设计敏感，需要仔细调整。
强化学习训练可能不稳定或收敛慢。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RELO 用强化学习替代手工空间先验，以 IoU 和 AUC 为奖励直接优化目标定位，在 LaSOText 上达到 57.5% AUC。

papers.title: MORPH-U: Multi-Objective Resilient Motion Planning for V2X-Enabled Autonomous Driving in High-Uncertainty Environments via Simulation
papers.abstract: V2X can warn an autonomous vehicle about hazards beyond line-of-sight, but it also brings uncertainty: messages may be delayed, dropped, or even forged. Meanwhile, map knowledge may change during a trip, forcing the vehicle to replan under tight real-time budgets. This paper studies how to make motion planning and low-level control robust to such uncertain, event-driven updates. We present MORPH-U, a CARLA-based closed-loop stack that fuses LiDAR/radar/camera with V2X (CAM/DENM) into a Local Dynamic Map (LDM) and triggers Hybrid-A* replanning when validated hazards or map changes affect the planned route. We expose the planning/control trade-offs via a multi-objective formulation over tracking error, safety margin (minimum TTC), responsiveness, and smoothness, and select operating points using Pareto-frontier analysis. To avoid unsafe replanning from faulty V2X triggers, MORPH-U adds a lightweight Byzantine-inspired acceptance gate that combines a quorum rule with an on-board sensor veto. Experiments in dynamic CARLA scenarios show that V2X-augmented LDM improves downstream safety, Pareto tuning provides controllable accuracy-comfort trade-offs, and the gate prevents replanning under saturated false-DENM injection ($p_{\text{attack}}=1.0$).

analysis.tldr: 提出MORPH-U，一种面向V2X高不确定性环境的鲁棒运动规划框架，融合多传感器与V2X信息，通过多目标优化和拜占庭容错门控提升安全性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: V2X通信能扩展自动驾驶感知范围，但消息延迟、丢失甚至伪造带来不确定性；同时地图知识可能动态变化，要求车辆在实时约束下重新规划。现有方法难以同时应对这些不确定性和实时性挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在V2X高不确定性环境下实现鲁棒的运动规划与底层控制，使车辆能安全应对通信故障和地图变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建CARLA闭环堆栈，融合LiDAR/雷达/相机与V2X消息到局部动态地图（LDM），触发Hybrid-A*重规划；通过多目标优化（跟踪误差、安全裕度、响应性、平滑性）和Pareto前沿分析选择工作点；添加轻量级拜占庭式接受门控（法定人数规则+车载传感器否决）过滤错误V2X触发。
contributions: 提出MORPH-U框架，融合多传感器与V2X信息实现鲁棒运动规划。
设计多目标优化与Pareto分析，量化规划与控制权衡。
引入拜占庭容错门控，有效防御V2X虚假触发攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在动态CARLA场景中实验，表明V2X增强LDM提升下游安全性，Pareto调优提供可控的精度-舒适度权衡，门控在饱和虚假DENM注入（p_attack=1.0）下阻止不安全重规划。
limitations: 实验仅在仿真环境中进行，未在真实车辆上验证。
拜占庭门控可能对非恶意但高延迟的消息产生误判。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MORPH-U，一种面向V2X高不确定性环境的鲁棒运动规划框架，融合多传感器与V2X信息，通过多目标优化和拜占庭容错门控提升安全性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Weather-Robust Scene Semantics with Vision-Aligned 4D Radar
papers.abstract: Cameras and LiDAR degrade in rain, fog, and snow, while millimeter-wave radar remains largely unaffected. We align a radar encoder to frozen SigLIP vision embeddings and decode structured scene captions through a frozen vision-language model (VLM) with approximately 7M trainable parameters. On K-RADAR with held-out fog, light snow, and heavy snow sequences, all radar configurations outperform a camera baseline that collapses to over 90% hallucination. We identify a token-norm mismatch as the dominant failure mode when bridging radar to a frozen VLM and show that projector-output LayerNorm resolves it. Analysis of encoder complexity, caption format, and pooling strategy reveals tradeoffs that inform future radar-VLM pipeline design.

analysis.tldr: 用视觉对齐的4D雷达实现天气鲁棒的场景语义理解，仅需7M可训练参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 相机和LiDAR在雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气下性能严重下降，而毫米波雷达几乎不受影响，因此需要利用雷达实现全天候场景理解。
analysis.problem: 如何将雷达信号与预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）对齐，实现天气鲁棒的场景语义描述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现将雷达桥接到冻结VLM时，token-norm不匹配是主要失败模式，通过投影输出层LayerNorm可解决。
analysis.method: 将雷达编码器对齐到冻结的SigLIP视觉嵌入，并通过冻结的VLM解码结构化场景描述，仅训练约7M参数。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级方法，将4D雷达与视觉语言模型对齐，实现天气鲁棒的场景语义理解。
识别并解决了雷达到VLM桥接中的token-norm不匹配问题。
在K-RADAR数据集上，所有雷达配置均优于相机基线，后者在恶劣天气下幻觉率超过90%。
analysis.experiments: 在K-RADAR数据集上，使用保留的雾、小雪和大雪序列进行评估，所有雷达配置均优于相机基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅使用K-RADAR数据集，可能在其他场景下泛化性有限。
未讨论雷达配置的细节（如分辨率、帧率）对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用视觉对齐的4D雷达实现天气鲁棒的场景语义理解，仅需7M可训练参数。

papers.title: MISA: Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.abstract: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) sets the state of the art for fine-grained inference-time sparse attention by introducing a learned token-wise indexer that scores every prefix token and selects the most relevant ones for the main attention. To remain expressive, the indexer uses many query heads (for example, 64 on DeepSeek-V3.2) that share the same selected token set; this multi-head design is precisely what makes the indexer the dominant cost on long contexts. We propose MISA (Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the DSA indexer that treats its indexer heads as a pool of mixture-of-experts. A lightweight router uses cheap block-level statistics to pick a query-dependent subset of only a few active heads, and only those heads run the heavy token-level scoring. This preserves the diversity of the original indexer pool while reducing the per-query cost from scoring every prefix token with every head to scoring it with only a handful of routed heads, plus a negligible router term computed on a small set of pooled keys. We further introduce a hierarchical variant of MISA that uses the routed pass to keep an enlarged candidate set and then re-ranks it with the original DSA indexer to recover the final selected tokens almost exactly. With only eight active heads and no additional training, MISA matches the dense DSA indexer on LongBench across DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-5 while running with eight and four times fewer indexer heads respectively, and outperforms HISA on average. It also preserves fully green Needle-in-a-Haystack heatmaps up to a 128K-token context and recovers more than 92% of the tokens selected by the DSA indexer per layer. Our TileLang kernel delivers roughly a 3.82 times speedup over DSA's original indexer kernel on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU.

analysis.tldr: MISA 用混合专家路由替代密集索引器头，在长上下文 LLM 推理中实现稀疏注意力加速且不损失精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文 LLM 推理中，细粒度稀疏注意力（如 DSA）的索引器因使用多头设计而成为主要计算瓶颈，需要降低其开销。
analysis.problem: DSA 索引器在长上下文中计算成本过高，因为每个查询头都要对所有前缀 token 进行评分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DSA 索引器使用多个查询头（如 64 个）共享同一 token 集，导致多头评分成为长上下文下的主导成本。
analysis.method: 将索引器头视为混合专家池，通过轻量路由器基于块级统计选择少量活跃头，仅这些头执行细粒度 token 评分；还提出分层变体以近似恢复原始选择。
contributions: 提出 MISA，一种即插即用的稀疏注意力索引器，通过混合专家路由大幅降低计算成本。
在 LongBench 上匹配 DSA 性能，同时减少 4-8 倍索引器头数，并在 H200 GPU 上实现约 3.82 倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在 LongBench 上使用 DeepSeek-V3.2 和 GLM-5 评估，MISA 匹配 DSA 性能；128K 上下文 needle-in-a-haystack 热图完全绿色；每层恢复超过 92% 的 DSA 选择 token。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如 DeepSeek-V3.2 和 GLM-5），泛化性需验证。
分层变体可能引入额外延迟，需权衡精度与速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MISA 用混合专家路由替代密集索引器头，在长上下文 LLM 推理中实现稀疏注意力加速且不损失精度。

papers.title: UniISP: A Unified ISP Framework for Both Human and Machine Vision
papers.abstract: Compared to RGB images, raw sensor data provides a richer representation of information, which is crucial for accurate recognition, particularly under challenging conditions such as low-light environments. The traditional Image Signal Processing (ISP) pipeline generates visually pleasing RGB images for human perception through a series of steps, but some of these operations may adversely impact the information integrity by introducing compression and loss. Furthermore, in computer vision tasks that directly utilize raw camera data, most existing methods integrate minimal ISP processing with downstream networks, yet the resulting images are often difficult to visualize or do not align with human aesthetic preferences. This paper proposes UniISP, a novel ISP framework designed to simultaneously meet the requirements of both human visual perception and computer vision applications. By incorporating a carefully designed Hybrid Attention Module (HAM) and employing supervised learning, the proposed method ensures that the generated images are visually appealing. Additionally, a Feature Adapter module is introduced to effectively propagate informative features from the ISP stage to subsequent downstream networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across various scenarios and multiple datasets, proving its generalizability and effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniISP框架，同时优化图像信号处理以兼顾人类视觉和机器视觉需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统ISP流程为人类视觉生成美观图像，但可能因压缩和损失影响信息完整性；而直接使用原始数据的计算机视觉方法难以生成可视化或符合人类审美的图像。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的ISP框架，同时满足人类视觉感知和计算机视觉应用的需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统ISP步骤可能损害信息完整性，现有方法难以兼顾视觉美观与机器任务性能。
analysis.method: 提出UniISP框架，包含混合注意力模块（HAM）用于生成视觉美观图像，以及特征适配器（Feature Adapter）将ISP阶段的信息特征有效传播到下游网络。
contributions: 提出UniISP框架，首次同时优化人类视觉和机器视觉的ISP处理。
设计混合注意力模块（HAM）和特征适配器，提升图像质量和下游任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和多种场景下达到最先进性能，证明泛化性和有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定下游网络结构。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UniISP框架，同时优化图像信号处理以兼顾人类视觉和机器视觉需求。

papers.title: GraphReAct: Reasoning and Acting for Multi-step Graph Inference
papers.abstract: Reasoning-acting frameworks enhance large language models (LLMs) by interleaving reasoning with actions for dynamic information acquisition. However, extending this paradigm to graph learning remains underexplored. Graph data is inherently structured, with information distributed across nodes and edges and encoded through both topology and latent representations.
