As a result, effective reasoning over graphs requires not only retrieving informative evidence from the graph, but also progressively refining the accumulated context during multi-step inference. In this work, we propose GraphReAct, a graph reasoning-acting framework that enables step-by-step inference over graph-structured data. Specifically, we design a graph-based action space with two complementary retrieval actions: topological retrieval, which captures local structural dependencies, and semantic retrieval, which accesses non-local but relevant evidence in the representation space. These actions dynamically expand the reasoning context. To further support multi-step reasoning, we introduce another type of action, context refinement, which distills and reorganizes accumulated information into a compact representation. By interleaving reasoning with both retrieval and refinement actions, our framework enables a progressive transition from context expansion to compression. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that GraphReAct consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, validating the effectiveness of reasoning-acting for graph learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出 GraphReAct，将推理-行动范式扩展到图学习，通过拓扑与语义检索及上下文精炼实现多步图推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理-行动框架主要针对文本或知识图谱，但图数据具有结构化特性，信息分布在节点和边中，需要逐步检索和精炼上下文，现有方法未能有效处理。
analysis.problem: 如何将推理-行动范式扩展到图学习，实现多步图推理中的动态信息获取和上下文精炼。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 图推理需要同时利用拓扑结构和语义表示，且多步推理中上下文需要从扩展逐步过渡到压缩。
analysis.method: 设计图动作空间，包含拓扑检索（捕获局部结构依赖）、语义检索（访问非局部相关证据）和上下文精炼（蒸馏重组累积信息）三类动作，通过交替推理与行动实现渐进式上下文扩展与压缩。
contributions: 首次将推理-行动框架系统性地引入图学习，提出 GraphReAct 框架。
设计包含拓扑检索、语义检索和上下文精炼的图动作空间，支持多步图推理。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上实验，GraphReAct 一致优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量图表示（如节点嵌入），在低质量表示下性能可能下降。
多步推理的计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 GraphReAct，将推理-行动范式扩展到图学习，通过拓扑与语义检索及上下文精炼实现多步图推理。

papers.title: UniD-Shift: Towards Unified Semantic Segmentation via Interpretable Share-Private Multimodal Decomposition
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation of large-scale 3D point clouds is crucial for applications such as autonomous driving and urban digital twins. However, the sparse sampling pattern of LiDAR and the view-dependent geometric distortion in image observations complicate cross-modal alignment and hinder stable fusion. Inspired by the fact that 2D images captured by cameras are representations of the 3D world, we recognize that the features learned from 2D and 3D segmentation share some common semantics, while other aspects remain modality-specific. This insight motivates a unified multimodal framework for joint 2D-3D semantic segmentation. We combine a SAM-based vision encoder with a SPTNet-based geometric encoder to extract complementary semantic and geometric representations. The resulting features from both modalities are explicitly decomposed into shared and private subspaces, where the shared components summarize semantic factors common to both domains, and the private components preserve properties that are unique to each modality. A lightweight attention-based fusion module aggregates the shared features into a consistent cross-modal representation, and a regularized training objective ensures both semantic alignment and subspace independence. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in segmentation accuracy over representative multimodal baselines, accompanied by competitive computational efficiency. Cross-domain evaluation on nuScenes USA-Singapore shows stable performance under distribution shifts, demonstrating strong generalization. The implementation code is publicly available at: https://github.com/shuaizhang69/UniD-Shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可解释的共享-私有多模态分解方法，实现2D-3D联合语义分割，在多个基准上提升精度并保持效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模3D点云语义分割对自动驾驶和城市数字孪生至关重要，但LiDAR稀疏采样与图像几何畸变导致跨模态对齐困难，现有融合方法不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合2D图像和3D点云特征，实现统一的语义分割，同时保持可解释性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D和3D特征存在共享语义和模态特有属性，显式分解为共享和私有子空间有助于对齐和融合。
analysis.method: 结合SAM视觉编码器和SPTNet几何编码器提取互补特征，将特征显式分解为共享和私有子空间，通过轻量注意力融合模块聚合共享特征，并采用正则化训练目标保证语义对齐和子空间独立性。
contributions: 提出一种可解释的共享-私有多模态分解框架，用于2D-3D联合语义分割。
在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上取得一致改进，并展示跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上验证，相比代表性多模态基线有持续改进，计算效率有竞争力；跨域评估（nuScenes USA-Singapore）显示分布偏移下性能稳定。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM和SPTNet的预训练质量。
跨域评估仅在一个数据集上进行，泛化性需更多验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可解释的共享-私有多模态分解方法，实现2D-3D联合语义分割，在多个基准上提升精度并保持效率。

papers.title: TTF: Temporal Token Fusion for Efficient Video-Language Model
papers.abstract: Video-language models (VLMs) face rapid inference costs as visual token counts scale with video length. For example, 32 frames at $448{\times}448$ resolution already yield >8,000 visual tokens in Qwen3-VL, making LLM prefill the dominant throughput bottleneck. Existing methods often rely on global similarity or attention-guided compression, incurring offsets to their gains. We propose \textbf{Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)}, a training-free, plug-and-play pre-LLM token compression framework that exploits structured temporal redundancy in video. TTF automatically selects an anchor frame, then for each subsequent frame, performs a local window similarity search (e.g.,$3\times 3$), fusing tokens that exceed a threshold. The compressed sequence maintains positional consistency across both prefill and decoding through coordinate realignment, enabling seamless integration with existing VLM pipelines. On Qwen3-VL-8B with threshold t=0.70, TTF removes about 67\% of visual tokens while retaining 99.5\% of the baseline accuracy and introducing only ${\approx}0.16$\,GFLOPs of matching overhead. Overall, TTF offers a practical, efficient solution for video understanding. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Cominder/ttf}{https://github.com/Cominder/ttf}

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的时序令牌融合方法TTF，压缩视频视觉令牌67%且保持99.5%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频语言模型推理成本随视频长度急剧增加，大量视觉令牌导致LLM预填充成为吞吐瓶颈，现有压缩方法依赖全局相似性或注意力引导，带来额外开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练、不引入显著开销的前提下，高效压缩视频视觉令牌数量以加速VLM推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频帧间存在结构化时序冗余，相邻帧局部区域高度相似，可通过局部窗口相似性搜索融合冗余令牌。
analysis.method: TTF：选择锚定帧，对后续帧进行局部窗口相似性搜索（如3×3），融合超过阈值的令牌，并通过坐标重对齐保持位置一致性。
contributions: 提出训练无关、即插即用的预LLM令牌压缩框架TTF，利用时序冗余压缩视觉令牌。
在Qwen3-VL-8B上，TTF去除约67%视觉令牌，保留99.5%基线准确率，仅增加约0.16 GFLOPs匹配开销。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL-8B模型上，阈值t=0.70时，去除约67%视觉令牌，保留99.5%基线准确率，匹配开销约0.16 GFLOPs。
limitations: 阈值t需要手动设定，可能影响不同视频的压缩率与精度平衡。
方法依赖局部窗口搜索，对快速运动或场景切换剧烈的视频可能效果下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练无关的时序令牌融合方法TTF，压缩视频视觉令牌67%且保持99.5%准确率。

papers.title: Task-Oriented Communication for Human Action Understanding via Edge-Cloud Co-Inference
papers.abstract: The expanding application of smart sensing has created a growing demand for the accurate understanding of human action at the network edge. Traditional approaches require massive video data to be transmitted from resource-constrained edge devices to powerful cloud servers, incurring prohibitive uplink bandwidth consumption and unacceptable latency while raising privacy concerns. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose a task-oriented communication framework for human action understanding (TOAU) through edge-cloud collaboration. Our framework utilizes a monocular pose estimator to extract continuous joint coordinates from raw videos, followed by a vector quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to convert these coordinates into discrete motion tokens. Consequently, only a compact sequence of codebook indices is transmitted over the network, consuming as few as 9 bits per frame and avoiding privacy leakages. At the cloud server, a lightweight projector aligns these motion tokens with the embedding space of a large vision-language model (VLM) to facilitate complex action understanding, which is trained with an efficient instruction tuning paradigm. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmarks demonstrate that our TOAU system reduces the transmission payload to approximately 1\% and the system latency to around 20\% compared to video codec-based solutions, while delivering comparable action understanding accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务导向通信框架TOAU，通过边缘端提取人体姿态并编码为离散运动令牌，仅传输极少量数据至云端VLM进行动作理解，大幅降低带宽和延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法需要将大量视频数据从资源受限的边缘设备传输到云端，导致带宽消耗大、延迟高且存在隐私风险，亟需高效的任务导向通信方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘-云协同推理中，仅传输极少量数据即可实现准确的人体动作理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 边缘端使用单目姿态估计器提取关节坐标，经VQ-VAE编码为离散运动令牌（每帧9比特）；云端通过轻量投影器将运动令牌对齐到大型视觉-语言模型的嵌入空间，并采用指令微调范式训练。
contributions: 提出任务导向通信框架TOAU，实现边缘-云协同的人体动作理解。
将姿态序列压缩为离散运动令牌，传输量仅为视频编解码方案的1%，延迟降至20%。
在三个基准上验证了与视频方案相当的准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上评估，TOAU将传输负载降至约1%，系统延迟降至约20%，同时保持可比的动作理解准确率。
limitations: 依赖单目姿态估计的准确性，在遮挡或复杂场景下可能受限。
仅针对人体动作理解，泛化到其他任务需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务导向通信框架TOAU，通过边缘端提取人体姿态并编码为离散运动令牌，仅传输极少量数据至云端VLM进行动作理解，大幅降低带宽和延迟。

papers.title: Confidence-Aware Alignment Makes Reasoning LLMs More Reliable
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models often reach correct answers through flawed intermediate steps, creating a gap between final accuracy and reasoning reliability. Existing alignment strategies address this with external verifiers or massive sampling, limiting scalability. In this work, we introduce CASPO (Confidence-Aware Step-wise Preference Optimization), a framework that aligns token-level confidence with step-wise logical correctness through iterative Direct Preference Optimization, without training a separate reward model. During inference, we propose Confidence-aware Thought (CaT), which leverages this calibrated confidence to dynamically prune uncertain reasoning branches with negligible O(V) latency. Experiments across ten benchmarks and multiple model families show that CASPO consistently improves reasoning reliability and inference efficiency. CASPO scales to Qwen3-8B-Base and surpasses tree-search baselines on AIME'24 and AIME'25 without using reward-model data. We also release a step-wise dataset with confidence annotations to support fine-grained analysis of reasoning reliability. Code is available at https://github.com/Thecommonirin/CASPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出CASPO框架，通过置信度感知的逐步偏好优化对齐推理步骤的置信度与正确性，提升推理可靠性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型常通过有缺陷的中间步骤得出正确答案，导致最终准确性与推理可靠性之间存在差距；现有对齐方法依赖外部验证器或大量采样，可扩展性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练独立奖励模型的情况下，对齐推理步骤的置信度与逻辑正确性，并利用校准后的置信度动态剪枝不确定的推理分支。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大型推理模型常通过有缺陷的中间步骤得出正确答案，形成最终准确性与推理可靠性之间的差距。
analysis.method: 提出CASPO框架，通过迭代直接偏好优化对齐token级置信度与逐步逻辑正确性；推理时提出Confidence-aware Thought (CaT)，利用校准后的置信度动态剪枝不确定推理分支，仅增加O(V)延迟。
contributions: 提出CASPO框架，无需独立奖励模型即可对齐置信度与逐步正确性。
提出CaT推理策略，利用校准置信度动态剪枝，提升推理效率。
在多个基准和模型族上验证了CASPO在推理可靠性和效率上的提升，并开源逐步置信度标注数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在十个基准和多个模型族上进行实验，CASPO在AIME'24和AIME'25上超越树搜索基线，且可扩展到Qwen3-8B-Base。
limitations: 可能对置信度校准的初始质量敏感。
动态剪枝策略在极端不确定场景下可能过度剪枝。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CASPO框架，通过置信度感知的逐步偏好优化对齐推理步骤的置信度与正确性，提升推理可靠性和效率。

papers.title: Disambiguating 2D-3D Correspondences in Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields for Visual Localization
papers.abstract: While Gaussian Splatting-based Feature Fields (GSFFs) have shown promise for visual localization, this paper highlights that photometrically optimized GSFFs are inherently ill-suited for 2D-3D matching. The volumetric extent of each Gaussian induces many-to-one pixel-to-point mappings that destabilize PnP-based pose estimation, while photometric optimization gives rise to superfluous Gaussians devoid of multi-view consistency. To address these issues, we propose SplitGS-Loc, a localization-specialized GSFFs construction framework that disambiguates 2D-3D correspondences by exploiting Gaussian attributes. Our key design, Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting, decomposes each Gaussian into smaller Gaussians, replacing ambiguous many-to-one with precise one-to-one correspondences. In parallel, we exploit composition weights from GS rasterization to select Gaussians that significantly and consistently contribute across multiple views and aggregate discriminative features through strong pixel-Gaussian associations, enforcing multi-view consistency. The resulting compact yet discriminative feature fields enable stable PnP convergence, achieving state-of-the-art performance on localization benchmarks. Extensive experiments validate that SplitGS-Loc extends the utility of photometric GSFFs to accurate and efficient localization by exploiting Gaussian attributes, without per-scene training or iterative pose refinement.

analysis.tldr: SplitGS-Loc通过高斯分裂和属性选择，解决了GSFFs中2D-3D匹配模糊问题，实现高效视觉定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉定位需要精确的2D-3D对应，但现有基于高斯泼溅的特征场（GSFFs）因高斯体积导致多对一映射，且光度优化产生多余高斯，影响PnP姿态估计的稳定性。
analysis.problem: GSFFs中2D-3D对应模糊（多对一映射）和缺乏多视图一致性的问题，导致PnP姿态估计不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：光度优化的GSFFs天生不适合2D-3D匹配，每个高斯的体积范围导致像素到点的多对一映射，破坏PnP稳定性；光度优化产生多余高斯，缺乏多视图一致性。
analysis.method: 提出SplitGS-Loc框架，核心是混合高斯分裂（Mixture-of-Gaussians-based splitting），将每个高斯分解为更小的高斯，将模糊的多对一对应替换为精确的一对一对应；同时利用GS光栅化的组合权重选择在多视图下显著且一致贡献的高斯，并通过强像素-高斯关联聚合判别特征，强制多视图一致性。
contributions: 揭示了光度优化的GSFFs在2D-3D匹配中的固有问题（多对一映射和多余高斯）。
提出了SplitGS-Loc框架，通过高斯分裂和属性选择实现精确的一对一对应和多视图一致性。
在多个定位基准上达到最先进性能，无需逐场景训练或迭代姿态优化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个定位基准上进行了广泛实验，验证了SplitGS-Loc的有效性，达到最先进性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高斯分裂的质量，对初始高斯分布敏感。
未讨论在动态场景或极端光照条件下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SplitGS-Loc通过高斯分裂和属性选择，解决了GSFFs中2D-3D匹配模糊问题，实现高效视觉定位。

papers.title: SoLAR: Error-Resilient Streamable Long-Horizon Free-Viewpoint Video Reconstruction with Anchor Activation and Latent Recalibration
papers.abstract: Free-Viewpoint Video (FVV) has emerged as a cornerstone of next-generation immersive media systems and attracted widespread attention. Previous methods primarily focus on short video sequences and suffer from significant performance degradation when processing long-horizon free-viewpoint video (LFVV). Motivated by bit allocation theory, we analyze dynamic-anchor-based volumetric video representation within a rate-distortion optimization framework and propose \textbf{SoLAR}, which is the first error-resilient streamable FVV framework that maintains stable reconstruction quality on long sequences without requiring group-of-pictures partitioning. We propose the Anchor Activation Dynamics (AAD), which enables dynamic anchors to model non-rigid transformations by dynamically activating informative anchors and suppressing redundant ones. Furthermore, we introduce Latent Discrepancy Aware Recalibration (LaDAR), which is a mechanism to identify discrepancies between latent representations and recalibrate the correspondences encoded in the network, effectively mitigating error propagation in LFVV without compromising real-time performance or storage compactness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textbf{SoLAR} achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance while maintaining minimum storage overhead, which provides a new direction for LFVV reconstruction and advances the practical deployment of immersive systems. Demo free-viewpoint videos are provided in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向长时自由视角视频的容错流式重建框架，通过锚点激活动态与潜在重校准抑制误差传播。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自由视角视频方法主要针对短序列，处理长时序列时性能显著下降，且缺乏容错流式能力，限制了沉浸式系统的实际部署。
analysis.problem: 长时自由视角视频重建中的误差传播和存储开销问题，以及现有方法无法流式处理长序列的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于比特分配理论分析，动态锚点表示在长序列中因冗余锚点和潜在表示差异导致误差累积。
analysis.method: 提出SoLAR框架，包含锚点激活动态（AAD）动态激活信息锚点并抑制冗余，以及潜在差异感知重校准（LaDAR）识别并修正潜在表示差异，抑制误差传播。
contributions: 首个面向长时自由视角视频的容错流式重建框架，无需分组划分即可保持稳定质量。
提出锚点激活动态和潜在差异感知重校准机制，有效抑制误差传播并保持实时性与存储紧凑性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到SOTA重建性能且存储开销最小。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动态锚点表示，泛化性需验证。
未提及对极端长序列或复杂场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向长时自由视角视频的容错流式重建框架，通过锚点激活动态与潜在重校准抑制误差传播。

papers.title: Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate
papers.abstract: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出多轴评估协议Mage，揭示编译通过率在LLM生成可执行游戏场景中的误导性，并发现结构条件化可恢复领域忠实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 编译通过率是LLM代码生成的主流评估指标，但对于多组件领域特定工件（如游戏场景）可能具有误导性，需要更全面的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有评估仅依赖编译通过率，无法捕捉生成场景的结构忠实性和机制符合度，导致评估结果与功能正确性脱节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接NL到C#生成虽运行时通过率最高（43%），但结构空洞（机制F1≈0.12）；结构IR条件化使运行时通过率减半，但恢复领域忠实结构（F1高达1.00）；行为级与全场景粒度在统计上无显著差异，表明输入粒度饱和。
analysis.method: 提出四轴评估协议Mage：编译成功、运行时成功、结构忠实性、机制符合度，应用于858次生成尝试，涵盖4个LLM、26个Unity目标模式及两种IR粒度。
contributions: 揭示编译通过率在游戏场景生成中与功能正确性反相关
提出多轴评估协议Mage，检测编译率无法发现的偏差
发布基准、回放日志及逐记录指标
analysis.experiments: 在858次生成尝试上评估4个开源LLM（7B-30B），使用26个手工制作的Unity目标模式及两种自动提取的IR粒度。
limitations: 仅针对Unity游戏场景，泛化性待验证
未涉及更大规模模型或商业模型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多轴评估协议Mage，揭示编译通过率在LLM生成可执行游戏场景中的误导性，并发现结构条件化可恢复领域忠实性。

papers.title: Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in orchestrating tools for reasoning tasks. However, existing methods rely on a step-wise paradigm that lacks a global perspective, which causes error accumulation over long horizons and restricts generalization to unseen tools. To overcome these limitations, we propose Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning (FlowAgent), which reconceptualizes tool chaining as continuous trajectory generation within a semantic space. To systematically evaluate this paradigm, we introduce the first plan-level closed-loop benchmark dedicated to plan-level agentic reasoning in dynamic real-world environments. Specifically, the proposed FlowAgent leverages conditional flow matching to generate continuous latent trajectories, providing a global planning perspective to ensure coherent and robust tool execution. Theoretically, we establish formal bounds on utility convergence and prove that our continuous formulation fundamentally guarantees robust generalization and error attenuation. Empirical evaluations show that FlowAgent achieves superior robustness and adaptability in long-horizon reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: FlowAgent将工具链重构为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，提升长程推理的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM工具编排方法采用逐步范式，缺乏全局视角，导致长程推理中误差累积且难以泛化到未见工具。
analysis.problem: 如何克服逐步工具链的误差累积和泛化限制，实现全局一致的鲁棒工具推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 逐步范式在长程任务中误差累积，且对未见工具泛化能力差。
analysis.method: 提出FlowAgent，利用条件流匹配在语义空间中生成连续潜在轨迹，将工具链重构为连续流，提供全局规划视角。
contributions: 提出FlowAgent框架，将工具链建模为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，实现全局规划。
引入首个计划级闭环基准，用于动态真实环境中计划级智能体推理的系统评估。
理论上证明了连续公式的效用收敛界、鲁棒泛化和误差衰减保证。
analysis.experiments: 在长程推理任务上，FlowAgent展现出优越的鲁棒性和适应性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的工具语义空间表示。
连续轨迹生成的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowAgent将工具链重构为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，提升长程推理的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

papers.title: ShellfishNet: A Domain-Specific Benchmark for Visual Recognition of Marine Molluscs
papers.abstract: The decline of global shellfish biodiversity poses a severe threat to coastal ecosystems. Although artificial intelligence (AI) technologies show potential for automated ecological monitoring, existing marine benthic datasets often lack adaptation to the complexities of real underwater environments (e.g., variable lighting conditions and diverse species postures), posing challenges for the robust generalization of vision models in practical ecological monitoring. To address this problem, we construct ShellfishNet, a comprehensive image benchmark dataset designed specifically for real-world ecological monitoring constraints. Comprising 8,691 images across 32 taxa, this dataset includes a curated subset annotated with descriptive captions. It is constructed through field photography and web scraping, encompassing samples from complex real-world environments. Based on this benchmark, we systematically evaluate 80 representative neural network models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), State Space Models (SSMs), and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods. Furthermore, we evaluate the performance of fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) models and investigate the image captioning capabilities of several mainstream multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Meanwhile, we introduce image corruption benchmark tests to simulate common underwater degradation scenarios (turbidity, severe weather) and assess the robustness of vision models, enabling trustworthy decisions on ecological protection in the wild. ShellfishNet is dedicated to providing a data foundation and a model-evaluation benchmark for the intelligent monitoring of benthic organisms.

analysis.tldr: ShellfishNet 是一个面向海洋软体动物视觉识别的领域专用基准数据集，系统评估了80种视觉模型并引入图像退化测试。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球贝类生物多样性下降威胁沿海生态系统，现有海洋底栖数据集缺乏对真实水下环境复杂性的适应，导致视觉模型在生态监测中泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对真实水下环境（如光照变化、物种姿态多样）的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集和模型鲁棒性评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 ShellfishNet 数据集（8,691张图像，32个分类），包含描述性标注子集；系统评估80种模型（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL）及细粒度分类和多模态大模型图像描述能力；引入图像退化基准测试模拟水下退化场景。
contributions: 构建了面向真实生态监测约束的海洋软体动物视觉识别基准数据集 ShellfishNet。
系统评估了80种代表性视觉模型，并引入图像退化测试以评估模型鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在 ShellfishNet 上评估了80种模型（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL），细粒度分类模型及多模态大模型的图像描述能力，并进行了图像退化鲁棒性测试。
limitations: 数据集规模相对较小（8,691张图像），可能限制模型泛化能力。
仅涵盖32个分类，物种多样性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShellfishNet 是一个面向海洋软体动物视觉识别的领域专用基准数据集，系统评估了80种视觉模型并引入图像退化测试。

papers.title: RCoT-Seg: Reinforced Chain-of-Thought for Video Reasoning and Segmentation
papers.abstract: Video Reasoning Segmentation (VRS) aims to segment target objects in videos based on implicit instructions that convey human intent and temporal logic. Existing MLLM-based methods predict masks with a [SEG] token after selecting frames via simple sampling or an auxiliary MLLM, where limited supervision and frame-language similarity rules often yield narrow-scope keyframe choices that weaken holistic temporal understanding and lead to brittle localization in complex multi-object scenes. To address these issues, we introduce RCoT-Seg, a video-of-thought framework that factorizes VRS into temporal video reasoning (TVR) and keyframe target perception (KTP), explicitly separating temporal reasoning from spatial perception. Specifically, in the TVR stage, an agentic keyframe selection module, initialized with a curated CoT-start corpus and refined by GRPO under task-aligned rewards, is proposed to generate and reselect the keyframe through self-evaluation, strengthening moment localization and temporal reasoning. In the KTP stage, RCoT-Seg performs high-resolution segmentation on the selected frame and propagates masks with SAM2-based methods across the sequence, replacing heuristic sampling and external selectors while improving spatial precision and inter-frame consistency. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RCoT-Seg achieves favorable performance against the state-of-the-art methods. The code and models will be publicly released at https://github.com/Victor-wjw/RCoT-Seg.

analysis.tldr: 提出视频推理分割框架RCoT-Seg，通过强化链式思维将时间推理与空间感知分离，提升关键帧选择和分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频推理分割方法依赖简单采样或辅助MLLM选择关键帧，监督有限且帧-语言相似性规则导致关键帧选择范围窄，削弱了整体时间理解，在复杂多目标场景中定位脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何将视频推理分割中的时间推理与空间感知显式分离，并实现鲁棒的关键帧选择和精确分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法通过简单采样或辅助MLLM选择关键帧，受限于有限监督和帧-语言相似性规则，导致关键帧选择范围狭窄，削弱了整体时间理解，在复杂多目标场景中定位脆弱。
analysis.method: 提出RCoT-Seg框架，将VRS分解为时间视频推理（TVR）和关键帧目标感知（KTP）两个阶段。TVR阶段使用基于GRPO优化的智能体关键帧选择模块，通过自评估生成和重新选择关键帧；KTP阶段在选定帧上进行高分辨率分割，并使用SAM2方法将掩码传播到整个序列。
contributions: 提出RCoT-Seg，一种将视频推理分割分解为时间推理和空间感知的视频思维框架。
设计基于GRPO的智能体关键帧选择模块，通过自评估和任务对齐奖励优化关键帧选择。
在KTP阶段结合高分辨率分割和SAM2传播，提升空间精度和帧间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频推理分割基准上，RCoT-Seg取得了优于现有方法的结果。代码和模型将公开。
limitations: 可能依赖SAM2的传播质量，在快速运动或遮挡场景中传播可能失败。
GRPO训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视频推理分割框架RCoT-Seg，通过强化链式思维将时间推理与空间感知分离，提升关键帧选择和分割精度。

papers.title: Rethinking Importance Sampling in LLM Policy Optimization: A Cumulative Token Perspective
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning, including reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), has emerged as a powerful approach for LLM post-training. Central to these approaches is the design of the importance sampling (IS) ratio used in off-policy policy-gradient estimation. Existing methods face a fundamental bias-variance dilemma: token-level IS ratios, as adopted by PPO (Schulman et al., 2017) and GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), introduce bias by ignoring prefix state distribution mismatch; full sequence ratios provide exact trajectory-level correction but suffer from high variance due to the multiplicative accumulation of per-token ratios, while GSPO (Zheng et al., 2025) improves numerical stability via length normalization at the cost of deviating from the exact full-sequence IS correction. In this work, we identify the cumulative token IS ratio, the product of per-token ratios up to position $t$, as a theoretically principled solution to this dilemma. We prove that, under the token-level policy-gradient formulation, this ratio provides an unbiased prefix correction for each token-level gradient term and has strictly lower variance than the full sequence ratio. Building on this insight, we propose CTPO (Cumulative Token Policy Optimization), which combines the cumulative token IS ratio with position-adaptive clipping that scales log-space clip bounds according to the natural $\sqrt{t}$ growth of the cumulative log-ratio. This yields more consistent regularization across token positions. We implement and evaluate CTPO in the tool-integrated reasoning setting on several challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, achieving the best average performance across both model scales compared with strong GRPO and GSPO baselines. Code will be available at https://github.com/horizon-llm/CTPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出累积token重要性采样比CTPO，在LLM策略优化中实现无偏低方差梯度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM策略优化方法（如PPO、GRPO、GSPO）在重要性采样比设计上面临偏差-方差困境：token级比有偏，全序列比方差高，GSPO长度归一化偏离精确校正。需要一种理论上无偏且方差更低的方案。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM离线策略梯度估计中重要性采样比的偏差-方差权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出token级IS比因忽略前缀状态分布失配而引入偏差；全序列比因逐token比值的乘积累积导致高方差；GSPO通过长度归一化改善数值稳定性但偏离精确校正。
analysis.method: 提出累积token重要性采样比（位置t处前t个token比值的乘积），证明其在token级策略梯度公式下提供无偏前缀校正且方差严格低于全序列比；结合位置自适应裁剪（对数空间裁剪边界按√t增长）得到CTPO算法。
contributions: 识别累积token IS比为理论上无偏且低方差的解决方案，并给出严格证明。
提出CTPO算法，结合累积token IS比与位置自适应裁剪，在工具集成推理任务上取得最佳平均性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的数学推理基准上，与GRPO和GSPO基线比较，CTPO在两个模型规模下均取得最佳平均性能。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖工具集成推理场景，未验证其他LLM后训练任务。
位置自适应裁剪的√t增长假设可能不适用于所有模型或任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出累积token重要性采样比CTPO，在LLM策略优化中实现无偏低方差梯度估计。

papers.title: SparseRL-Sync: Lossless Weight Synchronization with ~100x Less Communication
papers.abstract: In large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) systems with decoupled Trainer-Rollout execution, the Trainer must regularly synchronize policy weights to the Rollout side to limit policy staleness. When inter-node bandwidth is abundant, such synchronization is usually only a small fraction of end-to-end cost. As model size grows, however, the communication demand rises rapidly. In bandwidth-constrained or network-variable deployments -- for example, cross-datacenter or cross-cluster settings, heterogeneous resource pools, and online RL -- weight synchronization can become a dominant bottleneck for throughput and tail latency. We observe that, in mainstream large-model RL training, the locations where parameters actually change are highly sparse at the element level (often 99%+ sparsity). Building on this observation, we propose and implement SparseRL-Sync, which replaces full-weight transfers with a lossless sparse update payload (indices and values) that can be exactly reconstructed on the inference side, thereby preserving 100% fidelity. Under a simplified cost model, sparse synchronization reduces the per-update communication volume from S to approximately S/X; with 99% sparsity (X ~ 100), this yields about a 100x reduction in transmitted data. Combined with appropriate bucketing, SparseRL-Sync also reduces launch and control-plane overhead, significantly improving scalability and end-to-end efficiency in bandwidth-limited and highly asynchronous RL settings.

analysis.tldr: 利用参数更新的高度稀疏性，将RL权重同步通信量降低约100倍，且无损。
analysis.research_motivation: 在大规模强化学习系统中，Trainer与Rollout之间的权重同步在带宽受限或网络波动环境下成为吞吐和延迟瓶颈，现有全量传输方式通信开销随模型规模增长而急剧上升。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失模型精度的前提下，大幅降低分布式RL系统中跨节点权重同步的通信量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到主流大模型RL训练中，参数实际变化的位置在元素级别高度稀疏（通常99%以上稀疏性）。
analysis.method: 提出SparseRL-Sync，用稀疏更新载荷（索引+值）替代全权重传输，在推理侧精确重建，实现无损同步；结合分桶策略减少启动和控制平面开销。
contributions: 发现并利用RL训练中参数更新的高度稀疏性（>99%），提出无损稀疏同步方法。
实现SparseRL-Sync系统，在保持100%保真度下将通信量降低约100倍，并提升可扩展性和端到端效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 稀疏性假设可能不适用于所有RL场景（如小模型或密集更新算法）。
实际部署中索引和值的编码开销可能部分抵消通信收益。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用参数更新的高度稀疏性，将RL权重同步通信量降低约100倍，且无损。

papers.title: GC-ART: Global Learnable Second-Order Rational Tone Curves for Illumination Robustness
papers.abstract: We introduce GC-ART (Global Curve Adaptive Rational Tone-mapping), a lightweight differentiable pre-processing module for robust image classification. GC-ART predicts an endpoint-pinned rational tone curve from per-channel soft histograms using a 643-parameter MLP, then applies the curve pointwise before the classifier. The module is trained end-to-end with cross-entropy and a soft monotonicity penalty. On CIFAR-10 with a CIFAR-style ResNet-18, GC-ART matches clean accuracy with the unenhanced baseline and other learned enhancers, improves over the baseline on multiplicative darkening, and achieves the best learned-method result on contrast corruption (48.45% vs. 46.27% for the baseline and 47.13% for Zero-DCE++). These results suggest that histogram-conditioned rational curves can learn useful global tone corrections, including contrast-expanding behavior, while preserving edge locations by construction through pointwise mapping. GC-ART also uses substantially fewer FLOPs than convolutional learned enhancers at 32 x 32. The current hyperparameters are untuned, leaving room for systematic improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级可微分预处理模块GC-ART，通过直方图条件有理色调曲线提升图像分类的照明鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像分类在光照变化下性能下降，现有增强方法计算成本高或破坏边缘结构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量、可微分且保持边缘的预处理模块，提升分类器对光照变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GC-ART模块：使用643参数MLP从每通道软直方图预测端点固定的有理色调曲线，逐点应用曲线，端到端训练，损失函数包括交叉熵和软单调性惩罚。
contributions: 提出基于直方图条件有理色调曲线的轻量级可微分预处理模块。
在CIFAR-10上展示了对乘性变暗和对比度损坏的改进，且计算量远低于卷积增强器。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上使用CIFAR风格的ResNet-18，对比了干净准确率、乘性变暗和对比度损坏性能，GC-ART在对比度损坏上达到48.45%，优于基线46.27%和Zero-DCE++的47.13%。
limitations: 当前超参数未调优，性能可能未达最优。
仅在CIFAR-10上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级可微分预处理模块GC-ART，通过直方图条件有理色调曲线提升图像分类的照明鲁棒性。

papers.title: Teacher-Feature Drifting: One-Step Diffusion Distillation with Pretrained Diffusion Representations
papers.abstract: Sampling from pretrained diffusion and flow-matching models typically requires many forward passes to generate diverse and high-fidelity images. Existing distillation methods often rely on multiple auxiliary networks, carefully designed training stages, or complex optimization pipelines. In this work, we revisit the recently proposed Drifting Model objective and show that a single drifting loss can be directly used to simplify one step distillation. A key observation is that the pretrained diffusion teacher itself already provides a strong representation space. Unlike the original Drifting Model, which relies on an additional pretrained feature extractor, we use intermediate hidden states of the pretrained teacher model as the feature representation. This removes the need for training or introducing an extra representation network while preserving a semantically meaningful feature geometry for drifting. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight mode coverage loss to mitigate mode collapse during distillation and encourage the student generator to cover diverse teacher-supported regions. Extensive experiments on ImageNet and SDXL demonstrate that our method achieves efficient one step generation with competitive image quality and diversity, achieving FID scores of 1.58 on ImageNet-64$\times$64 and 18.4 on SDXL, while substantially simplifying the overall distillation framework.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练扩散模型的中间表征作为特征空间，简化一步扩散蒸馏，无需额外特征提取网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散蒸馏方法依赖多个辅助网络、精心设计的训练阶段或复杂优化流程，导致框架复杂且资源消耗大。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外特征提取网络的前提下，简化一步扩散蒸馏并保持生成质量与多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练扩散教师模型本身已提供强表征空间，其中间隐藏状态可作为语义有意义的特征几何用于漂移损失。
analysis.method: 使用预训练教师模型的中间隐藏状态作为特征表示，替代原有Drifting Model中的额外特征提取器；并引入轻量级模式覆盖损失缓解模式坍塌。
contributions: 提出利用教师模型中间表征简化一步扩散蒸馏，无需额外特征网络。
引入轻量级模式覆盖损失提升生成多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-64×64上FID=1.58，在SDXL上FID=18.4，实现高效一步生成且质量有竞争力。
limitations: 可能对教师模型中间层选择敏感。
模式覆盖损失可能增加少量计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练扩散模型的中间表征作为特征空间，简化一步扩散蒸馏，无需额外特征提取网络。

papers.title: GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba
papers.abstract: World models, which simulate environmental dynamics and generate sensor observations, are gaining increasing attention in autonomous driving. However, progress in LiDAR-based world models has lagged behind those built on camera videos or occupancy data, primarily due to two core challenges: the inherent disorder of LiDAR point clouds and the difficulty of distinguishing dynamic objects from static structures. To address these issues, we propose GEM: a Generative LiDAR world model that leverages deformable mamba architecture, significantly improving fidelity and imaginative capability. Specifically, leveraging the structural similarity between sequential laser scanning and Mamba's processing mechanism, we first tokenize LiDAR sweeps into compact representations via a custom LiDAR scene tokenizer. After unsupervised disentanglement of tokenized features via a dynamic-static separator, a tri-path deformable Mamba is introduced to perform selective scanning and adaptive gating fusion over the disentangled features, leading to enhanced spatial-temporal understanding of the world evolution. Optionally, a planner and a BEV layout controller can be integrated to explore the model's capability for autonomous rollout and its potential to generate ``what-if" scenarios. Extensive experiments show that GEM achieves state-of-the-art performances across diverse benchmarks and evaluation settings, demonstrating its superiority and effectiveness. Project page: https://github.com/wuyang98/GEM.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型GEM，通过解耦动态/静态特征和选择性扫描提升生成保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: LiDAR世界模型在自动驾驶中具有重要价值，但现有方法因点云无序性和动态/静态区分困难而进展缓慢。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高保真、具有想象力的LiDAR世界演化序列，并有效处理点云无序性和动态物体与静态结构的区分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LiDAR点云的无序性以及动态物体与静态结构难以区分是核心瓶颈。
analysis.method: 使用LiDAR场景分词器将扫描序列紧凑编码，通过动态-静态分离器无监督解耦特征，再引入三路径可变形Mamba进行选择性扫描和自适应门控融合，可选集成规划器和BEV布局控制器。
contributions: 提出GEM，首个基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型，有效解决点云无序性和动态/静态区分问题。
设计LiDAR场景分词器和动态-静态分离器，实现紧凑表示和无监督特征解耦。
引入三路径可变形Mamba架构，增强时空理解，并在多个基准上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和评估设置上进行了广泛实验，GEM达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LiDAR扫描模式，泛化性需进一步验证。
无监督解耦可能不完美，复杂场景下动态/静态分离可能出错。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可变形Mamba的LiDAR世界模型GEM，通过解耦动态/静态特征和选择性扫描提升生成保真度。

papers.title: CSR: Infinite-Horizon Real-Time Policies with Massive Cached State Representations
papers.abstract: Deploying massive large language models (LLMs) as continuous cognitive engines for robotics is bottlenecked by the time-to-first-token (TTFT) latency required to process extensive state histories. Existing solutions like RAG or sliding windows compromise global context or incur prohibitive re-computation costs. We formalize the optimal task structure for minimizing latency and theoretically prove that prefix stability, incremental extensibility, and asynchronous state reconciliation are necessary conditions for real-time performance. Building on these proofs, we introduce the Cached State Representation (CSR) framework as the practical instantiation of these properties, ensuring optimal KV-cache reuse. To sustain these properties over infinite horizons, we further propose an Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR) algorithm that offloads state memory eviction to a parallel computational resource to eliminate latency spikes. On a physical robot wirelessly connected to an on-premise GPU server, CSR achieves a 26-fold latency reduction (14.67s to 0.56s) for 120K token contexts with a 235B parameter model compared to a standard baseline. On an embodied AI benchmark, we achieve SOTA recall (0.836 vs. 0.459) while maintaining RAG-level latency. ASR is validated to sustain bounded, spike-free TTFT over 10 eviction cycles in continuous real-world operation. Together, CSR and ASR enable massive LLMs to function as continuously operating, high-frequency (> 2 Hz) embodied policies.

analysis.tldr: 提出CSR框架和ASR算法，通过理论证明和KV缓存复用，将大模型作为机器人实时策略的延迟降低26倍，实现高频连续运行。
analysis.research_motivation: 将大规模LLM作为机器人连续认知引擎时，处理大量状态历史的首Token延迟（TTFT）成为瓶颈，现有方法如RAG或滑动窗口会牺牲全局上下文或带来高昂重计算成本。
analysis.problem: 如何实现大规模LLM在无限时间范围内的实时策略推理，同时最小化TTFT延迟并避免延迟尖峰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件。
analysis.method: 提出Cached State Representation (CSR)框架，通过理论证明确保最优KV缓存复用；并设计Asynchronous State Reconciliation (ASR)算法，将状态内存驱逐卸载到并行计算资源以消除延迟尖峰。
contributions: 形式化定义了最小化延迟的最优任务结构，并理论证明了前缀稳定性、增量可扩展性和异步状态协调是实时性能的必要条件。
提出CSR框架作为这些性质的实践实例化，确保最优KV缓存复用。
提出ASR算法，通过并行资源异步协调状态，在无限时间范围内维持有界、无尖峰的TTFT。
analysis.experiments: 在物理机器人（无线连接本地GPU服务器）上，使用235B参数模型处理120K token上下文，CSR实现26倍延迟降低（从14.67s到0.56s）；在具身AI基准上达到SOTA召回率（0.836 vs 0.459），同时保持RAG级延迟；ASR在连续真实操作中经过10次驱逐周期验证，维持有界、无尖峰的TTFT。
limitations: 实验仅在单一机器人平台和特定模型上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
ASR的并行资源开销可能在某些边缘设备上受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CSR框架和ASR算法，通过理论证明和KV缓存复用，将大模型作为机器人实时策略的延迟降低26倍，实现高频连续运行。

papers.title: Activation Differences Reveal Backdoors: A Comparison of SAE Architectures
papers.abstract: Backdoor attacks on language models pose a significant threat to AI safety, where models behave normally on most inputs but exhibit harmful behavior when triggered by specific patterns. Detecting such backdoors through mechanistic interpretability remains an open challenge. We investigate two sparse autoencoder architectures -- Crosscoders and Differential SAEs (Diff-SAE) -- for isolating backdoor-related features in fine-tuned models. Using a controlled SQL injection backdoor triggered by year-based context ("2024" triggers vulnerable code, "2023" triggers safe code), we evaluate both approaches across LoRA and full-rank fine-tuning regimes on SmolLM2-360M. We find that Diff-SAE consistently and substantially outperforms Crosscoders for backdoor isolation. Diff-SAE achieves a Backdoor Isolation Score (BIS) of 0.40 with perfect precision (1.0) and zero false positive rate across most experimental conditions, while Crosscoders fail almost entirely with BIS below 0.02 in most cases. This performance gap holds across multiple transformer layers (14, 18, 22, 26) and both fine-tuning regimes, with full-rank fine-tuning producing particularly clean backdoor signals. Our results suggest that backdoors manifest as directional activation shifts rather than sparse feature activations, making difference-based representations fundamentally more effective for detection. These findings have important implications for AI safety monitoring and the development of interpretability tools for detecting model manipulation.

analysis.tldr: Diff-SAE 在检测语言模型后门方面显著优于 Crosscoders，后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活。
analysis.research_motivation: 后门攻击对语言模型构成严重安全威胁，但通过机制可解释性检测后门仍是一个开放挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何有效隔离和检测微调语言模型中的后门相关特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活，因此基于差异的表示（Diff-SAE）比基于稀疏特征（Crosscoders）更有效。
analysis.method: 比较两种稀疏自编码器架构（Crosscoders 和 Diff-SAE）在隔离后门特征上的表现，使用基于年份的 SQL 注入后门触发条件。
contributions: 发现 Diff-SAE 在隔离后门方面显著优于 Crosscoders，后门隔离得分（BIS）达 0.40，精确率 1.0，假阳性率为 0。
揭示后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活，为后门检测提供了新视角。
analysis.experiments: 在 SmolLM2-360M 模型上，使用 LoRA 和全秩微调两种方式，评估多个 Transformer 层（14, 18, 22, 26）的后门隔离效果。
limitations: 仅测试了单一后门类型（SQL 注入），泛化性未知。
模型规模较小（360M），在更大模型上的效果待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Diff-SAE 在检测语言模型后门方面显著优于 Crosscoders，后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活。

papers.title: Discovering Ordinary Differential Equations with LLM-Based Qualitative and Quantitative Evaluation
papers.abstract: Discovering governing differential equations from observational data is a fundamental challenge in scientific machine learning. Existing symbolic regression approaches rely primarily on quantitative metrics; however, real-world differential equation modeling also requires incorporating domain knowledge to ensure physical plausibility. To address this gap, we propose DoLQ, a method for discovering ordinary differential equations with LLM-based qualitative and quantitative evaluation. DoLQ employs a multi-agent architecture: a Sampler Agent proposes dynamic system candidates, a Parameter Optimizer refines equations for accuracy, and a Scientist Agent leverages an LLM to conduct both qualitative and quantitative evaluations and synthesize their results to iteratively guide the search. Experiments on multi-dimensional ordinary differential equation benchmarks demonstrate that DoLQ achieves superior performance compared to existing methods, not only attaining higher success rates but also more accurately recovering the correct symbolic terms of ground truth equations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bon99yun/DoLQ.

analysis.tldr: 提出DoLQ方法，利用LLM进行定性和定量评估来发现常微分方程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有符号回归方法主要依赖定量指标，但真实世界的微分方程建模需要融入领域知识以确保物理合理性。
analysis.problem: 从观测数据中发现控制微分方程时，如何结合定性评估（领域知识）和定量评估以提高发现准确性和物理合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DoLQ，采用多智能体架构：Sampler Agent提出动态系统候选，Parameter Optimizer优化方程精度，Scientist Agent利用LLM进行定性和定量评估并综合结果迭代引导搜索。
contributions: 提出结合LLM定性和定量评估的微分方程发现方法DoLQ。
在多维常微分方程基准上取得更高成功率和更准确恢复符号项的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多维常微分方程基准上实验，DoLQ相比现有方法取得更高成功率和更准确恢复正确符号项。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的评估质量，LLM的偏见或错误可能影响结果。
多智能体架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DoLQ方法，利用LLM进行定性和定量评估来发现常微分方程。

papers.title: Generative Modeling with Flux Matching
papers.abstract: We introduce Flux Matching, a new paradigm for generative modeling that generalizes existing score-based models to a broader family of vector fields that need not be conservative. Rather than requiring the model to equal the data score, the Flux Matching objective imposes a weaker condition that admits infinitely many vector fields whose stationary distribution is the data. This flexibility enables a class of generative models that cannot be learned under score matching, in which inductive biases, structural priors, and properties of the dynamics can be directly imposed or optimized. We show that Flux Matching performs strongly on high-dimensional image datasets and, more importantly, that our added freedom unlocks a range of applications including faster sampling, interpretable and mechanistic models, and dynamics that encode directed dependencies between variables. More broadly, Flux Matching opens a new dimension in generative modeling by turning the vector field itself into a design choice rather than a fixed target. Code is available at https://github.com/peterpaohuang/flux_matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Flux Matching 生成框架，放宽向量场约束以支持非保守场，实现更快采样与可解释动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于分数的生成模型要求向量场为保守场（即数据分数），限制了模型设计的灵活性，难以直接注入归纳偏置或结构先验。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个更通用的生成建模目标，允许学习非保守向量场，同时保证其稳态分布为目标数据分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Flux Matching 目标，通过弱化条件（仅要求向量场的稳态分布为数据分布，而非等于分数）来学习更广泛的向量场族，支持非保守场。
contributions: 提出 Flux Matching 生成框架，推广了分数匹配到非保守向量场。
展示了该框架在高维图像数据集上的强性能，并解锁了更快采样、可解释模型和编码有向依赖的动力学等应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对非保守场的理论性质（如收敛性）需要进一步分析。
实际应用中设计合适的向量场先验可能具有挑战性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Flux Matching 生成框架，放宽向量场约束以支持非保守场，实现更快采样与可解释动力学。

papers.title: Amortized-Precision Quantization for Early-Exit Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance across vision tasks, yet their deployment with low-precision early exiting remains fragile. Existing quantization methods assume static full-depth execution, making them unstable when exit decisions are perturbed by quantization noise, which can amplify errors along dynamic inference paths. In this paper, we introduce Amortized-Precision Quantization (APQ), a utilization-aware formulation that accounts for layer-wise stochastic exposure to quantization noise and reveals depth-precision trade-offs. Building on APQ, we propose Mutual Adaptive Quantization with Early Exiting (MAQEE), a bi-level framework that jointly optimizes exit thresholds and bit-widths under explicit risk control to improve inference stability. MAQEE establishes a superior Pareto frontier in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off, reducing BOPs by up to 95% while maintaining accuracy and outperforming strong baselines by up to 20\% across classification, detection, and segmentation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出摊销精度量化方法，联合优化退出阈值和位宽，实现早期退出ViT的高效稳定推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量化方法假设静态全深度执行，在早期退出场景中因量化噪声扰动退出决策导致不稳定，需要一种感知利用率的方法来平衡精度与效率。
analysis.problem: 解决低精度早期退出视觉Transformer中量化噪声导致推理路径不稳定、精度-效率权衡不佳的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到量化噪声沿动态推理路径放大误差，且不同层对量化噪声的暴露具有随机性，存在深度-精度权衡。
analysis.method: 提出摊销精度量化（APQ）框架，建模层间量化噪声暴露的随机性；并设计MAQEE双层优化框架，联合优化退出阈值和位宽，显式控制风险。
contributions: 提出APQ，一种感知利用率的量化公式，揭示深度-精度权衡。
提出MAQEE，双层框架联合优化退出阈值和位宽，在分类、检测、分割任务上实现精度-效率Pareto前沿。
analysis.experiments: 在分类、检测、分割任务上，MAQEE减少高达95%的BOPs，同时保持精度，比强基线提升高达20%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于ViT架构，未验证其他Transformer变体。
双层优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出摊销精度量化方法，联合优化退出阈值和位宽，实现早期退出ViT的高效稳定推理。

papers.title: Implicit Compression Regularization: Concise Reasoning via Internal Shorter Distributions in RL Post-Training
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves LLM reasoning but often induces overthinking, where models generate unnecessarily long reasoning traces. Existing methods mainly rely on length penalties or early-exit strategies; however, the former may degrade accuracy and induce underthinking, whereas the latter assumes that substantial portions of reasoning traces can be safely truncated. To obtain a compression signal without these limitations, we revisit the training dynamics of existing compression methods. We observe that the length--accuracy correlation is initially negative but continually increases during compression, indicating that shorter responses are initially more likely to be correct but gradually lose this property as the policy moves toward underthinking. Based on this observation, we formalize overthinking: a negative correlation indicates an overthinking regime, while a positive one indicates underthinking. When overthinking, the shortest correct responses are shorter than the group-average response length in expectation, making them natural compression targets already present in on-policy rollouts. We therefore propose \emph{Implicit Compression Regularization} (ICR), an on-policy regularization method whose compression signal comes from a virtual shorter distribution induced by the shortest correct responses in rollout groups, guiding the policy toward concise yet correct trajectories. Training dynamics show that ICR maintains a better length--accuracy correlation during compression, indicating that short responses remain better aligned with correctness instead of drifting toward underthinking. Experiments on three reasoning backbones and multiple mathematical and knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that ICR consistently shortens responses while preserving or improving accuracy, achieving a stronger accuracy--length Pareto frontier.

analysis.tldr: 通过强化学习后训练中的隐式压缩正则化，利用组内最短正确响应构建虚拟短分布，引导模型生成简洁且正确的推理轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理中过度思考导致冗长推理链，现有长度惩罚或早退策略存在精度下降或欠思考问题，需要一种不牺牲精度的压缩信号。
analysis.problem: 如何在强化学习后训练中实现推理长度压缩而不损害准确率，避免过度思考或欠思考。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到长度-准确率相关性在压缩过程中从负变正：负相关表示过度思考（短响应更可能正确），正相关表示欠思考（短响应正确率下降）。
analysis.method: 提出隐式压缩正则化（ICR），在策略rollout组内选取最短正确响应，构建虚拟短分布作为压缩信号，通过on-policy正则化引导策略生成简洁正确轨迹。
contributions: 形式化过度思考与欠思考的判别标准（长度-准确率相关性符号）
提出ICR方法，利用组内最短正确响应实现隐式压缩，无需显式长度惩罚或早退
analysis.experiments: 在三个推理骨干和多个数学与知识密集型基准上验证，ICR在保持或提升准确率的同时缩短响应长度，实现更强的准确率-长度帕累托前沿。
limitations: 依赖verifiable reward信号，可能不适用于开放域任务
组内最短正确响应的选取可能受采样噪声影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过强化学习后训练中的隐式压缩正则化，利用组内最短正确响应构建虚拟短分布，引导模型生成简洁且正确的推理轨迹。

papers.title: DCGL: Dual-Channel Graph Learning with Large Language Models for Knowledge-Aware Recommendation
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have proven highly effective for recommendation systems by capturing latent item relationships, while recent integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has further enhanced semantic understanding and addressed knowledge sparsity issues. Nevertheless, current KG-and-LLM-based methods still face three main limitations: 1) inadequate modeling of implicit semantic relationships beyond explicit KG links; 2) suboptimal single-channel fusion of ID and LLM embeddings, which often leads to signal interference and blurred representations; and 3) insufficient consideration of user-item interaction frequency variations in recommendation strategies. To address these challenges, we propose the Dual-Channel Graph Learning (DCGL) framework, featuring three key innovations: 1) a dual-channel architecture that structurally decouples rich semantic information from user behavioral patterns, preventing early interference; 2) a multi-level contrastive learning mechanism that enhances robustness against KG noise through intra-view contrasts and bridges semantic gaps between channels via inter-view alignment; and 3) a dynamic fusion mechanism that adaptively balances semantic generalization and behavioral specificity based on interaction frequency, resolving the cascading limitation. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets show that DCGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding substantial improvements in sparse scenarios while maintaining precision for active users. Our code is available at https://github.com/XinchiZou/DCGL.

analysis.tldr: 提出双通道图学习框架DCGL，通过解耦语义与行为信息、多级对比学习和动态融合机制提升知识感知推荐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于知识图谱和大语言模型的推荐方法在隐式语义建模、ID与LLM嵌入融合以及用户交互频率差异处理上存在不足，导致推荐精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合知识图谱的显式关系和大语言模型的语义信息，同时处理用户交互频率变化，提升推荐系统的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法存在三个主要局限：1) 对显式KG链接之外的隐式语义关系建模不足；2) 单通道融合ID和LLM嵌入导致信号干扰和表征模糊；3) 推荐策略未充分考虑用户-物品交互频率的变化。
analysis.method: 提出DCGL框架，包含双通道架构（解耦语义与行为信息）、多级对比学习（增强鲁棒性并桥接通道间语义差距）和动态融合机制（根据交互频率自适应平衡语义泛化与行为特异性）。
contributions: 提出双通道图学习框架，结构化解耦语义信息与用户行为模式，避免早期干扰。
设计多级对比学习机制，通过视图内对比和视图间对齐增强对KG噪声的鲁棒性并缩小通道间语义差距。
提出动态融合机制，根据交互频率自适应平衡语义泛化与行为特异性，解决级联限制。
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实世界数据集上进行实验，DCGL一致优于最先进方法，在稀疏场景下显著提升，同时保持活跃用户的精度。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱和大语言模型，在资源受限场景下部署成本较高。
动态融合机制的超参数调节可能增加模型调优复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双通道图学习框架DCGL，通过解耦语义与行为信息、多级对比学习和动态融合机制提升知识感知推荐性能。

papers.title: When Stored Evidence Stops Being Usable: Scale-Conditioned Evaluation of Agent Memory
papers.abstract: Memory-agent evaluations report fixed-snapshot accuracy or retrieval quality, but these scores do not show whether evidence remains usable as irrelevant sessions (sessions not annotated as task-relevant evidence for the query) accumulate. We present a scale-conditioned evaluation protocol for agent memory under evidence-preserving growth: for each query, task evidence is held fixed while irrelevant sessions are added. The protocol logs agent--memory trajectories and reports four diagnostics: budget-compliant reliability, tail memory-call burden, failure-regime decomposition, and the usable-scale boundary where reliability falls below the target. Applied to LongMemEval and LoCoMo across flat, planar, and hierarchical memory interfaces, the protocol shows reliability loss is not a single phenomenon. On LongMemEval, HippoRAG stays within the two-call budget but loses 16--20 percentage points in budget-compliant reliability as irrelevant sessions are added; LiCoMemory's observed failures depend strongly on the agent, with Qwen3-8B exceeding the budget while Qwen3-32B and Qwen3-235B remain reliable in the tested range. The result supports a framework for making scalable-memory claims conditional on agent, interface, scale range, and interaction budget.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种规模条件化的评估协议，揭示智能体记忆在无关会话积累时可靠性下降的非单一现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有记忆智能体评估仅报告固定快照的准确率或检索质量，无法反映证据在无关会话积累时是否仍可用，缺乏对记忆可扩展性的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何评估智能体记忆在证据保持不变但无关会话数量增长时的可靠性变化，并分解失效模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可靠性下降并非单一现象：不同记忆接口和智能体组合表现出不同的失效模式，如预算合规可靠性下降、尾部记忆调用负担增加等。
analysis.method: 提出规模条件化评估协议，在证据固定下逐步添加无关会话，记录智能体-记忆轨迹，并报告四个诊断指标：预算合规可靠性、尾部记忆调用负担、失效模式分解、可用规模边界。
contributions: 提出一种规模条件化的智能体记忆评估协议，支持在证据保持增长下诊断记忆可靠性。
在LongMemEval和LoCoMo上应用协议，揭示不同记忆接口和智能体组合的失效模式差异。
analysis.experiments: 在LongMemEval和LoCoMo上使用flat、planar、hierarchical三种记忆接口进行实验，测试了HippoRAG和LiCoMemory（搭配Qwen3-8B/32B/235B）等智能体。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖有限的数据集和记忆接口，泛化性需进一步验证。
协议假设无关会话与任务证据完全独立，实际场景中可能存在相关性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种规模条件化的评估协议，揭示智能体记忆在无关会话积累时可靠性下降的非单一现象。

papers.title: BioProVLA-Agent: An Affordable, Protocol-Driven, Vision-Enhanced VLA-Enabled Embodied Multi-Agent System with Closed-Loop-Capable Reasoning for Biological Laboratory Manipulation
papers.abstract: Biological laboratory automation can reduce repetitive manual work and improve reproducibility, but reliable embodied execution in wet-lab environments remains challenging. Protocols are often unstructured, labware is frequently transparent or reflective, and multi-step procedures require state-aware execution beyond one-shot instruction following. Existing robotic systems often rely on costly hardware, fixed workflows, dedicated instruments, or robotics-oriented interfaces. Here, we introduce BioProVLA-Agent, an affordable, protocol-driven, vision-enhanced embodied multi-agent system enabled by Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for biological manipulation. The system uses protocols as the task interface and integrates protocol parsing, visual state verification, and embodied execution in a closed-loop workflow. A Tailored LLM Protocol Agent converts protocols into verifiable subtasks; a VLM-RAG Verification Agent assesses readiness and completion using observations, robot states, retrieved knowledge, and success/failure examples; and a VLA Embodied Agent executes verified subtasks through a lightweight policy. To improve robustness under wet-lab visual perturbations, we develop AugSmolVLA, an online augmentation strategy targeting transparent labware, reflections, illumination shifts, and overexposure. We evaluate the system on a hierarchical benchmark covering 15 atomic tasks, 6 composite workflows, and 3 bimanual tasks, including tube loading, sorting, waste disposal, cap twisting, and liquid pouring. Across normal and high-exposure settings, AugSmolVLA improves execution stability over ACT, X-VLA, and the original SmolVLA, especially for precise placement, transparent-object manipulation, composite workflows, and visually degraded scenes. These results suggest a practical route toward accessible, protocol-centered, and verification-capable embodied AI for biological manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于VLA的、协议驱动的、视觉增强的多智能体系统，用于低成本生物实验室自动化操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物实验室自动化可以减少重复劳动并提高可重复性，但湿实验室环境中的可靠具身执行仍面临挑战：协议非结构化、器皿透明或反光、多步骤任务需要状态感知执行，现有系统依赖昂贵硬件或固定工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个低成本、协议驱动、视觉增强的具身多智能体系统，以在湿实验室环境中可靠地执行生物操作任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出湿实验室环境存在视觉扰动（透明器皿、反射、光照变化、过曝），导致现有方法（如ACT、X-VLA、SmolVLA）在精确放置、透明物体操作、复合工作流和视觉退化场景下稳定性不足。
analysis.method: 提出BioProVLA-Agent，包含三个智能体：1) Tailored LLM Protocol Agent将协议转换为可验证的子任务；2) VLM-RAG Verification Agent利用观测、机器人状态、检索知识和成功/失败示例评估子任务就绪与完成；3) VLA Embodied Agent通过轻量策略执行已验证的子任务。同时提出AugSmolVLA在线增强策略，针对透明器皿、反射、光照变化和过曝进行鲁棒性提升。
contributions: 提出一个协议驱动的、视觉增强的VLA多智能体系统，实现低成本生物实验室自动化操作。
开发AugSmolVLA在线增强策略，提升湿实验室视觉扰动下的执行稳定性。
构建层次化基准，涵盖15个原子任务、6个复合工作流和3个双手任务，并验证系统在正常和高曝光设置下的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在层次化基准上评估，包括15个原子任务、6个复合工作流和3个双手任务（如试管装载、分拣、废物处理、旋盖、液体倾倒）。在正常和高曝光设置下，AugSmolVLA相比ACT、X-VLA和原始SmolVLA在精确放置、透明物体操作、复合工作流和视觉退化场景中提升了执行稳定性。
limitations: 摘要未提及系统在更复杂或长序列任务上的扩展性。
可能依赖特定硬件或环境设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于VLA的、协议驱动的、视觉增强的多智能体系统，用于低成本生物实验室自动化操作。

papers.title: MedAction: Towards Active Multi-turn Clinical Diagnostic LLMs
papers.abstract: Most existing LLM diagnoses are evaluated on static, single-turn settings where complete patient information is provided upfront, an oversimplification of real clinical practice. We study active diagnosis: the real-life clinical process of starting from initial observation, ordering tests, interpreting results, and updating a differential diagnosis across multiple turns. Through systematic analysis, we identify three recurring failure modes in current LLMs: ungrounded test ordering, unreliable diagnostic update, and degraded multi-turn coherence. Together, these failures reveal a core deficit: existing medical training data teaches models to reason from complete information but not to act under evolving, partial evidence. To address this gap, we introduce MedAction, a tree-structured distillation pipeline that synthesizes diverse and high-quality multi-turn diagnostic trajectories via LLM-environment interaction. We propose two knowledge-graph-grounded metrics to filter trajectory quality: Disease Trajectory Consistency (DTC), which tracks whether the model's hypothesis converges toward the correct diagnosis, and Reasoning-Action Consistency (RAC), which verifies that belief updates are driven by gathered evidence. Using this pipeline, we construct MedAction-32K, a dataset of 32,681 trajectories from 2,896 PMC cases. Fine-tuning an 8B model on MedAction-32K achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models on both MedR-Bench and our curated MedAction-300-Hard benchmark, pushing the edge for open-source medical LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出树状蒸馏管道MedAction，生成多轮主动诊断轨迹数据集，微调8B模型在医学诊断基准上达到开源SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM诊断评估多基于静态单轮设定，简化了真实临床实践中的主动诊断过程，即从初始观察开始，逐步检查、解释结果并更新鉴别诊断。
analysis.problem: 当前LLM在主动诊断中存在三种失败模式：无根据的检查排序、不可靠的诊断更新、多轮连贯性下降，根本原因是训练数据仅教模型从完整信息推理，而非在部分证据下行动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过系统分析识别出三种反复出现的失败模式：无根据的检查排序、不可靠的诊断更新、多轮连贯性下降，表明现有模型缺乏在动态部分证据下行动的能力。
analysis.method: 提出MedAction，一种树状蒸馏管道，通过LLM-环境交互合成高质量多轮诊断轨迹，并设计两个知识图谱指标（DTC和RAC）过滤轨迹质量，构建数据集MedAction-32K。
contributions: 识别了LLM在主动诊断中的三种失败模式，并指出核心缺陷在于训练数据缺乏部分证据下的行动能力。
提出MedAction树状蒸馏管道和两个知识图谱指标（DTC和RAC），用于生成和过滤高质量多轮诊断轨迹。
构建MedAction-32K数据集（32,681条轨迹），微调8B模型在MedR-Bench和MedAction-300-Hard上达到开源SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在MedR-Bench和MedAction-300-Hard基准上评估，微调后的8B模型在开源模型中达到最佳性能。
limitations: 数据集仅基于PMC病例，可能无法覆盖所有临床场景。
方法依赖LLM-环境交互，可能受限于模拟环境的真实性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出树状蒸馏管道MedAction，生成多轮主动诊断轨迹数据集，微调8B模型在医学诊断基准上达到开源SOTA。

papers.title: SOM: Structured Opponent Modeling for LLM-based Agents via Structural Causal Model
papers.abstract: Accurately predicting opponents' behavior from interactions is a fundamental capability for large language model (LLM)-based agents in multi-agent and game-theoretic environments. Existing approaches often entangle opponent modeling with prediction, relying on implicit contextual reasoning and limiting adaptability in dynamic interactions. To this end, we propose Structured Opponent Modeling (SOM), a two-stage opponent modeling framework that distinctly separates opponent model construction and opponent prediction. At the construction stage, SOM employs a Structural Causal Model (SCM), a graph-based formalism for representing dependencies among variables, to capture directed links between opponents' observations and actions, yielding an explicit and structured opponent representation. At the prediction stage, the LLM performs structured reasoning along clear pathways derived from the SCM, improving both prediction accuracy and stability. Extensive experiments on diverse multi-agent benchmarks demonstrate that SOM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based reasoning baselines, enabling more accurate and adaptable strategic decision-making in complex and dynamic multi-agent interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化对手建模框架SOM，通过结构因果模型分离对手模型构建与预测，提升LLM智能体在多智能体环境中的预测准确性与适应性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对手建模方法常将模型构建与预测纠缠在一起，依赖隐式上下文推理，限制了在动态交互中的适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM智能体构建显式、结构化的对手模型，并实现准确且稳定的对手行为预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：构建阶段使用结构因果模型（SCM）捕获对手观测与动作间的有向依赖，形成显式结构化表示；预测阶段LLM沿SCM导出的清晰路径进行结构化推理。
contributions: 提出SOM框架，将对手模型构建与预测分离，提升可解释性和适应性。
引入SCM进行结构化对手建模，增强预测准确性和稳定性。
在多智能体基准上超越现有LLM推理基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种多智能体基准上进行了实验，SOM一致优于最先进的LLM推理基线。
limitations: 可能依赖对手观测数据的可获取性。
SCM构建可能需要领域知识或额外标注。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化对手建模框架SOM，通过结构因果模型分离对手模型构建与预测，提升LLM智能体在多智能体环境中的预测准确性与适应性。

papers.title: EgoPro-Bench: Benchmarking Personalized Proactive Interaction in Egocentric Video Streams
papers.abstract: Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) remain primarily reactive, failing to continuously perceive environments or proactively assist users. While emerging benchmarks address proactivity, they are largely confined to alert scenarios, neglect personalized context, and fail to evaluate the precise timing of human-machine interactions (HMI).In this paper, we introduce EgoPro-Bench, a novel benchmark for training and evaluating proactive interaction capabilities based on streaming egocentric videos; it comprises 2,400 videos in the evaluation set and over 12,000 videos in the training set.Unlike previous works, EgoPro-Bench leverages simulated user profiles to generate diverse user intentions and to construct high-fidelity HMI data across 12 distinct domains.Subsequently, we propose a specialized evaluation protocol and metrics, train proactive interaction models designed for efficient reasoning and low-latency interaction on streaming video data, and conduct comprehensive evaluations.Furthermore, we introduce an interaction principle termed "short thinking, better interaction", which allocates a limited token budget prior to intent recognition, thereby enhancing interaction performance.The experiments demonstrate that EgoPro-Bench substantially enhances the intention understanding capabilities of MLLMs and enables accurate identification of appropriate timings for HMI, thereby laying a solid foundation for next-generation user-centric proactive interactive agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于第一人称视频流的个性化主动交互基准EgoPro-Bench，包含2400个评测视频和12000个训练视频，并引入“短思考、更好交互”原则提升交互时机识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态大模型（MLLMs）主要处于被动响应状态，无法持续感知环境或主动帮助用户；已有的主动交互基准局限于警报场景，忽略个性化上下文，且未能评估人机交互的精确时机。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够训练和评估MLLMs在流式第一人称视频中实现个性化主动交互（包括意图理解和交互时机识别）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建EgoPro-Bench基准，利用模拟用户画像生成多样化用户意图，构建12个领域的高保真人机交互数据；提出专用评估协议和指标；引入“短思考、更好交互”原则，在意图识别前分配有限token预算以提升交互性能。
contributions: 提出EgoPro-Bench，首个基于流式第一人称视频的个性化主动交互基准，包含2400个评测视频和12000个训练视频。
引入“短思考、更好交互”原则，通过限制意图识别前的token预算提升交互时机识别性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明EgoPro-Bench显著增强了MLLMs的意图理解能力，并能够准确识别合适的人机交互时机。
limitations: 基准基于模拟用户画像，可能无法完全覆盖真实用户意图的多样性。
“短思考”原则在复杂场景下可能限制推理深度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于第一人称视频流的个性化主动交互基准EgoPro-Bench，包含2400个评测视频和12000个训练视频，并引入“短思考、更好交互”原则提升交互时机识别。

papers.title: Sword: Style-Robust World Models as Simulators via Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping for VLA Policy Post-Training
papers.abstract: The integration of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models with World Models has gained increasing attention. One representative approach treats learned World Models as generative simulators, enabling policy optimization entirely within "imagination." However, when deployed as simulators for specific environments such as the LIBERO benchmark, existing World Models often suffer from poor generalization and long-horizon error accumulation. During closed-loop rollouts, these models are highly sensitive to initial-state perturbations; minor changes in color, illumination, and other visual factors can trigger cascading hallucinations, leading to severe blurriness or overexposure. Moreover, long-horizon error accumulation further degrades the quality and fidelity of predicted future states. These issues limit the reliability of World Models as simulators. To mitigate these problems, we propose Sword, a robust World Model framework. Our method introduces Structure-Guided Style Augmentation to disentangle the visual textures of interactive environments from task-relevant dynamics, thereby improving generalization. We further propose Dynamic Latent Bootstrapping, which maintains consistency between training and inference while keeping memory consumption low. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that our method significantly outperforms the baseline WoVR in terms of generalization, generation quality, robustness, fidelity, and the success rate of reinforcement-learning post-training for VLA models.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Sword 框架，通过结构引导风格增强和动态潜在引导提升世界模型作为 VLA 策略后训练模拟器的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型作为模拟器时泛化性差且存在长程误差累积，对初始状态扰动敏感，限制了其在 VLA 策略后训练中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 世界模型在作为模拟器时对视觉风格变化（颜色、光照等）鲁棒性不足，且长程 rollout 中误差累积导致生成质量下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有世界模型在闭环 rollout 中对初始状态扰动高度敏感，微小的视觉变化会引发级联幻觉，导致严重模糊或过曝；长程误差累积进一步降低预测状态的质量和保真度。
analysis.method: 提出 Sword 框架，包含结构引导风格增强（分离视觉纹理与任务相关动态）和动态潜在引导（保持训练与推理一致性且低内存消耗）。
contributions: 提出结构引导风格增强，解耦交互环境的视觉纹理与任务相关动态，提升泛化性。
提出动态潜在引导，维持训练与推理一致性并降低内存消耗。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIBERO 基准上，Sword 在泛化性、生成质量、鲁棒性、保真度以及 VLA 模型强化学习后训练的成功率上显著优于基线 WoVR。
limitations: 可能仅在 LIBERO 基准上验证，未提及在其他环境或更复杂场景的泛化能力。
动态潜在引导的具体机制和内存消耗降低幅度未在摘要中量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Sword 框架，通过结构引导风格增强和动态潜在引导提升世界模型作为 VLA 策略后训练模拟器的鲁棒性。

papers.title: SplatWeaver: Learning to Allocate Gaussian Primitives for Generalizable Novel View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Generalizable novel view synthesis aims to render unseen views from uncalibrated input images without requiring per-scene optimization. Recent feed-forward approaches based on 3D Gaussian Splatting have achieved promising efficiency and rendering quality. However, most of them assign a fixed number of Gaussians to each pixel or voxel, ignoring the spatially varying complexity of real-world scenes. Such uniform allocation often wastes Gaussian primitives in smooth regions while providing insufficient capacity for fine structures, complex geometry, and high-frequency details. This motivates us to predict region-dependent primitive cardinalities rather than impose a fixed primitive budget everywhere, enabling a more expressive yet compact 3D scene representation. Therefore, we propose SplatWeaver, a generalizable novel view synthesis framework that is able to dynamically allocate Gaussian primitives over different regions in a feed-forward manner. Specifically, SplatWeaver introduces cardinality Gaussian experts and a pixel-level routing scheme, wherein each expert specializes in producing a specific number of primitives from 0 to M, and the routing scheme coordinates these experts to adaptively determine how many Gaussian primitives should be allocated to each spatial location. Moreover, SplatWeaver incorporates a high-frequency prior with attendant guidance module and routing regularization to stabilize expert selection and promote complexity-aware allocation. By leveraging high-frequency structural cues, the routing process is encouraged to assign more Gaussian primitives to fine structures, complex geometry, and textured regions, while suppressing redundant primitives in smooth areas. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios show that SplatWeaver consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, delivering more faithful novel-view renderings with fewer Gaussian primitives.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态分配高斯原语数量的框架SplatWeaver，实现更高效、高质量的新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的前馈方法为每个像素或体素分配固定数量的高斯原语，忽略了真实场景的空间复杂度变化，导致平滑区域浪费、精细结构容量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何根据区域复杂度动态分配高斯原语数量，实现紧凑且表达力强的3D场景表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均匀分配高斯原语在平滑区域冗余，在精细结构、复杂几何和高频细节区域容量不足。
analysis.method: 引入基数高斯专家和像素级路由方案，每个专家生成0到M个原语，路由协调专家自适应决定每个位置的原语数量；结合高频先验和路由正则化稳定专家选择。
contributions: 提出动态分配高斯原语数量的前馈框架SplatWeaver。
设计基数高斯专家和像素级路由机制实现自适应分配。
引入高频先验和路由正则化提升分配质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高频先验的准确性。
路由机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态分配高斯原语数量的框架SplatWeaver，实现更高效、高质量的新视角合成。

papers.title: Mask2Cause: Causal Discovery via Adjacency Constrained Causal Attention
papers.abstract: Leveraging deep learning for causal discovery in time series remains challenging because existing neural methods predominantly rely on component-wise architectures that fail to capture shared system dynamics or employ decoupled post-hoc graph extraction that risks overfitting to spurious correlations. We propose $\textbf{Mask2Cause}$, an end-to-end framework that recovers the underlying causal graph directly during the forecasting forward pass. Our approach introduces an Inverted Variable Embedding and an Adjacency-Constrained Masked Attention mechanism, trained with homoscedastic or heteroscedastic objectives to capture causal influences in both mean and variance. Empirical results on diverse benchmarks, from synthetic chaotic dynamics to realistic biological simulations, demonstrate state-of-the-art causal discovery with significantly reduced parameter complexity compared to standard baselines. We further show that inferred causal structures can be used to reduce parameter count of forecasting models by more than 70% on average while maintaining predictive accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出Mask2Cause，通过邻接约束掩码注意力在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图，实现高效因果发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经因果发现方法多采用组件式架构，无法捕获共享系统动态，或使用解耦的后处理图提取，容易过拟合虚假相关，亟需一种端到端、低复杂度的因果发现框架。
analysis.problem: 在时间序列中直接、高效地恢复底层因果图，避免后处理提取和过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Mask2Cause框架，包含倒置变量嵌入和邻接约束掩码注意力机制，通过同方差或异方差目标训练，同时捕获均值和方差中的因果影响。
contributions: 提出端到端因果发现框架Mask2Cause，在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图。
引入倒置变量嵌入和邻接约束掩码注意力，显著降低参数复杂度并提升因果发现性能。
analysis.experiments: 在从合成混沌动力学到真实生物模拟的多个基准上，Mask2Cause实现了最先进的因果发现，参数复杂度显著低于标准基线；推断的因果结构可使预测模型参数平均减少70%以上，同时保持预测精度。
limitations: 可能对高维或极长序列的扩展性有限。
依赖同方差或异方差假设，可能不适用于所有噪声类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Mask2Cause，通过邻接约束掩码注意力在预测前向传播中直接恢复因果图，实现高效因果发现。

papers.title: Predictive but Not Plannable: RC-aux for Latent World Models
papers.abstract: A latent world model may achieve accurate short-horizon prediction while still inducing a latent space that is poorly aligned with planning. A key issue is spatiotemporal mismatch: these models are often trained with local predictive supervision, but deployed for long-horizon goal-directed search in latent spaces where Euclidean distance may not reflect what is reachable within a finite action budget. We present the Reachability-Correction auxiliary objective (RC-aux), a lightweight correction for this mismatch in reconstruction-free latent world models. RC-aux keeps the world-model backbone unchanged and adds planning-aligned supervision along two axes. Along the time axis, multi-horizon open-loop prediction trains the model beyond one-step consistency. Along the space axis, budget-conditioned reachability supervision, together with temporal hard negatives, encourages the latent space to distinguish states that are eventually reachable from those reachable within the current planning horizon. At test time, the learned reachability signal can also be used by a reachability-aware planner to favor trajectories that are both goal-directed and attainable under the available budget. We instantiate RC-aux on LeWorldModel and evaluate it under both continuation-training and matched-from-scratch settings. Across goal-conditioned pixel-control tasks and a LIBERO-Goal extension, RC-aux improves LeWM-style planning with modest additional cost. These results suggest that planning with latent world models depends not only on predictive accuracy, but also on whether the learned representation encodes the temporal and geometric structure required by downstream search. The code is available at https://github.com/Guang000/RC-aux.

analysis.tldr: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，修正潜世界模型在规划时的时空不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜世界模型在短时预测上可能准确，但潜空间与规划目标不对齐，导致长时规划效果差。
analysis.problem: 潜世界模型的潜空间缺乏规划对齐，欧氏距离不能反映有限动作预算下的可达性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出潜世界模型存在时空不匹配：局部预测监督训练出的潜空间在长时目标导向搜索中表现不佳。
analysis.method: RC-aux：在无重建潜世界模型上添加规划对齐的辅助监督，包括多步开环预测和预算条件可达性监督，并引入时间硬负样本。
contributions: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，修正潜世界模型的时空不匹配问题。
在LeWorldModel上验证，在像素控制任务和LIBERO-Goal扩展中提升规划性能，且额外成本适中。
analysis.experiments: 在目标条件像素控制任务和LIBERO-Goal扩展上评估，采用续训练和从头匹配两种设置，结果显示RC-aux以适度额外成本提升LeWM风格规划。
limitations: 仅适用于无重建潜世界模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
实验任务范围有限，未在更复杂场景验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RC-aux辅助目标，修正潜世界模型在规划时的时空不匹配问题。

papers.title: Bifurcation Models: Learning Set-Valued Solution Maps with Weight-Tied Dynamics
papers.abstract: Many scientific and combinatorial problems admit multiple correct solutions, not a single label. Standard supervised learning resolves this ambiguity by choosing one solution as the target, but this hidden selector can be arbitrary, discontinuous, and harder to learn than the underlying solution set. We study bifurcation models, a weight-tied dynamical view in which different initializations can converge to different stable equilibria, so the model represents an attractor landscape rather than one chosen branch. We prove that broad set-valued maps with locally Lipschitz branches can be represented by regular equilibrium dynamics and that the induced selectors are almost everywhere regular, while manual selectors can be arbitrarily irregular. Experiments on frustrated Ising models show that such dynamics can discover multiple valid equilibria without branch labels and outperform single-branch supervision. Allen--Cahn experiments further show that diversity is not automatic: it can be encouraged explicitly, but with an accuracy--diversity tradeoff.

analysis.tldr: 提出分岔模型，通过权重共享动力学学习集合值解映射，无需分支标签即可发现多个有效解。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多科学和组合问题存在多个正确解，标准监督学习通过选择单一解作为目标来消除歧义，但隐藏的选择器可能任意、不连续且比底层解集更难学习。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型学习集合值解映射，即同时表示多个有效解，而不依赖人工选择单一分支。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分岔模型，采用权重共享动力学视角，不同初始化收敛到不同稳定平衡点，从而模型表示吸引子景观而非单一分支。
contributions: 证明具有局部Lipschitz分支的广泛集合值映射可以通过正则平衡动力学表示，且诱导的选择器几乎处处正则，而手动选择器可能任意不规则。
在受挫Ising模型上验证动力学无需分支标签即可发现多个有效平衡，优于单分支监督；Allen-Cahn实验表明多样性需显式鼓励，且存在精度-多样性权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在受挫Ising模型和Allen-Cahn方程上进行实验，展示了多平衡点发现和精度-多样性权衡。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有稳定平衡点的动力学系统。
精度-多样性权衡可能限制实际应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分岔模型，通过权重共享动力学学习集合值解映射，无需分支标签即可发现多个有效解。

papers.title: Signal Reshaping for GRPO in Weak-Feedback Agentic Code Repair
papers.abstract: Code-agent RL often receives weak feedback: rollout-time signals are reliable and executable, but capture only necessary or surface conditions for task success rather than the target semantic predicate. Using agentic compile-fix as the setting, we study signal reshaping for standard GRPO under such feedback. Our central claim is that GRPO's within-group comparison is meaningful only after three kinds of signals are reshaped: outcome rewards recover semantic ranking, process signals localize intra-trajectory credit, and rollouts from the same prompt remain execution-comparable. We operationalize these conditions with a minimal signal-reshaping construction that leaves GRPO's group-normalized advantage construction unchanged: compile-and-semantic layered rewards reshape trajectory ranking, step-level process scores outside group reward normalization reshape within-trajectory update strength, and failure-cause-aware rollout governance reshapes within-group comparability. Experiments show a clear end-to-end gain: full signal-reshaped GRPO improves strict compile-and-semantic accuracy from the base model's zero-shot $0.385$ to $0.535$. Controlled comparisons further explain the source of this gain: binary rewards remove the compile-only middle tier and degrade trajectory control; on top of layered rewards, process-score weighting further improves accuracy from $0.48$ to $0.53$ and reduces average evaluation steps from $23.50$ to $17.02$.
