analysis.problem: 研究词边界破坏（在单词内插入空格）如何影响LLM检测目标信息的能力，并解释性能非单调变化的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着插入率增加，LLM检测准确率呈U形曲线（文本恐怖谷）；在谷底，上下文学习无法挽救性能；正则化扰动可减轻U形；数学推理任务在较弱模型上复现U形；分词熵在F1最小值前达到峰值，支持模式冲突解释。
analysis.method: 通过系统性地在单词内插入空格来破坏词边界，测量LLM在信息检索任务上的F1分数，并提出模式转换假说（词级模式→字符级模式）来解释U形曲线。
contributions: 发现并命名了LLM信息检索中的“文本恐怖谷”现象，即性能随词边界破坏程度呈U形变化。
提出模式转换假说，并通过四个实验和一个分析验证了该假说。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及四个实验和一个分析支持假说。
limitations: 仅研究了词边界破坏这一种噪声类型，其他噪声形式（如拼写错误、语法错误）可能表现不同。
实验主要基于特定LLM和任务，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在词边界噪声文本上的信息检索性能呈U形曲线，揭示了“文本恐怖谷”现象。

papers.title: SatSurfGS: Generalizable 2D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Satellite Surface Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Sparse-view satellite image surface reconstruction remains highly challenging, fundamentally because the reliability of multi-view matching under satellite imaging conditions is strongly spatially heterogeneous. Affected by large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures, multi-view geometric constraints are often sparse, unevenly distributed, and locally unreliable. Although 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) is more suitable than 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for the explicit representation of continuous surfaces, research on generalizable feed-forward 2DGS frameworks for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction is still lacking. To address this issue, we propose SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view surface reconstruction method for satellite imagery based on 2DGS. The proposed method builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework and explicitly models local geometric reliability at three levels: feature learning, Gaussian parameter estimation, and training optimization. Specifically, we propose a confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion module to adaptively integrate monocular priors and multi-view matching features according to local confidence; a cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance module to stabilize stage-wise Gaussian parameter refinement using the residual between the rendered height map from the previous stage and the current-stage MVS height map, together with confidence information; and a confidence bidirectional routing loss to achieve differentiated allocation of geometric and appearance supervision. Experiments on satellite datasets show that the proposed method achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared with representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于2D高斯泼溅的通用稀疏视角卫星表面重建方法，通过多层级置信度建模提升重建质量与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏视角卫星图像表面重建极具挑战，主要由于卫星成像条件下多视角匹配的可靠性存在强空间异质性，受大光度差异、弱纹理和重复纹理影响，几何约束稀疏且局部不可靠。现有2DGS方法缺乏面向卫星图像的通用前馈框架。
analysis.problem: 解决稀疏视角卫星图像表面重建中多视角匹配可靠性空间异质性问题，实现通用且高效的表面重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 卫星图像中多视角匹配可靠性高度空间异质，导致几何约束稀疏、分布不均且局部不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出SatSurfGS，构建从粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，在特征学习、高斯参数估计和训练优化三个层面显式建模局部几何可靠性。包括：置信度感知的单目多视图特征融合模块、跨阶段自一致性残差引导模块、置信度双向路由损失。
contributions: 提出首个基于2DGS的通用稀疏视角卫星表面重建方法SatSurfGS。
设计多层级置信度建模机制，在特征、参数和优化层面处理空间异质性。
在卫星数据集上实现优于现有通用基线和逐场景优化方法的渲染质量、重建精度、跨数据集泛化能力和推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在卫星数据集上进行了实验，与代表性通用基线和竞争性逐场景优化方法比较，在渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化和推理效率方面取得改进。
limitations: 可能依赖特定卫星图像特征，泛化到其他遥感数据需验证。
方法复杂度较高，实时应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于2D高斯泼溅的通用稀疏视角卫星表面重建方法，通过多层级置信度建模提升重建质量与泛化能力。

papers.title: Masks Can Talk: Extracting Structured Text Information from Single-Modal Images for Remote Sensing Change Detection
papers.abstract: Remote sensing change detection is pivotal for urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and environmental resource management. Yet, unimodal deep learning methods frequently confuse genuine semantic changes with visually similar but irrelevant variations. Recent multimodal approaches incorporate text as auxiliary supervision, but their descriptions are either semantically coarse and unstructured or model-generated and thus noisy. Critically, all of them overlook a simple fact: fine-grained change semantics are already implicitly encoded in the ground-truth mask labels that come standard with every change detection dataset. These masks know where the change happened, what the land-cover types were before and after, how the transition occurred, and how many objects were involved. In this paper, we propose S2M, a framework that obtains structured textual features directly from change labels at zero additional annotation cost. Specifically, each change region is automatically transcribed into a semantic quadruple (where, what, how, how many) and converted into several fixed-template text descriptions, providing precise, dense, and noise-free multimodal supervision. We adopts a two-stage training strategy to fine-tune on remote sensing imagery firstly for robust domain-specific representation, after which a multimodal decoder with a bi-directional contrastive loss is introduced to achieve deep alignment between visual features and structured textual embeddings. To validate our method, we construct Gaza-Change-v2, a new multi-class change detection (MCD) dataset about the Gaza Strip. On this MCD dataset, S2M achieves a Sek of 17.80\% and an F$_{\text{scd}}$ of 66.14\%, notably surpassing even multimodal methods that leverage large language models. Our work demonstrates that masks can indeed talk. They tell us exactly what, where, how, and how many changes have occurred.

analysis.tldr: 利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注成本的多模态遥感变化检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感变化检测方法中，单模态方法易混淆语义变化与视觉相似变化，多模态方法依赖粗粒度或噪声文本，且忽略了掩码标签已隐式编码细粒度变化语义。
analysis.problem: 如何从单模态图像中提取结构化文本信息以提升遥感变化检测的语义精度，同时避免额外标注成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出掩码标签隐式包含变化位置、前后地物类型、转换方式和对象数量等细粒度语义，但现有方法未充分利用。
analysis.method: 提出S2M框架，从变化标签自动转录为语义四元组（where, what, how, how many）并转换为固定模板文本描述，采用两阶段训练：先在遥感图像上微调获得领域表示，再引入多模态解码器与双向对比损失实现视觉与结构化文本嵌入的深度对齐。
contributions: 首次利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注成本的多模态监督。
提出语义四元组（where, what, how, how many）自动转录方法，提供精确、密集、无噪声的文本特征。
构建Gaza-Change-v2多类变化检测数据集，并在该数据集上超越使用大语言模型的多模态方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Gaza-Change-v2数据集上，S2M达到Sek 17.80%和F_scd 66.14%，超越使用大语言模型的多模态方法。
limitations: 方法依赖固定模板文本描述，可能限制语义表达的灵活性。
仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用变化检测数据集自带掩码标签自动生成结构化文本描述，实现零额外标注成本的多模态遥感变化检测。

papers.title: HyperEyes: Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parallel Multimodal Search Agents
papers.abstract: Existing multimodal search agents process target entities sequentially, issuing one tool call per entity and accumulating redundant interaction rounds whenever a query decomposes into independent sub-retrievals. We argue that effective multimodal agents should search wider rather than longer: dispatching multiple grounded queries concurrently within a round. To this end, we present HyperEyes, a parallel multimodal search agent that fuses visual grounding and retrieval into a single atomic action, enabling concurrent search across multiple entities while treating inference efficiency as a first-class training objective. HyperEyes is trained in two stages. For cold-start supervision, we develop a Parallel-Amenable Data Synthesis Pipeline covering visual multi-entity and textual multi-constraint queries, curating efficiency-oriented trajectories via Progressive Rejection Sampling. Building on this, our central contribution, a Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework, operates at two levels. At the macro level, we propose TRACE (Tool-use Reference-Adaptive Cost Efficiency), a trajectory-level reward whose reference is monotonically tightened during training to suppress superfluous tool calls without restricting genuine multi-hop search. At the micro level, we adapt On-Policy Distillation to inject dense token-level corrective signals from an external teacher on failed rollouts, mitigating the credit-assignment deficiency of sparse outcome rewards. Since existing benchmarks evaluate accuracy as the sole metric, omitting inference cost, we introduce IMEB, a human-curated benchmark of 300 instances that jointly evaluates search capability and efficiency. Across six benchmarks, HyperEyes-30B surpasses the strongest comparable open-source agent by 9.9% in accuracy with 5.3x fewer tool-call rounds on average.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行多模态搜索智能体HyperEyes，通过双粒度效率感知强化学习实现多实体并发搜索，显著提升准确率并减少工具调用轮次。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态搜索智能体顺序处理目标实体，每次查询分解为独立子检索时会产生冗余交互轮次，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并行多模态搜索智能体，使其能并发执行多个独立子检索，同时将推理效率作为训练目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 顺序搜索导致冗余交互轮次，现有基准仅评估准确率而忽略推理成本。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：1) 并行兼容数据合成流水线生成效率导向轨迹；2) 双粒度效率感知强化学习框架，宏观层使用TRACE奖励抑制多余工具调用，微观层使用在线策略蒸馏注入密集令牌级纠正信号。
contributions: 提出并行多模态搜索智能体HyperEyes，融合视觉定位与检索为单一原子动作。
提出双粒度效率感知强化学习框架，宏观TRACE奖励和微观在线策略蒸馏。
构建IMEB基准，联合评估搜索能力和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准上，HyperEyes-30B相比最强开源智能体准确率提升9.9%，工具调用轮次平均减少5.3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据合成流水线，泛化性需进一步验证。
双粒度训练框架复杂度较高，训练成本可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行多模态搜索智能体HyperEyes，通过双粒度效率感知强化学习实现多实体并发搜索，显著提升准确率并减少工具调用轮次。

papers.title: Learning Multi-Relational Graph Representations for DNA Methylation-Based Biological Age Estimation
papers.abstract: Aging clocks aim to estimate biological age, a measure of physiological state distinct from chronological age, from observable biomarkers, and are widely used for health assessment and disease analysis. DNA methylation is a particularly informative biomarker due to its stability and strong association with aging, and recent learning-based approaches have improved predictive performance. However, most existing methods treat CpG sites as independent features, overlooking the complex and heterogeneous biological relationships among them. We propose RelAge-GNN, a multi-relational graph neural network framework for DNA methylation-based age prediction. Our method constructs three complementary graphs capturing co-methylation patterns, genomic co-localization, and gene-level associations among CpG sites. Each graph is modeled by an independent GNN branch, and a learnable gating mechanism adaptively fuses the resulting representations. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that RelAge-GNN achieves competitive accuracy and stronger correlation with chronological age compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the model exhibits improved sensitivity in detecting age acceleration across diverse disease cohorts, highlighting its potential utility for disease characterization. Finally, through post hoc interpretability analyses, we quantify the contributions of different relational structures and CpG sites, providing biologically meaningful insights and suggesting potential directions for aging-related research. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RelAge-GNN-F1E3/.

analysis.tldr: 提出多关系图神经网络 RelAge-GNN，利用 CpG 位点间的多种生物关系提升 DNA 甲基化年龄预测精度与疾病敏感性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 DNA 甲基化年龄预测方法将 CpG 位点视为独立特征，忽略了它们之间复杂的生物关系，限制了预测性能与生物学可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何建模 CpG 位点间的多关系结构以提升生物年龄估计的准确性和疾病相关年龄加速检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建三种互补图（共甲基化、基因组共定位、基因级关联），分别用独立 GNN 分支建模，并通过可学习门控机制自适应融合表示。
contributions: 提出 RelAge-GNN，首个将多关系图神经网络用于 DNA 甲基化年龄预测的框架。
在大型数据集上达到竞争性精度，并在多种疾病队列中展现出更强的年龄加速检测敏感性。
通过事后可解释性分析量化不同关系结构与 CpG 位点的贡献，提供生物学洞察。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模数据集上实验，与最先进方法比较，RelAge-GNN 达到竞争性精度且与实足年龄相关性更强，并在疾病队列中表现出更好的年龄加速检测敏感性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量甲基化数据，对数据缺失或噪声敏感。
图构建方式可能未覆盖所有重要生物关系，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多关系图神经网络 RelAge-GNN，利用 CpG 位点间的多种生物关系提升 DNA 甲基化年龄预测精度与疾病敏感性。

papers.title: Repeated Deceptive Path Planning against Learnable Observer
papers.abstract: We study the problem of deceptive path planning (DPP), where an agent aims to conceal its true destination from external observers. While existing work assumes static, non-learning observers, real-world adversaries-such as in critical goods transportation or military operations-can adapt by learning from historical trajectories. To address this gap, we introduce Repeated Deceptive Path Planning (RDPP), a new formulation that explicitly models learnable observers. We show that existing DPP methods fail under this setting, as they cannot adapt to evolving adversarial predictions. While incorporating observer previous predictions into updates enables some adaptation, such incremental updates cause accumulative lag that degrades deception. To this end, we propose Deceptive Meta Planning (DeMP), a two-level optimization framework that combines episode-level adaptation, which enables short-term policy adjustment to counter updated observer, and meta-level updates, which leverage cross-episode feedback to capture how observers update their models and accelerate adaptation in future episodes. In this way, DeMP mitigates the accumulation of adaptation lag, enabling sustained deception against a learning observer. Experiments across environments demonstrate that DeMP significantly outperforms existing approaches in RDPP while maintaining competitive path cost. Our results highlight the importance of modeling repeated interactions with learnable adversaries, providing new insights into deception and privacy in multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeMP元学习框架，使智能体在重复路径规划中持续欺骗可学习的观察者。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有欺骗路径规划（DPP）假设观察者静态且不学习，但实际场景中观察者会从历史轨迹中学习并适应，导致传统方法失效。
analysis.problem: 如何使智能体在重复路径规划中持续欺骗可学习的观察者，避免因观察者适应而导致的欺骗效果退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有DPP方法无法适应观察者预测的演化；简单增量更新会导致累积滞后，降低欺骗效果。
analysis.method: 提出DeMP，一种双层优化框架：内层进行episode级适应以应对更新后的观察者，外层进行元级更新以利用跨episode反馈加速未来适应，从而缓解适应滞后。
contributions: 提出重复欺骗路径规划（RDPP）新问题，显式建模可学习观察者。
提出DeMP元学习框架，实现持续欺骗并保持路径成本竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个环境中验证，DeMP显著优于现有方法，同时保持路径成本竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖环境可重复性，在高度动态环境中元学习可能失效。
未讨论观察者模型复杂度对算法性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeMP元学习框架，使智能体在重复路径规划中持续欺骗可学习的观察者。

papers.title: SREGym: A Live Benchmark for AI SRE Agents with High-Fidelity Failure Scenarios
papers.abstract: AI agents are increasingly used to diagnose and mitigate failures in production systems, known as agentic Site Reliability Engineering (SRE). Current SRE benchmarks are limited to oversimplistic SRE tasks and are unfortunately hard to extend due to bespoke designs. We present SREGym, a high-fidelity benchmark for SRE agents. SREGym exposes a live system environment built atop real-world cloud-native system stacks, where high-fidelity failure scenarios are simulated through fault injectors. SREGym models the complexity of production environments by simulating (1) a wide range of faults at different layers, (2) various ambient noises, and (3) diverse failure modes such as metastable failures and correlated failures. SREGym is architected as a modular, extensible framework that orchestrates fault and noise injectors across stacks. SREGym currently includes 90 realistic, challenging SRE problems. We use SREGym to evaluate frontier agents and show that their capabilities varies significantly in addressing different kinds of failures, with up to 40% differences in end-to-end results. SREGym is actively maintained as an open-source project and has been used by researchers and practitioners.

analysis.tldr: SREGym 是一个高保真、可扩展的 AI SRE 智能体实时基准测试平台，包含 90 个真实故障场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 SRE 基准测试任务过于简化且难以扩展，无法反映生产环境的复杂性，亟需高保真、可扩展的评估平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能模拟生产环境复杂故障（多层故障、环境噪声、元稳定故障等）且易于扩展的 SRE 智能体基准测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同前沿 AI 智能体在处理不同类型故障时能力差异显著，端到端结果差异高达 40%。
analysis.method: 基于真实云原生系统栈构建实时系统环境，通过故障注入器模拟高保真故障场景，并采用模块化可扩展框架编排多层故障和噪声注入。
contributions: 提出了 SREGym，一个高保真、可扩展的 SRE 智能体基准测试平台。
模拟了生产环境的三种复杂性：多层故障、环境噪声和多种故障模式（如元稳定故障和关联故障）。
提供了 90 个真实且具有挑战性的 SRE 问题，并开源维护。
analysis.experiments: 使用 SREGym 评估了前沿智能体，发现其在不同故障类型上的能力差异显著，端到端结果差异高达 40%。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有生产环境中的故障类型。
基准测试的实时性可能带来环境波动影响评估稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SREGym 是一个高保真、可扩展的 AI SRE 智能体实时基准测试平台，包含 90 个真实故障场景。

papers.title: Hierarchical Perfusion Graphs for Tumor Heterogeneity Modeling in Glioma Molecular Subtyping
papers.abstract: Precise molecular subtyping of gliomas, including isocitrate dehydrogenase (IDH) mutation and 1p/19q codeletion, directly guides surgical and therapeutic decisions, yet currently relies on invasive tissue sampling. Deep learning on structural MRI has emerged as a non-invasive alternative, but anatomy-only approaches cannot capture the hemodynamic signatures that distinguish molecular subtypes. Radiogenomics based on dynamic susceptibility contrast (DSC) MRI holds immense potential for non-invasively characterizing glioma molecular subtypes, yet clinical deployment has been hindered by inter-site variability and the limitations of voxel-wise analysis. We introduce HiPerfGNN, a framework that first learns discrete hemodynamic representations from raw time-intensity curves using a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE). These quantized perfusion codes define coarse-level graph nodes representing functional tumor habitats, each of which is hierarchically subdivided into fine-level subregions guided by structural MRI. A hierarchical graph neural network then propagates information across scales for molecular prediction. On an internal cohort (n=475), the model achieved AUCs of 0.96 (IDH), 0.89 (1p/19q), and 0.84 (WHO grade), and maintained robust IDH performance (AUC 0.89) on an independent external cohort (n=397) without recalibration. Gradient-based saliency analysis confirms biologically grounded attention patterns aligned with known glioma pathophysiology. Our results demonstrate the added value of integrating perfusion dynamics into radiogenomic pipelines for glioma molecular subtyping. Code is available at https://github.com/janghana/HiPerfGNN.

analysis.tldr: 提出HiPerfGNN框架，通过层次化灌注图建模肿瘤异质性，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 胶质瘤分子亚型（如IDH突变、1p/19q共缺失）对手术和治疗决策至关重要，但当前依赖有创组织取样；基于结构MRI的深度学习方法无法捕捉区分分子亚型的血流动力学特征，而DSC-MRI的放射基因组学受限于站点间变异和体素级分析。
analysis.problem: 如何从DSC-MRI时间-强度曲线中学习离散血流动力学表征，并构建层次化图结构以整合多尺度信息，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的准确预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用VQ-VAE从原始时间-强度曲线学习离散血流动力学编码，定义粗粒度图节点（功能肿瘤栖息地），再根据结构MRI将每个节点细分为细粒度子区域，最后通过层次化图神经网络跨尺度传播信息进行分子预测。
contributions: 提出HiPerfGNN框架，首次将层次化灌注图用于胶质瘤分子亚型建模。
在内部队列（n=475）和外部独立队列（n=397）上验证了模型的有效性和鲁棒性，IDH预测AUC分别达0.96和0.89。
梯度显著性分析表明模型关注区域与已知胶质瘤病理生理学一致。
analysis.experiments: 在内部队列（n=475）上，IDH、1p/19q和WHO分级AUC分别为0.96、0.89和0.84；在外部独立队列（n=397）上，IDH AUC为0.89。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量DSC-MRI数据，对采集协议差异敏感。
层次化图结构的设计可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiPerfGNN框架，通过层次化灌注图建模肿瘤异质性，实现胶质瘤分子亚型的非侵入性预测。

papers.title: PRIMED: Adaptive Modality Suppression for Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation via Biased Competition
papers.abstract: Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation (Ref-AVS) seeks to localize and segment target objects in video frames based on visual, auditory, and textual referring cues. The task is challenging because the relevance of different modalities varies across referring expressions and scenes, while existing methods typically treat multimodal cues as homogeneous inputs for fusion, prompting, or reasoning, making them vulnerable to irrelevant or misleading modalities. To address this problem, we propose PRIMED, inspired by the biased competition theory in cognitive neuroscience, which explicitly models both visual perception and language-driven prior modulation, and enables more accurate Ref-AVS by adaptive modality suppression. Specifically, a Modality Prior Decoder first estimates whether the referring expression relies primarily on audio, vision, or their joint interaction, generating a modality prior to adaptively guide high-level attention. A Token Distiller further extracts compact global visual tokens from high-level features and shares them across Competition-aware Cross-modal Fusion modules to provide hierarchical global context. Additionally, we introduce a Spatial-Aware Semantic Alignment loss to further enhance foreground-background discrimination through contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on the Ref-AVS benchmark demonstrate that PRIMED achieves state-of-the-art overall performance.

analysis.tldr: 受认知科学中偏置竞争理论启发，提出自适应模态抑制方法，在指代音视频分割任务上实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将多模态线索视为同质输入，易受无关或误导模态干扰，而不同指代表达和场景中模态相关性动态变化，亟需自适应模态抑制机制。
analysis.problem: 如何根据指代表达和场景动态抑制无关模态、突出相关模态，实现更准确的指代音视频分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PRIMED框架，包含模态先验解码器估计模态依赖类型并生成先验引导注意力，令牌蒸馏器提取紧凑全局视觉令牌并跨模块共享，以及空间感知语义对齐损失增强前景-背景区分。
contributions: 首次将认知科学的偏置竞争理论引入多模态分割，实现自适应模态抑制。
提出模态先验解码器和令牌蒸馏器，有效建模模态依赖和全局上下文。
在Ref-AVS基准上取得整体最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Ref-AVS基准上进行大量实验，达到整体最优性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量指代表达和模态先验标注。
计算开销可能因多模块协同而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受认知科学中偏置竞争理论启发，提出自适应模态抑制方法，在指代音视频分割任务上实现SOTA。

papers.title: DPG-CD: Depth-Prior-Guided Cross-Modal Joint 2D-3D Change Detection
papers.abstract: Urban spatial evolution is manifested not only through horizontal expansion but also through vertical structural changes. Consequently, jointly capturing 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes is essential for urban morphology analysis and emergency management. In practical scenarios, collecting 3D observations is often constrained by high acquisition costs and the inability to support frequent updates. The multi-temporal cross-modal input consisting of pre-event Digital Surface Model (DSM) and post-event imagery provides a practical solution for 3D change detection in high-frequency urban monitoring, disaster assessment, and emergency response scenarios. However, this setting remains challenging as imagery and DSM data exhibit significant spectral-geometric representation gaps. Moreover, modality differences may be confused with actual changes, and robust change detection requires effective fusion of semantic and geometric features from multi-temporal data. In this paper, we propose DPG-CD, a depth-prior-guided multi-temporal cross-modal fusion framework for joint 2D semantic and 3D height change detection. Specifically, an estimated depth prior is introduced into the imagery to mitigate the modality gap with DSM. A gated fusion mechanism then selectively injects geometric cues from depth prior while preserving discriminative spectral representations. Subsequently, a multi-stage cross-temporal cross-modal feature fusion architecture is employed to extract change-aware features. Finally, a multi-task decoder jointly predicts 2D semantic changes and 3D height changes, complemented by an auxiliary DSM prediction task to improve structural consistency and height estimation accuracy. Experiments on two public datasets, Hi-BCD and 3DCD, and a new dataset, NYC-MMCD, demonstrate that DPG-CD outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both 2D and 3D change detection tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市空间演化不仅体现在水平扩张，还包括垂直结构变化，但3D观测采集成本高、难以频繁更新，而多时相跨模态输入（前事件DSM和后事件影像）为高频监测提供了可行方案，但存在光谱-几何表征差异大、模态差异易与真实变化混淆等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合多时相影像和DSM的语义与几何特征，实现鲁棒的联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DPG-CD框架：引入估计的深度先验缩小影像与DSM的模态差距；门控融合机制选择性注入几何线索同时保留光谱表征；多阶段跨时相跨模态特征融合提取变化感知特征；多任务解码器联合预测2D语义变化和3D高度变化，并辅以DSM预测任务提升结构一致性。
contributions: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，用于联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测。
设计门控融合机制和多阶段跨时相跨模态特征融合架构，有效缓解模态差异并融合语义与几何特征。
在Hi-BCD、3DCD和新数据集NYC-MMCD上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Hi-BCD、3DCD和NYC-MMCD三个数据集上实验，DPG-CD在2D和3D变化检测任务上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖深度估计先验的质量，可能影响性能。
多任务学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度先验引导的跨模态融合框架DPG-CD，联合2D语义和3D高度变化检测，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Real-IAD MVN: A Multi-View Normal Vector Dataset and Benchmark for High-Fidelity Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) is critical for quality control, but existing methods struggle with subtle, geometric defects. Standard 2D (RGB) images are sensitive to texture and lighting but often miss fine geometric anomalies. While 3D point clouds capture macro-shape, they are typically too sparse to detect micro-defects like scratches or pits. We address this fundamental data limitation by introducing Real-IAD-MVN (Multi-View Normal), a large-scale industrial dataset. By upgrading our acquisition system, Real-IAD-MVN captures high-fidelity surface normal maps from five distinct viewpoints, replacing sparse 3D data entirely. This provides a comprehensive geometric representation at a micro-detail level, making previously invisible side-wall and occluded defects explicitly detectable. Our experiments, conducted on this new dataset, first provide evidence that incorporating dense, multi-view pseudo-3D (surface normals) yields significantly better detection performance than using sparse 3D point cloud data. To further validate the dataset and provide a strong benchmark, we introduce a baseline method based on reconstruction, which learns to extract cross-modal unified prototypes from the image and normal map streams. We demonstrate that this unified prototype approach surpasses existing state-of-the-art multimodal fusion methods, highlighting the rich potential of our new dataset for advancing geometric anomaly detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视角法向量图数据集Real-IAD-MVN，替代稀疏3D点云实现高保真工业异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工业异常检测方法受限于数据模态：2D RGB图像对纹理敏感但易漏检几何缺陷，3D点云稀疏难以检测微细缺陷（如划痕、凹坑），亟需一种兼具高分辨率几何细节的数据形式。
analysis.problem: 如何提供高保真几何表示，使侧壁、遮挡等微小几何缺陷变得显式可检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：密集多视角伪3D（表面法向量）比稀疏3D点云在检测性能上显著更优。
analysis.method: 构建多视角法向量图数据集，并提出基于重建的基线方法，从图像和法向量流中学习跨模态统一原型。
contributions: 发布Real-IAD-MVN大规模多视角法向量图数据集，替代稀疏3D点云提供微细节级几何表示。
实验证明密集多视角伪3D优于稀疏3D点云，并引入统一原型基线方法超越现有多模态融合方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Real-IAD-MVN数据集上进行实验，验证了密集多视角法向量相比稀疏3D点云的优越性，并展示了统一原型方法达到SOTA。
limitations: 数据集仅包含五个固定视角，可能无法覆盖所有复杂遮挡情况。
基线方法依赖重建，对极端异常或未见过的缺陷类型泛化能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视角法向量图数据集Real-IAD-MVN，替代稀疏3D点云实现高保真工业异常检测。

papers.title: Uncovering and Shaping the Latent Representation of 3D Scene Topology in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Decades of cognitive science establish that humans navigate environments by forming cognitive maps, defined as allocentric and topology-preserving representations of 3D space. While modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate emergent spatial reasoning from 2D egocentric inputs, it remains unclear whether they construct an analogous 3D internal representation. In this paper, we demonstrate that current VLMs do possess a latent topological map of 3D scenes, but it is heavily overshadowed by non-geometric visual semantics, such as color and shape. By isolating this spatial subspace through cross-scene linear feature extraction, we extract a clean spatial subspace that causally controls the model's spatial outputs. We mathematically shape this latent representation and prove its correspondence to the Laplacian eigenmaps of the scene's 3D Gaussian-kernel graph, converging to the physical 3D space in the continuous limit. Motivated by this geometric identification, we further introduce a mathematically principled latent regularization method for VLMs, based on Dirichlet energy. Applying this single-term regularizer to a minimal 500-step supervised VLM fine-tuning (SFT) on simple synthetic data yields significant improvements on real-world spatial benchmarks, outperforming standard SFT and competitive baselines by up to 12.1\% in spatial tasks involving scene topology understanding. Source code is available at https://github.com/pittisl/vlm-latent-shaping

analysis.tldr: 发现VLM中存在被视觉语义掩盖的3D场景拓扑隐空间，通过拉普拉斯特征映射和Dirichlet能量正则化可提取并塑造该空间，显著提升空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类通过拓扑保持的认知地图导航，但VLM从2D输入进行空间推理时是否构建了类似的3D内部表征尚不明确，且现有方法难以分离几何与语义信息。
analysis.problem: VLM的隐空间中3D场景拓扑表征被非几何视觉语义（如颜色、形状）掩盖，需要提取并塑造该空间以提升空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM确实拥有潜在拓扑地图，但被非几何视觉语义严重掩盖；通过跨场景线性特征提取可分离出干净的空间子空间，该子空间与场景3D高斯核图的拉普拉斯特征映射对应。
analysis.method: 通过跨场景线性特征提取分离空间子空间，基于Dirichlet能量设计隐空间正则化方法，在简单合成数据上对VLM进行500步监督微调。
contributions: 首次证明VLM中存在3D场景拓扑的隐空间表征，并揭示其被非几何语义掩盖的现象。
提出基于Dirichlet能量的隐空间正则化方法，通过数学上严谨的几何识别提升VLM空间推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界空间基准上，该方法在涉及场景拓扑理解的空间任务中比标准SFT和竞争基线提升高达12.1%。
limitations: 正则化仅基于简单合成数据微调，复杂场景泛化性待验证。
方法依赖跨场景线性特征提取，可能受场景多样性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现VLM中存在被视觉语义掩盖的3D场景拓扑隐空间，通过拉普拉斯特征映射和Dirichlet能量正则化可提取并塑造该空间，显著提升空间推理能力。

papers.title: MathlibPR: Pull Request Merge-Readiness Benchmark for Formal Mathematical Libraries
papers.abstract: The ecosystem of Lean and Mathlib has become the de facto standard for large language model (LLM) assisted formal reasoning with remarkable successes in recent years. Those successes, however, only consume Mathlib as an essential dependency but do not directly contribute to it. In the meantime, the growth of Mathlib has recently been bottlenecked by the review process, which requires human reviewers to judge whether proposed pull requests (PRs) follow the Mathlib's conventions and are worth integrating as part of a shared mathematical infrastructure. This leads to our central question: can LLMs help review Mathlib PRs? To this end, we introduce MathlibPR, a benchmark built from real Mathlib4 PR histories. We further propose a staged evaluation protocol and use it to evaluate both LLM models (e.g., DeepSeek, Qwen, Goedel, and Kimina) and LLM agents (e.g., Codex and Claude Code). Surprisingly, both LLM models and LLM agents struggle to distinguish merge-ready PRs from build-passing PRs that were revised or never merged. By turning Mathlib PR histories into a supervised signal, MathlibPR provides a step toward reviewer assistants and reward models that could help evaluate PRs and steer LLMs toward producing merge-ready Mathlib contributions.

analysis.tldr: 构建 Mathlib PR 合并就绪基准，发现 LLM 难以区分可合并与不可合并的 PR。
analysis.research_motivation: Mathlib 库的审核流程成为其增长瓶颈，需要大量人工判断 PR 是否符合规范，因此探索 LLM 辅助审核的可能性。
analysis.problem: LLM 能否有效判断 Mathlib PR 的合并就绪状态？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 模型和智能体均难以区分可合并 PR 与构建通过但未合并或已修订的 PR。
analysis.method: 从 Mathlib4 PR 历史构建基准，提出分阶段评估协议，评估多种 LLM 模型和智能体。
contributions: 提出 MathlibPR 基准，用于评估 LLM 在形式数学库 PR 审核中的能力。
通过实验揭示 LLM 在区分合并就绪 PR 上的不足，为开发审核助手和奖励模型提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 DeepSeek、Qwen、Goedel、Kimina 等模型以及 Codex、Claude Code 等智能体，发现它们均难以区分合并就绪 PR。
limitations: 基准仅基于 Mathlib4 PR 历史，可能不适用于其他形式数学库。
未提供具体实验数值结果，仅定性描述。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建 Mathlib PR 合并就绪基准，发现 LLM 难以区分可合并与不可合并的 PR。

papers.title: UniV2D: Bridging Visual Restoration and Semantic Perception for Underwater Salient Object Detection
papers.abstract: Underwater salient object detection (USOD) plays a vital role in marine vision tasks but remains fundamentally challenging due to severe visual degradation, such as selective absorption and medium scattering. Conventional pipelines typically adopt a sequential "enhance-then-detect" paradigm. However, isolating low-level visual restoration from high-level semantic perception often leads to semantic inconsistency, where the restored images may not be optimal for detection and can even introduce task-irrelevant noise. To break this sequential bottleneck, we propose UniV2D, a Unified Vision-to-Detection Network that jointly optimizes visual restoration and salient object detection within a mutually beneficial framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on disjointed pipelines or rigid physical priors, UniV2D introduces a semantic-driven learning paradigm: high-level saliency semantics actively guide the restoration process, while the restored visual cues reciprocally enhance saliency perception. Specifically, UniV2D features a hierarchical dual-branch architecture. It first employs a self-calibrated decoder to predict initial saliency masks alongside a mask-aware restoration module to reconstruct image content. Subsequently, a saliency-guided refinement module equipped with cross-level modulation is utilized to align structural fidelity with semantic consistency. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that UniV2D significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations, establishing a new standard for joint underwater perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出联合优化视觉恢复与语义感知的水下显著目标检测网络，打破传统顺序处理瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下显著目标检测因视觉退化（如选择性吸收和介质散射）而极具挑战，传统'增强-检测'顺序范式导致恢复与检测语义不一致，恢复图像可能引入任务无关噪声。
analysis.problem: 如何打破低层视觉恢复与高层语义感知之间的顺序瓶颈，实现两者联合优化与互惠增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统顺序范式下，恢复图像可能对检测并非最优，甚至引入任务无关噪声，导致语义不一致。
analysis.method: 提出UniV2D统一视觉到检测网络，包含层次化双分支架构：自校准解码器预测初始显著图，掩码感知恢复模块重建图像内容，显著引导精炼模块通过跨层调制对齐结构保真度与语义一致性。
contributions: 提出语义驱动的学习范式，高层显著语义主动引导恢复过程，恢复视觉线索反向增强显著感知。
设计层次化双分支架构，包含自校准解码器、掩码感知恢复模块和显著引导精炼模块。
在多个基准上显著超越现有方法，建立水下联合感知新标准。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了定量和定性评估，显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定水下退化模型，泛化到其他退化场景需验证。
双分支架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联合优化视觉恢复与语义感知的水下显著目标检测网络，打破传统顺序处理瓶颈。

papers.title: Fine-tuning a vision-language model for fracture-surface morphology recognition
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scientific image understanding, but general-purpose models often lack the domain-specific visual knowledge required for reliable materials characterization. In this work, we fine-tuned an open-source VLM (Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct) for fracture-surface image analysis using a curated dataset of 13,168 open-source, literature-mined fracture-surface images. Morphology annotations were generated by GPT-5.2-Reasoning (high) from both the images and relevant excerpts of their source papers, and the dataset was further enriched with targeted manual collection and rotation-based augmentation. The resulting specialist model outperforms flagship proprietary multimodal models on a benchmark of 100 manually annotated images. It achieves a precision of 0.92, compared to 0.35 for the base Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, 0.58 for GPT-5.5-Reasoning (high), and 0.78 for Gemini 3.1 Pro-Reasoning (high). Dataset ablations show that manual collection of rare-feature images and augmentation via image rotation are both beneficial to improve recognition of less common fracture morphology features. We further discuss integrated use of the fine-tuned model with proprietary models to combine fracture-specific visual accuracy with broader multimodal reasoning for autonomous fractography. Although focused on fracture-surface images, this work demonstrates how VLMs can be adapted through targeted collection and fine-tuning on novel feature images to recognize those features and support downstream decision-making in autonomous microscopy workflows.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调VLM实现断口形貌高精度识别，在100张人工标注图像上达到0.92精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用VLM缺乏材料科学领域特定的视觉知识，难以可靠地进行断口形貌识别，而人工分析效率低且主观性强。
analysis.problem: 如何使VLM具备断口形貌的领域特定视觉知识，实现高精度自动识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct，使用13168张文献挖掘的断口图像进行微调，形态标注由GPT-5.2-Reasoning生成，并辅以人工收集和旋转增强。
contributions: 构建了包含13168张断口图像的微调数据集，并利用GPT-5.2-Reasoning自动生成标注。
微调后的模型在100张人工标注图像上达到0.92精度，显著超越基础模型和旗舰闭源模型。
analysis.experiments: 在100张人工标注图像上评估，微调模型精度0.92，基础模型0.35，GPT-5.5-Reasoning 0.58，Gemini 3.1 Pro-Reasoning 0.78。消融实验表明人工收集稀有特征图像和旋转增强均有益。
limitations: 数据集仅来自文献挖掘，可能覆盖不全所有断口形貌类型。
标注依赖GPT-5.2-Reasoning，可能存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调VLM实现断口形貌高精度识别，在100张人工标注图像上达到0.92精度。

papers.title: TriP: A Triangle Puzzle Approach to Robust Translation Averaging
papers.abstract: Translation averaging aims to recover camera locations from pairwise relative translation directions and is a fundamental component of global Structure-from-Motion pipelines. The problem is challenging because direction measurements contain no distance information, making the estimation problem highly ill-conditioned and highly sensitive to corrupted observations. In this paper, we propose TriP, a triangle-based framework for robust translation averaging. TriP first infers local relative edge scales from triangle geometry, and then synchronizes the scales of overlapping triangles in the logarithmic domain to recover globally consistent edge lengths and camera locations. By leveraging higher-order consistency across triangles, the proposed method is robust to adversarial, cycle-consistent, and other structured corruptions. In addition, TriP avoids the collapse issue without requiring any extra anti-collapse constraints, since log-scale synchronization excludes the degenerate zero-scale solution by construction. These structural advantages enable a particularly strong theory for exact location recovery. On the practical side, TriP is fully parallelizable, computationally efficient, and naturally scalable to graphs with millions of cameras. Moreover, it outperforms all previous translation averaging methods by a large margin on both synthetic and real datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于三角形几何的鲁棒平移平均方法，通过局部尺度推断与对数域同步实现精确相机定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 平移平均是全局SfM的核心，但方向测量缺乏距离信息导致问题病态且对异常值敏感，现有方法难以同时处理结构化噪声和避免退化解。
analysis.problem: 从成对相对平移方向中鲁棒且高效地恢复相机位置，尤其对抗结构化异常值并避免零尺度退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TriP：首先利用三角形几何推断局部相对边尺度，然后在对数域同步重叠三角形的尺度以恢复全局一致的边长和相机位置。
contributions: 提出基于三角形高阶一致性的鲁棒平移平均框架，有效对抗对抗性、循环一致等结构化异常值。
通过构造性设计避免退化零尺度解，无需额外约束，并提供精确恢复的理论保证。
方法完全可并行化，计算高效，可扩展至百万级相机图，在合成和真实数据集上显著超越先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上进行了实验，结果大幅优于所有先前平移平均方法。
limitations: 可能依赖三角形质量，在退化几何（如共线点）下性能未知。
理论分析限于精确恢复条件，实际噪声下误差界未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于三角形几何的鲁棒平移平均方法，通过局部尺度推断与对数域同步实现精确相机定位。

papers.title: AGA3DNet: Anatomy-Guided Gaussian Priors with Multi-view xLSTM for 3D Brain MRI Subtype Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D brain MRI subtype classification benefits from both localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning. We present AGA3DNet, a report-grounded framework that incorporates brief anatomical phrases extracted from radiology reports as a soft anatomical prior channel and fuses it with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM aggregation. Specifically, extracted anatomical phrases are mapped to atlas-defined regions and converted into smooth spatial priors using a signed-distance transform followed by Gaussian weighting, providing interpretable, anatomy-grounded guidance without requiring dense voxel annotations. We evaluate AGA3DNet on a retrospective institutional brain MRI cohort for abnormal subtype discrimination and compare against reproducible 3D classification baselines. AGA3DNet achieves improved overall balance across performance metrics and supports clinically interpretable localization through the prior channel. We discuss limitations related to single-cohort evaluation and the lack of large-scale public brain MRI datasets paired with radiology reports under broadly usable terms.

analysis.tldr: 利用放射学报告中的解剖短语作为软先验，结合3D CNN与多视图xLSTM，提升脑MRI亚型分类性能与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D脑MRI亚型分类需要同时利用局部解剖线索和长程上下文推理，但现有方法缺乏可解释的解剖引导且依赖密集体素标注。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖密集体素标注的情况下，将放射学报告中的解剖知识融入3D CNN，提升分类准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从放射学报告中提取解剖短语，映射到图谱区域，通过符号距离变换和高斯加权生成平滑空间先验，作为软先验通道与轻量级3D CNN及多视图xLSTM聚合融合。
contributions: 提出一种报告引导的框架，利用解剖短语作为软先验，无需密集体素标注。
设计多视图xLSTM聚合机制，增强长程上下文推理。
analysis.experiments: 在回顾性机构脑MRI队列上进行异常亚型区分实验，与可复现的3D分类基线比较，AGA3DNet在性能指标上取得更均衡的提升，并通过先验通道支持临床可解释的定位。
limitations: 仅在单中心队列上评估，泛化性待验证。
缺乏大规模公开脑MRI数据集与放射学报告配对。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用放射学报告中的解剖短语作为软先验，结合3D CNN与多视图xLSTM，提升脑MRI亚型分类性能与可解释性。

papers.title: Qwen3-VL-Seg: Unlocking Open-World Referring Segmentation with Vision-Language Grounding
papers.abstract: Open-world referring segmentation requires grounding unconstrained language expressions to precise pixel-level regions. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibit strong open-world visual grounding, but their outputs remain limited to sparse bounding-box coordinates and are insufficient for dense visual prediction. Recent MLLM-based segmentation methods either directly predict sparse contour coordinates, struggling to reconstruct continuous object boundaries, or rely on external segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM), introducing substantial architectural and deployment overhead. We present Qwen3-VL-Seg, a parameter-efficient framework that treats the MLLM-predicted box as a semantically grounded structural prior and decodes it into pixel-level referring segmentation. At its core, a lightweight box-guided mask decoder combines multi-scale spatial feature injection, spatial-semantic query construction, box-guided high-resolution pixel fusion, and iterative mask-aware query refinement, introducing only 17M parameters (about 0.4\% of the base model). For scalable open-world training, we construct SA1B-ORS, an SA-1B-derived dataset with two subsets: SA1B-CoRS (category-oriented samples) and SA1B-DeRS (descriptive, instance-specific samples). For evaluation, we curate ORS-Bench, a manually screened benchmark with in-distribution and out-of-distribution subsets covering diverse referring expression types. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation, visual grounding, and ORS-Bench show that Qwen3-VL-Seg performs strongly across closed-set and open-world settings, with clear advantages on language-intensive instructions and strong out-of-distribution generalization. Evaluations on general multimodal benchmarks further show that the model broadly preserves general-purpose multimodal competence after segmentation-oriented adaptation.

analysis.tldr: Qwen3-VL-Seg 通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器，仅增加 17M 参数即可将 MLLM 的视觉定位能力扩展到开放世界指代分割，并构建了大规模训练集 SA1B-ORS 和评测基准 ORS-Bench。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 在开放世界视觉定位中仅输出稀疏边界框，无法实现密集像素级分割；而基于 MLLM 的分割方法要么直接预测稀疏轮廓坐标导致边界不连续，要么依赖外部分割模型（如 SAM）带来架构和部署开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入大量额外参数或外部模型的前提下，将 MLLM 的开放世界视觉定位能力扩展到精确的像素级指代分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一个参数高效框架：将 MLLM 预测的边界框作为语义结构先验，通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器（包含多尺度空间特征注入、空间-语义查询构建、框引导高分辨率像素融合和迭代掩码感知查询精化）解码为像素级分割掩码，仅增加 17M 参数。同时构建大规模训练集 SA1B-ORS（含类别导向和描述性实例样本）和评测基准 ORS-Bench。
contributions: 提出 Qwen3-VL-Seg，一种参数高效的开放世界指代分割框架，仅增加 17M 参数即可实现像素级分割。
构建 SA1B-ORS 大规模训练数据集和 ORS-Bench 评测基准，支持开放世界指代分割训练与评估。
实验表明该方法在封闭集和开放世界设置下均表现优异，尤其在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有优势，且保持通用多模态能力。
analysis.experiments: 在指代表达分割、视觉定位和 ORS-Bench 上进行了广泛实验，结果显示 Qwen3-VL-Seg 在封闭集和开放世界设置下表现强劲，在语言密集型指令和分布外泛化上具有明显优势，且通用多模态能力基本保持。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 预测的边界框质量，若框不准确则影响分割效果。
仅增加 17M 参数，但框架复杂度可能随多尺度特征融合等模块增加推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Qwen3-VL-Seg 通过轻量级框引导掩码解码器，仅增加 17M 参数即可将 MLLM 的视觉定位能力扩展到开放世界指代分割，并构建了大规模训练集 SA1B-ORS 和评测基准 ORS-Bench。

papers.title: Neurosymbolic Framework for Concept-Driven Logical Reasoning in Skeleton-Based Human Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Skeleton-based human activity recognition has achieved strong empirical performance, yet most existing models remain black boxes and difficult to interpret. In this work, we introduce a neurosymbolic formulation of skeleton-based HAR that reframes action recognition as concept-driven first-order logical reasoning over motion primitives. Our framework bridges representation learning and symbolic inference by grounding first-order logic predicates in learnable spatial and temporal motion concepts. Specifically, we employ a standard spatio-temporal skeleton encoder to extract latent motion representations, which are then mapped to interpretable concept predicates via a spatio-temporal concept decoder that explicitly separates pose-centric and dynamics-centric abstractions. These concept predicates are composed through differentiable first-order logic layers, enabling the model to learn human-readable logical rules that govern action semantics. To impose semantic structure on the learned concepts, we align skeleton representations with LLM-derived descriptions of atomic motion primitives, establishing a shared conceptual space for perception and reasoning. Extensive experiments on NTU RGB+D 60/120 and NW-UCLA demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive recognition performance while providing explicit, interpretable explanations grounded in logical structure. Our results highlight neurosymbolic reasoning as an effective paradigm for interpretable spatio-temporal action understanding. Code: https://github.com/Mr-TalhaIlyas/REASON

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别转化为基于概念的一阶逻辑推理，实现可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有骨架动作识别模型性能强但黑箱难解释，缺乏可解释性限制了在安全关键领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将骨架动作识别从黑箱模型转变为可解释的、基于逻辑推理的框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用时空骨架编码器提取潜在运动表示，通过时空概念解码器映射为可解释的概念谓词，再经可微一阶逻辑层组合成逻辑规则，并与LLM描述对齐。
contributions: 提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别重构为概念驱动的一阶逻辑推理。
设计时空概念解码器分离姿态中心和动态中心抽象，并与LLM对齐实现可解释概念学习。
analysis.experiments: 在NTU RGB+D 60/120和NW-UCLA上取得有竞争力的识别性能，并提供基于逻辑结构的显式可解释解释。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM描述的质量和覆盖范围。
逻辑规则的可读性可能随动作复杂度下降。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号框架，将骨架动作识别转化为基于概念的一阶逻辑推理，实现可解释性。

papers.title: Structural Rationale Distillation via Reasoning Space Compression
papers.abstract: When distilling reasoning from large language models (LLMs) into smaller ones, teacher rationales for similar problems often vary wildly in structure and strategy. Like a chef who makes the same dish differently each time, this inconsistency burdens the student with noisy supervision that is hard to internalize. We propose Distillation through Reasoning Path Compression (D-RPC), which constrains the teacher to follow a compact, dynamically maintained bank of reusable high-level reasoning paths. For each training question, D-RPC retrieves the most relevant path and conditions the teacher to follow it, producing rationales that are consistent across similar problems yet diverse enough to cover different problem types. A PAC-Bayes analysis formalizes the resulting trade-off between bank size and coverage: smaller banks reduce supervision entropy but risk coverage gaps, and the generalization bound identifies an optimal intermediate size confirmed by our ablations. Across five math and commonsense reasoning benchmarks with two student models, D-RPC consistently outperforms chain-of-thought distillation, freeform rationale generation, direct distillation, and structured-supervision baselines, while using fewer tokens than template-heavy alternatives.

analysis.tldr: 通过压缩推理空间，让教师模型生成结构一致的推理链，提升学生模型蒸馏效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型蒸馏到小模型时，教师对相似问题的推理链在结构和策略上差异很大，这种不一致性给学生模型带来噪声监督，难以内化。
analysis.problem: 如何让教师模型生成结构一致且覆盖多样的推理链，以降低学生蒸馏的监督噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 教师对相似问题的推理链在结构和策略上变化剧烈，导致学生模型难以学习稳定的推理模式。
analysis.method: 提出推理路径压缩蒸馏（D-RPC），维护一个紧凑的动态推理路径库，对每个训练问题检索最相关路径并约束教师遵循该路径生成推理链，从而在一致性和多样性间取得平衡。
contributions: 提出D-RPC方法，通过压缩推理空间实现结构一致的教师推理链生成。
提供PAC-Bayes理论分析，形式化推理路径库大小与覆盖率的权衡，并确认最优中间大小。
在五个数学和常识推理基准上，使用两个学生模型，D-RPC一致优于多种蒸馏基线，且使用更少token。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数学和常识推理基准上，使用两个学生模型，与链式思维蒸馏、自由形式推理生成、直接蒸馏和结构化监督基线对比，D-RPC一致优于所有基线，且使用更少token。
limitations: 依赖预定义的推理路径库，库的初始构建可能需要人工或额外计算。
理论分析基于PAC-Bayes框架，可能对实际复杂场景的适用性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过压缩推理空间，让教师模型生成结构一致的推理链，提升学生模型蒸馏效果。

papers.title: Can You Break RLVER? Probing Adversarial Robustness of RL-Trained Empathetic Agents
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable emotion rewards RLVER has produced language models with strong empathetic performance, evaluated on benchmarks that assume cooperative, honest users. Yet real emotional interactions systematically violate this assumption: users gaslight, escalate, and pressure AI systems for unconditional validation, dynamics that cooperative benchmarks cannot surface. We construct the Adversarial Empathy Benchmark AEB and introduce the Emotional Consistency Score ECS to evaluate empathetic robustness under adversarial conditions. AEB comprises six psychologically grounded adversarial trajectory types with discriminative reward structures that penalize formulaic responses; ECS formally disentangles a model's capacity to track user emotional states from its capacity to improve them. In a controlled experiment across eight scenario-matched conditions (think and no-think conditions on 2 RLVER models, and 2 base models (Qwen 1.5B and 7B) with 480 adversarial dialogues), RLVER-PPO-Think substantially outperforms the same-scale untuned baseline (0.963 vs. 0.761, \(p<0.001, r=0.688\)), with zero dialogue collapses and 47\% higher hidden-intention detection. However, ECS remains nearly flat and is not significantly different for RLVER-PPO-Think versus Base-7B-Think (\(p=0.650\)): RL training improves emotional responsiveness without measurable gains in observable state tracking. We interpret the ECS--FS (Final Score) gap as a behavioral/legibility dissociation inside this simulator family, not as evidence about internal understanding or clinical readiness.

analysis.tldr: RLVER训练的情感对话模型在对抗性用户行为下表现脆弱，本文提出对抗性共情基准AEB和情感一致性分数ECS来评估其鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感对话模型评估假设用户合作诚实，但真实交互中存在情感操纵、升级施压等对抗行为，现有基准无法暴露这些漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和量化RL训练的情感对话模型在对抗性用户行为下的鲁棒性？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLVER-PPO-Think在对抗性对话中表现优于基线（零对话崩溃、隐藏意图检测高47%），但ECS分数与基线无显著差异，表明RL训练提升了情感响应性但未改善可观测的状态跟踪能力，存在行为/可读性分离。
analysis.method: 构建对抗性共情基准AEB（含6种心理对抗轨迹类型和区分性奖励结构）和情感一致性分数ECS（分离状态跟踪与状态改善能力），在8种场景匹配条件下对比RLVER模型与基线的表现。
contributions: 提出对抗性共情基准AEB，包含6种心理对抗轨迹类型，用于评估情感对话模型的鲁棒性。
引入情感一致性分数ECS，形式化分离模型跟踪用户情感状态与改善情感状态的能力。
通过实验揭示RL训练提升情感响应性但未改善状态跟踪，发现行为/可读性分离现象。
analysis.experiments: 在8种场景匹配条件下，对2个RLVER模型和2个基线模型（Qwen 1.5B和7B）进行480个对抗性对话实验，RLVER-PPO-Think的最终分数显著高于基线（0.963 vs 0.761, p<0.001），但ECS无显著差异。
limitations: 实验仅基于Qwen 1.5B和7B模型，可能不适用于更大规模或不同架构的模型。
AEB的对抗轨迹类型可能未覆盖所有真实世界的情感操纵模式。
ECS的分离能力可能依赖于特定奖励结构设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RLVER训练的情感对话模型在对抗性用户行为下表现脆弱，本文提出对抗性共情基准AEB和情感一致性分数ECS来评估其鲁棒性。

papers.title: Adaptive Negative Reinforcement for LLM Reasoning:Dynamically Balancing Correction and Diversity in RLVR
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a highly effective method for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Recent research shows that Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) -- which focuses on penalizing incorrect steps rather than simply rewarding correct ones -- can match or even exceed the performance of more complex frameworks like PPO and GRPO across the entire Pass@k spectrum. However, current NSR techniques usually apply a fixed penalty throughout the training process and treat every incorrect response with the same weight. To address these limitations, we propose two extensions to the NSR framework: Adaptive Negative Sample Reinforcement. Rather than using a fixed update rule, A-NSR uses time-dependent scheduling functions. In the initial training phases, the system focuses heavily on correcting errors to stabilize the model. As training continues, it shifts toward more subtle and controlled updates. We also introduce Confidence-Weighted Negative Reinforcement, which operates on the principle that different mistakes carry different levels of importance. CW-NSR assigns specific penalty weights based on the model's normalized sequence likelihood. If the model is highly confident in a wrong path, it receives a larger penalty and for uncertain errors -- where the model is effectively exploring -- are penalized less strictly. Our formal analysis shows how these mechanisms govern token-level updates, allowing the model to leverage prior-guided probability redistribution while providing a natural defense against overfitting. We evaluated these methods on difficult reasoning datasets, including MATH, AIME 2025, and AMC23, using the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应负样本强化方法，动态调整推理错误惩罚权重，提升LLM推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有负样本强化方法使用固定惩罚权重，无法适应训练阶段变化和错误重要性差异，限制了推理性能提升。
analysis.problem: 如何动态调整负样本惩罚权重，以平衡错误纠正与探索多样性，提升LLM推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种扩展：A-NSR使用时间依赖调度函数，初期侧重纠错，后期精细更新；CW-NSR根据模型置信度分配惩罚权重，高置信错误重罚，低置信探索轻罚。
contributions: 提出自适应负样本强化框架A-NSR，通过时间依赖调度动态调整更新规则。
提出置信度加权负强化CW-NSR，根据模型置信度差异化惩罚错误。
形式化分析表明该方法能实现先验引导的概率重分布并防止过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH、AIME 2025、AMC23等困难推理数据集上，使用Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B架构进行评估。
limitations: 可能依赖特定奖励模型或验证器。
未在更大规模模型或更多任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应负样本强化方法，动态调整推理错误惩罚权重，提升LLM推理能力。

papers.title: Region4Web: Rethinking Observation Space Granularity for Web Agents
papers.abstract: Web agents perceive web pages through an observation space, yet its granularity has remained an underexamined design choice. Existing work treats observation at the same element-level granularity as the action space, leaving the page's functional organization implicit and forcing the agent to infer it from element-level signals at every step. We argue observation should instead operate at the granularity of functional regions, parts of the page that each serve a distinct purpose. We propose Region4Web, a framework that reorganizes the AXTree into functional regions through hierarchical decomposition and semantic abstraction, exposing the page's functional organization as the basis for page state understanding. Moreover, we propose PageDigest, a web-specific inference pipeline that delivers this region-level observation to the actor agent as a compact per-page digest that persists across steps. On the WebArena benchmark, PageDigest substantially reduces observation length while improving overall task success rate across diverse backbone large language models (LLMs) and established agent methods, regardless of backbone capacity. These results show that operating at the granularity of functional regions delivers a more compact and informative basis for the actor agent than element-level processing alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出以功能区域粒度重构Web Agent的观测空间，显著压缩观测长度并提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Web Agent将观测空间与动作空间都设定在元素级粒度，忽略了页面功能组织的隐式结构，迫使Agent每一步都从元素级信号推断页面功能，效率低下且信息冗余。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更高效的观测空间粒度，使Web Agent能直接感知页面的功能组织，减少冗余信息并提升任务表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Region4Web框架，通过层次化分解和语义抽象将AXTree重组织为功能区域，并设计PageDigest推理管线，为Actor Agent提供跨步骤持久的紧凑区域级观测摘要。
contributions: 提出以功能区域粒度作为Web Agent观测空间的新视角，替代传统元素级粒度。
设计Region4Web框架和PageDigest管线，实现区域级观测的生成与持久化，显著压缩观测长度并提升任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在WebArena基准上，使用多种骨干LLM和已有Agent方法，PageDigest显著降低观测长度并提升整体任务成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖AXTree的完整性和质量，对动态页面或复杂布局的适应性有待验证。
区域划分的语义抽象可能引入信息损失，影响细粒度交互任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以功能区域粒度重构Web Agent的观测空间，显著压缩观测长度并提升任务成功率。

papers.title: GAD in the Wild: Benchmarking Graph Anomaly Detection under Realistic Deployment Challenges
papers.abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) is a critical task in graph machine learning with vital applications in financial fraud detection and social platform governance. However, existing GAD benchmarks are often restricted to small-scale, curated graphs with relatively balanced anomaly ratios, leaving a substantial gap between academic evaluation and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we present a multi-dimensional benchmark that systematically evaluates GAD models under three deployment-relevant challenges: million-scale graphs, extreme anomaly scarcity, and missing node attributes. We derive a family of controlled benchmark variants from five diverse graphs, including two native industrial-scale datasets with over 3.7 million nodes. Our extensive evaluation of nine representative GAD models reveals three major limitations: (1) most GNN-based methods fail to scale to million-node graphs due to prohibitive memory requirements; (2) detection performance drops sharply under realistic anomaly ratios (e.g., 0.1\%), often resulting in zero recall; and (3) reconstruction-based models are highly sensitive to attribute imputation strategies. Our findings suggest that strong performance in laboratory settings does not guarantee robustness in production environments. We release this benchmark and empirical evaluation as a diagnostic testbed to promote the development of robust and scalable GAD systems for large-scale, imperfect graphs encountered in practice. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Benchmark_GAD-E7A3.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向百万级图、极端异常稀疏和属性缺失等真实部署挑战的图异常检测基准，揭示现有模型在实验室与生产环境间的显著性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图异常检测基准局限于小规模、平衡异常比的图，与真实部署场景（大规模、异常稀疏、属性缺失）存在巨大差距，阻碍了实用系统的开发。
analysis.problem: 系统评估图异常检测模型在百万级图、极端异常稀缺和节点属性缺失三个真实部署挑战下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 多数GNN方法因内存需求过高无法扩展到百万节点图；2) 在真实异常比（如0.1%）下检测性能急剧下降，常导致零召回；3) 基于重构的模型对属性插补策略高度敏感。
analysis.method: 从五个多样图（含两个原生工业级数据集，超370万节点）衍生出一系列受控基准变体，系统评估九种代表性GAD模型。
contributions: 构建了首个面向真实部署挑战的多维度图异常检测基准，涵盖百万级规模、极端异常稀疏和属性缺失场景。
通过广泛实验揭示了现有GAD模型在实验室与生产环境间的显著性能差距，并指出关键瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在五个图（含两个工业级数据集）上评估九种模型，覆盖三种挑战，报告了内存、召回率等指标。
limitations: 基准仅包含有限数量的数据集和模型，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
未提供具体缓解策略或新方法，仅作为诊断测试床。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向百万级图、极端异常稀疏和属性缺失等真实部署挑战的图异常检测基准，揭示现有模型在实验室与生产环境间的显著性能差距。

papers.title: RRCM: Ranking-Driven Retrieval over Collaborative and Meta Memories for LLM Recommendation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for next-generation recommender systems, offering strong semantic understanding and natural-language reasoning abilities. Despite recent progress, current LLM-based recommenders still face key challenges in constructing decision-relevant contexts from heterogeneous evidence. First, existing methods often rely on fixed context construction strategies: collaborative behavioral evidence and item-side metadata are typically incorporated through predefined prompts, static retrieval pipelines, or handcrafted injection mechanisms, making it difficult to determine what information is truly beneficial for each instance. Second, heterogeneous evidence introduces a severe context-efficiency bottleneck. Rich metadata and collaborative interaction records can quickly overwhelm the context window, while aggressive compression or heuristic filtering may discard fine-grained evidence critical for accurate recommendation. To address these challenges, we propose RRCM, a ranking-driven retrieval-and-reasoning framework over collaborative and metadata memories for LLM-based agentic recommendation. RRCM starts from a lightweight user-history context and learns whether to recommend directly, retrieve collaborative evidence, retrieve item metadata, or interleave both through reasoning. Both memories are represented in natural language and accessed through a unified retrieval interface, enabling flexible evidence acquisition without handcrafted CF injection or fixed retrieval rules. We optimize this memory-reading policy with an outcome-only ranking reward, instantiated using group relative policy optimization, so that retrieval decisions are directly driven by final top-k recommendation quality. Extensive experiments show that RRCM significantly outperforms traditional baselines and diverse LLM-based recommendation approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出RRCM框架，通过排序驱动的检索策略动态融合协同记忆和元数据记忆，提升LLM推荐系统的上下文效率与决策质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的推荐系统依赖固定上下文构建策略（如预定义提示、静态检索），难以判断哪些信息对每个实例真正有益；异构证据（协同行为与元数据）易导致上下文窗口过载，而激进压缩或启发式过滤可能丢失关键细粒度证据。
analysis.problem: 如何动态、自适应地从协同记忆和元数据记忆中检索决策相关的异构证据，以提升LLM推荐系统的上下文效率和推荐准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RRCM框架，包含轻量级用户历史上下文，通过推理决定是否直接推荐、检索协同证据、检索元数据或两者交替；两种记忆以自然语言表示并通过统一检索接口访问；使用基于排序奖励的组相对策略优化（GRPO）优化记忆读取策略。
contributions: 提出RRCM，一种排序驱动的检索-推理框架，动态融合协同记忆和元数据记忆。
设计基于排序奖励的优化方法，直接以最终top-k推荐质量驱动检索决策。
实验表明RRCM显著优于传统基线和多种LLM推荐方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，RRCM显著优于传统基线和多种基于LLM的推荐方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的记忆表示和检索接口。
优化策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RRCM框架，通过排序驱动的检索策略动态融合协同记忆和元数据记忆，提升LLM推荐系统的上下文效率与决策质量。

papers.title: An Embarrassingly Simple Graph Heuristic Reveals Shortcut-Solvable Benchmarks for Sequential Recommendation
papers.abstract: Sequential recommendation has increasingly shifted toward generative recommenders that combine sequential patterns with semantic item information. Yet these methods are often evaluated on a small set of widely used benchmarks, raising a key question: do these benchmarks actually require the advanced modeling capabilities that modern generative recommenders claim to provide? We conduct a benchmark audit with an intentionally simple graph heuristic. Starting from only the last one or two interacted items, it retrieves candidates from a few-hop item-transition graph and ranks them by item-feature similarity. Despite using no sequence encoder, generative objective, or training, this heuristic matches or outperforms many modern baselines, with relative NDCG@10 improvements of 38.10% and 44.18% over the best competing baseline on Amazon Review Sports and CDs. We show that this behavior reflects shortcut solvability rather than an artifact of one heuristic. We identify three shortcut structures that can make next-item prediction easier than expected: low-branching local transitions, feature-smooth transitions, and limited dependence on long user histories. These shortcuts need not appear together; even one or two strong signals can make simple local retrieval highly competitive, while weakening them makes the benefits of more sophisticated models clearer. Across 14 datasets, model rankings vary substantially with dataset properties, yet the heuristic remains competitive on 10 of them. Our findings suggest that strong performance on standard benchmarks does not always demonstrate advanced sequential, semantic, or generative modeling ability. We call for more careful dataset selection and dataset-level diagnostic analysis when using benchmarks to support claims about new recommendation models.

analysis.tldr: 一个简单的图启发式方法揭示了序列推荐基准中存在捷径可解问题，挑战了现代生成式推荐器的评估有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 序列推荐方法日益复杂，但常用基准可能无法真正测试模型的先进能力，导致性能评估失真。
analysis.problem: 验证标准序列推荐基准是否真正需要复杂的生成式建模能力，而非被简单启发式方法利用的捷径结构所主导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一个简单的图启发式方法（仅基于最后1-2个交互项，通过图检索和特征排序）在多个基准上匹配或超越现代基线，表明基准存在捷径可解性。
analysis.method: 提出一个简单的图启发式方法：从最后交互项出发，在物品转移图上进行几跳检索，然后按物品特征相似度排序候选。
contributions: 揭示序列推荐基准中存在三种捷径结构（低分支局部转移、特征平滑转移、弱长历史依赖），使简单方法表现优异。
通过14个数据集的系统分析，证明模型排名随数据集属性变化，但启发式方法在10个数据集上仍具竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在14个数据集上评估，与多种现代基线对比，报告了NDCG@10等指标，并分析了数据集属性对排名的影响。
limitations: 启发式方法仅基于最后1-2个交互，可能不适用于需要长历史依赖的场景。
未提供对非捷径结构的深入分析，如复杂序列模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一个简单的图启发式方法揭示了序列推荐基准中存在捷径可解问题，挑战了现代生成式推荐器的评估有效性。

papers.title: AdaTKG: Adaptive Memory for Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
papers.abstract: Temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) represent time-stamped relational facts and support a wide range of reasoning tasks over evolving events. However, existing methods produce entity representations that are static at the entity level, in that each representation is a function of learned parameters only and retains no trace of the interactions in which the entity has participated. In this paper, we depart from this static view and propose that each entity be modeled as an adaptive process whose representation is refined every time the entity participates in a fact. To this end, we propose AdaTKG, which maintains a per-entity memory that is updated with every observed interaction, with the memory accumulating online and predictions improving as more interactions arrive. Specifically, we instantiate the memory update as a learnable exponential moving average governed by a single shared scalar instead of using learnable parameters for each entity, enabling AdaTKG to handle entities unseen during training. Extensive experiments confirm consistent gains over TKG baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of adaptive memory. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/seunghan96/AdaTKG.

analysis.tldr: AdaTKG通过为每个实体维护自适应记忆来改进时序知识图谱推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有TKG方法生成静态实体表示，无法捕捉实体参与交互的动态演化过程，限制了推理性能。
analysis.problem: 如何建模实体表示随交互动态更新的过程，并处理训练中未见的实体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 为每个实体维护一个记忆，每次观察到交互时通过可学习的指数移动平均更新记忆，共享标量参数以处理未见实体。
contributions: 提出自适应记忆机制，实体表示随交互动态更新。
使用共享标量实现可学习指数移动平均，支持未见实体推理。
analysis.experiments: 在多个TKG基准上取得一致改进，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖交互顺序，对长序列记忆更新效率需验证。
共享标量可能限制不同实体更新模式的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaTKG通过为每个实体维护自适应记忆来改进时序知识图谱推理。

papers.title: Stabilized neural Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman solvers: Error analysis and applications in model-based reinforcement learning
papers.abstract: Physics-informed neural solvers offer a promising route to model-based reinforcement learning in continuous time, where optimal feedback synthesis is governed by Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman (HJB) equations. Practical implementations often occupy a regime that is neither a classical grid method nor a continuous-PDE PINN: the value function is represented by a neural network, finite-difference HJB policy-evaluation operators are evaluated by network queries at shifted points, and residuals are minimized by random continuous collocation. This regime preserves the stabilized finite-difference policy-evaluation structure while avoiding grid-based value unknowns. We develop an error theory for this hybrid regime. Interpreting finite differences as shift operators acting on neural networks, we prove a population $L^2$ stability estimate for one policy-evaluation step with learned dynamics. The bound separates residual error, initial and exterior-collar mismatch, policy mismatch, and model-identification error, with an explicit gradient amplification factor for learned dynamics, while the underlying linear evaluation stability remains free of hidden inverse-viscosity blow-up. We further give a finite-sample collocation certificate and a conditional multi-step propagation result through greedy policy improvement. Experiments on compact-control LQR upto 64 dimensions, Allen--Cahn control, pendulum, Hopper, and 3D quadrotor benchmarks compare against representative model-based and model-free RL baselines, demonstrating the predicted residual, policy-mismatch, and learned-model error trends.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种稳定的神经HJB求解器，结合有限差分策略评估与神经表示，给出误差理论并在模型基强化学习中验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型基强化学习中的连续时间最优反馈合成受HJB方程支配，但现有数值方法（网格法或PINN）在实用中面临精度与效率的权衡，缺乏对混合求解器（神经表示+有限差分）的误差理论分析。
analysis.problem: 为混合型神经HJB求解器（神经值函数+有限差分策略评估+随机配点）建立严格的误差理论，并验证其在模型基RL中的应用效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将有限差分视为作用于神经网络的移位算子，证明单步策略评估的种群L^2稳定性估计，分离残差、边界/外部套环失配、策略失配和模型辨识误差，并给出有限样本配点证书和条件多步传播结果。
contributions: 建立了混合神经HJB求解器的误差理论，包括稳定性估计和误差分解。
在多个控制基准（LQR、Allen-Cahn、pendulum、Hopper、3D quadrotor）上验证了理论预测的误差趋势，并与代表性RL基线对比。
analysis.experiments: 在紧凑控制LQR（最高64维）、Allen-Cahn控制、pendulum、Hopper和3D quadrotor基准上，与模型基和模型无关RL基线对比，展示了残差、策略失配和模型误差趋势。
limitations: 理论分析限于单步策略评估，多步传播结果有条件限制。
实验未涉及更复杂的高维非线性系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种稳定的神经HJB求解器，结合有限差分策略评估与神经表示，给出误差理论并在模型基强化学习中验证。

papers.title: Switchcraft: AI Model Router for Agentic Tool Calling
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems that invoke external tools are powerful but costly, leading developers to default to large models and overspend inference budgets. Model routing can mitigate this, but existing routers are designed for chat completion rather than tool use. We present Switchcraft, the first (to the best of our knowledge) model router optimized for agentic tool calling. Switchcraft operates inline, selecting the lowest-cost model subject to correctness. We construct an evaluation framework on five function-calling benchmarks and train a DistilBERT-based classifier, deployed under a latency budget. Switchcraft achieves 82.9% accuracy -- matching or exceeding the best individual model -- while reducing inference cost by 84%, saving over $3,600 per million queries. We find that larger models do not consistently outperform smaller ones on tool-use tasks, and that nominally cheaper models can incur higher total cost due to token-intensive reasoning. Our work enables cost-aware agentic AI deployment without sacrificing correctness.

analysis.tldr: Switchcraft 是首个面向智能体工具调用的模型路由器，通过轻量级分类器在保证正确性的前提下大幅降低推理成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体系统调用外部工具时成本高昂，开发者倾向于使用大模型导致推理预算超支，现有模型路由器仅针对聊天补全而非工具调用场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在智能体工具调用场景中，根据任务选择最低成本且保证正确性的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大模型在工具调用任务上并不一致优于小模型，且名义上更便宜的模型可能因推理 token 密集而总成本更高。
analysis.method: 基于 DistilBERT 的轻量级分类器，在线选择最低成本模型，并受延迟预算约束。
contributions: 首个面向智能体工具调用的模型路由器 Switchcraft
在五个函数调用基准上构建评估框架，实现 82.9% 准确率，推理成本降低 84%
analysis.experiments: 在五个函数调用基准上评估，Switchcraft 达到 82.9% 准确率，匹配或超越最佳单一模型，推理成本降低 84%，每百万查询节省超 3600 美元。
limitations: 仅基于 DistilBERT，可能无法处理更复杂的工具调用场景
未讨论对未见过的工具或动态工具集的泛化能力
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Switchcraft 是首个面向智能体工具调用的模型路由器，通过轻量级分类器在保证正确性的前提下大幅降低推理成本。

papers.title: Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent literature on fine-tuning Large Language Models highlights a fundamental debate. While Full Fine-Tuning (FFT) provides the representational plasticity required for high-entropy knowledge injection, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) can match or surpass FFT performance because many tasks only require updates in a low-rank space and benefit from LoRA's additional regularization. Through empirical evaluation across diverse tasks (SQL, Medical QA, and Counterfactual Knowledge) and varying language models (Gemma-3-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Qwen2.5-3B), we verify both trends and demonstrate that relying solely on either static architecture is structurally limited. To address this challenge, we propose a Mixture of LoRA and Full (MoLF) Fine-Tuning, a unified framework that enables continuous navigation between both training regimes. MoLF dynamically routes updates between FFT and LoRA at the optimizer level to ensure that exact gradient signals are available to both experts throughout training, yielding stable training dynamics. For memory-constrained environments, we also introduce MoLF-Efficient, which freezes base weights and only routes updates among a pair of LoRA experts of potentially varying rank. Our evaluations show that MoLF either improves on or stays within $1.5\%$ of the better of FFT and LoRA across all settings, while MoLF-Efficient outperforms prior adaptive LoRA approaches by up to $20\%$ on Fact and $9\%$ on Med and SQL.

analysis.tldr: 提出梯度引导优化器路由框架MoLF，在FFT和LoRA之间动态切换，兼顾两者优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 全微调（FFT）和低秩适配（LoRA）各有优劣，但静态选择任一架构在多样任务上存在结构性局限，需要一种能动态结合两者优势的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型微调中动态融合FFT和LoRA，以在不同任务上取得优于或接近两者中最佳的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验验证了FFT在高熵知识注入任务中表现更好，而LoRA在低秩更新任务中因正则化优势可匹敌或超越FFT，但单一架构无法在所有任务上最优。
analysis.method: 提出MoLF框架，在优化器层面动态路由梯度更新到FFT和LoRA专家，确保两者在整个训练中都能获得精确梯度信号；并针对内存受限场景提出MoLF-Efficient，冻结基座权重，仅在多个LoRA专家间路由更新。
contributions: 提出MoLF框架，实现FFT和LoRA之间的动态路由，兼顾两者优势。
提出MoLF-Efficient变体，在冻结基座权重下通过多LoRA专家路由实现高效适配。
在多个任务和模型上验证MoLF性能优于或接近FFT和LoRA中的最佳者，MoLF-Efficient相比先前自适应LoRA方法提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在SQL、Medical QA和Counterfactual Knowledge任务上，使用Gemma-3-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B和Qwen2.5-3B模型进行实验。MoLF在所有设置下性能优于或接近FFT和LoRA中的最佳者（差距在1.5%以内），MoLF-Efficient在Fact任务上比先前自适应LoRA方法提升高达20%，在Med和SQL上提升9%。
limitations: MoLF-Efficient可能仍受限于LoRA低秩假设，在需要高秩更新的任务上性能可能不如FFT。
路由机制可能引入额外计算开销，在大规模模型上效率需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出梯度引导优化器路由框架MoLF，在FFT和LoRA之间动态切换，兼顾两者优势。

papers.title: ARMOR: An Agentic Framework for Reaction Feasibility Prediction via Adaptive Utility-aware Multi-tool Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reaction feasibility prediction, as a fundamental problem in computational chemistry, has benefited from diverse tools enabled by recent advances in artificial intelligence, particularly large language models. However, the performance of individual tools varies substantially across reactions, making it difficult for any single tool to consistently perform well across all cases. This raises a critical challenge: how to effectively leverage multiple tools to obtain more accurate feasibility predictions. To address this, we propose ARMOR, an agentic framework that explicitly models tool-specific utilities, adaptively prioritizes tools, and further resolves the potential tool conflicts to produce the final prediction for each reaction. Unlike existing approaches that rely on simple aggregation or heuristic assignment over various tools, ARMOR organizes tools into a hierarchy that prioritizes top-performing tools and defers others when needed, characterizes their strengths through tool-specific patterns, and resolves conflicts via memoryaugmented reasoning. Extensive experiments on a public dataset demonstrate that ARMOR consistently outperforms strong baselines, including single-tool methods as well as various tool aggregation and tool selection approaches. Further analysis shows that the improvements are particularly significant on reactions with conflicting tool predictions, highlighting the effectiveness of ARMOR in leveraging the complementary strengths of multiple tools. The code is available via https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ARMOR-E13F.

analysis.tldr: 提出ARMOR框架，通过自适应效用感知的多工具推理提升化学反应可行性预测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 化学反应可行性预测中，单一工具在不同反应上表现差异大，难以在所有情况下保持高性能，亟需有效整合多个工具以获得更准确的预测。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用多个工具（如LLM驱动的化学工具）进行反应可行性预测，解决工具间性能差异和预测冲突问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同工具在不同反应上的性能差异显著，且工具预测可能存在冲突，简单聚合或启发式分配无法充分利用工具互补优势。
analysis.method: 提出ARMOR框架，显式建模工具特定效用，自适应优先选择高性能工具，并通过记忆增强推理解决工具冲突，最终生成预测。
contributions: 提出一种基于智能体的多工具推理框架ARMOR，通过效用建模和自适应优先级排序提升反应可行性预测性能。
引入工具层级结构和记忆增强推理机制，有效解决工具冲突并利用工具互补优势。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上，ARMOR持续优于强基线方法，包括单工具方法及多种工具聚合/选择方法，尤其在工具预测冲突的反应上改进显著。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的工具集，可能无法泛化到新工具。
记忆增强推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ARMOR框架，通过自适应效用感知的多工具推理提升化学反应可行性预测的准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: InfoGeo: Information-Theoretic Object-Centric Learning for Cross-View Generalizable UAV Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is fundamental for precise localization and navigation in GPS-denied environments, aiming to match ground or UAV imagery with satellite views. While existing approaches rely on global feature alignment, they often suffer from substantial domain shifts induced by varying regional textures and weather conditions. This issue becomes even more pronounced in UAV-based scenarios, where the broader perspective inevitably introduces dense, fine-grained objects, creating significant visual clutter. To address this, we draw inspiration from Object-Centric Learning (OCL) and propose InfoGeo, an information-theoretic framework designed to enhance robustness and generalization. InfoGeo reformulates the optimization as an information bottleneck process with two core objectives: (i) maximizing view-invariant information by aligning the object-centric structural relations across views, and (ii) minimizing view-specific noisy signals through cross-view knowledge constraints. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and challenging scenarios demonstrate that InfoGeo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出信息论框架InfoGeo，通过物体中心学习提升无人机跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性与泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有跨视角地理定位方法依赖全局特征对齐，在无人机场景下因视角广、物体密集导致视觉杂乱，且受区域纹理和天气变化影响，域偏移严重。
analysis.problem: 无人机跨视角地理定位中，因视角差异和视觉杂乱导致的域偏移和泛化性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无人机视角下密集细粒度物体造成视觉杂乱，现有全局对齐方法难以处理域偏移。
analysis.method: 基于信息瓶颈的物体中心学习框架，最大化跨视角不变信息（对齐物体中心结构关系）并最小化视角特定噪声（通过跨视角知识约束）。
contributions: 提出InfoGeo，首个将物体中心学习与信息论结合用于跨视角地理定位的框架。
通过信息瓶颈目标同时增强视图不变性和抑制噪声，显著提升鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和挑战场景下，InfoGeo显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖物体检测或分割的准确性。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息论框架InfoGeo，通过物体中心学习提升无人机跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性与泛化性。

papers.title: Query-efficient model evaluation using cached responses
papers.abstract: Evaluating a new model on an existing benchmark is often necessary to understand its behavior before deployment. For modern evaluation frameworks, generating and evaluating a response for all queries can be prohibitively expensive. In practice, responses from previously-evaluated models are often cached -- creating a potential opportunity to use this additional information to decrease the number of queries required to accurately evaluate a new model. In this paper, we introduce an approach for predicting benchmark performance that leverages cached model responses based on the Data Kernel Perspective Space (DKPS), a method for quantifying the relationship between models in the black-box setting. Theoretically, we show that DKPS-based methods are query-efficient under certain conditions. Empirically, we demonstrate that DKPS-based methods achieve the same mean absolute error as baselines with a substantially decreased query budget. We conclude by proposing an offline method for selecting a set of queries that maximizes the goodness-of-fit on reference models, improving prediction accuracy over random query selection.

analysis.tldr: 利用缓存模型响应，通过数据核视角空间（DKPS）方法高效预测新模型在基准上的性能，大幅减少查询次数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代模型评估框架中，对所有查询生成并评估响应成本高昂，而实践中常缓存已评估模型的响应，但未充分利用这些缓存信息来减少新模型评估的查询量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用缓存模型响应，以更少的查询次数准确预测新模型在基准上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于数据核视角空间（DKPS）的方法，利用缓存模型响应预测新模型性能；并提出了离线查询选择方法，最大化参考模型的拟合优度。
contributions: 提出DKPS方法，利用缓存响应高效预测新模型性能。
理论上证明DKPS方法在特定条件下具有查询效率。
提出离线查询选择策略，提升预测准确性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，DKPS方法在显著降低查询预算的情况下，达到与基线相同的平均绝对误差。
limitations: 方法依赖缓存模型响应的可用性和质量。
理论保证仅在特定条件下成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用缓存模型响应，通过数据核视角空间（DKPS）方法高效预测新模型在基准上的性能，大幅减少查询次数。

papers.title: The Translation Tax Is Not a Scalar: A Counterfactual Audit of English-Source Cue Inheritance in Chinese Multilingual Benchmarks
